Joshua19:5 Ziklagi, Beth-Markabothi, Hasarsusa," 
1Chronicles4:31 Beth-Markabothi, Hasar-Susimu, Beth-Biri, Shaar-Aimu." 
Matthew1:1 Kunini kitaaba maqa worra Yeso Kristoni keesaa d'alate. Yeso Kristoni d'aloota Daudi, Daudini d'aloota Abrahamu." 
Matthew1:2 Abrahamuuni abba Isaaqo; Isaaqoni abba Yakobo; Yakoboni abba Yudafi oboleyaani isaa. 
Matthew1:3 Yudani abba Peresifi Zera (haati isaani Tamari); Peresini abba Esromu; Esromuni abba Aramu; 
Matthew1:4 Aramuni abba Aminadabu; Aminadabuni abba Nashoni; Nashonini abba Salmoni; 
Matthew1:5 Salmonini abba Boazi (haati isaa Rahabu); Boazini abba Obedi (haati isaa Ruthi); Obedini abba Yese; 
Matthew1:6 Yeseni abba hayyu Daudi. Daudini abba Solomoni (haati isaa duri niiti Uriati); 
Matthew1:7 Solomoni abba Rehoboamu; Rehoboamuni abba Abiya; Abiyani abba Asa; 
Matthew1:8 Asani abba Yehoshefathi; Yehoshefathini abba Yoramu; Yoramuni abba Uzia; 
Matthew1:9 Uziani abba Yothamu; Yothamuni abba Ahazi; Ahazini abba Hezekia; 
Matthew1:10 Hezekiani abba Manase; Manaseni abba Amoni; Amonini abba Yosia; 
Matthew1:11 Yosiani abba Yekoniafi oboleyaani isaa, jari kunini eegi worra Israeli boojiani lafa Babiloni geesani d'alate." 
Matthew1:12 Eegi gosa Israeli boojiani lafa Babiloni geesani: Yekoniani abba Shealtieli; Shealtielini abba Zerubabeli; 
Matthew1:13 Zerubabelini abba Abihudi; Abihudini abba Eliakimu; Eliakimuni abba Azori; 
Matthew1:14 Azorini abba Sadoki; Sadokini abba Akimu, Akimuni abba Eliudi;" 
Matthew1:15 Eliudini abba Eleazari; Eleazarini abba Matani; Matanini abba Yakobo; 
Matthew1:16 Yakoboni abba Yusufu, d'iirsa Mariamu, ta Yeso ka Kristo jed'ani d'alte." 
Matthew1:17 Duuba akanaani Abrahamufi Daudi jiddu d'aloota kud'ani afuriti jira ammalle kud'ani afuri d'ibiti Daudifi ganna gosa Israeli boojiani lafa Babiloni geesani jiddu jira, akasuma ammalle d'aloota kud'ani afuriti gaafasifi d'aloota Kristo jiddu jira." 
Matthew1:18 D'alooti Yeso Kristo akana tahe. Gaafa Yusufuni haad'a isaa Mariamu kad'ate, ato worri d'iirsafi niiti intahiini, isi Lubbu Qulqullooni garaachoofte argani." 
Matthew1:19 Yusufuni, nami isi kad'atu suni, nama dansa, isi ch'eersu imfeene, ammo d'ossaani lakisu fed'e." 
Matthew1:20 Ato inni waan kana heregu, malaikaani Aabbo oobjuuni isati mullatte waan jetteeni, Yusufu, ilma Daudi, Mariamu fuud'u insodaatini. Garaachi isiini qabdu kunini ka Lubbu Qulqulloti." 
Matthew1:21 Isiini ilma deeti, duuba atini maqa isaa Yeso baasi, wonti akanatiifi inni gumi ufi ch'ufa daba keesa baasa." 
Matthew1:22 Wonti kunini ch'ufti aka wonti Aabbooni afaani raagatiini dubbate guutamtufi taate: 
Matthew1:23 Ilaala, intalti dubra garaachoofte ilma deeti. Maqa isa Imanueli baasani. Akasi jechaani Waaqi nu woliini jira jechu." 
Matthew1:24 Yusufuni hiriiba keesaa kaanaani waan malaikaani Aabbo jetteeni tolche, Mariamu fuud'e." 
Matthew1:25 Ammo haga isiini ilma deetuti niiti intolfanne. Jennaani Yusufuni maqa isaa Yeso baase. 
Matthew2:1 Gaafa Herodeni hayyu Yahudi, Yesoni dira Bethlehemu ka lafa Yahudi keesati d'alate. Hojuma suni ato inturinu jari waan urji beekhu toko gara ilaboruti Yerusalemu d'ufe, waan jed'e, Daimi hayyu Yahudi tahu ka d'alate me? Urji, isaa ilaboruti agarre isa guddisu d'umne." 
Matthew2:2  
Matthew2:3 Waan kana d'ageennaani, Herodefi nami Yerusalemu ch'ufti rifate." 
Matthew2:4 Inni qaalole gugurdofi jara Seera beekhu wolti yaame fulla Kristoni sila iti d'alatu gaafate. 
Matthew2:5 Worri waan jed'eeni, Dira Bethlehemu ka lafa Yuda keesa jiru. Wonti akanatiifi raagi t'aafe waan jed'e," 
Matthew2:6 Ee Bethlehemu, ta lafa Yuda keesa, atini maand'aniti hayyoota Yuda keesa; si keesaa nama gosa tiyya Israeli fiduti baha." 
Matthew2:7 Jennaani Herodeni jara ilaboruti d'ufe kaani d'ossaani wolti yaame, hojja urjiini mullate iraa hubate." 
Matthew2:8 Gara Bethlehemu worra erge waan jed'eeni, Beena, gurba aka dansaa barbaada, yo agartani qonqo nati erga, aka anileeni d'aqe isa guddisu." 
Matthew2:9 Hayyuuni woldubbatani jennaani kaani kara qabatani, urjiini worri ilaboruti arge taani worra dura deemte, fulla gurbaani jiru gubbati ejatte." 
Matthew2:10 Urji arginaani guddo gammadani qilit'amani! 
Matthew2:11 Mana seenani gurbafi Mariamu haad'a isaa argani, isa durati jigani isa guddisani. Subba ufi banani worqifi hit'anafi qayya kennanifi." 
Matthew2:12 Oobju keesa Waaqi, Herodeti indachaiina worraani jennaani kaani, kara d'ibiini lafa ufiti galani." 
Matthew2:13 Eegi worri yae, malaikaani Aabbo oobjuuni Yusufuti d'ufte waan jetteeni, Kai, gurbafi haad'a fuud'i, lafa Misiri d'aqi, haga anini siti himuti achuma tai. Herodeni gurba barbaade ijeesu fed'a jette." 
Matthew2:14 Jennaani Yusufuni kae gurbafi haad'a isaa halkaniini fuud'e lafa Misiriti baqate, haga Herodeni dueti achi tae." 
Matthew2:15 Wonti kunini aka dubbini Aabbooni afaani raagatiini duri fage, ta anini lafa Misiri keesa yayu ilma kiyya yaame jettu guutamtufi taate." 
Matthew2:16 Herodeni aka jari ilaboru d'ufe kaani isa sobe arginaani guddo dalane, nama erge ijoolle d'iira ta Bethlehemu keesa jirtuufi ta reera suni keesaa, ta ganna lama asi fit'a jed'e, aka ganna jara mirga d'ufe iraa hubate gula." 
Matthew2:17 Duuba akanaani wonti raagi Yeremiani jed'e guutamte: 
Matthew2:18 Qonqo Rama keesati d'agayani, ta laalafi boa guddo. Rahelini ilmaani ufiiti boote, iraa hafu dad'abde, waan isiini ch'ufa raawatteefi." 
Matthew2:19 Eegi Herodeni due, malaikaani Aabbo lafa Misiri keesati oobjuuni Yusufuti mullatte" 
Matthew2:20 waan jetteeni, Kai, gurbafi haad'a fuud'i, lafa Israeliti gali; worri gurba ijeesu fed'e namu ya due." 
Matthew2:21 Jennaani Yusufuni kae gurbafi haad'a fuud'e lafa Israeliti gale. 
Matthew2:22 Ammo Yusufuni aka Arkeloni fulla abba ufi Herode lafa Yudea fidu d'ageennaani achi d'aqu sodaate. Oobjuuni iti himnaani gara lafa Galilaya gore," 
Matthew2:23 deeme dira Nazareti jed'aniti qubate, aka wonti duri raagooti jette guutamtu, ta isaani nama Nazarayo jed'ani jettu." 
Matthew3:1 Bara suni Yohanani nama batisu lafa aloo ta Yudea d'ufe nama barsiise waan jed'e. 
Matthew3:2 Daba iraa deebia, Finni gubba ya, d'iaate." 
Matthew3:3 Raagi Isayani waan Yohana dubbate waan jed'e, Qonqooni nama lafa aloo keesa iyu: Kara Aabbo kurfeesaa, daandi isaa qajeelchaa jetti." 
Matthew3:4 Yohanani woya rifeensa gaala uyifate, gurda goga hid'ate, awaanisafi damma nyaate." 
Matthew3:5 Nama Yerusalemu jiruufi ka Yudeatiifi ka arda Yordani ch'ufti gara Yohana yae. 
Matthew3:6 Worri daba ufi himannaani inni galaana Yordani keesati worra batise. 
Matthew3:7 Farisayoofi Sadukayoni hedduuni aada batiso fed'achu d'umnaani, Yohanani waan worraani jed'e, Isani ilmaani bofaati, eentu dalansu hegeri duraa baqad'a isaniini jed'e?" 
Matthew3:8 Mid'aani daba iraa deebianiini baasa. 
Matthew3:9 Abbaani keenna Abrahamu ufiini injed'ina, wonti akanatiifi Waaqi d'akhaaye tana keesa ilmaani Abrahamu yaasu dandaa." 
Matthew3:10 D'agara yayu hidda mukha jala kayani; mukha mid'aani dansa imbaamne ch'ufa muraniti ibida keesa buusani. 
Matthew3:11 Anini bisaaniini isani batisa, aka akasiini isani daba iraa deebiti garsiiftani; ammo nami faana tiyya d'ufu nara jaba; seemsa kope isaa anini qabachu himmalle. Inni Lubbu Qulqullofi ibidaani isani batisa." 
Matthew3:12 Hafareeni isaa harka isaa keesa jirti. Oobdi ufi inqulqulleesa, dargaye wolti qabe khod'oti naqa, ammo qola ibida haga jiru ind'aamneti naqa." 
Matthew3:13 Jennaani Yesoni Galilaya bahe, Yordani d'ufe, gara Yohana d'aqe aka Yohanani isa batisu." 
Matthew3:14 Ammo Yohanani isa d'owu fed'e waan jed'e, Atini na batisu malte, akami gara kiyya d'ufte, Na batisi naani jetta?" 
Matthew3:15 Ammo Yesoni waan jed'eeni, Amma ha taatu, kara kanaani waan Waaqi fed'u ch'ufa guunna. Jennaani Yohanani ee jed'eeni." 
Matthew3:16 Eegi Yesoni batiso argate, hojuma suni bisaani keesaa baanaani, gubbaani banamte, Lubbu Waaqa ta bifa sabaliisa qabdu, ta isa ira teetu arge." 
Matthew3:17 Qonqooni gubba baate waan jette, Kunini Ilma kiyya ka anini jaalad'u, inni guddo na gammachiisa." 
Matthew4:1 Jennaani Lubbuuni Yeso lafa aloo geesite, aka Sheet'ani ilaalatu." 
Matthew4:2 Guyya afurtamatifi halkani afurtama sagale male tae, jennaani beelae." 
Matthew4:3 Sheet'ani d'ufe waan jed'eeni, Yo atini Ilma Waaqa taate, d'akha kanaani, Qit'a tahi jed'i." 
Matthew4:4 Ammo Yesoni waan jed'eeni, T'aafiini waan jettu, Nami qit'a ch'allaani injiraatu, ammo dubbi afaani Waaqa keesaa baate ch'ufaani jiraata." 
Matthew4:5 Jennaani Sheet'ani Dira Qulqullo isa geese, fiit'e Mana Waaqa gubba isa kaye," 
Matthew4:6 waan jed'eeni, Yo atini Ilma Waaqa taate, arma ufi gadi d'iisi, wonti akanatiifi t'aafiini waan jettu, Inni malaika ufi sii baasa, isiini harka isitiini oli si qabdi, aka d'akhaani miila kanke ind'oomne." 
Matthew4:7 Yesoni waan jed'eeni, Ammalle t'aafiini waan jettu, Aabbo Waaqa kanke inilaalatiini." 
Matthew4:8 Ammalle Sheet'ani gaara gudda toko isa korsiise, guddinna lafa ch'ufaafi dansooma isii agarsiise." 
Matthew4:9 Duuba waan jed'eeni, Waan kana ch'ufa anini sii kenna, yo atini gadi jette na guddifte." 
Matthew4:10 Jennaani Yesoni waan jed'eeni, na biraa deemi, Sheet'ana t'aafiini waan jettu Aabbo Waaqa kanke ch'alla guddisi isuma ch'alla hojad'u!" 
Matthew4:11 Jennaani Sheet'ani isa lakise, malaikaani d'ufte isa qarqaarte." 
Matthew4:12 Aka Yohana qabani d'ageennaani Yesoni Galilayati deebie. 
Matthew4:13 Nazareti bahe d'aqe Kapernaumu tae, d'aatu galaana, lafa Zabulonifi Naftali keesa," 
Matthew4:14 aka wonti raagi Isayani jed'e guutamtu ta," 
Matthew4:15 Lafa Zabulonifi lafa Naftali, gara galaana, moga Yordani, Galilaya ta gosa d'ibi!" 
Matthew4:16 Nami dukana keesa tau yayu ifsa gudda arge worra ardaafi gandidu duisa keesa tatau ifsaani yayu iti mullate jettu. 
Matthew4:17 Haga guyya suniti Yesoni odu dansa odeese waan jed'e, Daba iraa deebia, Finni gubba ya d'iaate." 
Matthew4:18 Ato Yesoni d'aatu galaana Galilaya deemu, oboleyaani lama, Simoni ka Petro jed'aniifi Andarea oboleesa isaa, ka t'urura qurt'umi galaana keesa darbani arge; worri guurtu qurt'umiiti." 
Matthew4:19 Inni waan worraani jed'e, Na gula koota, anini guurtu nama isani tolcha." 
Matthew4:20 Hojuma suni t'urura lakisani isa gula yaani. 
Matthew4:21 Yesoni arti deemnaani oboleyaani lama, Yakobofi Yohana ilmaani Zebedayo, hobolo keesa abba isaani Zebedayo woliini tataani arge, yaame;" 
Matthew4:22 jennaani worri hojuma suni hoboloofi abba ufi lakise isa gula yae. 
Matthew4:23 Yesoni Galilaya ch'ufa keesa dedeeme Maneeni Waaqa iti kad'atani keesati nama barsiise, Odu Dansa ta Finna odeese, d'ukubafi miid'ama gosa ch'ufa nama fayyise." 
Matthew4:24 Tanaafi gurri isaa lafa Shamu ch'ufa gahe, nama d'ukuba qabuufi ka fayyad'abaani gaargale, ka jinni qabu, ka gagabdufa, ka naafatele isatiini d'ufani, inni worra ch'ufa fayyise." 
Matthew4:25 Gumiini guddooni ta Galilayatiifi ta dira kud'ani, ta Yerusalemutiifi lafa Yahuditiifi ta d'aatu Yordani keesa ch'ufti isa gula yaate." 
Matthew5:1 Yesoni gumi arginaani gaara kore gubba tae. Jennaani jari isaa gara isaa d'ufe," 
Matthew5:2 inni worra barsiise waan jed'e," 
Matthew5:3 Ayyaana worra aka garaa keesa hiyyeeyi ufi beekhu: Finni Waaqa ka worraati! 
Matthew5:4 Ayyaana worra lalefatu: Waaqi garaa worra jabeesa! 
Matthew5:5 Ayyaana worra ufi diqeesu: lafa ch'ufa d'aalani! 
Matthew5:6 Ayyaana worra d'ugaa jed'e beelae d'eebotu: worra akana kana inquufsani! 
Matthew5:7 Ayyaana worra naasu qabu: worra kana inahani! 
Matthew5:8 Ayyaana worra garaa qulqullo qabu: Waaqa inargani! 
Matthew5:9 Ayyaana worra nagaya tolchu: ilmaani Waaqa jed'aniini! 
Matthew5:10 Ayyaana worra d'ugaafi gaargalchani: Finni gubbaa ka worraati! 
Matthew5:11 Ayyaana keesani hojja beeni isani arabse gaargalche, maro tiyyaafi d'araani isani himate waan hamtu ch'ufa isaniini jed'u." 
Matthew5:12 Hojja suni gammada, qilit'ama, gatiini teesani ta gubba jirtu waan guddo. Akuma kana raagoota duri gaargalchani." 
Matthew5:13 Isani soodda lafaati. Ammo yo sooddi bushae, maaniini kura iti deebisani? Waan tokole himmalle, yo alati gagatani miilaani ira ejaanjatani male." 
Matthew5:14 Isani ifsa lafaati. Diri gaara gubba jiru indaatu. 
Matthew5:15 Ifsa bobeesani qori iti ingombisani, ammo olfannisani, aka nami mana keesa jiru ch'ufti argu." 
Matthew5:16 Akasuma ifsaani keesani ha nama durati ifsu, aka hujiini teesani dansaani mullatte Abba keesani ka gubba jiru guddisani." 
Matthew5:17 Waan anini barsiisa Seeratiifi ta raaga balleesu d'ufe insehiina. Anini aka balleesu ind'umne, ammo aka qit'eesu d'ufe." 
Matthew5:18 D'uguma, waan anini isaniini jed'u, Haga lafafi gubbaani dabartuti ch'obi Seera tokoleeni indabru haga seeri ch'ufti guutamuti." 
Matthew5:19 Tanaafi nami seera didaqa kana toko ch'abse ammalle akasuma namale barsiise, Finna gubbaa keesati maand'a taha. Ammo nami Seera guute akasuma namale barsiise, Finna gubbaa keesati angafa taha." 
Matthew5:20 Waan anini isaniini jed'u, Yo d'ugaani teesani ta jara Seera beekhufi Farisayo ira injirre, dandeetani Finna gubba inargattani." 
Matthew5:21 Yayu d'ageettani aka worra duritiini, Nama inijeesiina; nami nama ijeesu ch'ufti qorsuma male jed'ani." 
Matthew5:22 Ammo waan anini amma isaniini jed'u, Nami oboleesa ufiti dalanu qorsuma argachu male. Nama oboleesa ufi arabsu kora iti baasu malani; ammalle nama oboleesa ufi tuffate, Daalle daba jed'uuni, ibida keesa buusu malani." 
Matthew5:23 Tanaafi yo aka galata kanke Waaqa baaftu, fulla sorio iti qalani d'ufte, ka aka oboleesi kanke si inquumne qaabatte, fulla sorioti kai," 
Matthew5:24 waan galata baaftu lakisi deemi, qaraa fiit'e oboleesa kanke araarama kad'ad'u, eege deebii galata kanke baasi." 
Matthew5:25 Yo nami si himate koraa si yaamani, hurrisi wold'aqa yokhaani inni jaarole si kenne, jaaroleleeni askartiti si kennite, askartileeni mana hid'aansa keesa si buufti." 
Matthew5:26 D'uguma, waan anini siini jed'u, hid'aansa keesaa imbaatu haga beese ch'ufa baaftuuti." 
Matthew5:27 Duri, ya d'ageettani, waan jed'ani, d'iirafi nad'eeni wolbarate gaarayu woliini intolfatini." 
Matthew5:28 Ammo waan anini isaniini jed'u, Nami d'araani nad'eeni millatu yayu garaa ufi keesati waan hamtu tolche." 
Matthew5:29 Yo ilti tante mirgitiini si wollaalchifte, ufi keesaa baasi, gati! Yo atini ila toko d'abde ira sii jirtii, fulla nafa kanke ch'ufa ibida keesa buusani." 
Matthew5:30 Ammalle yo harki kanke mirgichi si wollaalchise, ufira kuti, gati! Yo atini harka toko d'abde ira sii jirti, fulla nafa kanke ch'ufa ibida keesa buusani." 
Matthew5:31 Ammalle duri waan jed'ani, Nami niiti ufi lakisu fed'u ha tatabe lakisaniini kutufi." 
Matthew5:32 Ammo waan anini isaniini jed'u, Nami niiti ufi ta d'iira d'ibi imbaranne lakise ya daba keesa isi seensise; nami isi fuud'uleeni daba tolcha." 
Matthew5:33 Ammalle, ya d'ageettani aka worra duritiini, D'araani inkakhatiini, ammalle kakhu tante Waaqa durati guuti jed'ani." 
Matthew5:34 Ammo waan anini isaniini jed'u, Diqole inkakhatina, gubbaleeni; wonti akanatiifi isiini barch'uma Waaqati;" 
Matthew5:35 yokhaani lafaleeni; isiini fulla Waaqi miila keyatu; yokhaani Yerusalemuleeni, isiini dira Hayyu Guddaati." 
Matthew5:36 Ammalle mata kankeleeni inkakhatiini; wonti akanatiifi rifeensa kanke tokole dandeete inadeesitu, yokhaani inguraateesitu." 
Matthew5:37 Wonti isani jettani ch'ufti ha Eetiifi Hiyyo ch'allaa taatu, ta tana ira Sheet'ana keesaa baati." 
Matthew5:38 Duri, ya d'ageettani, waan jed'ani, Nama ila nama basse, ila isaale ha bassani; ka ilkaani nama ch'abse, ka isaale ha ch'absani jed'ani." 
Matthew5:39 Ammo waan anini isaniini jed'u, nama waan hamtu isani tolchu haalo infuud'iina. Yo boqo mirgiti si d'abanaasani bitatile iti garagalfad'u." 
Matthew5:40 Ammalle yo nami toko si himate ubaara kanke siraa baafate, kootile baafad'ufi." 
Matthew5:41 Ammalle yo nami si dabse irreeni haga gabaaba si deemsise haga fago gula deemi. 
Matthew5:42 Nama wo si kad'atu kenni; ka wo liqefatu ind'owatiini. 
Matthew5:43 Duri, ya d'ageettani, waan jed'ani, Oboleesa kanke jaalad'u, nyaapa kanke jibbi." 
Matthew5:44 Ammo waan anini isaniini jed'u, Nyaapa keesani jaalad'a, nama isani gaargalchu Waaqa kad'ad'a," 
Matthew5:45 aka isani ilmaani Abba keesani ka gubba jiru taatani. Inni adu nama hamamafi dadansale baase, bokayale nama d'ugatiifi nama d'arale rooba." 
Matthew5:46 Yo nama isani jaalatu ch'alla jaalattani, gati maani Waaqa ira argattani? Worri damoosa guuruleeni akasuma tolchaniti?" 
Matthew5:47 Yo oboleyaani teesani ch'alla nagaya fuutani, nama d'ibi maaniini ira jirtani? Worri Waaqa imbeenneleeni akasuma tolchaniti?" 
Matthew5:48 Isani qit'e tahu maltani, akuma abbaani keesani ka gubba qit'e." 
Matthew6:1 Eegad'a aka huji teesani dansa nama durati intolchine aka nami argu. Yo akasi tolchitani Abba keesani ka gubba jiru galata ira inargattani. 
Matthew6:2 Tanaafi yo hiyyeesa qarqaartu, magalata ufi durati ind'aiini, aka nami kiyyibaani Maneeni Waaqa iti kad'ataniifi kara keesati tolchu, aka nami sila worra guddisu. D'uguma waan anini isaniini jed'u, Worri suni gati ufi ya argate." 
Matthew6:3 Ammo yo hiyyeesa qarqaartu harki bitaachi waan harki mirgichi tolchu imbeekhiini," 
Matthew6:4 aka qarqaarsi kanke waan d'ossa tahu, duuba Abbaani kanke ka waan atini d'ossaani tolchitu argu galata si baasa." 
Matthew6:5 Yo Waaqa kad'attani, aka nama kiyyibu intahiina! Wonti akanatiifi worri Maneeni Waaqa iti kad'atani keesafi d'aatu kara ejaanjani kad'achu fed'ani, aka nami worra argu. D'uguma, waan anini isaniini jed'u, Worri suni gati ufi ya argate." 
Matthew6:6 Ammo atini yo Waaqa kad'attu mana kanke keesa seeni, balbala ch'ufi Abbaani kanke ka waan atini d'ossani tolchitu argu galata sii baasa." 
Matthew6:7 Kad'acha keesati dubbi woma imbaane ind'eeresiina, aka worri Waaqa imbeenne tolchu; worri waan maro dubbi heddutiifi kad'acha d'agayaniifi seha." 
Matthew6:8 Aka worra intahiina; Abbaani keesani ato isani woma injed'ini waan isani feetani ch'ufa beekha. 
Matthew6:9 Aki kad'atani akana: Aabbo keenna ka gubba jirtu, maqa kanke qulqullo ha guddisani;" 
Matthew6:10 Finni kanke ha d'ufu, fed'i tante lafati ha guutani aka gubbaa guutani." 
Matthew6:11 Liqimsa teenna ta arra nuu kenni; 
Matthew6:12 ch'ubbu teenna nuu araarami, akuma nuleeni nama nuti ch'ubbame araaramnu." 
Matthew6:13 Ilaalacha nutiini ind'ufiini, ammo waan hamtu nuraa d'owi." 
Matthew6:14 Wonti akanatiifi yo isani wollaala namaa araaramtani, Abbaani keesani ka gubbaleeni isani araarama." 
Matthew6:15 Ammo yo isani wollaala namaa inaraaramne, Abbaani keesanileeni wollaala isanii inaraaramu." 
Matthew6:16 Yo Waaqa kad'achaafi agabdani, fuula iyakatiina, aka worra kiyyiba. Worri fuula yakata, aka agabu worraa nami argu. D'uguma, waan anini isaniini jed'u, Worri suni gati ufi ya argate." 
Matthew6:17 Ammo yo agabdu, fuula d'iqad'u, mata filad'u," 
Matthew6:18 aka nami agabu tante inagarre; ammo Abba kanke ka d'ossa jiru ch'allati arga. Abbaani kanke ka waan d'ossani argu galata sii baasa. 
Matthew6:19 Hori keesani lafa inkeyatina, fulla bilaachafi dandiini nyaattu, yokhaani fulla hattuuni ch'absite hattufi." 
Matthew6:20 Ammo hori keesani gubba keyad'a, fulla bilaachafi dandiini inyaanne yokhaani hattuuni ch'absite inhanne." 
Matthew6:21 Fulla horiini keesani jiru, garaani keesanileeni jira." 
Matthew6:22 Ilti ifsa nafaati. Yo ilti tante dansaa taate, nafi kanke ch'ufti ifsa qaba." 
Matthew6:23 Ammo yo ilti tante dansaa intahiini, nafi kanke ch'ufti indukanaa. Tanaafi yo ifsaani si keesa jiru dukanae, dukanti inguddatti." 
Matthew6:24 Nami tokoleeni dandae abbooti lama inhojatu: toko jibbeti kaani jaalata, yokhaani tokooni wold'aqani kaani tuffata. Waaqafi hori hojachu indandeetani." 
Matthew6:25 Tanaafi anini isaniti hima, Jireenna yokhaani nyaata d'ugaati, yokhaani waan nafaati uyifatani ind'ind'insiina. Jireenni liqimsa ira injiru: Yokhaani nafi woya ira injiru:" 
Matthew6:26 Simpirre ilaala; mid'aani imfach'aaftu, imurtu, yokhaani khod'oti ingalchitu; ammo Abbaani keesani ka gubba jiru isile nyaachisa, isani simpirre ira injirtani?" 
Matthew6:27 Eentu isani keesa, ato d'ind'insele, dandae d'und'uma toko d'eerinna ufiti dara?" 
Matthew6:28 Maafi waan uyifattani d'ind'insitani? Aka daraaraani oobru bahu herega; inni inhojatu yokhaani woya ind'aatu. 
Matthew6:29 Ammo waan anini isaniini jed'u, Solomonileeni guddinna ufi keesati woya aka daraara mid'aadu inuyifanne." 
Matthew6:30 Yo Waaqi buuyo arra jirtu ta bori ibidati gatani akana uyise, inni hagasi ira isani inuyisu? D'ugefachaani teesani waan diqoo!" 
Matthew6:31 Tanaafi d'ind'insitani, Maani nyaanna yokhaani maani d'unna yokhaani maani uyifanna: injed'ina." 
Matthew6:32 Worri Waaqa imbeenne waan kana ch'ufa barbaada. Abbaani keesani ka gubba jiru aka isani waan kana ch'ufa feetani imbeekha. 
Matthew6:33 Ammo qaraa fiit'e Finnafi d'uga isaa barbaada, duuba wonti kunini ch'ufti teesani taati." 
Matthew6:34 Tanaafi waan bori ind'ind'insiina, waan bori, ha borumani ufi d'ind'insituti. Guyyaani ch'ufti gaargala ufi qaba." 
Matthew7:1 Waan nama inqorina, aka namileeni waan keesani inqorre;" 
Matthew7:2 qorsuma isani namaani qortani isanile qorani; ammalle kiila isani biimitaniini isanile biimani. 
Matthew7:3 Atini maafi filida ila oboleesa keti keesa jiru argita ammo jirma ila tante keesa jiru inargine? 
Matthew7:4 Yokhaani akami dandeete oboleesa keetiini, Filida ila keesaa si fuud'a jetta, ka ila tante keesa jirmi jiru?" 
Matthew7:5 Kiyyiba! Qaraa fiit'e jirma ila tante keesaa fuud'i, duuba aka dansaa lafa agarta, aka ila oboleesa keti keesaa filida fuutu." 
Matthew7:6 Waan qulqullo saree inkennani; ammalle booyye dura dooqa imbuusina, aka isiini miilaani ira ejaanjatte isaniti garagalte isani inyaanne." 
Matthew7:7 Kad'ad'a, isanii kennani; barbaada, inargitani; balbala d'ad'aa, isani duraa banani." 
Matthew7:8 Nami wo kad'atu inargata, nami barbaadu inarga, ammalle nama balbala d'ad'au imbananiifi." 
Matthew7:9 Eentu yo ilmi isaa qit'a kad'ate d'akha kennaafi? 
Matthew7:10 Yokhaani yo inni qurt'umi kad'ate bofa kennaafi? 
Matthew7:11 Yo isanu ka hameenna qabdani, waan dansa ilmaani teesani kennu beetani, Abbaani keesani hagasi ira waan dansa worra isa kad'atu kenna!" 
Matthew7:12 Akuma aka nami waan dansa isani tolchu feetani, akasuma namale tolcha; tunini dubbi Seeratiifi ta raaga." 
Matthew7:13 Balbala d'ipooni olseena. Balbala ballofi karaani laafaani gara badi nama geesa, nami achi deemuleeni heddu." 
Matthew7:14 Balbala d'ipofi karaani jabaani jireennati nama geesa, nami argatuleeni diqa." 
Matthew7:15 Raagoota d'ara eegad'a, ta bifa jijiratte isaniti d'uftu, ammo keesi worraa aka yai jira." 
Matthew7:16 Mid'aani worraatiini worra beetani. Mid'aani zabibu qoraati iraa guurani? Yokhaani d'eeka mogorre iraa guurani: 
Matthew7:17 Mukhi dansaani ch'ufti mid'aani dansa baasa, ammo mukhi hamaani mid'aani hamo baasa." 
Matthew7:18 Mukhi dansaani mid'aani hamo dandae imbaasu; mukhi hamaleeni mid'aani dansa dandae imbaasu. 
Matthew7:19 Mukha mid'aani dansa imbaamne ch'ufa muraniti ibida keesa buusani. 
Matthew7:20 Tanaafi mid'aani worraatiini worra beetani. 
Matthew7:21 Nami Aabbo, Aabbo, naani jed'u ch'ufti Finna gubba inargattu, ammo nama fed'i Abba kiyya ka gubba jiru guutu ch'allati argata." 
Matthew7:22 Guyya suni nami hedduuni, Nu maqa keetiini fanne, maqa keetiini jinni baamne, ammalle maqa keetiini waan mama heddu tolchine jed'a." 
Matthew7:23 Jennaani anini diideese worrati hima, anini fuula isani imbeekhu; na biraa fagaad'a, isani nama dabaati." 
Matthew7:24 Duuba, nami dubbi tiyya tana d'agaye guutu nama qalbi qabu fakaata, ka d'akha gubbati mana ijaare." 
Matthew7:25 Bokeeni roobe, guddo lolaase, bubbeeni bubbifte mana suni d'oofte. Ammo mani jigu dide, maro yayabi d'akha gubba jiruufi." 
Matthew7:26 Nami dubbi tiyya tana d'agaye inguunne nama daalle ka mana maansa irati ijaare fakaata. 
Matthew7:27 Bokeeni roobe, guddo lolaase, bubbeeni bubbifte mana kaani d'oofte, mani jige. Jigisi mana suni waan gudda!" 
Matthew7:28 Yesoni dubbi tana barsiimnaani, nami ch'ufti guddo waan barsiisa isaa mame." 
Matthew7:29 Inni aka jara Seera beekhu nama imbarsiimne, ammo aka nama jabeenna qabu barsiise." 
Matthew8:1 Yesoni gaara iraa gadi buunaani, gumiini guddooni isa gula yaate." 
Matthew8:2 Namichi qomaat'a qabu toko isati d'ufe, durati jilbifate waan jed'eeni, Aabbo, atini yo feete na fayyisu dandeeta." 
Matthew8:3 Yesoni harka diriirfate, isa tuqe waan jed'eeni, Imfed'a, fayyi. Inni maro tokotu d'ukuba suni fayye." 
Matthew8:4 Jennaani Yesoni waan jed'eeni, Ch'aqasi! Waan tokole namaani injed'ini, ammo d'aqi, qaallicha ufi agarsiisi, sorio Musani mure baasi, aka nami ch'ufti aka atini fayyite argu." 
Matthew8:5 Yesoni Kapernaumu seennaani, shumichi gosa Rumi toko gara isaa d'ufe, qarqaarsa kad'ate." 
Matthew8:6 Waan jed'eeni, Aabbo garbichi kiyya guddo fayyaniti mana keesa ch'iisee garagalu jira, chochoule indandau." 
Matthew8:7 Yesoni waan jed'eeni, Anini d'ufe isa fayyisa." 
Matthew8:8 Shumichi waan jed'eeni, Atini mana kiyya seenu himmalle, ammo afaanumaani jed'i, garbichi kiyya imfaya." 
Matthew8:9 Anini nama jala hojad'a, askartileeni na jala jirti; yo anini nama tokooni. Deemi jed'u, indeema; yo ka d'ibiini, Kooti jed'u, ind'ufa. Ammalle yo anini tisse tiyyaani, Waan kana tolchi jed'u, intolcha." 
Matthew8:10 Yesoni waan kana d'ageennaani mame, worra isa gula yauni waan jed'e, D'uguma, waan anini isaniini jed'u, d'ugefacha akana tana anini taka Israeli keesaleti ingarre." 
Matthew8:11 Me ilaala, nami hedduuni mirga bitaa d'ufe Abrahamufi Isaaqofi Yakobo woliini Finna gubba keesa taani." 
Matthew8:12 Ammo nami Finna suni iti d'alate dukana ala keesa buusani, achiti nami bohe ilkaani qara." 
Matthew8:13 Yesoni waan shumichaani jed'e, Beeni, wonti atini d'ugefatte suni sii tahinna. Jennaani garbichi hojuma suni fayye." 
Matthew8:14 Yesoni mana Petro seennaani, jaarti soda isaa ta qanno qabdu arge." 
Matthew8:15 Harka isii tuqe, jennaani qannooni isi lakifte, isiini kaate worra gololchite." 
Matthew8:16 Galgala suni nama heddu ka jinni qabu Yesotiini d'ufani duuba inni jecha tokooni jinni baase, nama d'ukuba qabule ch'ufa fayyise." 
Matthew8:17 Wonti kunini aka fagiisi raagi Isayani jed'e guutamu agarsiifti: Inni d'ukuba keenna fud'ate, fayyad'aba keennale baate." 
Matthew8:18 Yesoni gumi isa marsitu arginaani aka gama galaana kaaniti taakani buufate. 
Matthew8:19 Namichi Seera beekhu toko gara isaa d'ufe waan jed'eeni, Aabbo, anini fulla atini deemtu ch'ufa si gula deema." 
Matthew8:20 Yeso waan jed'eeni, Geedalti goda qabdi, simpirreleeni mana qabdi, ammo Ilmi Nama fulla mata ufi keyatu inqabu." 
Matthew8:21 Jara isaa keesaa nami toko waan jed'eeni, Aabbo, eegi, qara d'aqe Aabbo awaala." 
Matthew8:22 Ammo Yesoni waan jed'eeni, Na gula kooti, reefi ha reefa awaaluti." 
Matthew8:23 Yesoni hobolo seennaani, jari isaa isa gula yae." 
Matthew8:24 Bubbeeni guddooni galaana d'oofte, d'awaani hobolo roraafte, ammo Yesoni rafu jira." 
Matthew8:25 Worri d'aqe isa damase waan jed'eeni, Aabbo, nu baasi, nu badu jirra." 
Matthew8:26 Jennaani Yesoni waan worraani jed'e, Maafi akana sodaattani? D'ugefachaani teesani waan diqo. Jennaani Yesoni kae, bubbeefi galaana ch'allisiise, wonti ch'ufti qabanoofte." 
Matthew8:27 Biyyiti maadefatte waan jette, Kunini nama akami, ka qilleensafi galaanileeni sarmuufi?" 
Matthew8:28 Inni gama galaana, lafa Gerasi jed'ani taakinaani, jari lama ka jinni qabu ka awaala keesaa yae isaani bahe. Jari guddo bineensae, tanaafi nami tokoleeni dandae kara suni gula indeemu." 
Matthew8:29 Worri iye waan jed'e, Atini maani nuraa qabda, Ee Ilma Waaqa? Ato guyyaani ingahiini nu gaargalchu d'ufte?" 
Matthew8:30 Diqo fago worra iraa mana booyyeti d'eedu jira. 
Matthew8:31 Jinniini waan jetteeni, Yo ka nu baaftu taate, gara booyye suni nu ergi." 
Matthew8:32 Yesoni beena Yaa jed'eeni. Worra keesaa yaate booyye taani duudde. Duuba booyyeeni orite, bisaani keesa duudde, bisaani liqimsani." 
Matthew8:33 Tissituuni baqatte, dira d'at'e waan worri jinni qabu tahe ch'ufa odeesite." 
Matthew8:34 Duuba diri ch'ufti haguma gahuunu Yeso argu d'ufe; arginaani aka inni lafa worra keesaa deemu kad'atani. 
Matthew9:1 Yesoni hobolo keesa seene galaana taake, dira lafa ufi d'aqe." 
Matthew9:2 Namicha naafa toko ka sire gubba ch'iisu isatiini d'ufani. Yesoni d'ugefacha worraa arginaani waan namicha naafa kaaniini jed'e, Garaa jabaad'u, gurba kiyya; daba kanke ya sii araaramani." 
Matthew9:3 Jari Seera beekhu toko waan woliini jed'e, Nami kunini Waaqa abaara!" 
Matthew9:4 Yesoni herega worraa beennaani waan jed'e, Maafi garaa keesani keesati hameenna akana kana hereddani?" 
Matthew9:5 Tamiti ira laaftu, Daba kanke ya si araaramani jecha mo, kai deemi jecha?" 
Matthew9:6 Ammo aka Ilmi Nama lafa keesati jabeenna daba nama araaramuuni qabu hubad'a. Jennaani inni waan namicha naafa kaaniini jed'e, Kai, sire tante fud'ad'u, worrati gali." 
Matthew9:7 Duuba inni kae worrati gale. 
Matthew9:8 Biyyiti waan kana arginaani sodaate, Waaqa ka jabeenna akana kana namaa kenne guddifte." 
Matthew9:9 Yesoni achi deemnaani, nama toko ka Matayo jed'ani, ka fulla mana damoosa tau arge, Na gula kooti jed'eeni. Jennaani Matayoni kae, isa gula deeme." 
Matthew9:10 Inni sagale nyaataa teennaani, jara damoosa guurufi nami daba hedduuni isaafi jara isaa woliini tatae." 
Matthew9:11 Duuba Farisayooni waan kana arginaani waan jara isatiini jette, Qaallichi keesani maafi nama damoosa guurufi nama daba qabu woliini sagale nyaata?" 
Matthew9:12 Yesoni dubbi tana d'ageennaani waan jed'e, Nami fayya qabu ch'ireesa imbarbaadu, ammo nama fayyad'abe ch'allati barbaada." 
Matthew9:13 Beena, waan jecha kana hubad'a, Anini naasu fed'a, sorio imfed'u. Anini nama daba male, nama d'uga yaamu ind'umne." 
Matthew9:14 Jennaani jari Yohana gara Yeso d'ufe waan jed'eeni, Nuufi Farisayooni maafi Waaqaa jenne ufi agabsina, ka jari kanke ufi inagabsine?" 
Matthew9:15 Yesoni waan worraani jed'e, Keessumaani fuud'aa haga abbaani fuud'a worra woliini jiru lalefachu dandeeti? Guyyaani abba fuud'a worra biraa fuud'ani ind'ufa, duuba hojja suni worri ufi agabsa." 
Matthew9:16 Nami woya hareeti kooti dullatiti erbu injiru; erbaani suni woya dullati taani intarsaafti, tarsaaleeni ira guddatti." 
Matthew9:17 Daad'i hareeti gorjo dullatiti inaqani. Yo akasi tolchani, gorjooni intarsaati, daad'iini jidde gorjooni baddi. Daad'i hareeti gorjo hareetiti naqani, duuba lachu guyya heddu teeti." 
Matthew9:18 Ato Yesoni waan kana dubbatu, motichi toko d'ufe, durati jilbifate waan jed'e, Intalti tiyya ammumatana doote; ammo kooti, harka isi ira kayi, isiini injiraatti." 
Matthew9:19 Jennaani Yesoni kae, jara ufi woliini isa gula deeme." 
Matthew9:20 Niitiini toko, ta d'iigi ganna kud'ani lama keesaa yae, isa duddaduubaani d'ufte, handaara woya isaa tut'e." 
Matthew9:21 Isiini waan ufiini jette, Yo anini woya isaa ch'alla tuqele imfaya." 
Matthew9:22 Yesoni ufira garagale, isi arginaani waan jed'eeni, Intala, garaa jabaad'u, d'ugefachaani tante la si fayyifte. Hojuma suni fayyite." 
Matthew9:23 Yesoni mana moticha kaani seennaani jara fuludo tabatufi biyya bohu jirtu arginaani 
Matthew9:24 waan jed'e, Alati baha, intalti indoone, ammo rafu jirti. Jennaani worri isa koble," 
Matthew9:25 ammo, eegi biyyiti alati baate, inni olseene harka intala olfuud'e, intalti kaate." 
Matthew9:26 Oduuni tunini lafa suni ch'ufa keesa fulla ch'ufa geete. 
Matthew9:27 Yesoni achi deemnaani jari ballaani lama isa gula yae waan jed'eeni, Ilma Daudi, nuu nahi." 
Matthew9:28 Inni mana olseennaani jari ballaani kaani gara isaa d'ufe. Yesoni waan worraani jed'e, Aka anini waan kana tolchu dandau ind'ugefattani? Jari, Ee Aabbo ind'ugefanna jed'eeni." 
Matthew9:29 Jennaani Yesoni ila worra tuqe waan jed'eeni, D'ugefacha teesani gula ha isanii taatu." 
Matthew9:30 Duuba ilti worra banamte, Ammo Yesoni nama tokoleti inhimina jed'e, worrati seere." 
Matthew9:31 Ammo worri yae, waan isaa lafa suni ch'ufa keesati odeese." 
Matthew9:32 Ato worri yau nama jinni duuda qabu Yesotiini d'ufani. 
Matthew9:33 Inni jinni keesaa baase jennaani namichi duudaani kaani dubbate. Biyyiti maadefatte waan jette, Waan akana kana taka Israeli keesati ingarre." 
Matthew9:34 Ammo Farisayooni waan jette, Inni jabeenna gudda jinnitiini jinni baasa." 
Matthew9:35 Duuba Yesoni achi deeme diraafi ollowaanifi maneeni Waaqa iti kad'atani keesati Odu Dansa ta Finna odeese, d'ukubafi fayyad'aba ch'ufa fayyise." 
Matthew9:36 Gumi arginaani naheefi, maro isiini dad'abde qarqaarsa d'abde hooliye tissitu inqamne fakaatefi." 
Matthew9:37 Jennaani Yesoni waan jara isatiini jed'e, Mid'aani murani guddo, ammo nami mid'aani muru diqa." 
Matthew9:38 Tanaafi abba mid'aani suni kad'ad'a aka inni nama mid'aani muru oobruti ergu. 
Matthew10:1 Jennaani Yesoni jara isaa kud'ani lama wolti yaame jabeenna kenneefi, aka jinni nama keesaa baasani, fayyad'abafi d'ukuba ch'ufa fayyisani." 
Matthew10:2 Maqaani ergattu kud'ani lamaani kana: ka qara, Simoni ka Petro jed'aniifi oboleesa isaa Andarea; Yakobofi oboleesa isaa Yohana, ilmaani Zebedayo;" 
Matthew10:3 Filipofi Bartholomayo; Tomasofi Matayo, ka damoosa guuru; Yakobo ilma Alfayofi Thadayo;" 
Matthew10:4 Simoni, nama lafa ufi jabeesufi Yuda Iskariote, ka Yeso gurgure." 
Matthew10:5 Jara kud'ani lamaani kana Yesoni erge waan jed'eeni, Lafa gosa d'ibi yokhaani dira gosa Samaria inseeniina." 
Matthew10:6 Ammo gara hooliye badde ta gosa Israeli d'aqa. 
Matthew10:7 Yaa, Finni gubba ya d'iaate jed'a, namati odeesa." 
Matthew10:8 Nama d'ukuba qabu fayyisa, ka duele kaasa, ka qomaat'a qabule fayyisa, jinnile nama keesa baasa. Gati male isanii kennani isanileeni gati male namaa kenna." 
Matthew10:9 Worqifi qarsi yokhaani beese d'ibi imfud'atiina; 
Matthew10:10 karerisafa, ubaara d'ibifa, kopefa, ulele imfud'atiina. Hojattuuni waan maleefi argachu malte." 
Matthew10:11 Ollafi dira ka seentanifu, nama dansa barbaada, haga yaataniti isa woliini taa." 
Matthew10:12 Akuma namati olduudanini nagaya fuud'a eebisa. 
Matthew10:13 Yo nami suni dansa tahe, nageenni keesani ha iti d'ufu; ammo yo nami suni isani jalaa dide, nageenni keesani ha isaniti deebiu." 
Matthew10:14 Yo nami isani imfud'anne, yokhaani dubbi teesani inch'aqamne, hojja mana suni yokhaani dira suni keesaa yaatani, awaara miila keesani ira d'ad'aad'a." 
Matthew10:15 D'uguma, waan anini isaniini jed'u, lafti Sodomafi Gomora guyya mura dira suni iraa goomti!" 
Matthew10:16 Kuno, anini aka ilmoole hooliye jiddu yaiti isani erga. Tanaafi aka bofa qaro taha, ammalle aka sabaliisa nagayaani taa." 
Matthew10:17 Nama eegad'a; isani qabani kora isani geesani; ammalle Maneeni Waaqa iti kad'atani keesati isani d'aanani. 
Matthew10:18 Maro tiyyaafi hayyootafi jaallaba durati isani hirkisani, aka worraafi gosa d'ibile durati d'ugeesitani." 
Matthew10:19 Yo qorsuma isani yaamani, waan dubbattanifi waan jettani inheregiina; waan isani jettani hojuma suni isaniti himani." 
Matthew10:20 Nami dubbatu isaniiniti, ammo Lubbu Abba keesaniti isani keesa dubbata." 
Matthew10:21 Oboleesi oboleesa ufi duati geesa; abbaani ilma ufi akasuma tolcha; ijoolleleeni abbootifi haad'a ufi akasuma tolchiti. 
Matthew10:22 Nami ch'ufti maro tiyyaafi isani jibba. Ammo nami haga muumme obsu imbaafama. 
Matthew10:23 Hojja dira toko keesati isani gaargalchani, ka iti aanuti baqad'a. D'uguma, anini isaniti hima, dira Israeli ch'ufa dantetani inqit'eesitani, ato Ilmi Nama ind'umne." 
Matthew10:24 Nami woi baratu nama isa barsiisu ira injiru; yokhaani garbichi abba ufi ira injiru. 
Matthew10:25 Nami woi baratu, yo akuma nama isa barsiise tahe yokhaani garbichileeni yo aka abba ufi tahe ya taateefi. Yo abba worraatiini Beelzebuli jed'ani, worra mana maqa hagasi ira hamatiini yaamani!" 
Matthew10:26 Tanaafi insodaatiina; wonti daboolaani ta daboola ira imbuqimne injirtu; yokhaani wonti d'ossani ta imullanne injirtu. 
Matthew10:27 Waan anini dukana keesati isaniti himu ifsa keesati dubbad'a; ammalle waan hasasani ka d'ageettani fiit'e mana gubbati lalaba. 
Matthew10:28 Nama nafa ijeese ammo lubbu woma tolchu indandeenne insodaatiina; ammo nama nafafi lubbu ibida keesa buusu dandau sodaad'a. 
Matthew10:29 Ch'uquliisa lama beese tokoti gurguraniyu? Ammo yo Abbaani keesani fed'e male, tokoleeni lafa ind'au." 
Matthew10:30 Rifeensa mata keesanile ch'ufa yayu hedani. 
Matthew10:31 Tanaafi insodaatiina; isani ch'uquliisa ira jirtani! 
Matthew10:32 Nama nama durati na d'ugeesu ch'ufa anileeni Abba gubba durati d'ugeesa. 
Matthew10:33 Ammo ka nama durati na mormatu ch'ufa anileeni Abba kiyya ka gubba durati mormad'a. 
Matthew10:34 Waan anini nagaya lafaani d'ufu d'ufe insehiina; anini nagaya lafaani d'ufu ind'umne ammo sheefti lafaani d'ufu d'ufe. 
Matthew10:35 Anini ilmaafi abba wolti naqa d'ufe, intalafi haad'ale; niiti ilmaatiifi haad'a isaale;" 
Matthew10:36 worruma namati nyaapa namaa taha. 
Matthew10:37 Nami abbaafi haad'a ufi nara jaalatu naa himmalle; ammalle nami ilmaani ufi nara jaalatu naa himmalle. 
Matthew10:38 Nami maskali ufi fud'ate na gula indeemne na himmalle. 
Matthew10:39 Nami lubbu ufi qorqorachu fed'u ind'aba; ammo nami lubbu ufi naa jed'e balleesu inargata. 
Matthew10:40 Nami isani d'ieesu, na d'ieesa; nami na d'ieesu nama na erge d'ieesa." 
Matthew10:41 Nami raaga Waaqa, maro inni raaga taheefi d'ieesu, aka raaga galata argata. Ammalle, nami nama d'uga, maro inni nama d'uga taheefi d'ieesu, aka nama d'uga galata argata." 
Matthew10:42 Hubad'a, nami, maro inni na gula deemuufi ijoolle didiqo tana toko bisaani guraachale obaase, galata ufi ind'abu." 
Matthew11:1 Eegi Yesoni barsiisiti jara ufi kud'ani lamaani hobaase, inni achii kae dira lafa suni keesati nama barsiisafi dubbi odeesu d'aqe." 
Matthew11:2 Yohanani, ato mana hid'aansa keesa jiru, waan huji Kristo d'agaye jennaani jara ufi Yesoti erge" 
Matthew11:3 waan jed'eeni, Nami ind'ufa jed'ani si mo ka d'ibi eenna?" 
Matthew11:4 Yesoni waan worraani jed'e, Beena, waan d'ageetanifi waan argitani Yohanati hima:" 
Matthew11:5 ballaani lafa arga, naafi indeema, nami qomaat'a qabu inqulqulla, duudaani ind'agaya, reefale kaasani, Odu Dansa hiyyeeyiti odeesani." 
Matthew11:6 Ayaana nama diqole na ind'arefanne. 
Matthew11:7 Worri kaani yaanaani, Yesoni waan Yohana biyyati dubbate waan jed'e, Lafa gamooji keesa maani daawachu d'at'ani? Ilaadu qilleensi tabsiisu wo taate?" 
Matthew11:8 Nama woya lalaaftu uyifatu daawachu d'at'ani? Worri woya lalaaftu uyifatu mana hayyoota keesa tataa. 
Matthew11:9 Maafi alati yaatani re? Raaga daawachu d'at'ani? Ee, ammo waan raaga ira jira daawachu d'at'ani." 
Matthew11:10 Nami kunini ka waan isaa akana t'aafani, Kuno, anini ergattu tiyya si dura erga, aka kara si durati mid'aasu." 
Matthew11:11 D'uguma, waan anini isaniini jed'u, Nami garaa nad'eeni keesaa bue tokoleeni ka Yohana nama batisu ira jiru injiru. Ammo nami Finna gubba ch'ufa keesa ira maand'a isa ira jira." 
Matthew11:12 Haga, bara Yohana nama batisu haga arra Finna gubba ya had'ani, worri irre qabu irreeni had'a." 
Matthew11:13 Raaga ch'ufaafi Seeri Musa haga Yohana ch'alla woi hime. 
Matthew11:14 Yo sila isani d'ugefattani, Yohanani Eliya, ka d'ufiisa isaa himani." 
Matthew11:15 Yo gurra qabaattani d'agaya. 
Matthew11:16 Duuba d'aloota kana maanti akheekha? Aka ijoolle gabaya keesa teteete jaalaani ufi yaamtu jira, ta waan woliini jettu." 
Matthew11:17 Nu dibe isani d'oomne, ammo isani sirbu diddani; ammalle nu iyinnaani isani bohu diddani." 
Matthew11:18 Yohanani nyaate d'ugu ind'umne, ammo isani, inni jinni qaba jettani." 
Matthew11:19 Ilmi Nama nyaate d'ugu d'ufe, ammo waan jed'ani, Kunini sabdifi nama farso d'ugu, jaala nama, damoosa guurufi nama daba. Tatule, qalbi Waaqa d'uga, waan isiini tolchituuni beekhani." 
Matthew11:20 Jennaani Yesoni worra dira qaraa inni keesati waan mama tolche, waan worri daba iraa deebiu dideefi, wollaala iti mure waan jed'e," 
Matthew11:21 Gaargala keti, Korazini! Gaargala keti, Bethsaida! Ato sila waan mama ta isani keesati tolchani Tirofi Sidoni keesati duri tolchani, worri arra kale ch'arqi naqate, daara dibate, daba ufi inhimatiini!" 
Matthew11:22 Ammo anini isaniti hima, guyya qorisa Waaqi isani ira worra Tirotiifi ka Sidoniti naha." 
Matthew11:23 Kapernaumu, waan gubba oldeemtu ufi seeta? Fulla ekhera si buusani. Yo sila waan mama ka si keesati tolchani Sodoma keesati tolchani, diri suni haga arra injira." 
Matthew11:24 Ammo waan anini siini jed'u, Guyya muumme diri Sodoma sira gooma!" 
Matthew11:25 Hojja suni Yesoni waan jed'e, Anini galata sii deebisa, Ee Aabbo, Abba lafafi gubba, waan atini waan kana worra qalbi qabuufi worra wo barate d'ossite ijoolle didiqoti mullifteefi." 
Matthew11:26 Ee Aabbo, tunini fed'i teeti." 
Matthew11:27 Waan ch'ufa Aabbooni ya harka kiyyati kenne. Abba male, nami Ilma beekhu injiru, ammalle nami Abba beekhu injiru, Ilmaafi nama inni iti mullisu fed'u male." 
Matthew11:28 Nati koota, nami dad'abefi ka baa ulfo baatu anini isani boqachiisa." 
Matthew11:29 Qaampara kiyya keyad'a, naraa barad'a, anini nama laana, ka mata inguddifanne; duuba boqota argattani." 
Matthew11:30 Qaampari kiyya sabla, baani tiyya inulfaattu." 
Matthew12:1 Bara suni, Yesoni guyya Sabato oobru dargaye keesa dabarraani, jari isaa beelae, jennaani mid'aani t'ururate nyaate." 
Matthew12:2 Farisayooni waan kana arginaani waan Yesoni jette, Ilaali, jari kanke waan guyya Sabato tolchu himmalini tolcha." 
Matthew12:3 Inni waan worraani jed'e, Isani waan Daudifi jari isa woliini jiru beelomnaani tahani insoomne?" 
Matthew12:4 Inni Mana Waaqa olseene, qit'a Waaqaa baasani fud'ate, nyaate wahela isaleeni gahe — qit'a nami tokoleeni, qaalole male, nyaachu himmalini." 
Matthew12:5 Yokhaani isani Seera Musa keesa aka qaaloleeni guyya Sabato Mana Waaqa keesa seera Sabato ch'absitu ammo wollaala inqamne insoomne? 
Matthew12:6 Waan anini isaniti himu, Wonti Mana Waaqa ira guddo arma jirti." 
Matthew12:7 T'aafiini waan jettu, yo sila jecha, anini nasu male sorio hori infed'u jed'u beetani, isani nama wollaala inqamne wollaala itimurtani." 
Matthew12:8 Wonti akanatiifi Ilmi Nama gudda Sabatooti. 
Matthew12:9 Yesoni achi deemnaani Mana Waaqa iti kad'atani toko olseene. 
Matthew12:10 Namicha toko ka harki rifateti achi jira. Jennaani aka sila Yeso himatani waan jed'aniini, Guyya Sabato nama fayyisitiini fullaa mo fullaaniti?" 
Matthew12:11 Yesoni waan worraani jed'e, Isani kana keesa, eennu nami hoola toko qabu, ka yo inni guyya Sabato boola keesa bue, hampaare boola keesaa imbaamne?" 
Matthew12:12 Nami hoola ira injiru re? Yoosi, guyya Sabato aki waan dansaa tolchani fulla." 
Matthew12:13 Jennaani inni waan namichaani jed'e, Harka kanke diriirfad'u. Namichi harka diriirfannaani harki fayye, akuma harka kaani tahe." 
Matthew12:14 Ammo Farisayooni yaate koratte, aka isa ijeeftu mariatte." 
Matthew12:15 Yesoni waan kana d'ageennaani achi kae deeme, duuba nami hedduuni isa gula yae. Inni nama ch'ufa fayyise," 
Matthew12:16 ammalle biyyaani waan kiyya namati inhimina jed'e seerate," 
Matthew12:17 aka wonti raagi Isayani jed'e guutamtu: 
Matthew12:18 Hojattuuni tiyya ka anini fohad'e kana, ka ani jaalad'u, ka guddo na gammachiisu. Anini Lubbu tiyya isati erga, inni qorsuma tiyya gosa ch'ufati odeesa." 
Matthew12:19 Inni imormu yokhaani lalabe iniyu, yokhaani nami tokoleeni qonqo isaa kara keesati ind'agayu." 
Matthew12:20 Inni ilaadu melatte inch'absu, yokhaani ifse aartule ind'aamsu, haga d'uga dabsachiisuuti." 
Matthew12:21 Gochiti ch'ufti maqa isaa abdatti. 
Matthew12:22 Jennaani namicha toko ka jinniini ilaafi afaani duchite Yesotiini d'ufani, Yesoni isa fayyise, duudaani kaani dubbate ilaaleeni lafa arge." 
Matthew12:23 Biyyiti ch'ufti mamte waan jette, Kunini hegeri dandae Ilma Daudi taha?" 
Matthew12:24 Ammo Farisayooni waan kana d'ageennaani waan jette, Nami kunini gudda jinni, ka Beelzebuli jed'aniini, jinni baasa." 
Matthew12:25 Yesoni herega worraa beennaani waan worraani jed'e, Nami lafa toko ka gosaani gargari qodamu imbada. Ammalle diri yokhaani mani gargari qodamu aka d'aabatu inqabu." 
Matthew12:26 Akasuma duuba yo Sheet'ani Sheet'ana baase, inni yayu gargari qodame; akamiini dandae jabeennaani lafa fida re?" 
Matthew12:27 Yo anini maqa Beelzebulitiini jinni baase, ilmaani teesani maqa eennutiini baafti? Tanaafi isiti isani qora." 
Matthew12:28 Ammo yo anini Lubbu Waaqatiini jinni baase, yo suni Finni Waaqa ya d'iaate." 
Matthew12:29 Nami akami dandae mana nama jaba seene miha hata, yo qaraa fiit'e abba mana inhid'iini? Yo suni dandae mana isaa seene hata." 
Matthew12:30 Nami na woliini injirre nyaapa kiyya; nami na woliini woingurre wofirfisa. 
Matthew12:31 Tanaafi waan anini isaniti himu: Ch'ubbufi araba hama nami wo arabsu, namaa inaraaramani, ammo nami Lubbu Qulqulloti muratu araarama inargattu." 
Matthew12:32 Nami Ilma Nama miid'u araarama argata; ammo nami Lubbu Qulqullo miid'u haga jiru jireenna araarama inargattu. 
Matthew12:33 Mukhi dansaani mid'aani dansaa d'ala, mukhi hamaani mid'aani hamo d'ala. Mukha ch'ufa mid'aani inni d'aluuni beekhani." 
Matthew12:34 Isani ilmoole bofaati! Akami dandeetani waan dansa dubbattani, yo isani hamamo taatani? Wonti akanatiifi afaani waan garaani qabu dubbatani." 
Matthew12:35 Nami dansaani hori ufi dansa keesaa waan dansaa baasa; nami hamaleeni hori ufi hama keesaa waan hamtu baasa. 
Matthew12:36 Waan anini isanti himu, guyya mura Waaqi nama ch'ufa dubbi didiqo inni jed'e, ta sila jecha himmalini gaafata." 
Matthew12:37 Dubbi teetiini d'uga sii murani, ammalle dubbi teetiini wollaala siti murani." 
Matthew12:38 Jennaani jara Seera beekhufi Farisayooni waan Yesoni jette, Aabbo, nu akheekha atini tolchitu argu feena." 
Matthew12:39 Ammo Yesoni waan jed'eeni, D'alooti kunini hama, Waaqa dida, akheekha barbaada, akheekhi nama agarsiisani injiru, ka raaga Yona male." 
Matthew12:40 Akuma Yonani guyya sadifi halkani sadi garaa qurt'umi keesa tae, akasuma Ilmi Namaleeni guyya sadifi halkani sadi boola keesa taa." 
Matthew12:41 Biyyiti Ninawi Guyya Mura kaateti d'aloota kana himatti, waan worri maro odu dansa ta Yonani odeeseefi daba iraa deebiefi. Ammo kuno, nami Yona ira jiru arma jira." 
Matthew12:42 Guyya Mura hayyitiini lafa Sheba olkaate d'aloota kana himatti isiini muumme lafati baate aka qarooma Solomoni ch'aqaftu; ammo kuno, wonti Solomoni ira jira arma jirti." 
Matthew12:43 Hojja jinniini nama keesaa baatu, lafa bisaani inqamne keesa marte boqota barbaaddi; ammo yo d'abdu" 
Matthew12:44 waan ufiini jettu, Anini mana kiyya ka keesaa d'ufeti deebia. Ammo isiini deebinaani mana duwa, ka harani massani argiti." 
Matthew12:45 Isiini deemte jinni torba d'ibi ta isi ira hamtutiini d'ufti; duuba seenani achi qubatani. Jireenni nama suni ka lameeso jireenna qara ira hama. D'alooti hamaani kunileeni akasuma taha. 
Matthew12:46 Ato inni tae hasau, haad'afi oboleyaani isaa ala ejaanjani isaani dubbachu fed'ani." 
Matthew12:47 Tanaafi nami toko waan isaani jed'e, Ilaali, haatetifi oboleyaani tante ala ejaanjani siini dubbachu fed'ani." 
Matthew12:48 Ammo Yesoni waan namicha isati himeeni jed'e, Haad'afi oboleyaani tiyya eennu?" 
Matthew12:49 Jennaani inni jara ufiti quba qabe waan jed'e, Kuno, haad'afi oboleyaani tiyya jara kana." 
Matthew12:50 Nama waan Abbaani kiyya ka gubba fed'u tolchu ch'allati oboleesafi, oboleetifi, haad'a tiyya." 
Matthew13:1 Guyyuma suni, Yesoni mana keesaa bahe d'aatu galaana tae." 
Matthew13:2 Gumiini guddooni wolti baanaani inni hobolo keesa seene achi tae, duuba gumiini ch'ufti afaani galaana ejaanjite." 
Matthew13:3 Inni mammaasaani waan heddu worrati hime waan jed'e, Namichi toko mid'aani fach'aasu d'aqe." 
Matthew13:4 Ato inni fach'aasu mid'aani gari d'aatu karaa jigani, simpirreeni d'ufte nyaatte." 
Matthew13:5 Mid'aani gari d'akha gubbaa jigani, fulla biyyeeni guddooni injirre. Yoosu biqilani, ammo waan biyyeeni gadi fago intahiniifi," 
Matthew13:6 aduuni baanaani qanch'ooratani, duuba waan hidda inqamneefi qanch'arani." 
Matthew13:7 Mid'aani gari qoraati keesa jigani, qoraatiini woliini baate ukaamsite." 
Matthew13:8 Mid'aani gari biyye dansa gubbaa jigani; mid'aani d'alani, hagi toko d'ibba d'alani, ka gari jaatama d'alani, ka gari sodoma d'alani." 
Matthew13:9 Yo gurra qabaattani d'agaya. 
Matthew13:10 Jari Yeso gara isaa d'ufe waan jed'eeni, Atini maafi mammaasaani worrati dubbatta?" 
Matthew13:11 Yesoni waan worraani jed'e, waan Finna gubba ka d'ossani ya isani barsiisani, ammo worra imbarsiimne." 
Matthew13:12 Nama waan guddo qabu iti daraniifi, duuba inni quufeti hambisa; ammo nama woma inqamne diqo inni qabule iraa fuud'ani." 
Matthew13:13 Maro waan kanatifi anini mammaasaani worrati dubbad'a. Ato ilaalanile inargani, ch'aqasanile ind'agayani, yokhaani imid'aafatani." 
Matthew13:14 Tanaafi wonti raagi Isayani jed'e ya guutamte. Inni waan jed'e: Inuma ch'aqaftani ammo inhubattani; inuma ilaaltani ammo imid'aafattani. 
Matthew13:15 Garaani gumi tana ya daallae. Gurri worra yayu duude, ilaale ya dunuunfatani, aka woma ingarre, aka gurraleeni woma ind'ageenne aka garaani woma inhubanne, aka nati deebiani, anini imfayimne." 
Matthew13:16 Ammo ayaana keesani ka ilti teesani lafa gartu, gurri keesanileeni woi d'agayu." 
Matthew13:17 D'uguma, waan anini isaniini jed'u, raagafi nami d'uga hedduuni waan isani agartani kana argu fed'e, ammo argu dad'abe; ammalle waan isani d'ageettani kana d'agayu fed'e, ammo d'agayu dad'abe." 
Matthew13:18 Yoosi mammaasa nama mid'aani fach'aasu d'agaya. 
Matthew13:19 Yo nami dubbi Finna d'agaye inhubatiini, hamaani kaani d'ufe, waan garaa isaa keesati fach'aasani kaani keesaa fuud'a. Kunini mid'aani d'aatu kara jige." 
Matthew13:20 Mid'aani lafa d'akha gubba jige sunini nama dubbi d'agaye hurrise gammadaani fud'atu fakaata. 
Matthew13:21 Ammo hidda inqabu, haga diqa obse, hojja d'ipufi gaargali maro dubbi tanaatiifi d'ufu yoosu gufata." 
Matthew13:22 Mid'aani qoraati keesati fach'aasani suni nama dubbi d'agaye, ammo herega lafatiifi sobi durooma dubbi taani ukaamse, mid'aani d'alu d'owu fakaata." 
Matthew13:23 Mid'aani biyye dansa gubbati fach'aasani suni nama dubbi d'ageennaani mid'aafate, duuba mid'aani d'alu fakaata; toko d'iba toko, ka d'ibiini jaatama, ka gari sodoma d'ala." 
Matthew13:24 Yesoni mammaasa d'ibi worrati hime waan jed'e: Finni gubba nama sanyi dansa oobru ufi keesati oobre fakaata. 
Matthew13:25 Ammo ato abbaani rafu, nyaapi isaa d'ufe, raafu jiddu dargayeti fach'aase, kae iti d'aabate." 
Matthew13:26 Dargayeeni biqillaani mid'aani d'alte, jennaani raafuleeni woliini bat'e." 
Matthew13:27 Garbooti abbaati d'ufte waan jetteeni, Aabbo, atini sanyi dansa oobru tante keesati imfach'aamne? Akamiini raafu qabdi re?" 
Matthew13:28 Abbaani oobru waan jed'eeni, Nyaapa kiyyati waan kana tolche. Garbooti waan isaani jette, Nu d'anne haramnu feeta?" 
Matthew13:29 Abbaani oobru waan jed'eeni, Hiyyo; hegeri ato haramtanu dargayele woliini bubuqiftani." 
Matthew13:30 Lachu ha woliini baatu, haga muraansi gahuuti. Gaafa muraansa, anini waan worra muruuni jed'u, Qara raafu wolti guura, wolti hid'a aka gubani, ammo dargaye khod'o tiyyati galcha jed'aani." 
Matthew13:31 Mammaasa d'ibi Yesoni worrati hime waan jed'eeni, Finni gubba waan aka guma dambi fakaata, ka nami toko fuud'e oobru ufi keesati fach'aase." 
Matthew13:32 Inni mid'aani ch'ufa ira diqa ammo eegi bahe mid'aani ch'ufa ira guddate mukha gudda taha. Duuba simpirreeni d'ufte dame irati mana jaarati. 
Matthew13:33 Ammalle inni mammaasa d'ibi worrati hime, Finni Waaqa ka gubba bukho fakaata, ka niitiini fuute; dargaye d'ebbe lama ta jiisaniti nat'e, haga ch'ufti bukhofte olbatuti." 
Matthew13:34 Yesoni mammaasaani waan kana ch'ufa worrati hasae, mammaasa male woma tokole namati inhasoomne." 
Matthew13:35 Tunini aka wonti raagi jed'e guutamtu: Anini afaani kiyya banad'e mammaasaani dubbad'a, anini waan haga lafti uumamte d'ossani hima." 
Matthew13:36 Jennaani gumi biraa deeme manati gale. Jari isaa gara isaa d'ufe waan jed'eeni, Mammaasa raafu oobru keesa diideesi nuti himi." 
Matthew13:37 Yesoni waan jed'eeni, Nami mid'aani dansaa fach'aasu Ilma Namaati;" 
Matthew13:38 oobruuni lafa tana; mid'aani dansaani ilmaani Finna Waaqati; raafuuni ilmaani Hama Kaani; 
Matthew13:39 nyaapi isi fach'aase Sheet'ana. Muraansi waan eegi tana. Worri muruleeni malaika. 
Matthew13:40 Akuma raafu wolti guurani ibidaani gubani, akasuma eegi tanale taati." 
Matthew13:41 Ilmi Nama malaika ufi erge, isiini Finna isaa keesa waan daba ch'ufaafi worra hameenna tolchu ch'ufa wolti guurte," 
Matthew13:42 ibida balaliu keesaa gati; achiti bohani ilkaani qarani. 
Matthew13:43 Gaafasi jari d'uga aka adu Finna Abba worraa keesati ifsa. Yo gurra qabaattani, d'agaya." 
Matthew13:44 Finni gubba aka hori oobru keesati d'ossani jira, ka nami argate, biyye irati deebise biraa deeme. Gammada ufi keesa waan qabu ch'ufa gurgure oobru suni bitata." 
Matthew13:45 Ammalle Finni gubba daldaltu dooqa mid'aadu barbaadu fakaata. 
Matthew13:46 Dooqa toko ta gati guddo arginaani deeme waan qabu ch'ufa gurgure bitata. 
Matthew13:47 Ammalle Finni gubba t'urura galaana keesa buusani, qurt'umi gosa ch'ufa wolti guuraniini fakaata." 
Matthew13:48 Yo guutame, afaani galaanati hirkisani, tataani qurt'umi gargari filani: dadansa olkeyatani, hamamtu gadigatani." 
Matthew13:49 Eegi tanale akasuma taati: malaikaani d'ufte nama hamamafi dadansa gargari baafti. 
Matthew13:50 Ibida balaliuti guurti, achiti bohani ilkaani qarani." 
Matthew13:51 Waan kana ch'ufa hubattani? Worri, Ee jed'eeni." 
Matthew13:52 Yesoni waan worraani jed'e, Tanaafi nami seera beekhu ka waan Finna gubba barate, aka abba worraa ka subba ufi keesaa waan hareesafi dullacha baasu fakaata." 
Matthew13:53 Yesoni mammaasa kana hobaamnaani achi kae deeme 
Matthew13:54 lafa ufi d'aqe, Mana Waaqa iti kad'atani keesati nama barsiise. Nami isa ch'aqase ch'ufti maadefate waan jed'e, Namichi kunini qalbi tanaafi humna waan mama kanaani tolchu eesaa argate?" 
Matthew13:55 Kunini ilma namicha wo boch'u kaaniiniti? Maqaani haad'a isa Mariamuniti? Oboleyaani isaa Yakobofi Yusufufi Simonifi Yudaniti? 
Matthew13:56 Oboleyaani isaa ta dubra nu woliini jirtiniti? Namichi kunini jabeenna kana ch'ufa eesa argate re? 
Matthew13:57 Duuba isa quufu didani jennaani Yesoni waan worraani jed'e, Fulla ch'ufati raaga guddisani, ollafi worra isaa keesa male." 
Matthew13:58 Inni waan mama achiti intolchine, maro worri d'ugefacha inqamneefi." 
Matthew14:1 Hayyu Herode, bara suni, waan Yeso d'agaye, waan tissele ufitiini jed'e," 
Matthew14:2 Nami kunini Yohana nama batisu; inni ya duisa keesaa kae; maro waan kanatifi waan mama kana tolcha. 
Matthew14:3 Wonti akanatiifi Herodeni duri Yohana qabe hid'aansa keesa kaye, maro Herodia, niiti Filipo, oboleesa isaa." 
Matthew14:4 Yohanani waan Herodeni jed'e, Aki atini niiti oboleesa keti barattu fullaaniti." 
Matthew14:5 Herodeni Yohana ijeesu fed'e, ammo biyya sodaate, waan biyyiti Yohana raaga seetefi." 
Matthew14:6 Ammo guyyaani qaabacha d'aloota Herode geennaani, intalti Herodia biyya durati sirbite Herode gammachiifte." 
Matthew14:7 Tanaafi Herodeni kakhate, Waan atini feetu ch'ufa sii kenna jed'eeni." 
Matthew14:8 Haati mala d'oofteefi, isiini d'at'e waan jette, Mata Yohana nama batisu qori gubba kayi naa kenni jetteeni." 
Matthew14:9 Herodeni lalefate, ammo maro kakhu isaatiifi ammalle maro keessuma isaatiifi, Kennaafi jed'e." 
Matthew14:10 Jennaani nama mana hid'aansati erge, Mata Yohana iraa kuta jed'e." 
Matthew14:11 Mata isaa qori gubba kayani intalati kennani, isiini gara haad'a geesite." 
Matthew14:12 Jari Yohana d'ufe reefa fuud'e awaale, d'aqe Yesoti hime." 
Matthew14:13 Yesoni waan kana d'ageennaani achi kae hobolo keesa seene fulla nami injirre d'aqe. Ammo biyyiti gara inni jiru d'ageennaani dira keesa miilaani isa hordofte. 
Matthew14:14 Inni alati baanaani nama heddu arge, naheefi nama fayyad'abe fayyise." 
Matthew14:15 Lafti galgaloomnaani jari Yeso gara isaa d'ufe waan jed'eeni, Fullaani tunini lafa alooti, aduuni ya d'iite, biyya galchi, ha yaani ollowaani keesa deemani sagale bitatani." 
Matthew14:16 Yesoni waan jed'eeni, Worri yau himmalle; isanumaani waan worri nyaatu kennaafi." 
Matthew14:17 Worri, Nu qit'a shanifi qurt'umi lama ch'alla arma qamna jed'eeni." 
Matthew14:18 Jennaani inni waan jed'eeni, Arma natiini koota." 
Matthew14:19 Duuba, Buuyo ira tataa biyyaani jed'e, qit'a shanifi qurt'umi lamaani taani guure, gubba olmillate, Waaqa galata deebise, duuba ch'ach'abse, qit'a kaani jara ufiti kenne; worri biyya qoode." 
Matthew14:20 Worri ch'ufti nyaate quufe. Duuba hamba dadu kud'ani lama wolti guurani. 
Matthew14:21 Nad'eeni ijoolle male, nami nyaate haga kunki shaniti." 
Matthew14:22 Jennaani Yesoni jara ufitiini, Hobolo keesa duuda galaana taaka jed'eeni, ufi isati biyya galche." 
Matthew14:23 Eegi biyya galche, koba ufi gaara kore aka Waaqa kad'atu. Lafti galgaloomnaanile kobuma ufi tae;" 
Matthew14:24 ammo hojja suni hobolooni yayu jiddu galaana geete, d'awaani oli gadi hobolo dadarbite, bubbeeni duddaduuba d'iibde." 
Matthew14:25 Baraaqa Yesoni bisaani gubba deeme fulla worraa d'ufe. 
Matthew14:26 Ammo jari isaa Yeso galaana gubba deemu arginaani rifate, Ekhera jed'ani sodaatani iyani." 
Matthew14:27 Ammo hojuma suni Yesoni worrati dubbate waan jed'eeni, Garaa jabaad'a, ana insodaatiina." 
Matthew14:28 Jennaani Petroni waan jed'eeni, Aabbo, yo d'uguma si taate, Bisaani gubba deemi kooti naani jed'i." 
Matthew14:29 Yesoni, Kooti jed'eeni. Duuba Petroni hobolo keesaa bahe, bisaani gubba gara Yeso d'aqe." 
Matthew14:30 Ammo bubbe arginaani sodaate, ka diquma bisaani keesa illit'iini iye, Aabbo, na qabi jed'e." 
Matthew14:31 Hojuma suni Yesoni harka diriirfate isa qabe waan jed'eeni, D'ugefachaani tante diqo! Maafi sodaatte?" 
Matthew14:32 Worri lachu hobolo keesa seennaani bubbeeni ch'allifte. 
Matthew14:33 Jari hobolo keesa jiru isa guddise waan jed'e, D'uguma atini Ilma Waaqaati." 
Matthew14:34 Galaana taakinaani lafa Genesareti d'ufani. 
Matthew14:35 Worri lafa suni Yeso hubannaani reera suniti d'aamsa ergani nama d'ukuba qabu ch'ufaa isatiini d'ufani. 
Matthew14:36 Aka handaara woya isaa tuqani isa kad'atani; jennaani nami tuqe ch'ufti fayye. 
Matthew15:1 Jennaani Farisayoofi jari Seera beekhu Yerusalemu bahani gara Yeso d'ufani waan jed'aniini," 
Matthew15:2 Jari kanke maafi aada jaarole ch'absa? Hojja sagale nyaatu harka ind'iqatu. 
Matthew15:3 Yesoni waan worraani jed'e, Isani maafi aada teesani gula yaatani akasiini seera Waaqa ch'absitani?" 
Matthew15:4 Waaqi waan jed'e, Abbaafi haad'a tanteti saalfad'u; nama abbaafi haad'a ufi arabsu ha ijeesani." 
Matthew15:5 Ammo isani waan jettani, Yo nami abbaafi haad'a ufitiini, waan sila nara argattani yayu Waaqaa kennani jed'e," 
Matthew15:6 inni waan abba ufi saalfatuufi inqabu jettani. Tanaafi maro aada teesanitiifi yayu seera Waaqa ch'absitani. 
Matthew15:7 Isani kiyyibdoole! Isayani d'uga dubbate, gaafa waan keesani fage!" 
Matthew15:8 Biyyiti tunini afaanumaani na guddifti, ammo garaani worra nara fago jira." 
Matthew15:9 Ufuma na yaamatani, wonti akanatiifi barsiisa ufi keesa seera nama aka seera Waaqa barsiisani jed'e." 
Matthew15:10 Jennaani Yesoni biyya ufiti yaame waan jed'eeni, Ch'aqasa, hubad'a." 
Matthew15:11 Wonti afaani nama keesa seene nama int'ureesitu, ammo waan afaani nama keesaa bahati nama t'ureesa." 
Matthew15:12 Jari Yeso gara isaa d'ufe waan jed'eeni, Farisayooni waan kana d'ageennaani ya dalante, beeta?" 
Matthew15:13 Inni waan jed'e, Mukha Abbaani kiyya ka gubba inobriini ch'ufa imbuqisani." 
Matthew15:14 Lakisa, worri balla. Yo nami ballaani balla d'ibiini deemu, worri lachu boola keesa bua." 
Matthew15:15 Jennaani Petroni, Mammaasa kana nu diigi jed'eeni." 
Matthew15:16 Yesoni waan jed'eeni, Isanileeni ammalle hubacha inarganne?" 
Matthew15:17 Aka wonti afaani seene garaati dabarte gadi baatu imbeetani? 
Matthew15:18 Ammo wonti afaani keesa baha, herega garaa keesaa d'ufti Duuba suniti nama t'ureesa." 
Matthew15:19 Garaa keesaa herega hamafi ijeechafi wolbarachaafi ch'abanumafi hannafi d'arafi arabati baha. 
Matthew15:20 Waan kanati nama t'ureesa. Ammo harka t'uritiini nyaachaani nama int'ureesitu. 
Matthew15:21 Yesoni achi kae lafa Tirotiifi Sidoni d'aqe. 
Matthew15:22 Niitiini gosa Kanaani toko iyaa d'ufte waan jetteeni, Ee Aabbo, Ilma Daudi, naa nahi, intala tiyya yayu jinniini aka hama qabatte." 
Matthew15:23 Ammo Yesoni woma deebisufi dide. Jari isa d'ufe waan jed'eeni, Niiti tana arma deemsisi, nu gula deemte nuti iyiti." 
Matthew15:24 Ammo Yesoni waan jed'eeni, Gara hooliye badde ta mana Israeli ch'allati na ergani." 
Matthew15:25 Ammo niitiini taani d'ufte isa durati jilbifatte waan jetteeni, Aabbo, na qarqaari." 
Matthew15:26 Yesoni waan jed'eeni, Sagale ijoolle duraa fuud'ani sare duraa buusitiini fullaaniti." 
Matthew15:27 Niitiini taani waan jetteeni, Sunini d'uga, Aabbo; ammo sareleeni hamba abba iraa jijiddu inyaatti." 
Matthew15:28 Jennaani Yesoni waan jed'eeni, Haato, d'ugefachaani tante waan guddo. Wonti atini feetu ha sii taatu. Duuba intalti isii hojuma suni fayyite." 
Matthew15:29 Yesoni achi deeme d'aatu galaana Galilaya dabre, gaara kore achi tae." 
Matthew15:30 Nami hedduuni isati d'ufe, naafafi ballafi farrafi duudafi nama d'ukuba gosa heddu Yesotiini d'ufani, jennaani inni worra fayyise." 
Matthew15:31 Tanaafi biyyiti duuda dubbatufi farra fayyufi naafa deemuufi balla lafa argu arginaani maadefatte, Waaqa Israeli guddifte." 
Matthew15:32 Jennaani Yesoni jara ufi yaame waan jed'eeni, Anini biyya tanaa naha, waan isiini guyya sadi na woliini teete waan nyaatani d'abdeefi. Anini akanumati worra gadi d'iisu imfed'u, hegeri beelaani karaati gagabani." 
Matthew15:33 Jari isaa waan isaani jed'e, Sagale worra geetu lafa aloo tana keesa eesa argina?" 
Matthew15:34 Yesoni waan worraani jed'e, Qit'a hagami qabdani? Worri, Nu qit'a torbaafi qurt'umi didiqo toko qamna jed'eeni." 
Matthew15:35 Yesoni biyyaani, Lafa tataa jed'e," 
Matthew15:36 qit'a torbaanifi qurt'umi guure, eegi galata deebise ch'ach'abse, jara isati kenne. Jari biyya dura naqe." 
Matthew15:37 Nami ch'ufti nyaate quufe, hamba dadu torba miju guurani." 
Matthew15:38 Nad'eeni ijoolle male, nami nyaate haga kunki afuriti." 
Matthew15:39 Duuba Yesoni biyyaani, Nagayati jed'e, hobolo keesa seene, gara lafa Magadani d'aqe." 
Matthew16:1 Farisayoofi Sadukayoni gara isaa d'ufte aka sila ilaalattu, Akheekha gubba nu agarsiisi jed'aniini." 
Matthew16:2 Yesoni waan worraani jed'e, Yo aduuni d'iite galchuuni diimate, bori bokai irroobu jettani." 
Matthew16:3 Ammo diirama, Bokai irrooba jettani, waan dumansi guraatae d'ud'ufaeefi. Isaani waan gubba beetani, ammo akheekha bara kana gargari barachu imbeetani." 
Matthew16:4 D'alooti hamani Waaqa didu kunini akheekha mama, barbaada akheekhi mama ka anini nama garsiisu injiru ka Yona male. Duuba akasi jed'e kae worra bira iti d'aabate." 
Matthew16:5 Jari isaa gama galaanati taakinaani, qit'a fud'achu ded'ani." 
Matthew16:6 Yesoni waan worraani jed'e, Bukho Farisayootiifi ta Sadukayo eegad'a." 
Matthew16:7 Jennaani jari isaa woliini hasae waan jed'e, Nu qit'aani ind'umne." 
Matthew16:8 Yesoni waan kana beennaani waan jed'eeni, D'ugefachaani teesani waan diqo. Maafi hasooftani, Nu qit'a inqamnu jettani?" 
Matthew16:9 Ammalle inhubanne? Qit'a shanaani ka nami kunki shani nyaate inqaabatani? Ammalle dadu hagami ta hambaa guurtani? 
Matthew16:10 Yokhaani qit'a torbaani ka nami kunki afuri nyaate inqaabatani? Ammalle dadu hagani ta hambaa guurtani? 
Matthew16:11 Akami inhubanne re aka anini waan qit'a dubbachuti injirre? Bukho Farisayootiifi ta Sadukayo eegad'a. 
Matthew16:12 Jennaani aka inni bukho qit'a ta Farisayootiifi ta Sadukayo imbaaniini, ammo barsiisa Farisayootiifi ta Sadukayo eegad'a jed'eeni hubatani." 
Matthew16:13 Duuba Yesoni lafa Kaisaria Filipi d'umnaani, jara isaa gaafate waan jed'eeni, Biyyiti, Ilmi Namatiini eennu jetti?" 
Matthew16:14 Worri waan jed'eeni, Hagi toko, Yohana nama batisu jed'a, ka gari, Eliya jed'a, ka gari, Yeremia yokhaani raaga duri toko jed'a." 
Matthew16:15 Yesoni waan worraani jed'e, Ammo isani eennu naani jettani?" 
Matthew16:16 Simoni Petroni waan jed'eeni, Atini Kristo, Ilma Waaqa jiruuti." 
Matthew16:17 Yesoni waan jed'eeni, Ayyaani keti, Simoni, ilma Yona. Nafafi d'iigi waan kana siti imullimne, ammo Abba kiyya ka gubba jiruti siti mullise." 
Matthew16:18 Anini siti hima: Maqaani ke Petro yokhaani d'akha, d'akha kana gubbati anini gumi tiyya ijaara. Dooti dandeete jabeenna isii indabsattu." 
Matthew16:19 Fura Finna gubba siti kenna; waan atini lafa tana keesati didde gubbaleti didani, waan atini lafati ee jette gubbaleti ee jed'ani." 
Matthew16:20 Jennaani Yesoni jara ergattu isaa ch'ufati seere, Aka anini Kristo nama tokoleti inhimina jed'eeni." 
Matthew16:21 Eegi suni Yesoni diideese jara ufiti hime waan jed'eeni, Anini Yerusalemu d'aqu male. Harka jaaroletiifi qaalole gugurdotiifi jara Seera beekhutiini gaargala. Ammalle na ijeesani, guyya sadeeso kau male." 
Matthew16:22 Duuba Petroni kobati yaame waan jed'eeni, Waaqi si didinna, Aabbo. Wonti kuni tahu himmalle." 
Matthew16:23 Ammo Yesoni garagale waan jed'eeni, Na biraa deemi, Sheet'ana; atini na gufachiifta, heregi kanke ka nama male ka Waaqatiiniti." 
Matthew16:24 Jennaani Yesoni waan jara ufitiini jed'e, Yo nami tokoleeni na gula deemu fed'e ha ufi mormate, maskali ufi baate na gula deemuti." 
Matthew16:25 Wonti akanatiifi nami jireenna ufi baasu fed'u ch'ufti ind'aba; ammo nami jireenna ufi naa jed'e balleesu inargata. 
Matthew16:26 Yo waan lafa ch'ufa argatani ammo jireenna ufii d'abani, maani namaa baati? Nami maani dandae gati jireenna ufiti baasa?" 
Matthew16:27 Ilmi Nama malaika ufi woliini guddinna Abbaatiini d'ufa, duuba nama ch'ufa huji isaa gula waan isaa male kennaafi." 
Matthew16:28 D'uguma, waan anini isaniini jed'u, Jara arma ejaanju kana keesa nama haga Ilmi Nama guddinna ufitiini d'ufuti indooneti jira." 
Matthew17:1 Eegi guyya jaa Yesoni Petrofi Yohanafi oboleesa isaa Yakobo yaame, gaara d'eera toko koba korsiise." 
Matthew17:2 Worra durati jijirame, fuuli isaa aka adu ifse, woyaani isaa aka ifsa adaatte." 
Matthew17:3 Jennaani Musafi Eliyaani worrati mullatani Yeso woliini hasaani. 
Matthew17:4 Petroni waan Yesoni jed'e, Aabbo guddo dansa aki nu arma jiru. Yo atini feete, hoosa sadi armati jaara; toko keeti tokoleeni ka Musati kaleeni ka Eliyati." 
Matthew17:5 Ato inni dubbatu, dumansi adiini toko worrati golle, qonqooni dumansa keesa waan jette, Kunini Ilma kiyya ka anini jaalad'u, ka na gammachiisu, dubbi isaa ch'aqasa jette." 
Matthew17:6 Jari isaa qonqo tana d'ageennaani guddo sodaate fuula lafati deefate jige. 
Matthew17:7 Ammo Yesoni d'ufe, worra tuqe waan jed'eeni, Kakaa, insodaatiina!" 
Matthew17:8 Mata olfud'atani jennaani Yeso ch'alla argani. 
Matthew17:9 Ato gaara ira gadi buanu, Yesoni, Waan argitani kana nama tokoleti inhimina haga Ilmi Nama duisa keesaa kauti worraani jed'e." 
Matthew17:10 Jennaani jari isa gaafate waan jed'eeni, Jari Seera beekhu maafi Eliyaani isa durati d'ufu male jed'a?" 
Matthew17:11 Yesoni waan worraani jed'e, D'uguma, qaraa fiit'e Eliyati d'ufe waan ch'ufa durati mid'aasa." 
Matthew17:12 Ammo waan anini isaniini jed'u, Eliyaani arra kale ind'ufiini, ammo nami isa imbeenne; tanaafi waan fed'ani isa tolchani. Akasuma Ilmi Namaleeni harka worrati gaargala." 
Matthew17:13 Jennaani worri aka Yesoni waan Yohana nama batisu dubbatu hubate. 
Matthew17:14 Biyyaani baanaani, namichi toko isati d'ufe, durati jilbifate" 
Matthew17:15 waan jed'eeni, Aabbo, gurba kiyyaa nahi, inni gagabdu qaba, guddo isa garagalchiti. Hojja ch'ufa ibida keesati jiga yokhaani bisaani keesati jiga." 
Matthew17:16 Jara keetiitini d'ufeeni jennaani fayyisu dad'abani. 
Matthew17:17 Yesoni waan jed'eeni, Ee, worra d'ugefacha inqamne, ka woma imbeenne, haga yoomi anini isani woliini tau male? Haga yoomi obsa? Garana natiini koota." 
Matthew17:18 Yesoni isaani lole, jinniini keesaa baate, gurbaani hojuma suni fayye." 
Matthew17:19 Jennaani jari Yeso kobati isati d'ufe waan jed'eeni, Nu maanifi jinni suni baasu dad'amne?" 
Matthew17:20 Yesoni waan worraani jed'e, Maro isani d'ugefacha diqo qabdaniifi. D'uguma, waan anini isaniini jed'u, Yo d'ugefacha diqo haga guma dambi qabaattani, gaara kanaani, Arma buqai, fulla d'ibi deemi, yo jettani, imbuqaa; wonti isani dabsata injirtu. [" 
Matthew17:21 Ammo kad'achaafi ufi agabsiti ch'allati jinni akana tana baasa, wonti d'ibiini dandeete imbaaftu.]" 
Matthew17:22 Jari isaa ch'ufti Galilayati wolti d'umnaani Yesoni waan worraani jed'e, Ilma Nama harka nyaapati, kennani," 
Matthew17:23 isa ijeesani, ammo guyya sadeeso kaa. Duuba jari guddo lalefate." 
Matthew17:24 Kapernaumu d'umnaani worri gibira Mana Waaqa guuru gara Petro d'ufe waan jed'eeni, Qaallichi keesani gibira imbaasu?" 
Matthew17:25 Petroni, Imbaasa jed'eeni. Akuma Petroni mana seeneeni, Yesoni qara waan jed'eeni, Simoni, atini maani seeta? Hayyooti lafa gibirafi damoosa eennu iraa guurti? Abbooti lafa mo nama d'ibi iraa guurti?" 
Matthew17:26 Petroni, Nama d'ibi iraa guurti jed'eeni. Yesoni waan jed'eeni, Yo akasi taate, abbootiini lafa woma imbaaftu." 
Matthew17:27 Yo taatele, nu worra kana dalansiisu imfeenu. Gara galaana, d'aqi, t'urura keesa buusi, duuba qurt'umi qara qabdu fuud'i, afaani isii gargari qabi, beese keesati argatta. Fuud'i, anaafi sile baasi." 
Matthew18:1 Hojja suni jari Yesoti d'ufe waan jed'eeni, Eennuti Finna gubba keesa nama ch'ufa ira jira?" 
Matthew18:2 Yesoni gurba diqa toko yaame, jiddu worra teesise" 
Matthew18:3 waan jed'e, Ilaala, yo jijiramtani aka ijoolle didiqo tana taatani male, Finna gubba diqole inargattani." 
Matthew18:4 Nama aka daima kana ufi diqeesuti Finna gubba keesati nama ch'ufa ira gudda. 
Matthew18:5 Nami maro maqa kiyyatiifi daima akana fud'atu ch'ufti na fud'ata. 
Matthew18:6 Ammo nama ijoolle didiqo akana tana wollaalchise, ira dansa yo sila d'akha daakhu morma isati hid'ani, d'immu galaana keesa buusani." 
Matthew18:7 Gaargala lafati, maro wonti nama gufachiisa hedduuni jirtuufi. Wonti akana kunini hojja ch'ufa injirti, ammo gaargala worra waan kanaani d'ufeeti." 
Matthew18:8 Yo harki kanke yokhaani miili kanke si wollaalchise, ufira kuti gati! Ira dansa yo hokolte, yokhaani naafatte jireenni argatte, fulla harka lamafi miila lamaani ibida hegeri keesa si buusani." 
Matthew18:9 Yo ilti tante si wollaalchifte, ufi keesaa baasi gati! Ira dansa yo ila tokooni jireenni argatte, fulla ila lamaani ibida keesa gadi si gatani." 
Matthew18:10 Eegad'a, aka ijoolle didiqo tana tokole intufanne. Anini isaniti hima, malaikaani isii gubbati hojja ch'ufa fuula Abba kiyya dura ejaanjiti. [" 
Matthew18:11 Wonti akanatiifi Ilmi Nama ka bade baasu d'ufe.] 
Matthew18:12 Maani seetani? Nami hooliye d'ibba toko qabu, yo toko bade, sagaltami sagalaani taani d'eedati lakise, tokocha bade kaani barbaadu ind'aqu?" 
Matthew18:13 Duuba yo argate, d'uguma, waan anini isaaniini jed'u, inni hooliye sagaltami sagalaani ta taka imbadiini taani ira, hoola tokocha bade kanaafi gammada." 
Matthew18:14 Akasuma fed'i Abba keesani ka gubbati, aka ijoolle didiqo tana keesa tokoleeni imbanne." 
Matthew18:15 Yo oboleesi kanke siti dabe, kobati yaami gorsi. Yo inni dubbi tante d'agaye, atini ya oboleesa keti waan guddo taate." 
Matthew18:16 Ammo yo inni si d'agayu d'ibaate, nama toko lama yaami, aka dubbini ch'ufti d'uga nama lama sadiini taatu." 
Matthew18:17 Yo inni dubbi worra d'agayu d'ibaate gumiti himi; ammalle yo inni gumi Waaqa ch'aqasu dide, nyaapafi aka nama damoosa guuruti heregi." 
Matthew18:18 Ilaala, waan anini isaniini jed'u, Waan isani lafa tana keesati diddani, gubbaleti ya didani; ammalle waan isani lafati ee jettani gubbaleti ya ee jed'ani." 
Matthew18:19 Ammalle waan anini isaniini jed'u, Yo isani nami lama lafa tana irati wold'at'ani, Abbaani kiyya ka gubba waan isani kad'attani isanii kenna." 
Matthew18:20 Yo nami lamaa sadi wolwoldae maqa kiyyaani kad'atu, anini jiddu worra jira." 
Matthew18:21 Petroni d'ufe waan jed'eeni, Aabbo, yo oboleesi kiyya nati dabe, anini maro hagami araaramaafi? Maro torba?" 
Matthew18:22 Yesoni waan jed'eeni, Anini maro torba siini injed'u, ammo torba maro torbaatama." 
Matthew18:23 Finni gubba hayyu toko fakaata, ka henna garboole ufi hobaafachu fed'e." 
Matthew18:24 Herennaani namicha toko ka gati isaa hori muumme inqamne qabu isaatiini d'ufani. 
Matthew18:25 Inni baasu dad'amnaani, hayyuuni kaani aka isaafi waan inni qabu ch'ufa, niiti isaatiifi ijoolle isaale gurgurani mure, aka gati suni baasani." 
Matthew18:26 Garbichi kaani miila abba ufi durati jige waan jed'eeni, Aabbo kiyya na nahi, waan ch'ufa sii baasa, diqo na eegi." 
Matthew18:27 Abbaani kaani naheefi gati ch'ufa lakisefi, Beeni deemi jed'eeni." 
Matthew18:28 Nami kaani achii deemnaani, garbicha wahela isaa toko ka gati isaa diqo toko qabu arge, hud'e waan jed'eeni, Gati tiyya naa baasi." 
Matthew18:29 Waheli isaa kaani miilati jige, kad'ate waan jed'eeni, Na nahi, sii baasa, diqo na eegi jed'eeni." 
Matthew18:30 Ammo inni dide, hid'aansa keesa isa buuse, haga inni gati baasuuti." 
Matthew18:31 Garbichi d'ibiini waan kana arginaani guddo dalane, d'aqe abbaati hime." 
Matthew18:32 Abbaani kaani garbicha kaani yaame: Atini garbicha woma imbaane, anini gati tiyya ta atini qabdu ch'ufa si lakise, maro atini na kad'attefi." 
Matthew18:33 Garbicha wahela keti sule nahu malte, akuma anini sii nahe." 
Matthew18:34 Abbaani guddo dalane, garbicha kaani mana hid'aansa keesa buuse, haga inni gati ch'ufa baasuuti." 
Matthew18:35 Duuba Yesoni waan jed'e, Abbaani kiyya ka gubbaleeni akasuma isani tolcha, yo isani ch'ufti garaa keesani keesati oboleyaani teesani inaraaramne." 
Matthew19:1 Dubbi tana buufannaani, Yesoni Galilaya keesaa bahe, lafa Yudea ta moga galaana Yordani d'aqe." 
Matthew19:2 Gumiini guddooni isa gula yaate, achiti inni worra fayyise." 
Matthew19:3 Farisayooni gari isati d'ufte waan jetteeni, Yo nami niiti ufi lakise fullaa mo fullaaniti?" 
Matthew19:4 Yesoni waan jed'eeni, Isani t'aafi keesati insoomne? Qaraa fiit'e Waaqi d'iirafi uwa uume" 
Matthew19:5 waan jed'e, Maro waan kanatifi d'iirti abbaafi haad'a ufi lakifte niiti ufitiini taka taati, worri lamaani takaa taha." 
Matthew19:6 Worri amma nama lamaaniti, ammo taka quba ch'iteeti. Waan Waaqi takaa tolche nami gargari baasu himmalle." 
Matthew19:7 Farisayooni waan jetteeni, Musani maafi, Nami tatabe lakisiti niiti ufiti kenne dandae niiti ufi illakisa jed'e re?" 
Matthew19:8 Inni waan worraani jed'e, Maro jabeenna mata keesanitiifi Musani aka lakisani ee jed'e; ammo gaafa uumama akanaaniti." 
Matthew19:9 Waan anini isaniini jed'u, Yo nami niiti ufi ta d'iira d'ibi imbaratiini lakise nad'eeni d'ibi fuud'e, ya seera Waaqa ch'abse." 
Matthew19:10 Jari isaa waan isaani jed'e, Yo wonti d'iirsafi niitiyu akana taate, ira dansa yo nami nad'eeni imfuune." 
Matthew19:11 Yesoni waan jed'eeni, Nami ch'ufti dandae barsiisa tana gula indeemu, ammo isiini ta worra Waaqi kenneefi ch'alla." 
Matthew19:12 Wonti nami nad'eeni imfuuneefi hedduti jira: hagi gari maro akasuma d'alateefi; ka gari maro nami akasi worra tolcheefi; ka gari maro Finna gubbatiifi nad'eeni imfuune. Nami dandau ha barsiisa tana fud'atuuti. 
Matthew19:13 Nami gari ijoolle didiqo Yesoti d'ufeeni, aka inni harka ira kaye kad'atuufi. Ammo jari isaa worra d'owe." 
Matthew19:14 Yesoni waan jed'e, Ijoolleeni ha nati d'uftuuti, ind'owiina, Finni gubba ka nama akana kana." 
Matthew19:15 Harka ijoolle ira kaye duuba kae iti d'aabate. 
Matthew19:16 Gaafa toko, namichi toko Yesoti d'ufe waan jed'e, Aabbo, anini waan dansa akami tolchu male aka jireenna hegeri argad'u?" 
Matthew19:17 Yesoni waan jed'eeni, Waan dansaa maafi na gaafatta? Nami dansaani toko ch'alla. Yo jireenna argachu feete, seera ch'ufa guuti." 
Matthew19:18 Namichi kaani waan jed'eeni, Seera kami? Yesoni waan jed'eeni, Inijeesiini d'iirafi nad'eeni wolbarate gaarayu wolintolfatini; inhatiini; inkiyyibiini;" 
Matthew19:19 abbeetiifi haateti saalfad'u oboleesa kanke aka ufi jaalatu jaalad'u. 
Matthew19:20 Namichi kaani, Anini seera kana ch'ufa ya guute; wonti d'ibiini anini tolchu male maani? jed'eeni." 
Matthew19:21 Yesoni waan jed'eeni, Yo d'uguma qit'e tahu feete, waan qabdu ch'ufa gurguri, hiyyeeyi qoodi, duuba durooma gubba argatta, kooti na gula deemi." 
Matthew19:22 Namichi kaani waan kana d'agaye jennaani aka hama lalefate kae iti d'aabate, waan inni guddo dureesatiifi." 
Matthew19:23 Yesoni waan jara ufitiini jed'e, Waan anini jed'u, Guddo jabaatti, aka dureeyiini Finna gubba argattu." 
Matthew19:24 Ammalle isaniti hima, Ira laaftu aka gaali qaa lime seenu, fulla dureeyiini Finna Waaqa argattu." 
Matthew19:25 Jari isaa waan kana d'ageennaani guddo mame waan jed'e, Eentu dandae baafama re?" 
Matthew19:26 Yesoni worra ilaale waan jed'eeni, Nami indandau, ammo Waaqi waan tokole indad'abu." 
Matthew19:27 Petroni waan jed'e, Ilaali, nu ya waan ch'ufa lakimne si gula yaane, maani arganna?" 
Matthew19:28 Yesoni waan worraani jed'e, Waan anini isaniti himu, Gaafa Ilmi Nama barch'uma guddinna ufi ira tau, isaniini kud'ani lamaani kunileeni barch'uma guddinna ira teteetani, dubbi gosa kud'ani lama ta Israeli ch'ufa qortani." 
Matthew19:29 Ammalle nami maneenifi oboleesafi oboleetifi, abbaafi haad'afi, ilmaaniifi oobru, maro tiyyaafi lakise, maro d'ibba toko deebisaniifi, jireenna hegerile argata." 
Matthew19:30 Ammo nami hedduuni ka amma qara ka eege taha, ka amma eege ka qara taha." 
Matthew20:1 Finni gubba aka abba oobru zabibu jira, ka ganamaani lafaa kae, nama huji qoru barbaadu." 
Matthew20:2 Aka beese huji guyya toko guyyaati kennuufi wold'aqani, oobru zabibuti worra erge." 
Matthew20:3 Saa sadi fulla gabaya d'annaani, nama huji inqamne arge" 
Matthew20:4 waan jed'eeni, D'aqa, oobru tiyya ta zabibu keesa hojad'a, hori isanii baasa. Worri kae yae." 
Matthew20:5 Saa jaafi sagalile akasuma tolche. 
Matthew20:6 Saa kud'ani tokole gabaya d'annaani nama d'ibi huji inqamne arge waan jed'eeni, Isani guyya kana ch'ufa maanifi arma ejaanjitani, ka woma inhojanne?" 
Matthew20:7 Worri waan jed'eeni, Nami tokoleeni huji nu inqorre. Inni waan jed'eeni, Yoosi isanileeni d'aqa, oobru tiyya keesa hojad'a." 
Matthew20:8 Lafti galgaloomnaani abbaani oobru zabibu waan gudda hojattutiini jed'e, Worra hujiti hori baasi, ka eegitiini iti keyad'u, haga ka qara." 
Matthew20:9 Worri saa kud'ani toko qorani kaani d'umnaani beese huji guyya toko argate. 
Matthew20:10 Worri qara ganamaani qorani kaani d'umnaani, waan hagasi ira argatani ufi sehani, ammo beesuma suni ch'alla argatani." 
Matthew20:11 Hori fud'atani tuffatani abbaati gungumani 
Matthew20:12 waan jed'ani, Worri eege qorani kunini diquma toko hojate, ammo nu guyya kana ch'ufa adu tana keesa oolle, duuba atini waanuma worraa kennite nule kennita!" 
Matthew20:13 Abbaani oobru waan jara suni nama tokooni jed'e, Abbo, ch'aqasi, anini si indabsine; atini aka hojatte beese huji guyya toko argattu ee jetteeniti?" 
Matthew20:14 Duuba hori kanke fud'ad'u, nagayaani gali. Anini waanuma sii kenne worra eege qorani kaale kennu fed'a." 
Matthew20:15 Anini hori kiyya waan fed'u intolchu? Yokhaani waan anini arja taheefi na qot'ifta? 
Matthew20:16 Yesoni waan jed'e, Nami qara ka eege taha, ammo ka eege ka qara taha." 
Matthew20:17 Ato Yerusalemu deemu jiru, Yesoni jara ufi kud'ani lamaani kara keesa kobati yaame waan jed'eeni," 
Matthew20:18 Ch'aqasa, nu Yerusalemu yau jirra, achiti Ilma Nama harka qaalole gugurdotiifi ka worra Seera beekhuti kennani. Worri dua iti mure," 
Matthew20:19 harka gosa d'ibiti kenna, isa goyeesani, lichooni d'aanani, mukhati fannisani, ammo guyya sadeeso isa kaasani." 
Matthew20:20 Haati ijoolle Zebedayo ilmaani ufitiini Yesoti d'ufte, durati gadi jette wo kad'atte." 
Matthew20:21 Yesoni waan jed'eeni, Maani feeta? Isiini waan jette, Aka ilmaani tiyya tuni lamaani, Finna kanke keesati, harka kanke ka mirgatiifi ka bitale teteetu fed'a." 
Matthew20:22 Yesoni waan worraani jed'e, Isani waan kad'attani imbeetani. Isani dandeetani mudunu anini keesa d'ugu ind'uddaniini? Indandeenna jed'aniini." 
Matthew20:23 Inni waan jed'eeni, D'uguma mudunu tiyya keesaa d'uddani, ammo anini jabeenna nama harka kiyya mirgafi bitaachaani tau fohad'u inqabu. Fullaani tunini tama worra Aabbooni kurfeeseefi." 
Matthew20:24 Jari kud'annaani kaani waan kana d'ageennaani oboleyaani taani lamaanti dalane.
