Matthew20:25 Ammo Yesoni worra ch'ufa wolti yaame waan jed'eeni, isani imbeetani, aka jari gugurdaani gosa d'ibitiifi jari lafa fidu jabeenna qabu." 
Matthew20:26 Ammo isani akasiiniti. Yo nami toko gudda tahu fed'e, ha hojattu nama ch'ufa tahuuti." 
Matthew20:27 Ammalle nami ka qara tahu fed'u tisse teesani tahuuti — 
Matthew20:28 akuma Ilmi Nama, aka nami isa hojattufi ind'ufiini, ammo aka namaa hojate, jireenna ufi maro nama heddutiifi baasu d'ufe." 
Matthew20:29 Ato worri Yeriko keesaa bahu jiru, gumiini guddooni Yeso gula yaate." 
Matthew20:30 Jari ballaani lamaani toko ka d'aatu kara tatau, aka Yesoni kara suni gula deemu d'ageennaani iyani waan jed'ani, Ilma Daudi, nuu nahi." 
Matthew20:31 Gumiini worra d'owarte, Ch'allisa worraani jette." 
Matthew20:32 Ammo Yesoni waan worraani jed'e, Ana maani isani tolchu feetani?" 
Matthew20:33 Worri waan jed'eeni, Sii ila nuu bantu feena!" 
Matthew20:34 Yesoni worraa nahe, ila worraa tuqe, hojuma suni lafa argani isa gula yaani." 
Matthew21:1 Yerusalemuti d'iaannaani, Bethfage fulla Gaara Ejersa jed'ani d'ufani. Achiti Yesoni d'aamsa kanaani jara ufi lama erge:" 
Matthew21:2 Olla nu dura suni d'aqa, harre bukhura isii woliini mukhati hid'ani gartani. Hiikha, natiini koota jed'e." 
Matthew21:3 Yo nami tokoleeni woi jed'e, waan jettaniini, Motichati fed'a jed'a, inni hurrise erga." 
Matthew21:4 Tunini aka wonti raagi jed'e guutamtu: 
Matthew21:5 Waan dira Sionitini jettu: Hayyuuni kanke siti d'ufu jira, inni nama laana, harre yaabata, inni bukhura harre yaabata." 
Matthew21:6 Jari suni deeme waan Yesoni jed'eeni tolche," 
Matthew21:7 harrefi bukhura isitiini d'ufani, woya ufi rara tolchani, Yesoni yaabate." 
Matthew21:8 Gumiini guddooni woya ufi kara keesa afte, nami gari dame mukhaa ch'ire lafa afe." 
Matthew21:9 Gumiini Yeso dura yaatufi ta duuba yaatu iyite waan jette, Ilmi Daudi ha guddifamu. Ka maqa Aabbootiini d'ufu ha eebifamu! Waaqa ha faarsani jed'ani!" 
Matthew21:10 Yesoni Yerusalemu seennaani diri ch'ufti wolti kae. Kuni eennu? jed'ani. 
Matthew21:11 Gumiini taani waan jette, Inni raaga Yeso jed'ani, ka Nazareti Galilaya keesaa d'ufu." 
Matthew21:12 Yesoni Mana Waaqa olseene, worra keesati woi bitatufi ka gurguratu had'e, mesa worra hori jijirutiifi barch'uma worra sabaliisa gurguru ch'ufa garagalche" 
Matthew21:13 waan jed'eeni, T'aafi keesati waan Waaqi jed'e, Mana kiyya mana kad'acha jed'aniini, ammo isani goda hattu tolchitani." 
Matthew21:14 Ballafi naafi ch'ufti Mana Waaqa keesati isati d'ufe, inni worra fayyise." 
Matthew21:15 Qaalole gugurdofi jari Seera beekhu waan dansaa inni tolcheefi ijoolle Mana Waaqa keesati iyite, Ilmi Daudi ha guddifamu jettu d'ageennaani dalanani." 
Matthew21:16 Worri waan Yesoni jed'e, Waan worri jed'u d'ageeta? Ind'agaya jed'e. T'aafi keesa taka insoomne? Isani ya ijoolleefi daima aka faaru d'uga baaftu barsiiftani." 
Matthew21:17 Yesoni worra biraa deeme, Bethania d'aqe achi bule." 
Matthew21:18 Diirama lameeso, ato dira d'aqu jiru, Yesoni beelae." 
Matthew21:19 Oda toko d'aatu karaati arge, jennaani d'aqe ammo baala male woma iraa d'abe waan jed'eeni, Iti deebite mid'aani ind'aliini. Hojuma suni mukhi kaani gogoge." 
Matthew21:20 Jari isaa waan kana arge jennaani mame, Odaani eesa akana hurrise gogoge? jed'ani wolgaafatani." 
Matthew21:21 Yesoni waan jed'eeni, D'uguma, waan anini isaniini jed'u, Yo isani d'ugefattani, woljaji keesa injirre, isani dandeetani waan anini mukha oda kana tolche tolchitani. Tana ch'allaleniti, ammo yo gaara kanaleeni, Kai, galaana keesa bui jettani, duuba intaati." 
Matthew21:22 Yo d'ugefattani waan kad'attani ch'ufa inargattani. 
Matthew21:23 Yesoni Mana Waaqa olseene; ato nama barsiisu, qaalole gugurdofi jari gugurdaani Yahudi isati d'ufani waan jed'aniini, Atini jabeenna kamiini waan kana tolchita? Eentu jabeenna kana sii kenne?" 
Matthew21:24 Yesoni waan jed'eeni, Anileeni gaafi toko isani gaafad'a; yo isani naa deebiftani, anileeni jabeenna waan kana tolchuuni isaniti hima." 
Matthew21:25 Batisooni Yohana eesaa d'ufte? Waaqa biraa d'ufte mo nama biraa d'ufte? Worri wolmorme waan jed'e, Maani jenna? Yo nu Waaqa biraa d'ufte jenne, inni waan nuuni jed'u, Maafi Yohana ind'ugefatiina re?" 
Matthew21:26 Ammo yo nu nama biraa d'ufte jenne, nu biyya sodaanna, waan nami ch'ufti Yohana raaga sehuufi." 
Matthew21:27 Tanaafi worri waan Yesoni jed'e, Nu imbeennu. Inni waan worraani jed'e, Yoosi, anileeni jabeenna waan kanaani tolchu isaniti inhimu." 
Matthew21:28 Isani maani seetani? Nama ilmaani lama qabuti jira. Inni gara angafa d'aqe waan jed'eeni, Oobru zabibu arra d'aqi keesa hojad'u." 
Matthew21:29 Gurbaani kaani, Ani indeemu jed'eeni; ammo eege herega ufi jijirate kae deeme." 
Matthew21:30 Abbaani gara ilma mand'icha d'aqe akasuma jed'eeni. Aabbo, hayye ind'aqa jed'e, ammo d'aqu dide." 
Matthew21:31 Eentu fed'i abba ufi guute? Angafa jed'aniini. Yesoni waan jed'e, Waan anini isaniti himu, sharmut'afi worri damoosa guuru isani durati Finna Waaqa argata." 
Matthew21:32 Yohanani nama batisu d'ufe kara d'uga isani agarsiise, ammo isani d'ugefachu diddani; tatule worra damoosa guurufi sharmut'ileeni isa d'ugefatte. Eegi waan kana gartanile, qalbi teesani garagalchitani isa d'ugefachu diddani." 
Matthew21:33 Mammaasa kana ch'aqasa. Abba oobru toko jira ka oobru zabibu oobrate, dallaani marse, fulla daad'i iti ch'ach'arasanifi doofi oobru jaarate. Oobru ufi harka namati lakise, imaltu d'aqe." 
Matthew21:34 Yoi zabibu murani geennaani, inni tissele ufi erge, aka qooda mid'aani argatu." 
Matthew21:35 Jari oobru qorqoratu kaani tisse toko d'aane, toko ijeese, toko mata d'od'oose." 
Matthew21:36 Ammalle abbaani oobru kaani tissele d'ibi erge, ta haga qara ira jirtu, ammalle jari oobru qorqoratu kaani akasuma worra tolche." 
Matthew21:37 Muumme qit'issu, ilma ufi erge, Ilma kiyya inuma sodaatani jed'e." 
Matthew21:38 Ammo worri oobru qorqoratu kaani ilma arginaani waan woliini jed'e, Ilmi abba oobru kana, koota inijeemna; duuba d'aala ch'ufa imfud'anna." 
Matthew21:39 Duuba isa qabani, oobru keesaa baasani ijeesani." 
Matthew21:40 Yesoni waan jed'eeni, Abbaani oobru, yo d'ufu, maani worra oobru qorqoratu kana tolcha seetani?" 
Matthew21:41 Worri waan jed'eeni, Inni d'uguma worra daba suni fit'eti, oobru nama d'ibiti kenna, ka qooda mid'aani yo hojjaani geete, isaa kennu." 
Matthew21:42 Yesoni waan worraani jed'e, Isani waan t'aafiini jettu taka insoomne? D'akhachi ijaartuuni tuffatte dide ya d'akha ch'ufa ira jabaa tahe. Aabbooti waan kana tolche, ila teenna durati wonti kuni waan mamaati!" 
Matthew21:43 Tanaafi anini isaniti hima, Finna Waaqa isani iraa fuud'ani worra mid'aani dansa baasuuti kennani. [" 
Matthew21:44 Nami d'akha kana gubbati jigu imbututa; yo d'akhaani nama gubba buele nama butucha.] 
Matthew21:45 Qaalole gugurdofi Farisayooni mammaasa Yeso d'ageennaani, aka inni waan worra dubbatu hubatani;" 
Matthew21:46 isa qabu fed'ani, ammo gumi sodaatani, ta Yeso raaga seete." 
Matthew22:1 Yesoni ammalle mammaasaani biyyati dubbate waan jed'e," 
Matthew22:2 Finni gubba hayyu ilma ufi dubra fuusise," 
Matthew22:3 tissele keessuma yaamtu erge, ammo keessumaani d'ufu didde fakaata." 
Matthew22:4 Tanaafi hayyuuni kaani tissele d'ibi erge waan jed'eeni, Amma mirgoolefi jiboota tiyya yayu qalani, wonti ch'ufti ya kurfoofte, keessumaani jila fuud'a, Koota jed'aani." 
Matthew22:5 Ammo keessumaani ch'ufti jalaa didde; toko oobru ufi d'aqe, tokoleeni daldala ufi d'aqe;" 
Matthew22:6 ta gari tissele guurte d'aante fitt'e. 
Matthew22:7 Hayyuuni guddo dalane, askarti ufi erge, worra nama ijeese suni ch'ufa fit'e dira worrale gube." 
Matthew22:8 Jennaani tissele ufi gadi yaame waan jed'eeni, Jilti tiyya kurfo jirti, ammo worri anini yaame jilaa himmalle." 
Matthew22:9 Kara dira gula yaa, namuma gartani yaama." 
Matthew22:10 Tisseleeni kara gula yaate nama agarte ch'ufa dansaafi hamale yaamte, nami mana fuud'aa guute." 
Matthew22:11 Hayyuuni mana fuud'aa olseene keessuma ilaale; nama toko ka woya fuud'a ufira inqamne arge," 
Matthew22:12 waan jed'eeni, Isii, abbo, atini akami woya fuud'a male arma seente? Ammo namichi kaani waan jed'u d'abe." 
Matthew22:13 Duuba hayyuuni waan tisseleeni jed'e, Harkafi miila wolti hid'a, alati baasa, ha achiti bohe ilkaani qaru." 
Matthew22:14 Wonti akanatiifi nami yaamani heddu, ammo ka fohatani diqa." 
Matthew22:15 Farisayooni yaate aka Yeso afaani fuutu wolmariatte. 
Matthew22:16 Jara worraatiifi jara Herode woliini Yesoti ergani waan jed'ani, Aabbo, nu imbeenna aka atini nama d'uga, atini waan Waaqi nama ira fed'u akuma d'uga barsiifta; waan nami jed'ule iyaaltu." 
Matthew22:17 Me, herega kanke nuti himi. Aki gibira hayyu Rumiti baasani fullaa mo fullaaniti?" 
Matthew22:18 Yesoni ch'ubbu worra beennaani waan jed'e, Isani kiyyibdoole! Maanifu afaani na fuud'u feetani?" 
Matthew22:19 Shilingi toko na agarsiisa jed'e. Worri shilingi toko agarsiise 
Matthew22:20 jennaani inni waan jed'e, Matafi maqa eennu irati t'aafani?" 
Matthew22:21 Ka hayyu Kaisari jed'ani. Jennaani Yesoni waan jed'eeni, Yoosi hayyu waan isaa male baasa, Waaqale waan maleefi baasa." 
Matthew22:22 Waan kana d'ageennaani mamani, biraa yaani iti d'aabatani." 
Matthew22:23 Guyyuma suni Sadukayoni gari fulla Yeso d'ufte. (Sadukayoni worra, Duisa keesaa kaisi injiru jed'u.)" 
Matthew22:24 Duuba isiini waan jette, Aabbo, waan Musani barsiise, Yo nami ilmaani male due, oboleesi isaa niiti isaa fuud'e, oboleesa ufiti ilmaani d'alu male jed'e." 
Matthew22:25 Duuba oboleyaani torbaati ta woliini teetu jira, angafi dubra fuud'e ilme male due, Niiti taani oboleesi lameeso d'aale," 
Matthew22:26 innileeni akasuma ilma male due ka sadeesoleeni isi fuud'e akasuma due, duuba eege oboleyaani hafte taaleni ch'ufti akasuma raawate." 
Matthew22:27 Eege niitiini taleeni doote. 
Matthew22:28 Gaafa worra due kaasani isiini niiti eennu taati? Worri torbaanu yayu isii fuud'e. 
Matthew22:29 Yesoni waan worraani jed'e, Isani guddo wollaaltani, maro isani T'aafifi jabeenna Waaqa imbeenneefi." 
Matthew22:30 Worri due, yo kaasani, aka malaika Waaqa jira, d'iirafi nad'eeni wolimfuud'ani." 
Matthew22:31 Ammo, waan kaisa worra due, waan Waaqi isaniini jed'e insoomne? Inni waan jed'e," 
Matthew22:32 Anini Waaqa Abrahamutiifi Waaqa Isaaqotiifi Waaqa Yakoboti. Akasi jechuuni, inni Waaqa worra jiruuti, ka worra duetiiniti." 
Matthew22:33 Gumiini waan kana d'ageennaani guddo waan barsiisa isaa mamte. 
Matthew22:34 Farisayooni aka Yesoni Sadukayo ch'allisiise d'ageennaani wolti d'ufte," 
Matthew22:35 jennaani qaallichi Seera toko aka isa ilaalatu wo isa gaafate waan jed'e," 
Matthew22:36 Seeri Seera ch'ufa ira jaba kami kana? 
Matthew22:37 Yesoni waan jed'e, Aabbo Waaqa kanke jaalad'u, garaa kanke ch'ufaani, lubbu tante ch'ufaani, qalbi tante ch'ufaani." 
Matthew22:38 Seeri ch'ufa ira jaba ka qara kana. 
Matthew22:39 Ka lameesotiini wolfakaata: Nama ch'ufa aka ufi jaalatu jaalad'u. 
Matthew22:40 Seera Musatiifi barsiisani raaga ch'ufti seera kana lamaani ch'allaani guutamti. 
Matthew22:41 Farisayooni wolwoldeennaani, Yesoni waan jed'eeni," 
Matthew22:42 Waan Kristo maani hereddani? Inni ilma eennu? Inni ilma Daudi jed'aniini. 
Matthew22:43 Yesoni waan jed'e, Daudini, Lubbu Waaqa gula, maafi Aabbo isaani jed'e re? Wonti akanatiifi Daudini waan jed'e," 
Matthew22:44 Aabbooni waan Abba kiyyaani jed'e: Mirga kiyya tai, haga anini nyaapa kanke miila kanke jalati deebisuti." 
Matthew22:45 Yo Daudini Aabbo isaani jed'e, Kristoni akami ilma Daudi taha re?" 
Matthew22:46 Nami tokoleeni deebisu dad'abe, haga guyya suniti asi, nami tokoleeni woma isa gaafachu sodaate." 
Matthew23:1 Yesoni gumifi jara ufitiini hasae waan jed'e," 
Matthew23:2 Jara Seera beekhufi Farisayooni waan Seera Musa himti. 
Matthew23:3 Tanaafi waan worri tolcha jed'u ch'ufa tolchu maltani, ammo waan worri tolchu intolchiina, waan worri waan nama barsiisu ufii inguunneefi." 
Matthew23:4 Seera jajaba mid'aasani qach'eera namati hid'ani, ammo ufii baa ulfo suni qubaleeni tuqu imfed'ani." 
Matthew23:5 Waan ch'ufa aka nami worra argu tolchani. Qud'aami worri addafi harkati hid'atu waan gugurda, handaari woya worraleeni waan d'ed'eera." 
Matthew23:6 Fulla jilati fulla dadansa fed'ani, maneeni Waaqa iti kad'atani keesale barch'uma dadansa fed'ani." 
Matthew23:7 Aka nami fulla gabayati nagaya worra fuud'u fed'ani, nama Rabbi worraani jed'u fed'ani." 
Matthew23:8 Ammo Rabbi nami isaniini jechu himmalle, wonti akanatiifi isaniini ch'ufti oboleyaani, barsiiftu toko ch'alla qabdani." 
Matthew23:9 Ammalle nama lafa tana keesa jiru tokoleeni Aabbo injed'ina; wonti akanatiifi isani Abba toko ch'alla qabdani, ka gubba jiru." 
Matthew23:10 Yokhaani Moticha nami isaniini jechu himmalle; wonti akanatiifi motichi keesani Kristo ch'alla. 
Matthew23:11 Nami isani ch'ufa ira gudda ha hojattu teesani tahu. 
Matthew23:12 Nama ufi guddisu indiqeesani, ammo nama ufi diqeesu inguddisani." 
Matthew23:13 Gaargala keesani jara Seera beekhufi Farisayo! Kiyyibdoole! Isani Finna gubba nama duraa ch'uftani, ammo ufile inseentani, yokhaani worra seennu fed'ule d'owartani. [" 
Matthew23:14 Gaargala keesani, isani jara Seera beekhufi Farisayo! Kiyyibdoole! Isani nad'eeni d'iirsi iraa due dabsitani, waan worra hattani, kad'acha teesani kiyyibafi d'eersetani. Maro waan kanatifi nama ch'ufa ira gaargaltani.]" 
Matthew23:15 Gaargala keesani, jara Seera beekhufi Farisayo! Kiyyibdoole! Galaana taakitani, lafa fago yaatani, aka nama toko aada teesani barsiiftani; yo inni barate, maro lama haga keesanile ira ibidaa male!" 
Matthew23:16 Gaargala keesani, balloota nama dura yaatu! Yo nami Mana Waaqatiini kakhate womaniti jettani barsiiftani; ammo yo inni worqi Mana Waaqa keesa jirtuuni kakhate akasi woi jettani barsiiftani." 
Matthew23:17 Isaani daalle ila inqamne! Worqi mo Mana Waaqaati ira jira, ka worqi qulqulleesu?" 
Matthew23:18 Ammalle yo nami waan sorio irati qalanini kakhate, womaniti jettani barsiiftani, ammo yo inni sorio waan sorio irati qalani gubba teetuni kakhate woi jettani." 
Matthew23:19 Isani guddo balla! Sorio mo waan sorio irati qalani ka sorio qulqulleesuti ira jaba? 
Matthew23:20 Tanaafi yo nami waan sorio irati qalanini kakhate, inni waan sorio irati qalaniifi waan gubba jiru ch'ufaani kakhata;" 
Matthew23:21 akasuma yo nami Mana Waaqatiini kakhate, isaafi Waaqa achi tauleeni kakhata;" 
Matthew23:22 ammalle yo nami gubbaani kakhate inni barch'uma Waaqatiifi nama ira tauleeni kakhata. 
Matthew23:23 Gaargala keesani, jara Seera beekhufi Farisayo. Kiyyibdoole! Qooda kud'anneeso ka gurbi urgotiifi waan d'ibi ka sagaleeni urgesanile Waaqa baaftani, ammo barsiisa isa jajabdu ta Seera diddani, ta aka nagayafi nasufi d'ugaa. Waan kana guutu maltani, ato seera d'ibile indinne." 
Matthew23:24 Balloota, nama dura yaatu! Tiite aanani keesaa fud'attani, ammo gaala liqimsitani!" 
Matthew23:25 Gaargala keesani, jara Seera beekhufi Farisayo! Kiyyibdoole! Qorifi mudunu ala d'it'ani, ammo keesa isii hannafi ufi jaalachaani guutani." 
Matthew23:26 Farisayo balloota! Waan mudunu keesa jira d'iqi, duuba alileeni inqulqullaa." 
Matthew23:27 Gaargala keesani, jara Seera beekhufi Farisayo! Kiyyibdoole! Isani aka awaala gubbaa adeesani jirtani, ka alaani guddo mid'aagu, ammo keesi lafefi waan shame qaba." 
Matthew23:28 Akasuma alaani isani dansaa fakaattani, ammo garaani keesani d'arafi daba qaba." 
Matthew23:29 Gaargala keesani, jara Seera beekhufi Farisayo! Kiyyibdoole! Awaala mimid'aaga raagaa tolchitani, waan worra d'ugatiini qaabatani gubbaa jaartani," 
Matthew23:30 waan jettani, Yo nu sila bara ababoota teenna lafa jiraanne, nu aka worraa raagoota inijeemnu jettani." 
Matthew23:31 Isani, Nu ilmaani worra raagoota fit'e jettani ufi d'ugeesitani." 
Matthew23:32 Dura yaa me, waan ababooti teesani qara tolchite hobaasa." 
Matthew23:33 Isani bofafi ilmaani bofaati! Murisa hegeri dandeetani duraa imbaatani. 
Matthew23:34 Tanaafi waan anini isaniti himu: Anini raagootafi worra qalbi qabuufi qaaloota isani erga; ka gari fitt'ani, ka gari mukhati fanniftani, ka gari Maneeni Waaqa iti kad'atani keesati lichooni d'aantani, dira ch'ufa keesaa haatani." 
Matthew23:35 D'iigi worra woma iyakini ch'ufti mata keesani gubba jira, d'iiga Habiliti haga d'iiga Zekaria ilma Barakia, ka isani Mana Waaqatiifi waan sorio irati baasani jiddu lamanti ijeeftani." 
Matthew23:36 Anini isaniti hima, wonti kunini ch'ufti mata d'aloota kana gubba buuti." 
Matthew23:37 Ee Yerusalemu, Yerusalemu, atini raagoota fitt'e ergattu Waaqi siti erge d'akhaani d'oossite. Maro hagami anini nama kanke ch'ufa, aka lukuuni ilmoole ufi koola jalati guuratu sila guuru fed'e, ammo atini indidde." 
Matthew23:38 Amma worri kanke ona taha. 
Matthew23:39 Waan anini isaniti himu, Arraa achi iti deebitani na ingartani, haga isani, Waaqi nama maqa Aabbootiini d'ufu ha eebisu jettaniti." 
Matthew24:1 Ato Yesoni Mana Waaqa keesaa bahu jiru, jari isaa isati d'ufe, aka ijaarsa Mana Waaqa isa agarsiisu." 
Matthew24:2 Inni waan jed'eeni, Waan kana ch'ufa agartani? Waan anini isaniti himu, d'akhaani tokoleeni woli irati inhafu, ch'ufa gargari jissani." 
Matthew24:3 Ato Yesoni gaara Ejersa jed'ani gubba tau, jari isaa koba isati d'ufe waan jed'eeni, Wonti kunini ch'ufti yoomi taati? Akheekhi d'ufiisa kanketitiifi guyya muumme maani? jed'ani gaafatani." 
Matthew24:4 Yesoni waan jed'e, Eegad'a, nami tokoleeni isani insobini." 
Matthew24:5 Wonti akanatiifi nama hedduti maqa kiyyaani d'ufe, Anini Kristo isaniini jed'e, nama heddu soba." 
Matthew24:6 Wolhad'iisa d'iotiifi ka fagole ch'ufa ind'ageetani, ammo insodaatiina, wonti kunini ch'ufti d'ufu malte, ammo muummeeni ind'iaanne." 
Matthew24:7 Lafti toko lafa d'ibi haati, hayyuuni toko hayyu d'ibi had'a. Fulla ch'ufa beelafi lafa chochoititi d'ufa;" 
Matthew24:8 wonti kunini ch'ufti aka ch'iniinsu d'ala jirti. 
Matthew24:9 Isani qabani gaargalchani duisa isaniti murani. Maro tiyyaafi gochi ch'ufti isani jibbiti. 
Matthew24:10 Nami hedduuni hojja suni d'ugefacha lakisa, woli gurguratani, woljibbani." 
Matthew24:11 Jennaani raagi d'ara hedduuni d'ufe nama heddu soba. 
Matthew24:12 Hameenni heddate jennaani jaalalti nama heddu qabanoofti. 
Matthew24:13 Ammo nami haga muumme obsu imbaha. 
Matthew24:14 Odu Dansa tana ta Finna lafa ch'ufa keesati odeesani, aka gosa ch'ufati d'ugeesani, eegi suni muummeeni d'ufti." 
Matthew24:15 Isani waan jibbani, ta nama rifachiisa, ta fulla qulqullo ejitu, ta raagi Danielini waan isii dubbate ya argitani (nami soomu ha hubatu)" 
Matthew24:16 hojja suni worri Yudea keesa jiru ha gareeniti baqatu. 
Matthew24:17 Nami mana gubba jiru mana seene woma imfud'atiini. 
Matthew24:18 Nami oobru keesa jiru mana d'aqe woya imfud'atiini. 
Matthew24:19 Gaargala nad'eeni hojja suni garaacha qabduufi ta ijoolle hoosiftu! 
Matthew24:20 Kad'ad'a, aka bara d'aamochatiifi guyya Sabato imbaqanne!" 
Matthew24:21 Gaargali guyya suni gaargala taka haga lafti uumamte haga arrale ind'ufiini taha. Wonti akasi iti deebite lafa ind'uftu. 
Matthew24:22 Ammo Waaqi ya guyya suni gabaabse; yo inni akasi intolchiini, nami tokoleeni sila imbahu. Maro worra inni fohateefi, Waaqi guyya ingabaabsa." 
Matthew24:23 Yo nami, Kuno, Kristoni arma jira jed'e, yokhaani, Achi jira jed'e, ind'ugefatiina." 
Matthew24:24 Wonti akanatiifi Kristo d'aratiifi raagi d'ara ind'ufa, akheekhafi waan mama heddu tolchani, aka worra Waaqi fohate sobani, yo sila dandaani." 
Matthew24:25 Me, anini waan kana ato guyyaani ingahiini ya isaniti hime." 
Matthew24:26 Yokhaani, yo nami, Ilaala, inni lafa gamooji keesa jira jed'e, achi indeemina; yokhaani yo, Inni armati d'okhachu jira jed'ani, ind'ugefatiina." 
Matthew24:27 Akuma angaasuuni mirgaa bita angaatu, akasuma Ilmi Nama tassa d'ufa." 
Matthew24:28 Fulla reefi jiruti allaatiini buuti. 
Matthew24:29 Maro tokotu, eegi garagala guyya suni, aduuni indukanoofti, jii iti deebie inifsu, urjiini gubba gadi jiddi, jabeenni gubba inhargufama." 
Matthew24:30 Duuba akheekhi Ilma Nama gubbati mullata; gochiti lafa tana ch'ufti imbooti, Ilma Nama ka dumansa keesa jabeennaafi guddinnaani gadi buu argani." 
Matthew24:31 Magalata gudda d'aani, inni malaika ufi moga lafa afraaniti erga, gumi inni fohate haga muumme tanaafi haga muumme suni woltiguurani." 
Matthew24:32 Mukhi oda ha woi isani barsiisu. Yo dameeni isaa dotaate latte baala baafte, aka lafti ch'aamsa imbeetani." 
Matthew24:33 Akasuma yo waan kana agartani aka inni d'io jiru, ka diquma isani hanqatu beekha." 
Matthew24:34 D'uguma, waan anini isaniini jed'u, Wonti kuni ch'ufti, ato nami amma jiru inhobaane taati." 
Matthew24:35 Lafafi gubbaani indabarti, ammo dubbini tiyya tokoleeni indabartu." 
Matthew24:36 Nami hojafi guyya suni beekhu injiru, malaika gubbatiifi Ilmileeni imbeekhani, Abba ch'allati beekha." 
Matthew24:37 D'ufiisi Ilma Nama aka gaafa Nuhu taha. 
Matthew24:38 Haga lollaani d'ufe Nuhuuni hobolo inseeniini nyaatani d'ugani wolfuud'ani. 
Matthew24:39 Ammo haga bisaani fach'aani worra liqimsaniti worri woma inhubanne. Guyya Ilmi Nama d'ufule akasuma taati. 
Matthew24:40 Hojja suni nama lamati oobru keesa woliini hojachu jira: toko fuud'ani, kaani lakisani." 
Matthew24:41 Nad'eeni lama ta d'akha daakhu jirti: toko fuud'ani, taani lakisani." 
Matthew24:42 Eegad'a duuba, guyya Aabbooni keesani d'ufu imbeetani." 
Matthew24:43 Waan kana qaabad'a: Abbaani mana, yo sila hojja hattuuni d'uftu beekhe, mana ufi iraa d'owa." 
Matthew24:44 Maro waan kanatifi, hojja ch'ufa kurfo tahu maltani. Ilmi Nama hojja isani insehanne d'ufa." 
Matthew24:45 Hojattuuni d'ugatiifi qarooni tami? Inni ka abbaani isaa gudda hojattu ch'ufaa tolche, aka sagale hojja saatiini geetu kennuufi." 
Matthew24:46 Hojattuuni suni guddo gammada, yo abbaani isaa isa hojachu jiru worrati galu." 
Matthew24:47 D'uguma, waan anini isaniini jed'u, abbaani suni gudda waan qabu ch'ufa isa tolcha." 
Matthew24:48 Ammo yo inni hojattu hamtu taate, waan inni ufiini jed'u, Abbaani kiyya d'ufu ingeenne jed'e," 
Matthew24:49 hojattu ch'ufa d'aane, sagale nyaate, worra farso d'ugu woliini d'uga." 
Matthew24:50 Abbaani hojattu suni guyya inni insehannefi hojja inni imbeenne d'ufe," 
Matthew24:51 Abbaani kaani gargari isa ch'ich'ire jara kikiyyibani wolti dara. Achiti bohe ilkaani qara. 
Matthew25:1 Guyya suni Finni gubba aka dubra kud'ani, ta ifse fud'atte, abba fuud'a argu d'at'e fakaata." 
Matthew25:2 Shani qaro, taani gowoota." 
Matthew25:3 Gowoleeni taani ifse fud'atte, ammo d'ad'a bobeesaniini lakifte;" 
Matthew25:4 qarooni taani waan d'ad'a iti naqani d'ad'a guute fud'atte. 
Matthew25:5 Abbaani fuud'aa ture jennaani dubriti taani mudde rafte. 
Matthew25:6 Halkani guddo qonqooni d'ufte, Abbaani fuud'a kana, koota isa arga jed'ani." 
Matthew25:7 Dubriti kud'annaanu kaate ifse bobefatte. 
Matthew25:8 Gowoleeni taani waan qaro taaniini jette, D'ad'a nu ch'obsa; ifseeni teenna d'aamu jirti." 
Matthew25:9 Qarooni taani waan jetteeni, Hiyyo, wolti nu ingahu, beena bitad'a." 
Matthew25:10 Gowoleeni taani d'ad'a d'ibi bitachu d'at'i, iti d'aabannaani, abbaani fuud'aa d'ufe. Dubriti kurfo taate taani jila fuud'a olduude, balbala ch'ufani." 
Matthew25:11 Eegi suni dubriti gowaani shanaani taani dachaate, Aabbo, Aabbo, balbala nu bani jette." 
Matthew25:12 Ammo abbaani fuud'a waan jed'e, Lakisa, anini fuula isani imbeekhu." 
Matthew25:13 Eegad'a duuba, isani guyyafi hojja imbeetani." 
Matthew25:14 Gaafasi finna gubbaa aka nama imaltu deemu fed'u, ka hojattu ufi yaame, waan qabu ch'ufa harka worraati lakise jira." 
Matthew25:15 Inni nama ch'ufa waan inni dandau iti kenne. Toko shilingi kunki shantama iti kenne, ka lameeso kunki diddama iti kenne, ka sadeeso kunki kud'ani iti kenne, kae iti d'aabate." 
Matthew25:16 Namichi kunki shantama iti kennani kaani d'aqe daldaleeni, kunki shantama d'ibi argate." 
Matthew25:17 Namichi kunki diddama iti kennanileeni akasuma kunki diddama d'ibi argate. 
Matthew25:18 Ammo namichi kunki kud'ani iti kennani kaani d'aqe, boola qote, hori kaani achiti d'osse." 
Matthew25:19 Abbaani hojattu taani guddo ture gadi deebie, henna suni ch'ufa worra woliini tolche." 
Matthew25:20 Namichi kunki shantama iti kennani kaani d'ufe, kunki shantama d'ibi iti kenne waan jed'e, Atini kunki shantama nati kennite, ilaali, kunkiini shantama d'ibileeni tana." 
Matthew25:21 Abbaani waan jed'eeni, Aka d'iiraa tolchite, atini aka dansaa daldalte, tanaafi anini waan guddo harka keetiti kenna. Kooti, woliini gammanna." 
Matthew25:22 Namichi shilingi kunki diddama iti kennani kaani d'ufe waan jed'e, Atini kunki diddama nati kennite, ilaali, kunkiini diddama d'ibileeni tana." 
Matthew25:23 Abbaani waan jed'eeni, Aka d'iiraa tolchite, atini aka dansaa daldalte, tanaafi anini waan guddo harka keetiti kenna. Kooti, woliini gammanna." 
Matthew25:24 Jennaani namichi shilingi kunki kud'ani iti kennani kaani d'ufe waan jed'e, Aabbo, anini imbeekha aka atini nama hama, atini waan inobriini murte mid'aani imfach'aasiini khod'oti galchita." 
Matthew25:25 Anini sodaad'e hori kanke boola keesati d'osse; ilaali, horiini kanke kana." 
Matthew25:26 Abbaani waan jed'eeni, Atini hojattu hamtu, ammalle laafa; atini aka anini waan inobriini murad'e mid'aani imfach'aasiini khod'oti galchu imbeetayu?" 
Matthew25:27 Yoosi, hori kiyya oli naa kayu malte, aka anini hojja gale waan isiini d'alte woliini fud'ad'u." 
Matthew25:28 Tanaafi hori suni isa iraa fuud'a, namicha kunki d'ibba toko qabuti kenna." 
Matthew25:29 Wonti akanatiifi nama woi qabu iti darani, ammo ka woma inqamne waan inni qabule iraa fuud'ani." 
Matthew25:30 Hojattu woma imbaane tana d'aqa, dukana keesa ala buusa; achiti bohe ilkaani qara." 
Matthew25:31 Guyya Ilmi Nama guddinna ufitiini d'ufu malaika ch'ufa woliini, inni barch'uma guddinna ufi gubba tae," 
Matthew25:32 nami lafa tana ch'ufti isa durati wolwoldaa. Jennaani inni fulla lamati gargari worra foha, akuma tissituuni ree ufi, hooliyefi laleesa gargari footu:" 
Matthew25:33 hooliye harka mirga deebise, laleesa harka bitaacha deebisa." 
Matthew25:34 Duuba Hayyuuni waan hooliye harka mirgatiini jed'u, Abbaani kiyya ya isani eebise, koota, guddinna haga lafa uumani isani mid'aasani seena." 
Matthew25:35 Gaafa anini beela qabu beela naa baaftani, ana d'eebu qabu, d'eebu naa baaftani, ana keessuma na bulchitani," 
Matthew25:36 ana daara qabu daara na baaftani, anini fayya d'amnaani na qorqorattani, na hid'ani jennaani d'uftani na ilaaltani." 
Matthew25:37 Worri d'uga duuba waan jed'u, Aabbo, yoomi sii beela qabdu arginaani beela si baamne, sii d'eebote d'eebu si baamne?" 
Matthew25:38 Yoomi sii keessuma arginaani si bulchine, sii daara qabdu arginaani daara si baamne," 
Matthew25:39 sii fayya d'abde yokhaani hid'aansa keesa jirtu si ilaale? 
Matthew25:40 Hayyuuni waan jed'u, Waan anini isaniti himu, waan oboleyaani tiyya didiqo tanaa tolchitani yayu nale tolchitani." 
Matthew25:41 Duuba waan worra harka bitatiini jed'u, Na biraa bada, isani abaarsa Waaqa qabdani; gara ibida ind'aamne bada, ka Sheet'anafi malaika isaati bobeesani!" 
Matthew25:42 Gaafa anini beela qabu beela na baasu diddani, ka anini d'eebod'e d'eebu na baasu diddani;" 
Matthew25:43 gaafa anini keessuma na bulchu diddani, ka anini daara qabu daara na baasu diddani; gaafa anini fayyad'abe hid'aansa keesa jiru na ilaalu diddani." 
Matthew25:44 Worri waan jed'uuni, Aabbo, nu yoomi taka sii beela qabdu yokhaani sii d'eebu qabdu yokhaani sii keessuma yokhaani sii daara qabdu yokhaani sii fayyad'abde yokhaani sii hid'aansa keesa jirtu argine si qarqaaru dinne?" 
Matthew25:45 Inni waan jed'uuni, D'uguma, waan anini isaniini jed'u, yo isani worra didiqa kana qarqaaru diddani, yayu nale qarqaaru diddani." 
Matthew25:46 Worra kana gara gaargala ind'umanne ergani, worra d'uga gara jireenna ind'umanne ergani." 
Matthew26:1 Yesoni barsiisa tana ch'ufa hobaamnaani, inni waan jara ufitiini jed'e," 
Matthew26:2 Aka isani beetani, eegi bulti lamaa jila Pasakaati; gaafasi Ilma Nama harka namati kennani mukha gubbati fannisani." 
Matthew26:3 Jennaani qaalole gugurdofi jaaroleeni Yahudi mana Qaallicha ira Gudda, ka Kayafa jed'ani keesati wolwoldeete," 
Matthew26:4 aka Yeso d'ossaani qabani ijeesani mariatte. 
Matthew26:5 Fulla jilati tolchu himmalle, hegeri biyyiti inch'aarti wolinjed'ani." 
Matthew26:6 Ato Yesoni mana Simoni ka qomaat'a qabu keesa jiru," 
Matthew26:7 niitiini toko killa d'ad'a urgaa, ka gati guddotiini d'ufte, mata Yesoti nat'e, ato inni sagale nyaachu jiru." 
Matthew26:8 Jari Yeso waan kana arginaani guddo dalane waan jed'e, Maafi waan kana ch'ufa balleesani?" 
Matthew26:9 D'ad'a kana sila beese guddoti gurgurani hiyyeeyi qoodu dandaani jed'ani. 
Matthew26:10 Yesoni waan worri jed'e beennaani waan jed'eeni, Isani maafi teetani niiti tana gaargalchitani? Wonti isiini naa tolchite kunini guddo dansa." 
Matthew26:11 Hiyyeeyiini guyya ch'ufa isani woliini jirti, ammo anini guyya ch'ufa isani woliini injiru." 
Matthew26:12 Isiini aka nafa kiyya awaalaa na kurfeesitufi qayya na nat'e. 
Matthew26:13 D'uguma, waan anini isaniini jed'u, Yo odu dansa tana lafa ch'ufa keesati odeesani, waan isiini tolchite kana qaabatani isiini odeesani." 
Matthew26:14 Jennaani nami Yeso toko ka Yuda Iskariote jed'ani gara qaalole gugurdo d'aqe 
Matthew26:15 waan jed'e, Yo anini Yeso harka keesaniti kenne, maani naa kennitani? Duuba worri qarsi sodoma fuud'e kenneefi." 
Matthew26:16 Haga gaafasiti Yudani akuma Yeso gurguratu barbaade. 
Matthew26:17 Guyya qara ka jila Qit'a bukho inqamne, jari Yeso iti d'ufe waan jed'eeni, Jila Pasaka jed'ani eesati si tolchina?" 
Matthew26:18 Inni waan jed'eeni, Gara nama toko d'aqa waan jettaniini, Aabbooni waan jed'u, Guyyaani kiyya ya gahe; anaafi jari kiyyaleeni mana kanke keesati Pasaka nyaanna jed'aani." 
Matthew26:19 Jari waan Yesoni jed'eeni tolche Pasaka kurfeese. 
Matthew26:20 Lafti galgaloomnaani, Yesofi jari isaa tataani sagale nyaatani." 
Matthew26:21 Ato sagale nyaatanu, Yesoni waan jed'e, Isani kana keesa nami toko na gurgurata." 
Matthew26:22 Jari guddo lalefate, toko tokooni waan jed'eeni, Aabbo, naa wo taate?" 
Matthew26:23 Yesoni waan jed'e, Nama qit'a qori keesa naa woliini tuqate nyaachu jiruti na gurgurata." 
Matthew26:24 Ilmi Nama aka t'aafiini jette gula dua; ammo gaargala nama Ilma Nama ijeesuti; ira dansa yo sila nami suni duri ind'alatiini. 
Matthew26:25 Yudani qonqo olfud'ate waan jed'e, Na wo taate, Aabbo? Yesoni waan jed'eeni, Atini ya afaani keetiini jette." 
Matthew26:26 Ato sagale nyaatanu, Yesoni qit'a fuud'e, galata deebise, ch'ach'abse, jara ufiti kenne waan jed'eeni, Kunini nafa kiyya, hood'a, nyaad'a." 
Matthew26:27 Mudunu fuud'e, galata deebise, worrati kenne waan jed'eeni, Isaniini ch'ufti d'uga." 
Matthew26:28 Kunini d'iiga kiyya ka wold'aqisa haraa, ka nama hedduu jissani, aka daba nama araaramani." 
Matthew26:29 Waan anini isaniini jed'u, Anini iti deebie daad'i tana ind'ugu, haga daad'i haraa Finna Abba kiyya keesati woliini d'unnuuti." 
Matthew26:30 Jennaani sirba toko sirbani gara Gaara Ejersa jed'ani d'aqani. 
Matthew26:31 Jennaani Yesoni waan jed'eeni, Halkani kana isaniini ch'ufti na lakiftani baqattani, wonti akanatiifi t'aafiini waan jettu, Waaqi tissitu ree ijeese, reeni gargari firfirfamti." 
Matthew26:32 Ammo eegi anini duisa keesaa kae, anini isani durati Galilaya d'aqa." 
Matthew26:33 Petroni waan Yesoni jed'e, Ato nami ch'ufti baqatele, anini si biraa imbaqad'u." 
Matthew26:34 Yesoni waan jed'eeni, D'uguma waan anini siini jed'u, ato kormi luku iniyiini, ati maro sadi na mormatta." 
Matthew26:35 Petroni waan jed'e, Ato duele, anini si imormad'u. Jari kaleeni akasuma jed'e." 
Matthew26:36 Yesoni jara ufi woliini lafa Gethsemane jed'ani d'aqe waan jed'eeni, Haga anini achi deeme kad'ad'u, arma tataa." 
Matthew26:37 Inni Petrofi ilmaani Zebedayo lamaani guure. Lalefachafi naasuuni isa dabsatte," 
Matthew26:38 waan worraani jed'e, Naasuuni diquma na inijeesiini. Arma na woliini tataa eega." 
Matthew26:39 Diqo dura deeme fuula durati lafaani ufi d'ae, Waaqa kad'ate waan jed'e, Aabbo kiyya yo dandeete mudunu tana nara fuud'i, fed'i tiyyaaniti ammo fed'i tante gula." 
Matthew26:40 Jennaani gara jara isaa sadeeni kaani deebie, worra rafu arge waan Petroni jed'e, Akami dandeetani haga saa tokole na woliini eegu dad'abdani?" 
Matthew26:41 Tataa, Waaqa kad'ad'a, aka ilaalacha keesa inseene. Lubbuuni imfeeti, ammo nafi indandau." 
Matthew26:42 Maro lameeso Yesoni deeme, Waaqa kad'ate waan jed'e, Yo mudunu tana haga anini d'uguti naraa imfuune, fed'iini tante ha taatuuti." 
Matthew26:43 Ammalle gadeebinaani worra muugatiini dabsatte rafu arge. 
Matthew26:44 Ammalle Yesoni worra biraa deeme, maro sadeeso dubbuma suniini Waaqa kad'ate." 
Matthew26:45 Jennaani gara worra deebie waan jed'eeni, Ammalle ufuma ch'iiftani raftani? Ilaala, hojjaani Ilma Nama harka worra dabaati kennani ya d'iaatte." 
Matthew26:46 Kakaa, nu yaasa. Kuno, nami na gurguratu kana." 
Matthew26:47 Ato inni dubbachu jiru, Yudani ka jara kud'ani lama ke jiru d'ufe. Isa woliini gumiini guddooni ta sheeftifi bokuuni yaatu d'ufte, ta qaalole gugurdofi jaaroleeni Yahudi ergite." 
Matthew26:48 Yudani akheekha toko worraa kenne, Nami anini d'ungad'u isa, qaba jed'e." 
Matthew26:49 Yudani d'umnaani gara Yeso d'aqe, Aabbo, bultiini nagaya? Jed'e d'ungate." 
Matthew26:50 Yesoni waan jed'eeni, Jaali, waan feetu hurrisi tolchi. Jennaani d'ufani Yeso jabeesani qabani." 
Matthew26:51 Nami Yeso woliini jiru toko, sheefti ufi qalqala keesaa luqise, tisse qaallicha gudda d'ae, gurra iraa kute." 
Matthew26:52 Yesoni waan isaani jed'e, Sheefti tante qalqalati deebisi; wonti akanatiifi nami sheefti fud'atu ch'ufti sheeftiini dua." 
Matthew26:53 Atini aka yo anini Aabbooni, Qarqaarsa na ergi jed'e, inni duula kud'ani lama ka malaika na ergu imbeetu?" 
Matthew26:54 Ammo yo akasi taate, t'aafiini ta woni kuni tahu malte jettu akami dandeete guutamti?" 
Matthew26:55 Hojuma suni Yesoni gumiti dubbate waan jed'e, Maafi sheeftifi bokuuni d'uftani na qabdani, aka waan anini shifta tahe. Guyya ch'ufa anini Mana Waaqa keesa tae nama barsiise, ammo gaafasi na inqamne." 
Matthew26:56 Ammo wonti kunini ch'ufti aka wonti raagi jed'e, guutamtufi taate. Jennaani jari isaa ch'ufti isa lakise baqate." 
Matthew26:57 Worri Yeso qabe, mana Kayafatiini isa d'ufani, fulla jara Seera beekhufi jaaroleeni iti wolwoldeete." 
Matthew26:58 Petroni isa gula deeme haga ch'icha mana qaallicha gudda, d'aqetiini worra lafa eegu woliini tae, aka waan dubbini buufattuuni ilaalu." 
Matthew26:59 Qaalole gugurdofi kori ch'ufti dubbi d'aratiini Yeso himatani, aka ijeesani;" 
Matthew26:60 ammo indad'abani, ato nami hedduuni d'ufe, d'araani himatele. Eege jari lamaani toko d'ufe" 
Matthew26:61 waan jed'e, Namichi kunini waan jed'e, Anini dandae Mana Waaqa ch'abse, eegi guyya sadi jaara jed'e jed'ani." 
Matthew26:62 Qaallichi guddaani olkae waan Yesoni jed'e, Atini himacha jari kunini si himatu tanaani woma injettu?" 
Matthew26:63 Ammo Yesoni dubbachu dide. Ammalle qaallichi guddaani waan isaani jed'e, Maqa Waaqa jirutiini si kakhachiisa, Yo atini Kristo, Ilma Waaqa taate, nuti himi." 
Matthew26:64 Yesoni waan isaani jed'e, Atu ya jette. Ammo waan anini isaniti himu, Eegi arra, Ilma Nama ka harka mirgicha Waaqa Gudda tae, dumansa gubbatiini gadi deebiu argitani." 
Matthew26:65 Jennaani qaallichi guddaani woya ufi tarsaase waan jed'e, Atini ya Waaqa arabsite, nu d'uga d'ibi imbarbaannu; armati ya dubbi isaa ta daba d'ageettani;" 
Matthew26:66 isani maani hereddani? Worri waan jed'eeni, Inni wollaala qaba, duu male jed'ani." 
Matthew26:67 Hanch'ufa fuulati tufani d'aanani; worri isa d'abanaase 
Matthew26:68 waan jed'e Kristo, fagi nama si d'ae nuti himi." 
Matthew26:69 Ato Petroni ch'icha dura tau, intalti hojattu qaallicha gudda toko d'ufte waan jetteeni, Atileeni Yeso Galilaya woliini jirta." 
Matthew26:70 Ammo inni worra ch'ufa durati mormate, Anini waan atini dubbachu jirtu kana imbeekhu jed'e," 
Matthew26:71 fullooni bahe. Intalti hojattu toko d'ibileeni isa garte waan jara d'iira tokooni jette, Namichi kunini Yeso Nazareti woliini jira." 
Matthew26:72 Ammalle Petroni mormate waan jed'e, Inkakhad'a, anini namicha kana fuulale imbeekhu." 
Matthew26:73 Eegi diqo toko taani, worri achi ejaanju Petroti d'ufe waan jed'eeni, Atini nama isaati, arabi kanketiyu inhima." 
Matthew26:74 Petroni kakhate waan jed'e, Yo anini isani sobe Waaqi na dabsinna. Anini namicha suni fuulale imbeekhu. Hojuma suni kormi luku iye." 
Matthew26:75 Petroni, waan Yesoni isaani jed'e, qaabate, Ato kormi lukuu iniyiini atini maro sadi na mormatta. Duuba inni alati bahe guddo bohe." 
Matthew27:1 Ganama qaalole gugurdofi jaaroleeni Yahudi aka Yeso ijeeftu wolmariatte. 
Matthew27:2 Haada sibiilatiini hid'ani, isa fuud'ani, harka hayyu Pilatoti kennani." 
Matthew27:3 Yudani, ka Yeso gurgurate, aka Yeso ijeecha iti murani arginaani, iraa deebie, hori qaalole gugurdofi jaaroleti deebise" 
Matthew27:4 waan jed'e, Anini ya daba tolche, nama woma iyakini gurgurad'e. Worri waan jed'eeni, Nu maani iraa qamna re? Sunini huji tanteti." 
Matthew27:5 Yudani hori kaani fulla sorio iti qalani jisse d'aqe t'ururaani ufi ijeese. 
Matthew27:6 Qaaloleeni gugurdooni hori kaani lafaa guurte waan jette, Horiini kunini hori d'iigaati, aki hori Mana Waaqatiini wolti darani fullaaniti jed'ani." 
Matthew27:7 Eegi wolmariatani, lafa toko ta Ogeesa Okote Faara jed'ani bitani lafa keessuma iti awaalani tolchani." 
Matthew27:8 Maro waan kanatifi lafa suniini, Lafa D'iiga jed'ani yaamani, arrale." 
Matthew27:9 Duuba akanaani Wonti raagi Yeremiani jed'e d'uga taate: qarsi sodomi sadi suni fuud'ani (ta gochiti Israeli ee jette aka baaftu)," 
Matthew27:10 hori suniini lafaani bitani, akuma Aabbooni nati hime." 
Matthew27:11 Yesoni hayyu Pilato dura ejate, Pilatoni waan jed'eeni, Atini Hayyu Yahuditi? Yesoni waan jed'e, Atu ya jette." 
Matthew27:12 Ammo waan qaalole gugurdofi jaaroleeni isa himatte maqa ind'oomne. 
Matthew27:13 Jennaani Pilatoni waan Yesoni jed'e, Waan worri si himate kana ind'ageetu?" 
Matthew27:14 Ammo Yesoni dubbi tokole dubbachu dide, tanaafi Pilatoni guddo mame." 
Matthew27:15 Guyya jila Pasaka ch'ufa, hayyuuni nama hid'ani toko, ka gumiini kad'atte, gadi lakisa." 
Matthew27:16 Gaafasi namicha nami ch'ufti beekhu tokoti jira, ka Yeso Baraba jed'ani." 
Matthew27:17 Gumiini wolwoldeennaani, Pilatoni waan jed'e, Ana eennu gadi lakisu feetani, Yeso Baraba mo Yeso ka Kristo jed'ani?" 
Matthew27:18 Inni imbeekha, aka worri Yeso qot'efi isatiini d'ufe." 
Matthew27:19 Ato Pilatoni barch'uma qorsuma ira tau, niitiini isaa nama isati ergite waan jetteeni, Nama woma iyakini suni woma intolchiini, anini eedda oobju keesa guddo maro isaatiifi gaargale jette." 
Matthew27:20 Qaalole gugurdofi jaaroleeni biyya sosobde waan jette, Aka Pilatoni Baraba lakise Yeso ijeesu kad'ad'a." 
Matthew27:21 Hayyuuni, Worra kana lamaani eennu gadi lakisa? jed'e, Jennaani worri, Baraba feena jed'e." 
Matthew27:22 Pilatoni waan jed'eeni, Yeso ka Kristo jed'ani maani tolcha re? Iyani, Mukhati fannisi jed'ani." 
Matthew27:23 Ammo Pilatoni waan jed'e, Inni maani yake? Qonqo guddooni iyani waan jed'ani, Mukhati fannisi!" 
Matthew27:24 Pilatoni aka dura deemitiini woma imbaane arginaani, ammalle aka loli d'ufu arginaani, bisaani fud'ate, harka biyya durati d'iqate waan jed'e, Anini d'iiga nama kana keesa injiru! Tunini huji teesani!" 
Matthew27:25 Gumiini ch'ufti waan jette, D'iigi isaa mata keennafi ka ijoolle teenna gubba jira." 
Matthew27:26 Jennaani Pilatoni Baraba gadi lakise, Yeso d'aana jed'e, aka ijeesani harka worrati kenne." 
Matthew27:27 Jennaani askartiini Pilato mana hayyu keesa Yeso seensifte, isiini ch'ufti isa marsite." 
Matthew27:28 Woya iraa baasani, woya diimtu toko uyisaniifi." 
Matthew27:29 Duuba qoraati aka sure marani mata isaa ira kayani, ule harka isaa ka mirga keesa kayani, isa durati jilbifatani goyeesani waan jed'ani, Lubbuuni tante ha d'eeratuuti, Hayyu Yahudi." 
Matthew27:30 Hanch'ufa isati tufani, ule fuud'ani mata keesani d'aanani." 
Matthew27:31 Eegi isa goyeesani, woya iraa baasani, woya isaa ta qara keyachiisani, Duuba aka mukhati fannisani alati geesani." 
Matthew27:32 Ato dira keesaa bahanu, namicha Kirene toko ka Simoni jed'ani argani, maskali Yeso baachisani." 
Matthew27:33 Fulla Golgotha d'ufani, akasi jechaani Fulla Buqe Mata jecha." 
Matthew27:34 Achiti daad'i had'ooftu obaasani, inni diqo une ammo d'ugu dide." 
Matthew27:35 Mukhati fannisani, woya isaa hit'a buufatani, gargari qoodatani," 
Matthew27:36 achi tataani isa eegani. 
Matthew27:37 Mata isaa gararoti waan isa himataniifi t'aafani, Nami kunini Yeso, Hayyu Yahudi jed'ani." 
Matthew27:38 Shifta lama isa woliini fannisani, toko gama mirga, kaani gama bita." 
Matthew27:39 Nami d'aatu suni yau mata iti irbe Yeso arabse waan jed'e," 
Matthew27:40 Atini ka, Mana Waaqa ch'abse, guyya saditi jaaru dandaa jette, ufi baasi, yo atini Ilma Waaqaa taate! Maskali ira lafati gadi bui!" 
Matthew27:41 Akasuma qaalole gugurdofi jara Seera beekhufi jaaroleeni isa goyeesite waan jette," 
Matthew27:42 Inni biyya baase, ammo dandae ufi imbaasu! Inni Hayyu Israelitiyu? Yo inni ammatana maskali ira gadi bue, nu isa d'ugefanna!" 
Matthew27:43 Inni Waaqa d'ugefate, Anini Ilma Waaqa ufiini jed'a. Yo akasi taate, aka amma Waaqi isa baasu fed'u ilaalu feena." 
Matthew27:44 Shiftaani isa woliini fannisanileeni akasuma isa goyeesite. 
Matthew27:45 Guyya gudda haga saa sagali lafti ch'ufti dukanoofte. 
Matthew27:46 Saa sagali geennaani, Yesoni qonqo guddooni iye waan jed'e, Eli, Eli, lama sabakthani? Akasi jechaani, Waaqa kiyya, Waaqa kiyya, maafi na lakifte? jecha." 
Matthew27:47 Nami achi ejaanju ka gari isa d'agaye waan jed'e, Inni Eliya yaamu jira." 
Matthew27:48 Namichi toko gara isaa utaale, waan aka bututu laaftu toko fuud'e, daad'i keesa kaye, hokoti fannise, isa dura qabe." 
Matthew27:49 Ammo nami gari waan jed'e, Eega, aka Eliyaani d'ufe isa qarqaaru ilaala." 
Matthew27:50 Yesoni ammalle qonqo guddooni iye, hafuura baafate due." 
Matthew27:51 Hojuma suni golli Mana Waaqa fulla lamati gubba gadi tarsae. Lafti chochote, d'akhaani dayae," 
Matthew27:52 awaali baname, worri Waaqa ka due ka gari jireennati deebie." 
Matthew27:53 Awaala keesaa yaani, eegi Yesoni duisa keesaa kae, dira qulqullo seenani, nami hedduuni worra arge." 
Matthew27:54 Gudda askartitiifi askartiini isa woliini jirjirtu lafa chochoteefi waan tahe ch'ufa arginaani, nahani waan jed'ani, Nami kunini d'uguma Ilma Waaqaati." 
Matthew27:55 Nad'eeni hedduti jira, ta fago waan kana daawatte, ta haga Galilaya Yeso gula yaate isa qarqaarte." 
Matthew27:56 Nad'eeni suni keesaa, Mariamu Magdalenefi Mariamu haad'a Yakobotiifi Yusufufi haad'a ilmaani Zebedayoti jira." 
Matthew27:57 Lafti galgaloomnaani, namichi dureesi lafa Arimathaya toko d'ufe; maqaani isaa Yusufu, innileeni nama Yesoti." 
Matthew27:58 Duuba gara Pilato d'aqe, reefa Yeso kad'ate. Pilatoni reefa suni, Yusufu kenna jed'e." 
Matthew27:59 Yusufuni fuud'e, woya booftatiini mamare," 
Matthew27:60 awaala inni d'io qote keesa kaye. Jennaani d'akha gudda toko afaani awaalati gangalche biraa gale. 
Matthew27:61 Mariamu Magdalenefi Mariamuni taani d'aatu awaala teteete. 
Matthew27:62 Guyya lameeso, ka gumaatati aanu, qaalole gugurdofi Farisayooni gara Pilato d'at'e," 
Matthew27:63 waan jetteeni, Aabbo, nu aka namichi kiyyibaani suni gaafa jiru, Eegi guyya sadi anini duisa keesaa kaa jed'e, inqaabanna." 
Matthew27:64 Tanaafi nama ergi, aka awaala suni haga guyya sadi jabeesani eegani, aka jari isaa d'aqe reefa Yeso hate, biyyaani, Isa ya duisa keesaa kaasani injenne. Kiyyibi eege kunini ka qarale ira hamaata jed'ani." 
Matthew27:65 Pilatoni waan jed'eeni, Askarti fud'ad'a, haga dandeetani awaala eega." 
Matthew27:66 Tanaafi kaani iti d'aabatani, d'akha awaala iti gangalchani kaani beesisa ira kayani, jabeesani askarti eeddu achiti lakisani." 
Matthew28:1 Eegi guyyaani Sabato dabre, guyya qara ka torbaani suni, lafti bariinaani Mariamu Magdalenefi Mariamuni taani awaala ilaalu d'aqani." 
Matthew28:2 Jennaani maro tokotu lafti chochote, malaikaani Aabbo toko gubba gadi buute, d'akha gangalchite gubba teete." 
Matthew28:3 Fuuli isii aka angaasu ifse, woyaani isii aka ch'aama adaatte." 
Matthew28:4 Askartiini aka taka inargiini sodaatte, aka waan doote taate." 
Matthew28:5 Malaikaani waan nad'eeni taaniini jette, Insodaatiina; anini imbeekha, isani Yeso maskaliti fannisani barbaaddani." 
Matthew28:6 Inni arma injiru, yayu kaasani, akuma inni jed'e. Koota, fulla isa ch'iifsisani ilaala." 
Matthew28:7 Hurrisa, deema jara isaati hima: Yayu duisa keesaa kaasani, amma ya Galilayati isani dura dabre; achiti isa argitani jed'a. D'aamsa kiyya kana inded'ina." 
Matthew28:8 Jennaani hurrisani kaani, awaala kaani biraa yaani, guddo sodaatani, ammo gammada qabani, utaalani jara Yesoti himani." 
Matthew28:9 Yesoni tassa worrati gadi bahe waan jed'eeni, Bultiini isani nagaya? Iti d'iaatani, miila isaa qabatani isa guddisani." 
Matthew28:10 Yesoni waan jed'eeni, Insodaatiina, d'aqa oboleyaani tiyyaani, Galilaya d'aqa achiti na argani jed'a jed'e." 
Matthew28:11 Nad'eeni iti d'aabannaani, askartiini hagi gari ta awaala eeddu dira d'at'e, waan ch'ufa qaalole gugurdoti himte." 
Matthew28:12 Qaalole gugurdofi jaaroleeni woliwoldeete mariatte, hori gudda askartiti kennite" 
Matthew28:13 waan jetteeni, Jara isati halkani, ato nu rafu jirru, d'ufe reefa isa hate jed'a." 
Matthew28:14 Yo hayyuuni waan kana d'agaye, nuti iti hima, woma tokole insodaatiina jed'ani." 
Matthew28:15 Askartiini taani hori fud'atte, waan tolcha jed'aniini tolchite. Yahudiini arrale dubbuma tana d'ageete d'ugefatti." 
Matthew28:16 Jari kud'ani toko gara gaara lafa Galilaya keesa, ka Yesoni worrati hime d'aqe." 
Matthew28:17 Isa arginaani guddisani, ato nami gari d'arefatele." 
Matthew28:18 Yesoni worrati d'iaate waan jed'eeni: Jabeenna ch'ufa, ka lafafi gubbale, ya nati kennani." 
Matthew28:19 Tanaafi fulla ch'ufa yaa, gosa ch'ufa nama kiyya tolcha: maqa Abbaatiifi ka ilmaatiifi ka Lubbu Qulqullotini aada batiso namaa kenna," 
Matthew28:20 waan anini isani barsiise ch'ufa guuta worraani jed'a. Beekha, haga guyya muummele anini isani woliini jira." 
Mark1:1 Oduuni Dansaani ta Yeso Kristo Ilma Waaqa tana. 
Mark1:2 Isiini akuma raagi Isayani duri t'aafe jirti: Kuno, anini ergattu tiyya si dura erga, aka kara sii mid'aasitu." 
Mark1:3 Qonqooni nama lafa alooti iyu waan jettu: Kara Aabbo kurfeesa, daandi isaa qajeelcha!" 
Mark1:4 Yohanani lafa gamooji d'ufe, aada batiso jed'ani biyya kenne waan jed'e, Daba iraa deebia, aada batiso fud'ad'a, aka Waaqi daba keesani isanii araaramu." 
Mark1:5 Nami Yudeatiifi ka Yerusalemu keesa jiruleeni ch'ufti d'aqe Yohana ch'aqase. Daba ufi himatani jennaani inni galaana Yordani keesati worraa batiso kenne. 
Mark1:6 Woyaani Yohana rifeensa galati, gurda hid'aanati hid'ate, awaanisafi damma nyaate." 
Mark1:7 Inni odeese waan jed'e, Eegi tiyya, ka nara jiruti d'ufa, ka seemsa kobe isaa anini gajed'e hiikhu himmalini." 
Mark1:8 Anini bisaaniini isani batisa, ammo inni Lubbu Qulqullooni isani batisa." 
Mark1:9 Bara suni Yesoni Nazareti ta lafa Galilaya jirtu bahe, Yordani d'aqe, aka Yohanani isa batisu." 
Mark1:10 Akuma Yesoni bisaani keesaa baheeni, inni gubba banamte, Lubbu bifa sabaliisa qabdu, ta isa gubba buutu, arge." 
Mark1:11 Qonqooni gubba baate waan jette, Atini Ilma kiyya tokocha, ka guddo na gammachiisu." 
Mark1:12 Jennaani Lubbuuni diidati isa baafte. 
Mark1:13 Inni bulti afurtama diida keesa tae, Sheet'ani isa ilaalate. Inni bineensa ala jiddu tae, malaikaani d'ufte isa qorqoratte." 
Mark1:14 Eegi Yohana qabani, Yesoni Galilaya d'aqe, Odu Dansa ta gara Waaqaati d'ufte odeese," 
Mark1:15 waan jed'e, Hojjaani yayu geete, Finni Waaqa la d'iaate, daba iraa deebia, Odu Dansa d'ugefad'a jed'e." 
Mark1:16 Ato inni d'aatu galaana Galilaya deemu, Simonifi oboleesa isaa Andarea, ka t'urura qurt'umi galaana keesa buusani, arge; worri guurtu qurt'umiiti." 
Mark1:17 Yesoni waan worraani jed'e, Na gula koota, anini guurtu nama isani tolcha." 
Mark1:18 T'urura ufi achumati lakisani hurrisani isa gula yaani. 
Mark1:19 Diqo deemnaani, inni Yakobo ilma Zebedayotiifi Yohana oboleesa isaa arge. Worri hobolo keesati t'urura qurt'umi mid'aafachu jira." 
Mark1:20 Inni akuma argeeni yaame, duuba abbaafi hojattu isaani hobolo keesati lakisani isa gula yaani." 
Mark1:21 Yesofi jari isaa dira Kapernaumu d'umnaani, guyya Sabato Yesoni Mana Waaqa iti kad'atani seene biyya barsiise." 
Mark1:22 Biyyiti waan inni barsiise guddo maadefatte, waan inni aka jara Seera beekhu imbarsiimne, ammo aka nama humna qabu barsiiseefi." 
Mark1:23 Hojja suni nami toko ka jinni qabu Mana Waaqa suni keesa seene 
Mark1:24 iye waan jed'e, Atini maani nura qabda, Yeso Nazareti? Nu balleesu d'ufte? Anini si beekha, atini Qulqullo Waaqaati." 
Mark1:25 Yesoni jinni d'owe, Ch'allisi, isa keesaa bahi jed'eeni." 
Mark1:26 Jinniini taani isa hargufte, lalabde, iyite baate." 
Mark1:27 Biyyiti ch'ufti guddo maadefatte waan woliini jette, Taka agartani d'ageetani? Barsiisaani hareetiini tuni maal? Nami kunini guddo jabeenna qaba. Yo inni dubbatu jinnileeni insarmitifi." 
Mark1:28 Maro tokotu gurri isaa arda lafa Galilaya ch'ufa gahe. 
Mark1:29 Mana Waaqa keesaa bahani, jennaani Yakobofi Yohana woliini, mana Simonifi Andarea d'aqani." 
Mark1:30 Jaartiini soda Petro, qanno fuute ch'iifti, akuma Yesoni achiini baheeni iti himani." 
Mark1:31 Inni gara isi d'aqe, harka qabe olkaase. Qannooni isi iraa galte, isiini worra gololchite." 
Mark1:32 Lafti galgaloomnaani, nama fayya inqamneefi ka jinni qabu ch'ufa isatiini d'ufani." 
Mark1:33 Nami dira ch'ufti balbala durati wolti bahe. 
Mark1:34 Inni nama d'ukuba gosa ch'ufa qabu fayyise, jinni heddule nama keesaa baase, isi dubbachu d'owe, waan isiini isa beetuufi." 
Mark1:35 Boriyya, afaani bari, Yesoni kae, fulla nami injirre d'aqe Waaqa kad'ate." 
Mark1:36 Ammo Simonifi waheli isaa Yeso barbaadani; 
Mark1:37 isa arginaani waan jed'aniini, Nami ch'uftumaani si barbaaduu jira." 
Mark1:38 Inni waan jed'eeni, Koota, dira iti aanu yaana, aka achileti hasau; anini waan kanaafi d'ufe." 
Mark1:39 Jennaani inni lafa Galilaya ch'ufa keesa dedeeme, maneeni Waaqa iti kad'atani keesati hasae, jinni nama keesaa yaase." 
Mark1:40 Nami toko ka qomaat'a qabu isati d'ufe, miilati jige waan jed'eeni, Yo sila atini na fayyisu feete, indandeeta jed'e." 
Mark1:41 Yesoni naheefi, harka d'eerefate, isa qabate waan jed'e, Imfed'a, fayyi." 
Mark1:42 Maro tokotu qomaat'aani isa iraa bade, inni fayye." 
Mark1:43 Jennaani Yesoni aka jaba isa gorse, ufi biraa deemsise," 
Mark1:44 waan jed'eeni, Eegad'u, nama tokoleti inhimini. Ammo deemi, qaallicha gudda ufi agarsiisi, sorio Musa iraa d'ufte qali, aka nami fayya te argu." 
Mark1:45 Ammo namichi kaani achi deemnaani akuma arge fulluma ch'ufati hasae. Waan kanaafi Yesoni d'ossa male dira tokole seenu dad'abe, ammo ala tae biyyiti fulluma ch'ufa isati d'ufte." 
Mark2:1 Eegi bulti diqo, Yesoni Kapernaumuti gallaani, biyyiti aka inni gale d'ageete." 
Mark2:2 Nami hedduuni wolti bahe, afaani balbalale fulla bahaniini d'abani. Inni dubbi Waaqa worrati hasae." 
Mark2:3 Jennaani nami afuri nama toko ka kokotae baate isatiini d'ufe. 
Mark2:4 Ammo maro gumitiifi Yesoti d'iaachu dad'abani. Jennaani gubba mana saaqani gararo isaa, afaani iti tolchani, wosaasa namichi ira ch'iisu gadi buusani." 
Mark2:5 Yesoni d'ugefacha jara kana arginaani, waan nama kokotae kaaniini jed'e, Gurba, daba kanke ya si araaramani." 
Mark2:6 Jari Seera beekhu ka achi jiru garaa ufi keesati waan jed'e," 
Mark2:7 Namichi kuni akami akana dubbata? Waaqa arabsayu? Eentu dandae daba nama araarama, Waaqa male?" 
Mark2:8 Jennaani Yesoni aka worri garaa ufi keesati waan kana heregu beennaani waan jed'eeni, Isani maafi waan akana kana garaa keesani keesati hereddani?" 
Mark2:9 Tamiti ira laaftu, aka nama kokotae kanaani, Daba kanke la si araaramani jed'ani mo, Kai, wosaasa tante fud'ad'u, gali jecha?" 
Mark2:10 Ammo aka Ilmi Nama lafa tana irati jabeenna daba nama araaramuuni qabu argitani," 
Mark2:11 inni namicha kokotae kaaniini waan jed'e, Kai, wosaasa tante fud'ad'u, gali jed'e." 
Mark2:12 Inni kae, wosaasa ufi fud'ate, nama ch'ufa durati iti d'aabate. Tanaafi nami ch'ufti mame, Waaqa guddisani waan jed'ani, Nu waan akana kana taka ingarre." 
Mark2:13 Yesoni ammalle gara galaana d'aqe, gumiini isati d'umnaani barsiise." 
Mark2:14 Ato inni deemu, Lawi, ilma Alfayo, ka mana damoosa keesa tau arge waan jed'eeni, Na gula kooti. Inni kae, Yeso gula deeme." 
Mark2:15 Eegi suni Yesoni mana Lawi keesati sagale nyaate. Jara damoosa guurufi nami daba qabu hedduuni, ka Yeso gula yau, Yesofi jara isaa woliini tatae sagale nyaate." 
Mark2:16 Jari Seera beekhu ka Farisayo, isa nama daba qabuufi jara damoosa guuru woliini sagale nyaatu arginaani, waan jara isatiini jed'e, Inni maafi jara damoosa guurufi nama daba qabu woliini sagale nyaata? jed'ani gaafatani." 
Mark2:17 Yesoni waan kana d'ageennaani waan jed'eeni, Nami fayyaa qabu ch'ireesa imbarbaadu, ammo ka fayya inqamneti barbaadata. Anini nama d'uga yaamu ind'umne, ammo maro nama dabaatiifi d'ufe." 
Mark2:18 Jari Yohanatiifi ka Farisayo gaafasi ufi agabsa. Biyyiti isati d'ufte waan jetteeni, Jari Yohanatiifi ka Farisayo maafi ufi agabsa, ka jari kanke ufi inagabsine?" 
Mark2:19 Yesoni waan jed'eeni, Keessumaani fuud'a dandeete agabdi? Hiyyo. Haga abbaani fuud'a worra woliini jiru dandaani ufi inagabsani." 
Mark2:20 Ammo hojjaani ind'ufti, ta abba fuud'a worra biraa fuud'ani, yoosi guyya suni ufi agabsani." 
Mark2:21 Nami woya hareeti kooti dullatiti inerbu. Yo akasi tolche, woyaani hareetiini woya dullati tarsaafte tarsaani guddatti." 
Mark2:22 Nami daad'i hareeti gorjo dullatiti naqu injiru. Yo akasi tolche, daad'iini gorjo tarsaafte, daad'iifi gorjoleeni imbaddi. Ammo daad'iini hareetiini gorjo hareeti malte." 
Mark2:23 Guyya Sabato toko, ato Yesoni oobru dargaye keesa deemu, jari isaa dargaye t'ururate nyaate." 
Mark2:24 Farisayooni waan isaani jette, Me ilaali, worri maafi waan fulla intahiini guyya Sabato tolcha?" 
Mark2:25 Yesoni waan worraani jed'e, Isani waan Daudini duri gaafa isaafi jari isaa sagale d'abe beelae jennaani tolche insoomne?" 
Mark2:26 Inni bara Abiatharini qaallicha gudda, Mana Waaqa seene qit'a Waaqa baasani nyaate, ka sila Seera gula qaalole male nami d'ibiini nyaachu himmalini; ammalle jara isa woliini jirule qoode." 
Mark2:27 Inni waan worraani jed'e, Sabato maro namatiifi mid'aasani male, nama maro Sabatotiifi inuumne." 
Mark2:28 Tanaafi Ilmi Nama abba Sabatooti. 
Mark3:1 Yesoni ammalle mana Waaqa seennaani, nama toko ka harki kokotae achiti arge." 
Mark3:2 Worra tokoti achi jira ka Yeso himachu fed'e tanaafi guyya Sabato aka inni isa fayyisu eegani. 
Mark3:3 Yesoni nama harki kokotae kaaniini waan jed'e, Kooti, arma eji." 
Mark3:4 Jennaani waan biyyaani jed'e, Guyya Sabato aki waan dansa tolchani fullaa mo fullaaniti? Lubbu baasani mo inijeesani? Ammo worri isa gula dubbachu dide ch'allise." 
Mark3:5 Inni dalansuuni worra mimillate, aka garaani worra jabaate lalefannaani nama kaaniini, Harka diriirfad'u jed'e. Inni harka ufi diriirfannaani fayye." 
Mark3:6 Farisayooni gadi yaate hojuma suni jara Herode woliini kora tolchite, aka Yeso ijeesani wolmariatani." 
Mark3:7 Yesoni jara ufi woliini galaanati deebie. Gumiini guddooni ta Galilayatiifi ta Yudeatiifi ta 
Mark3:8 Yerusalemutiifi ta Idumeatiifi ta Yordani gama sunitiifi ta dira Tirotiifi Sidonileeni wolti baate, waan inni tolche d'ageennaani isati d'ufte." 
Mark3:9 Inni jara isaatiini, Hobolo toko na kurfeesa jed'e, aka gumiini guddooni isa indadarbine." 
Mark3:10 Maro inni nama heddu fayyisefi nami d'ukuba qabu ch'ufti isa tuqu fed'e wold'id'ibe. 
Mark3:11 Yo jinniini isa argite ch'ufa, isa durati jidde iyite, Atini Ilma Waaqa jette." 
Mark3:12 Ammo inni aka isiini nama isa imbeesimne jabeese iti seere. 
Mark3:13 Jennaani Yesoni gaara toko kore, jara fed'u ufiti yaame worri isati d'ufe jennaani," 
Mark3:14 Inni jara kud'ani lama fohate ergattu tolfate waan jed'eeni, Anini yayu isani fohad'e aka na woliini teetani. Ammalle isani erga aka yaatani biyya barsiiftani," 
Mark3:15 ammalle humna jinniini nama keesa baaftanile isanii kenna. 
Mark3:16 Nami kud'ani lama ka inni fohate kana: Simoni, ka inni maqa Petro baaseefi;" 
Mark3:17 Yakobo ilma Zebedayo, Yohana oboleesa Yakobo (ka worra lachu inni maqa Boanerge iti baase, akasi jechaani Ilmaani Mandiisu jecha)," 
Mark3:18 Andarea, Filipo, Bartholomayo, Matayo, Tomaso, Yakobo ilma Alfayo, Thadayo, Simoni nama lafa ufi jabeesu," 
Mark3:19 Yuda Iskariote ka isa gurgurate. 
Mark3:20 Jennaani Yesoni worrati gale. Gumiini ammalle wolti baate, tanaafi Yesofi jari isaa sagalele nyaachu dad'abani." 
Mark3:21 Waan kana d'ageennaani fiit'aani isaa isa fuud'u d'ufte, waan biyyiti, Inni ya maraate jetteefi." 
Mark3:22 Jari Seera beekhu ka gari ka Yerusalemu gadi bue waan jed'e, Beelzebuliti isa qabate, ammalle humna gudda jinnitiini jinni nama keesaa baasa jed'ani." 
Mark3:23 Duuba Yesoni biyya yaame, mammaasaani waan jed'eeni, Sheet'ani akami dandae Sheet'ana baasa?" 
Mark3:24 Yo gochiti toko sila gargari baate, gochiti suni imbaddi." 
Mark3:25 Yo worri mana toko sila gargari bahe, worri suni imbada." 
Mark3:26 Ammalle yo Sheet'ani sila woldide, jabeenni isaa qoodame, inni dandae injabaatu; sunini muumme isaati." 
Mark3:27 Ammo nami injiru, ka mana nama jaba dandae ch'abse seene miha isa hatu, yo inni qara nama jaba suni hid'e male; yoosi mana suni dandae hata." 
Mark3:28 D'uguma, waan anini isaniini jed'u, Dabaafi araba nami jed'u ch'ufa Waaqi nama inaraarama," 
Mark3:29 ammo nami Lubbu Qulqullo arabsu araarama inargatu, haga hegeri daba qaba." 
Mark3:30 Wonti Yesoni akana jed'eefi, waan qara biyyiti, Inni jinni qaba jetteefi." 
Mark3:31 Jennaani haad'afi oboleyaani Yeso d'ufani, ala ejaanjani, nama isati ergani yaamani." 
Mark3:32 Gumiini isa d'aatu teteetu waan jetteeni, Ilaali, haatetiifi oboleyaani tante ala ejaanjani si barbaadani." 
Mark3:33 Inni waan jed'eeni, Haad'a tiyyaafi oboleyaani tiyya eennu?" 
Mark3:34 Biyya isa marsite ch'iiftu millate waan jed'e, Kuno, haad'afi oboleyaani tiyya tana." 
Mark3:35 Nami fed'i Waaqa guutu ch'ufti oboleesafi haad'a tiyya. 
Mark4:1 Ammalle d'aatu galaana Galilaya Yesoni nama barsiise. Maro gumiini guddooni isati d'ufteefi, inni hobolo toko ta galaana gubba teetu keesa seene tae. Gumiini ch'ufti afaani galaana teteete." 
Mark4:2 Inni waan heddu mammaasaani biyya barsiise, barsiisa ufi keesati waan jed'e," 
Mark4:3 Dubbi tana ch'aqasa! Nami toko mid'aani fach'aafachu d'aqe. 
Mark4:4 Ato inni fach'aasu, mid'aani gari dandi keesati jigani, simpirreeni d'ufte nyaatte hobaafte." 
Mark4:5 Mid'aani gari lafa d'akha gubbaa jigani, fulla biyyeeni guddo injirre; duuba hure bahani, ammo maro biyyeeni guddo gadi injirrefi," 
Mark4:6 aduuni baanaani gubatani, waan hidda inqamneefi gogani." 
Mark4:7 Mid'aani gari qoraati keesati jigani. Duuba qoraatiini baate, mid'aani qanch'arsite, mid'aani baasu d'owiti." 
Mark4:8 Mid'aani gari fulla biyye dansa jigani, bahani, mid'aani dansa baasani, ka gari sodoma, ka gari jaatama, ka gari d'ibba d'alani." 
Mark4:9 Yesoni waan jed'e, Nami gurra qabu ha d'agayuuti." 
Mark4:10 Ato inni koba jiru, jara isa gula yaufi jari kud'ani lamaani kaani waan mammaasa kana isa gaafate." 
Mark4:11 Inni waan jed'e, Waan qara d'ossani ta Finna Waaqa ya isani kennani; ammo ka gari ka ala jiru mammaasa ch'alla d'agaya," 
Mark4:12 aka, Ato jabeesani ilaalanile woma inagarre, ato jabeesani ch'aqasanile woma inhubanne; wonti akanatiifi, yo akasi tolchani, sila Waaqaati deebiani, Waaqi nama araarama." 
Mark4:13 Jennaani Yesoni waan jed'eeni, Mammaasa kana mid'aafattu? Mammaasa tokole akami mid'aafattani re?" 
Mark4:14 Nami fach'aasu dubbi Waaqa fach'aasa. 
Mark4:15 Mid'aani gari dandi keesati jigani. Kunini nama d'agaye, akuma d'agayeeni Sheet'ani d'ufe, dubbi ta keesati fach'aasani iraa fud'atu." 
Mark4:16 Ka gari lafa d'akha gubbaa jigani. Kunini nama dubbi d'ageennaani gammadaani fud'atu. 
Mark4:17 Ammo waan hidda inqamneefi, bulti diqo ch'alla taani; duuba yo d'ipufi gaargali maro dubbi Waaqatiifi d'ufu, hojja suni yoosu jigani." 
Mark4:18 Ka gari qoraati keesati jigani. Kunini nama dubbi d'agaye," 
Mark4:19 ammo d'ipu lafa tanaatiifi gammada horitiifi d'araani gosa ch'ufaa seente, dubbi qanch'arsitu, aka mid'aani imbaamne." 
Mark4:20 Ka gari biyye dansati jigani. Kunini nama dubbi d'agaye fud'ate, mid'aani ka gari sodoma, ka gari jaatama, ka gari d'ibba baasu." 
Mark4:21 Yesoni waan worraani jed'e, Isiyii, d'uguma ifse d'ufaniini qori yokhaani sire jala inkayani? Gubbati fannisaniiniti?" 
Mark4:22 Wonti d'ossani ta imullimne injirtu, yokhaani wonti daboolaani ta imbuqimne injirtu." 
Mark4:23 Nami gurra qabu ha d'agayu. 
Mark4:24 Ammalle inni waan worraani jed'e, Waan d'ageetani mid'aafad'a! Waan isani namaa kennitani isanile kennani, iti isani daranile." 
Mark4:25 Nama wo qabu iti daraniifi, ammo ka woma inqamne waan inni qabule iraa fuud'ani." 
Mark4:26 Jennaani inni waan jed'e, Finni Waaqa aka nama mid'aani oobru ufi keesa harch'aasu jira." 
Mark4:27 Halkani rafe, guyya kaa, mid'aleeni bahani guddatani, ato inni imbeekatiini." 
Mark4:28 Lafti ufiini mid'aani baafti, qara lata, duuba gurra, eege dargaye bilchaattu." 
Mark4:29 Yo mid'aani bilchaatani, inni maro tokotu mura, waan mid'aani bilchaataniifi." 
Mark4:30 Ammalle inni waan jed'e, Finni Waaqa nu maani wolfakeesina? Mammaasa kamiini himna?" 
Mark4:31 Inni guma dambi fakaata, ka hojja oobrani mukha ch'ufa ira diqa." 
Mark4:32 Ammo eegi fach'aasani guddate, mukha ch'ufa ira d'eerate, dame baasa, aka simpirreeni keesati mana ijaaratte teetu." 
Mark4:33 Mammaasa akana hedduuni inni dubbi biyyati hasae, haga worri dandae mid'aafatu ch'ufa." 
Mark4:34 Inni mammaasa male worrati inhasoomne; ammo kobati jara ufi waan ch'ufa barsiise. 
Mark4:35 Guyyuma suni, lafti galgaloomnaani, Yesoni waan worraani jed'e, Koota, gama kaaniti taakina." 
Mark4:36 Duuba worri kae gumi bira yae, ergattuuni hobolo qara Yesoni keesa jiru keesa duudde isa fuute kaate iti d'aabate." 
Mark4:37 Jennaani bubbeeni guddooni bubbifte, d'awaani galaana hobolo seente, diquma bisaani inguutiini." 
Mark4:38 Ammo Yesoni hobolo duuba, saabo gubba rafuu jira. Beenni isa kaase waan jed'eeni, Aabbo, atini woma iyaaltu yo nu hobaanu?" 
Mark4:39 Yesoni kae, bubbe d'owe waan galaanaani jed'e, Ch'allisi! Bubbeeni ch'allimnaani lafti ch'aqali jette." 
Mark4:40 Jennaani inni waan worraani jed'e, Maafi akana d'eetani? D'ugefacha inqabdani ammalle?" 
Mark4:41 Worri guddo sodaate, waan woliini jed'e, Eennu kunini, ka bubbeefi galaani sarmuufi? jed'ani wolgaafatani." 
Mark5:1 Yesofi jari isaa moga galaana Gerasene geennaani," 
Mark5:2 akuma inni hobolo keesaa bueni, nami jinni hamtu qabu toko," 
Mark5:3 ka awaala keesati galu, ka nami tokoleeni dandae sibiilaleeni inhiinne isaani bahe." 
Mark5:4 Maro heddu harkafi miila isaa sibiilaani hid'ani, ammo sibiila ch'ufa gargari maaqe, ammalle sibiila miilaani hid'ani kute. Nami tokoleeni isa eegu dad'abe." 
Mark5:5 Halkani guyya inni awaalafi gaara gubba dedeeme, iye, d'akhaani ufi d'aane." 
Mark5:6 Yeso fagoti arginaani, utaale, durati jige," 
Mark5:7 qonqo olfud'ate, lalabe waan jed'eeni, Atini maani nara qabda, Yeso, Ilma Waaqa ka gubba jiru? Anini si kad'ad'a, maqa Waaqatiini, na ingaargalchiini." 
Mark5:8 (Wonti inni akasi jed'eefi, Yesoni qara jinni sunini, Jinni, namicha kana keesaa bahi jed'e.)" 
Mark5:9 Duuba Yesoni waan jed'eeni, Maqaani kanke eennu? Inni waan jed'e, Maqaani kiyya Gumi, nu heddu." 
Mark5:10 Inni guddo Yeso kad'ate aka lafa suni keesaa inni jinni suni imbaamne. 
Mark5:11 Booyyeti laaga gaara d'eedu jira. 
Mark5:12 Jinniini Yeso kad'atte waan jetteeni, Booyye suniti nu ergi, aka nu d'anne ke duunnu." 
Mark5:13 Tanaafi Yesoni gadi lakise; jinniini namicha keesaa yaate, booyye ke duudde, duuba booyyeeni ta haga kunki lama orite, galaana duudde, galaani liqimse." 
Mark5:14 Tissituuni baqatte, odu tana diraafi reerati odeesite. Jennaani biyyiti dawachu d'ufte." 
Mark5:15 Yesoti d'ufani, namicha jinni gumi qabu kaani, ka achi tau argani, ka woya uyifate, qalbi ufi qabu." 
Mark5:16 Worri arge kaani waan namicha jinni Gumi jed'ani qabutiifi waan booyyeeni taate worrati odeese. 
Mark5:17 Duuba worri Yeso kad'ate, aka inni lafa worraa keesaa deemu." 
Mark5:18 Ato inni hobolo keesa seenu jiru, namichi qara jinni qabu kaani Yeso kad'ate, aka isa woliini deemu." 
Mark5:19 Ammo Yesoni dide, waan jed'eeni, Beeni, worra ke gali, waan Aabbooni sii tolcheefi aka inni sii nahe worrati himi." 
Mark5:20 Inni kae gale, lafa Dira Kud'ani ch'ufa keesati waan Yesoni isaa tolche hasae; nami isa d'agaye ch'ufti mame." 
Mark5:21 Yesoni galaana gama kaaniti taakinaani, gumiini guddooni ammalle isati baate, ato inni galaana bira jiru." 
Mark5:22 Namichi toko, ka Yairo jed'ani, guddaani mana Waaqa iti kad'atani, isati d'ufe. Yeso arginaani, inni miila isati jige," 
Mark5:23 guddo kad'ate waan jed'eeni, Intalti tiyya diquma induiini, kooti, harka kanke isi ira kayi, aka isiini fayyitu." 
Mark5:24 Jennaani Yesoni kae isa woliini deeme, gumiini guddooni isa gula d'ufte isa gaargalchite." 
Mark5:25 Niiti tokoti jira, ta d'iigi ganna kud'ani lama keesaa yae;" 
Mark5:26 isiini guddo harka ch'ireeyiti gaargalte, hori hobaafte, ammo fayyu dad'abde haga qarale ira d'ibamte." 
Mark5:27 Odu Yeso d'ageennaani, gumi keesaa isa duuba d'ufte, woya isaa qabatte." 
Mark5:28 Isiini waan ufiini jette, Yo anini woya isaa qabad'ele, anini imfaya jette." 
Mark5:29 Hojuma suni d'iigi yaasuma lakise, aka fayyite nafa keesati ufi beete." 
Mark5:30 Maro tokotu Yesoni aka humniti isa keesaa baate arginaani, gumi keesa garagale, Eentu woya tiyya qabate? jed'e gaafate." 
Mark5:31 Jari isaa waan jed'eeni, Gumi si d'iibdu, ato argitu, Eentu na qabate jetta?" 
Mark5:32 Ammo inni worra millate aka nama isa qabate argu. 
Mark5:33 Niitiini taani waan taate beete, sodaatte, holatte, d'ufte, isa durati jidde, diideesite waan ch'ufa iti himte." 
Mark5:34 Inni waan isiini jed'e, Intala, d'ugefachaani tante la si fayyifte, nagayaani deemi, d'ukuba kanke fayyi jed'eeni." 
Mark5:35 Ato Yesoni dubbachu jiru, nami gari ka mana nama gudda suniti d'ufe waan jed'eeni, Intalti tante la doote; maafi moticha ammalle gaargalchita?" 
Mark5:36 Ammo Yesoni dubbi worraa ch'aqasu dide, waan gudda mana Waaqatiini jed'e, Insodaatini, ammo d'ugefachuma d'ugefad'u." 
Mark5:37 Yesoni nama ch'ufa ufi jala rare, Petrofi Yakobofi Yohana oboleesa Yakobo male." 
Mark5:38 Worra nama gudda mana Waaqa iti kad'atani geennaani, Yesoni biyya lalalaani ch'aarte boote iyitu arge." 
Mark5:39 Mana seennaani inni waan worraani jed'e, Isani maafi bootani? Intalti indoone, ammo ufumaa rafti." 
Mark5:40 Worri isa koble, ammo inni worra ch'ufa alati arie, jennaani abba intalatiifi haad'a isitiifi jara isa woliini jiru woliini fulla isiini ch'iiftu seene." 
Mark5:41 Harka isii qabe, waan jed'eeni, Talitha, kumi, akasi jechaani, Intala, anini kai siini jed'a jecha." 
Mark5:42 Hojuma suni intalti kaate deemte. Ganni isii kud'ani lama. Worri duuba aka taka inargiini maadefate. 
Mark5:43 Ammo Yesoni nami tokoleeni waan kana ind'againi jed'e worrati seere. 
Mark6:1 Yesoni achii kae, lafa ufiti gale; jari isaleeni isa gula yae." 
Mark6:2 Guyyaani Sabato geennaani, inni Mana Waaqa iti kad'atani keesati nama barsiise. Nami isa d'agaye hedduuni mame waan jed'e, Namichi kuni eesaa waan kana argate? Qaroomi isaa kennani kunini maani? Wonti mama ta inni tolchu tuni maani?" 
Mark6:3 Kunini ogeesa mukhatiiniti, ilma Mariamu, oboleesa Yakobotiifi Yosafi Yudafi Simoniiniti? Oboleyaani isaa ta dubra arma nu woliini injirtu? jed'ani, isa didani." 
Mark6:4 Yesoni waan worraani jed'e, Raagi fulla ch'ufati guddinna qaba, lafa ufitiifi fiit'a ufitiifi worra ufi keesati male." 
Mark6:5 Achi keesati waan mama tolchu dad'abe, worra fayyad'abe harka ira kaye fayyise male." 
Mark6:6 Waan worri d'ugefacha d'abeefi guddo mame. Jennaani Yesoni olla ch'ufa keesa dedeeme barsiise. 
Mark6:7 Jara kud'ani lama wolti yaame, lama lamaani erge, humna jinni hamtuuni dabsatani iti kenne" 
Mark6:8 waan jed'eeni, Imaltu teesani keesa, ule male, woma tokole infud'atiina: qit'afi subba beese iti kad'ataniifi beesele infud'atiina." 
Mark6:9 Kope salala keyad'a, ammo ubaara lamale inkeyatina jed'e." 
Mark6:10 Ammalle waan worraani jed'e, Hojja mana nama toko olduuddani, arti tataa, haga achi yaataniti." 
Mark6:11 Fulla isani ind'ieesine ch'ufa, yokhaani fulla nami iti isani ind'ageenne ch'ufati, awaara miila ira hat'aad'a aka himacha worraa taatu." 
Mark6:12 Tanaafi worri kae yae, Daba iraa deebia jed'e nama barsiise." 
Mark6:13 Jinni heddule ariani, nama fayyad'abe heddu d'ad'a dibani fayyisani." 
Mark6:14 Waan maqaani Yeso fulla ch'ufa gaheefi, hayyu Herodeni waan kana d'agaye. Nami gari waan jed'e, Yohanani ka nama batisu la duisa keesaa kae jed'ani, tanaafi inni waan mama kana tolcha." 
Mark6:15 Ammo nami gari waan jed'e, Inni Eliya. Nami gari waan jed'e, Inni raaga, akuma raaga duri jira." 
Mark6:16 Ammo Herodeni waan kana d'ageennaani waan jed'e, Isii Yohanani, ka anini mata iraa kute, ya kae? jed'e gaafate." 
Mark6:17 Herodeni duri nama erge, Yohana qabe hid'e, maro Herodia, niiti Filipo, oboleesa isaa, ta Herodeni fuud'eefi." 
Mark6:18 Maro waan kanatifi Yohanani, Aki atini niiti oboleesa keeti fuutu fullaaniti Herodeni jed'e." 
Mark6:19 Duuba Herodiani guddo Yohana jibbite ijeesu feete. Ammo indad'abde. 
Mark6:20 Wonti akanatiifi Herodeni Yohana sodaate, maro aka inni nama d'ugatiifi qulqullo beekhufi, tanaafi nagayaani isa lakise. Inni ato hojja dubbi Yohana d'agayu ch'ufa guddo rifatele sila guddo isa ch'aqasu fed'e." 
Mark6:21 Jennaani hojjaani dansaani Herodia mullatte. Gaafasi guyya qaabacha d'aloota Herodeti. Inni nama gugurdafi shumootafi jara jajaba ka Galilaya ch'ufa wolti yaame. 
Mark6:22 Intalti Herodia olseente, sirbite tabatte, Herodefi keessuma isaa guddo gammachiifte. Jennaani hayyuuni waan intalaani jed'e, Waan atini feetu ch'ufa himad'u, anini sii kenna." 
Mark6:23 Inni isiti kakhate waan jed'e, Waan atini na kad'attu ch'ufa, ato moga lafa ani fidu toko taatele, anini sii kenna jed'eeni." 
Mark6:24 Isiini d'at'e waan haad'aani jette, Anini maani himachu male? Isiini waan jetteeni, Mata Yohana nama batisu kad'ad'u jette." 
Mark6:25 Maro tokotu isiini hayyuti utaalte waan jette, Mata Yohana nama batisu qori guddo keesa naa kayi, maro tokotu naa kenni jetteeni." 
Mark6:26 Hayyuuni guddo lalefate, ammo maro kakhu ufitiifi ammalle maro keessumatiifi dubbi isii didu dad'abe." 
Mark6:27 Tanaafi hayyuuni askarti erge, Mata Yohana ira kuta, kootaani jed'e. Askartiini deemte, mana hid'aansa d'at'e, mata Yohana kute," 
Mark6:28 qori guddo keesa keete, intalati kennite, duuba intalti haad'a ufiti kennite." 
Mark6:29 Jari Yohana waan kana d'ageennaani deemani, reefa Yohana fuud'ani awaalani." 
Mark6:30 Ergattuuni Yesoti dachaate, waan tolchiteefi waan barsiifte ch'ufa isati odeesite." 
Mark6:31 Inni waan worraani jed'e, Lafa mogati nu yaasa koba teteenne diqo boqonna. Wonti akanatiifi nama hedduti oli gadi yaa tanaafi sagale nyaachu dad'abani." 
Mark6:32 Koba ufi hobolo keesa duudani, lafa moga d'aqani." 
Mark6:33 Nami hedduuni worra yau jiru arge worra hubate, dira ch'ufa keesaa miilaani oriani, worra durati achiini bahani." 
Mark6:34 Yesoni hobolo keesaa buunaani, gumi guddo arge naheefi, waan worri ree tissitu inqamne fakaatuufi. Inni waan heddu worra barsiise." 
Mark6:35 Lafti galgaloomnaani, jari isaa isati d'ufe waan jed'eeni, Lafti moga, aduleeni ya d'iite," 
Mark6:36 biyya gadi d'iisi, aka reerafi olla keesa yaani waan nyaatani bitatani." 
Mark6:37 Inni waan jed'eeni, Waan worri nyaatu isaniiyu kennaafi. Worri waan jed'eeni, Yaaneti qit'a shilingi d'ibba afuri binna re, aka worri nyaatu?" 
Mark6:38 Inni waan worraani jed'e, Isani qit'a hagami qabdani? Me, beena, ilaala. Ilaallaani waan jed'ani, Qit'a shanifi qurt'umi lama qamna." 
Mark6:39 Jennaani Yesoni biyya gargari qoqoode, Buuyo dooti gubba tataa jed'eeni." 
Mark6:40 Jennaani biyyiti teteete, fulla gari d'ibbaani, fulla gari shantama shantamaani." 
Mark6:41 Inni qit'a shanifi qurt'umi lamaani taani guure, gubba olmillate, eebise, qit'a ch'ach'abse, jara isati kenne, aka biyya gololchani. Ammalle qurt'umi lamaanile biyya ch'ufaa qoode." 
Mark6:42 Nami ch'ufti nyaate quufe. 
Mark6:43 Worri hamba qit'atiifi qurt'umile ta dadu kud'ani lama miju guure. 
Mark6:44 Jari d'iira ka qit'a nyaate nama kunki shani. 
Mark6:45 Hojuma suni Yesoni ato gumi ufiraa galchu, waan Jara isaatiini jed'e beena hobolo duuda na dura gama galaana gara dira Bethsaida taaka." 
Mark6:46 Inni eegi nagayati biyyaani jed'e d'aqe gaara kore Waaqa kad'ate. 
Mark6:47 Lafti dukanoomnaani, ka hobolooni jiddu galaana deemtu, inni koba lafa godduti hafe." 
Mark6:48 Aka worri hobolo keesati maro d'awa bubbeetifi guddo gaargala qabu arge, baraaqa d'eera bisaani gubba deema d'ufe worraani bahe, ka diquma bira indabriini." 
Mark6:49 Ammo worri ekhera sehe iye. 
Mark6:50 Wonti akanatiifi worri ch'ufti isa arginaani babakhakhe. Jennaani Yesoni worrati dubbate waan jed'e, Garaa jabaad'a, naa, insodaatiina." 
Mark6:51 Inni hobolo worra seennaani, bubbeeni ch'allifte. Worri aka taka inargiini maadefate." 
Mark6:52 Wonti akanatiifi dubbini worraa ingalle, worri waan qit'ale inhubanne." 
Mark6:53 Galaana taakinaani, lafa Genesaretiti d'ufani, hobolo lafa goddu afaani galaanati hid'ani." 
Mark6:54 Hobolo keesaa buunaani, biyyiti maro tokotu Yeso hubatte." 
Mark6:55 Lafa suni ch'ufa keesa oriani nama fayya inqamne itille ira kayani fulla isa iti d'agayani ch'ufati iti geesani. 
Mark6:56 Fulla inni seene ch'ufa, ollafi diraafi lafa oobru taanaanile, nama fayya inqamne geesani fulla gabaya kayani, aka handaara woya isaa tuqani isa kad'atani; duuba nami isa tuqe ch'ufti imfaye." 
Mark7:1 Farisayoofi jari Seera beekhu ka gari, ka Yerusalemu d'ufe, gara Yeso d'aqani." 
Mark7:2 Worri aka jari isaa ka gari, ato harka ind'iqatiini yokhaani t'uri qabanu sagale nyaatani arge." 
Mark7:3 Wonti akanatiifi Farisayoofi Yahudiini ch'ufti, haga harka d'iqatuuti sagale inyaattu, aka aada jaarole ira baratani gula;" 
Mark7:4 ammalle yo gabaya galanile ufi qulqulleesani male sagale inyaatani; ammalle aada d'ibi hedduti jira, ta worri qabu, ta aka d'iqaansa mudunutiifi okote, eele, sire." 
Mark7:5 Tanaafi Farisayoofi jari Seera beekhu isa gaafatani waan jed'ani, Jari kanke maafi aada jaarole gula iyaane, harka t'urichaani sagale nyaatani?" 
Mark7:6 Inni waan jed'eeni, Isani kiyyibdoole, Isayani ka waan keesani fage, d'uga dubbate waan jed'e, Gumiini tuni afaani ufitiini na guddifti, ammo garaani worraa nara fago jira." 
Mark7:7 D'araani na guddisani; wonti akanatiifi seera nama aka dubbi Waaqa barsiisani. 
Mark7:8 Yesoni waan jed'e, Isani Seera Waaqa lakiftani, aada nama gula yaatani." 
Mark7:9 Ammalle waan worraani jed'e, Isani Seera Waaqa akuma dansa lakiftani, aada teesani jabeesitani!" 
Mark7:10 Musani waan jed'e, Abbeetiifi haateti saalfad'u, nama abbaafi haad'aani dubbi hamtu jed'u ha ijeesani jed'e." 
Mark7:11 Ammo isani waan jettani, Yo nami abbaafi haad'a isatiini, Waan isani sila nara argattani Korbani jed'e (akasi jechaani Waaqaa kennani jecha)," 
Mark7:12 duuba isani iti deebitani, aka inni abbaafi haad'a ufi qarqaaru ee injettani." 
Mark7:13 Isani akasi dubbi Waaqa maro aada teesanitiifi lakiftani, ammalle waan akana kana heddu tolchitani." 
Mark7:14 Jennaani Yesoni gumi ufiti yaame waan jed'eeni, Isani ch'ufti na ch'aqasa, dubbi tiyya hubad'a." 
Mark7:15 Wonti ala nama seena ka nama t'ureesa injirtu, ammo waan nama keesa bahati nama t'ureesa. [" 
Mark7:16 Yo nami gurra qabaate ha d'agayu.] 
Mark7:17 Inni biyya lakise mana seene jennaani jari isaa waan mammaasa suni isa gaafate. 
Mark7:18 Inni waan jed'eeni, Isanileeni imid'aafanne? Isani inargitani, aka wonti ala nama seena dandeete nama int'ureesine," 
Mark7:19 maro qalbi isaa inseenne, ammo gaara isaa seente keesa baatuufi. (Jecha kanaani Yesoni aka sagaleeni ch'ufti qulqullo garsiise.)" 
Mark7:20 Inni waan jed'e, Waan nama keesaa bahati nama t'ureesa." 
Mark7:21 Wonti akanatiifi heregi hamaani nama keesaa baha, yokhaani garaa nama keesaa baha: ch'abanoomafa, hannafa, ijeechafa, d'iirafi nad'eeni wolbarachafa," 
Mark7:22 d'araafa, jallumafa, sobafa, ch'eera d'abafa, d'iibifa, arabafa, ufi saaditifi daalluma —" 
Mark7:23 wonti kuni ch'ufti nama keesaa baati, ammalle nama t'ureesiti." 
Mark7:24 Inni achii deeme, lafa Tirofi Sidoni d'aqe. Mana seennaani, aka nami tokoleeni isa beekhu imfeene, ammo ind'okhanne." 
Mark7:25 Niitiini toko ta intalti isi diqooni jinni qabdu waan isaa d'ageete jennaani d'ufte miila isaati jidde. 
Mark7:26 Niitiini tuni gosa Griki, d'alooti isii Sirofoinike. Isiini Yeso kad'atte aka jinni intala isi keesaa baasani." 
Mark7:27 Yesoni waan jed'eeni, Eegi, qara ha ijoolle gololchaniti, aki sagale ijoolle duraa fuud'ani sareti darbatani fullaaniti." 
Mark7:28 Ammo niitiini waan jette, D'uguma, Aabbo, ammo sareleeni mesa jala hamba ijoolle inyaatti." 
Mark7:29 Inni waan isiini jed'e, Maro jecha kanatifi beeni gali, jinniini yayu intala tante keesaa baate." 
Mark7:30 Isiini kaate galte, intala sire ira ch'iiftu ta, jinniini keesaa baate agarte." 
Mark7:31 Jennaani Yesoni lafa Tiroti gale, lafa Sidoni keesa dabre, gara galaana Galilaya d'aqe, kara lafa Dira Kud'ani jed'aniini bahe." 
Mark7:32 Biyyiti nama duuda bopisu isatiini d'ufte, isa kad'atte, aka inni harka isaa ira kayu." 
Mark7:33 Yesoni isa kobati gumi biraa fuud'e, quba ufi gurra isaa keesa kaye, hanch'ufa tufe, araba isaa tuqe," 
Mark7:34 gubba olmillate, hafuura baafate waan jed'e, Efatha, akasi jechaani, Banami jecha." 
Mark7:35 Jennaani gurri isaa baname, hid'aansi araba isaa furame, inni aka dansa dubbate." 
Mark7:36 Yesoni worra jabeese seere, Nama tokoleti inhimina worraani jed'e; ammo worri hagasi ira odeese." 
Mark7:37 Nami waan kana d'agaye ch'ufti guddo mame waan jed'e, Inni waan ch'ufa yayu aka dansa tolche! Nama gurri duudele ind'ageesiisa, ka afaani duudanile indubbachiisa jed'ani." 
Mark8:1 Eegi suni, hojja gumiini guddooni ta sagale inqamne wolti baate, Yesoni jara ufi yaame waan jed'eeni," 
Mark8:2 Anini gumi tanaa naha, waan isiini guyya sadi na woliini oolte, ammalle amma waan nyaattu inqamneefi." 
Mark8:3 Yo anini beelaani galche, karaati gagabani, wonti akanatiifi nami gari fago d'ufe." 
Mark8:4 Jari isa waan jed'e, Isi nami dandae lafa aloo tana keesati gumi hagana geetu tana inqufsa?" 
Mark8:5 Inni, Qit'a hagami qabdani? jed'e gaafate. Torba jed'ani." 
Mark8:6 Jennaani gumi teteesise qit'a torbaanu fuud'e galata Waaqa deebise, qit'a ch'ach'abse jara isaati kenne, biyya gololcha jed'eeni. Jennaani jari biyya gololche." 
Mark8:7 Worri qurt'umi didiqo toko qaba. Yesoni eebimnaani, jara isatiini, Tanale biyyaa kenna jed'e." 
Mark8:8 Nyaatani quufani, hamba dadu torba guutani." 
Mark8:9 Nami nyaate kunki afurifa. Jennaani Yesoni biyya ufira galche," 
Mark8:10 hobolo seene, jara isaa woliini lafa Dalmanutha jed'ani d'aqe." 
Mark8:11 Farisayooni d'ufte, Yesoni woi mormite, akheekha gubba isa iraa barbaade aka isa ilaalattu." 
Mark8:12 Inni maadefate waan jed'e, D'alooti kuni maafi akheekha barbaada? D'uguma wonti anini jed'u akheekha tokole d'aloota kanaa inkennani." 
Mark8:13 Worra biraa deeme, hobolo keesa seene, gama kaaniti taake." 
Mark8:14 Jari isaa qit'a woreega ka isaani gahu fud'achu ded'ee, qit'a toko ch'allati hobolo keesa jira." 
Mark8:15 Yesoni waan Jara isatiini jed'e, Bukho Farisayootiifi ta Herode ira ufi eega." 
Mark8:16 Worri waan woliini jed'e, Isii inni waan qit'a inqamneefi akasi jed'e." 
Mark8:17 Yesoni waan worri jed'e, Beennaani waan worraani jed'e Maafi waan qit'a inqamneefi dubbattani? Ammalle imbeetani yokhaani inhubatani? Qalbiini teesani guddo wo inhubattu." 
Mark8:18 Isani ila qabdani ammo woma inagartani? Gurra qabdani ammo ind'ageetani? Isani woma inqaabatani? 
Mark8:19 Gaafa anini qit'a shani ch'ach'abse nama kunki shani nyaachise, isani hamba dadu hagami guurtani? Worri waan jed'e kud'ani lama!" 
Mark8:20 Ammalle gaafa anini qit'a torba ch'ach'abse nama kunki afuri nyaachise, isani hamba dadu hagami guurtani? Worri! Torba jed'e." 
Mark8:21 Inni waan worraani jed'e, Isani ammalle inhubanne re?"
