John12:40 Inni la ila worraa duuche, qalbi worra d'owe, aka worri ila ufiitini arge, qalbi ufitiini barate, gara ingalle, aka anini worra fayyisu." 
John12:41 Wonti Isayani dubbi tana jed'eefi, waan inni guddinna isaa arge waan isaa dubbateefi." 
John12:42 Taatule nami gugurdaani hedduuni Yeso d'ugefate; ammo maro Farisayo sodaataniifi inhimanne aka mana Waaqa iti kad'atani seenu worra ind'owarre. 
John12:43 Wonti akanatiifi worri saadu Waaqa iraa ta namaa fed'a. 
John12:44 Yesoni qonqo olfud'ate waan jed'e, Nami na d'ugefatu, na ind'ugefatu, ammo ka na erge d'ugefata." 
John12:45 Nami na ilaalu ka na ergele ilaala. 
John12:46 Anini lafa tanati aka ifsa tahu d'ufe, aka nami na d'ugefatu dukana keesa inteenne." 
John12:47 Yo nami toko dubbi tiyya d'agaye inguunne, anini wollaala iti imuru. Wonti akanatiifi anini wollaala namati muru ind'umne, ammo nama baasu d'ufe." 
John12:48 Nami na dide dubbi tiyya imfud'anne, nama iti muru toko qaba. Dubbi anini jed'e suniti guyya muumme wollaala iti mura." 
John12:49 Anini yaada kiyyaani indubbanne, ammo Abba na ergeti seera nati kenne waan ani dubbad'uufi waan ani jed'u na jechisiisa." 
John12:50 Ammalle aka seeri isaa jireenna hegeri namaa kennu imbeekha. Wonti anini dubbad'u kuni waan Aabbooni, Dubbad'u naani jed'e." 
John13:1 Ato jilti Pasaka jed'ani ingahiini, Yesoni aka hojjaani inni lafa keesaa kae gara Abbati galu d'iaatte beekhe. Inni haguma qara jara ufi ka lafa tana gubba woliini tae guddo jaalate, jaalalti sunileeni muumme inqabdu." 
John13:2 Sheet'ani layu Yuda Iskariote, ilma Simoni, keesa seene, aka inni Yeso gurguru heresiise. Eegi worri sagale nyaataa tatae," 
John13:3 Yesoni aka Abbaani waan ch'ufa harka isaa keesa kaye, ammalle aka inni gara Waaqaati bahe Waaqati deebiu beennaani," 
John13:4 sagale ira olkae, woya ufi lafa kaye, woya diqo toko mart'ifate." 
John13:5 Jennaani bisaani qoriti buuse, miila jara ufi d'iqisaa kae, woya ufi ta mart'ifateeni miila worraa haaqe." 
John13:6 Inni fulla Simoni Petro gahe jennaani Petroni, Aabbo, atini miila na d'it'a? jed'e gaafate." 
John13:7 Yesoni waan jed'eeni, Waan anini ammatana tolchuu jiru ati imbeetu, ammo eegi tana imbaratta." 
John13:8 Petroni waan jed'eeni, Haga jiru jireennale na ind'it'u! Yesoni waan jed'eeni, Yo anini si d'iqu d'ibaad'e, atini woma nara inqabdu." 
John13:9 Simoni Petroni waan jed'eeni, Miila ch'allaaniti, ammo harkafi matale na d'iqi." 
John13:10 Yesoni waan jed'eeni, Nami nafa d'iqate waan iti deebie d'iqatuufi inqabu, miila male, inni ya qulqullae. Isani ch'ufti qulqullo, toko male." 
John13:11 Wonti inni akana jed'eefi, inni nama isa gurguru imbeekha; tanaafi inni, Isani ch'ufti qulqullo, toko male jed'e." 
John13:12 Duuba eegi miila worraa d'iqe, Yesoni woya ufi fud'ate, deebie tae waan worraani jed'e, Waan anini isanii tolche beetu?" 
John13:13 Isani Motichafi Aabbo naani jettani, aka dansa jettanile, anini akasuma." 
John13:14 Yo anini Motichafi Aabbo keesani tahe miila keesani d'iqe, isanileeni miila woli d'iqu maltani." 
John13:15 Anini ya akheekha isanii kenne aka isanileeni waan anini isani tolche tolchitani. 
John13:16 D'uguma, waan anini isaniini jed'u, Tisseeni abba ufi ira injirtu, yokhaani ergattuuni nama isii ergate ira injirtu." 
John13:17 Yo isani waan kana beetani tolchitani, ayyaana keesani!" 
John13:18 Anini isani ch'ufa imbaanu; nama anini fohad'e imbeekha. Ammo t'aafiini ta, Nami na woliini qit'a nyaatu nati garagala jette guutamu malte." 
John13:19 Armaa achi ato wonti kuni intahiini isaniti hima, aka yo isiini taate, aka anini Isuma d'ugefattani." 
John13:20 D'uguma, waan anini isaniini jed'u, Nami nama ani ergu fud'ate, nale ya fud'ate; ammalle ka na fud'atu nama na erge fud'ata." 
John13:21 Waan kana jennaani Yesoni guddo lalefate, diideese hime waan jed'e, D'uguma, waan anini isaniini jed'u, Isani keesa, nami toko na gurgurata." 
John13:22 Jari isaa woli mimillate, ammo nama inni baane suni imbeekhani." 
John13:23 Jara isaa keesa nami toko, ka Yesoni jaalate, bobaa Yesoti hirkate tau jira." 
John13:24 Simoni Petro harkaani isa yaame waan jed'eeni, Nama inni baanu eennu? Gaafad'u me." 
John13:25 Inni, ato qoma Yesoti hirkatu, waan jed'eeni, Aabbo, nami ati baantu suni eennu?" 
John13:26 Yesoni waan jed'eeni, Nami anini qit'a kana ch'abse fuutooni tuqe iti kennu sunuma. Duuba inni qit'a fuud'e, fuutooni tuqe Yuda Iskarioteti kenne." 
John13:27 Akuma Yudani qit'a fud'ateeni, Sheet'ani isa keesa seene. Duuba Yesoni waan jed'eeni, Waan tolchu feetu hurrisi tolchi." 
John13:28 Nami achi tau tokoleeni waan inni akasi jed'eefi imbeenne. 
John13:29 Nami gari waan Yudani subba hori harkaa qabatuufi waan Yesoni, Waan nu jilaa feenu nu biti, yokhaani, Hiyyeeyii hori kenni jed'eeni sehe." 
John13:30 Jennaani inni qit'a suni fud'annaani hojuma suni alati bahe. Yo suni lafti halkani. 
John13:31 Yudani bannaani Yesoni waan jed'e, Amma guddinni Ilma Nama la mullate, guddinni Waaqaleeni la isa keesa mullate." 
John13:32 Yo guddinni Waaqa isa keesa mullate, yoosi Waaqumati guddinna Ilma Nama mullisa, ammalle hurrise mullisa." 
John13:33 Ijoolle tiyya, nu haga diqa woliini jira. Isani na barbaadani, ammalle akuma anini qara Yahudiini jed'e amma isanileeni jed'a, fulla anini deemu isani dandeetani ind'uftani." 
John13:34 Seera haraa isanii kenna, Woljaalad'a; akuma anini isani jaalad'e, isanileeni akasi woljaalad'a." 
John13:35 Akanaani yo isani woljaalatani nami ch'ufti aka isani nama kiyya beekha. 
John13:36 Simoni Petroni waan jed'eeni, Aabbo, eesa deemta re? Yesoni waan jed'eeni, Fulla ani deemu dandeete amma na gula ind'uftu; ammo eegi tana na gula d'ufta." 
John13:37 Petroni waan jed'eeni, Aabbo, maafi amma si gula d'ufu indandeenne? Maro kanketiifi anini indua." 
John13:38 Yesoni waan jed'eeni, Maro kiyyafi atini indoota? D'uguma, waan anini siini jed'u, Kormi luku iniyu, haga atini maro sadi na mormatuuti." 
John14:1 Garaa keesani keesa ingaargaliina. Waaqa d'ugefad'a, akasuma nale d'ugefad'a." 
John14:2 Mana Abba kiyya keesa fulla hedduti jira, yo injirre sila isaniti hima. Anini deeme fulla isanii mid'aasa." 
John14:3 Yo anini deeme fulla isanii mid'aase, deebie d'ufe fulla tiyyati isani geesa, aka fulla ani jiru suni isanileeni arti teetani." 
John14:4 Gara ani deemule kara la barattani jed'e. 
John14:5 Tomasoni waan jed'eeni, Gara atini deemtu imbeennu, akamiini karaa beena?" 
John14:6 Yesoni waan jed'eeni, Karaani ana, d'ugaafi jireennileeni ana; nami tokoleeni gara Abba ind'aqu, anaani d'aqu male." 
John14:7 Ato sila na beetani, Abba kiyyale imbeetani; armaa achi isa beetani ammalle ya isa argitani jed'e." 
John14:8 Filiponi waan jed'eeni, Aabbo, Abba nu agarsiisi, nu inquumna." 
John14:9 Yesoni waan jed'eeni, Ila Filipo, nu guyya heddu woliini teenne, ammalle na imbaranne? Nami na arge Abbaale la arge. Atini akami, Abba nu agarsiisi jetta?" 
John14:10 Isii Filipo, aka anini Abba keesa jiru, Abbaaleeni na keesa jiru ind'ugefanne? Dubbini anini isaniini jed'u yaada kiyyaani injed'u. Ammo Abba na keesa jiruti huji ufi tolfata." 
John14:11 Aka anini Abba keesa jiru, ammalle aka Abbaani na keesa jiru, d'ugefad'a; yo akasi ind'ugefanne, maruma hujitiifi na d'ugefad'a." 
John14:12 D'uguma waan anini isaniini jed'u, nami na d'ugefatu, huji anini tolchu innileeni intolcha, ta hagana ira jirtule intolcha, waan anini gara Abba kiyya galufi." 
John14:13 Waan isani maqa kiyyaani kad'atani ch'ufa ani intolcha, aka guddinni Abbaa Ilma keesaa mullatu." 
John14:14 Yo isani maqa kiyyaani waan tokole kad'atani, anini intolcha." 
John14:15 Yo na jaalatani, seera kiyya inguutani." 
John14:16 Duuba anini Abba kad'ad'a, aka qarqaarsa d'ibi isanii ergu, aka inni haga hegeri isani woliini tau." 
John14:17 Inni Lubbu d'uga, ka nami lafa dandae inarganne, waan isa ingarre yokhaani isa imbeenneefi. Ammo isani imbeetani, waan inni isani woliini tae, isani keesa haga hegeri tauufi." 
John14:18 Anini hiyyuma keesati isani illakisu; anini isaniti deebia. 
John14:19 Eegi bulti diqo nami lafa deebie na inargu, ammo isani na agartani, waan anini jiruufi isanileeni injiraattani." 
John14:20 Guyya suni aka anini Abba keesa jiru, ka akuma anini isani keesa jiru ka isanileeni na keesa jirtani beetani." 
John14:21 Nami seera kiyya fud'ate guutu na jaalata. Nama na jaalatu Abbaani kiyyaleeni injaalata; anileeni isa jaalad'e isa ufi beesisa. 
John14:22 Yudani (ka Iskariotetiniti) kaani d'ibiini waan jed'eeni, Aabbo akami ufi nu beesifte nama lafa ufi imbeesisiini?" 
John14:23 Yesoni waan jed'eeni, Yo nami na jaalate dubbi tiyya guuta, Abbaani kiyyaleeni isa jaalata, ammalle nu isati d'umne fulla isaa teenna." 
John14:24 Nami na injaalanne dubbi tiyya inguutu. Dubbini isani d'ageetani tiyyaaniti, ammo ta Abba na ergeti." 
John14:25 Waan kana anini, yayu isaniti hime ato nu wolumaani jirru." 
John14:26 Ammo nami isani jabeesu, ka Lubbu Qulqullo jed'ani, ka Abbaani maqa kiyyaani ergu, waan ch'ufa isani barsiise waan anini isaniini jed'e ch'ufa isani qaabsiisa." 
John14:27 Nagayaani taa, nagayaa kiyya isanii kenna, aki anini isanii kennu aka nami lafa woli kennuniti, garaa keesani keesa gaargaltani insodaatiina." 
John14:28 Aka anini, Deeme isaniti deebia jed'e, la d'ageetani. Yo na jaalattani sila ingammaddani, waan anini gara Abba kiyya deemuufi. Wonti akanatiifi Abbaani kiyya nara gudda." 
John14:29 Anini ya isaniti hime, ato guyyaani ingahiini, aka yo guyyaani suni gahe d'ugefattani." 
John14:30 Armaa achi anini guddo isaniini indubbad'u, wonti akanatiifi hayyuuni lafa tana d'ufuti jira, inni jabeenna womatu ka woiini na tolchu inqabu." 
John14:31 Ammo nami lafaa aka anini Abba jaalad'u beekhu male, tanaafi anini waan ch'ufa akuma inni tolchi naani jed'e tolcha. kaa armaa nu yaasa." 
John15:1 Anini zabibu d'ugaati, Abbaani kiyya abba oobruuti." 
John15:2 Dame na keesa jirtu ta mid'aani imbaamne ch'ufa inni imballeesa, dame mid'aani baaftu ch'ufa inni kolkoleti mid'aasa aka mid'aani haga qarale ira baaftu." 
John15:3 Isani qara la qulqullooftani, maro dubbi anini isaniti hime suniifi." 
John15:4 Na keesa taa, anileeni isani keesa taa. Akuma dameeni koba ufi mid'aani imbaamne, yo mukha zabibuti ejitu male, akasuma isanileeni woma indandeenne, yo na keesa teetani male." 
John15:5 Anini mukha zabibuti, isani damele. Nama na keesa tae anileeni keesa tau ch'allati mid'aani guddo baasa; wonti akanatiifi na male dandeetani woma intolchitani." 
John15:6 Nami na keesa inteenne, akuma dame alati gatani, gatani duuba ingoga; damele suni wolti guurani ibidati naqani gubani." 
John15:7 Yo isani na keesa teetani dubbini tiyya isani keesa teete, waan feetani ch'ufa kad'ad'a, isanii kennani." 
John15:8 Maro waan kanatifi Abbaani kiyya inguddifama, waan isani mid'aani guddo baaftaniifi; akasiini isani jara kiyya taatani." 
John15:9 Akuma Abbaani na jaalatu, anileeni isani jaalad'a; jaalala tiyya keesa taa." 
John15:10 Yo isani seera kiyya guuttani jaalala tiyya keesa teetani, akuma anini seera Abba kiyya guute jaalala isaa keesa tau." 
John15:11 Waan kana anini yayu isaniti hime aka gammadi kiyya isani keesa tae gammadi keesanileeni guutamu. 
John15:12 Seeri kiyya kana: Woljaalad'a, aka anini isani jaalad'e." 
John15:13 Nami tokoleeni jaalala hagana ira inqabu, ta nami maro jaalaani ufitiifi duu." 
John15:14 Isanileeni jaalani tiyya, yo waan anini isaniti hime guuttani." 
John15:15 Armaa achi tissele isaniini injed'u; wonti akanatiifi tisseeni waan abbaani tolchu imbeetu. Ammo anini jaalaani isaniini jed'a, waan dubbi Abba kiyya iraa d'agaye ch'ufa isaniti odeeseefi." 
John15:16 Isani na imfohanne, ammo anati isani fohate erge, aka deemtani mid'aani baaftani, mid'aani ka inhamaanne. Duuba Abbaani waan maqa kiyyaani kad'attani ch'ufa isanii kenna." 
John15:17 Waan kana duuba anini isaniti hima: woljaalad'a. 
John15:18 Yo nami lafa isani jibbe, beekha aka, ato isani injibiini, na jibbani." 
John15:19 Yo isani nama lafa tanaa taatani, nami lafa tana akuma woljaalatu isanile jaalata. Ammo waan isani nama lafaa intahiiniifi ammalle waan anini lafa keesa isani fohad'eefi, nami lafaa isani jibba." 
John15:20 Dubbi anini isaniini jed'e tana qaabad'a: Tisseeni abba ufi ira injirtu. Yo nami qara na gaargalche, isanile ingaargalcha; yo nami jecha kiyya guute, keesanile inguuta." 
John15:21 Ammo waan kana ch'ufa maro maqa kiyyatiifi isani tolchani, waan nama na erge imbeenneefi." 
John15:22 Ato sila anini d'ufe worrati himu d'ibaad'e, daba inqabani; ammo ammatana waan dabaani d'ofatani inqabani." 
John15:23 Nami na jibbu Abba kiyyale injiba. 
John15:24 Ato sila anini huji nami tokoleeni jiddu worrati intolchiini tolchu d'ibaad'e, daba inqabani; taatule amma worri ya anaafi Abba kiyya arge jibbe." 
John15:25 Wonti kunini ch'ufti aka dubbini Seera worraa keesati t'aafani ta, ufumaa na jibbani jettu guutamtu." 
John15:26 Ammo yo Qarqaarsi d'ufu, ka anini gara Abba kiyyati ergu, Lubbu d'uga, ta gara Abbati baatuuti na d'ugeesa." 
John15:27 Isanileeni na d'ugeesitani, waan haguma duri na woliini jirtaniifi." 
John16:1 Anini waan kana yayu isaniti hime aka d'ugefachaani teesani laafte isaani kara iraa ingorre. 
John16:2 Maneeni Waaqa iti kad'atani keesaa isani yaasani. Tana male, hojjaani ind'ufti ta nami isani ijeesu waan Waaqaa hojatu ufi sehu." 
John16:3 Waan kana maro naafi Abba imbeenneefi isani tolchani. 
John16:4 Ammo waan kana qara ya isaniti hime, aka yo guyyaani suni gahe, waan anini duri isaniti hime qaabattani. Waan kana anini gaafa qara isaniti inhimne, waan nu woliini jiruufi." 
John16:5 Ammo amma gara nama na erge gala; isani keesa tokoleeni ka, Garami deemta? jed'e na gaafatu injiru." 
John16:6 Taatule waan anini waan kana isaniini jed'eefi, la guddo lalefattani." 
John16:7 Anini ammo dubbi d'uga isaniti hima: aka anini deemuti ira isani jira. Wonti akanatiifi yo anini indeemini, Qarqaarsi kaani isanii ind'ufu. Ammo yo anini deeme, anini isa isanii erga." 
John16:8 Inni gaafa d'ufu, aka dabi jiruufi aka d'ugaani jirtuufi aka Waaqi wollaala namaati muru nama garsiise hubachiisa." 
John16:9 Aka dabi jiru, waan worri d'ugefachu diduufi;" 
John16:10 aka d'ugaani jirtu, waan anini gara Abba d'aquufi, duuba isani iti deebitani na inargitani;" 
John16:11 aka Waaqi wollaala namati muru, waan hayyu lafa tana wollaala iti muraniifi." 
John16:12 Anini ammalle waan heddu ta isaniini jed'u qaba, ammo amma dandeetani imfud'attani." 
John16:13 Taatule hojja Lubbuuni d'ugaa d'uftu, isiiti waan d'ugaa iti isani qajeelcha. Isiini waan ufi indubbatu, ammo waan d'ageete ch'ufa dubbatti, waan eegi tana d'ufale isaniti himti." 
John16:14 Isiini na guddifte waan kiyya fuute isani agarsiifti. 
John16:15 Wonti Aabbooni qabu ch'ufti tiyya; tanaafi anini, isiini waan kiyya fuute isani agarsiifti isaniini jed'a." 
John16:16 Eegi bulti diqo deebitani na inargitani; ammalle eegi bulti diqo deebitani na agartani. 
John16:17 Jennaani jari isaa ka gari waan woliini jed'e, Wonti inni nuuni jed'u kunini maani? Inni, eegi bulti diqo na inargitani jed'a ammalle eegi bulti diqo deebitani na agartani nuuni jed'a, inni ammalle, waan anini gara Abbaa d'aqa jed'eefi akasi jed'e?" 
John16:18 Worri duuba waan jed'e, Wonti inni, Eegi buti diqo jed'e tunini maani? Waan inni jed'eefi imid'aafanne jed'ani." 
John16:19 Yesoni aka worri isa gaafachu fed'u beennaani waan jed'eeni, Waan anini jed'e suni wolgaafattani? Ta, Eegi bulti diqo na inargitani, ammalle, Eegi bulti diqo deebitani na agartani jed'e suni?" 
John16:20 D'uguma, waan anini isaniini jed'u, Isani laalefattani bootani, ammo nami lafa igammada; isani ilaalefattani, ammo lalalti teesani garagalte gammada taati." 
John16:21 Nad'eeni yo ch'ininfattu ilaalefatti, maro guyyaani isiini deetu gaheefi. Ammo eegi isiini ilme deete, deebite lalala suni inqaabattu, maro gammada daima lafati d'alteefi." 
John16:22 Tanaafi isani amma lalala qabdani, ammo anini deebieti isani arga, garaani keesani ingammada, gammada keesani kana nami dandae isani ira imfud'atu." 
John16:23 Guyya suni woma na ingaafattani. D'uguma, waan anini isaniini jed'u, Waan isani maqa kiyyaani Abba kad'attani ch'ufa inni isanii kenna." 
John16:24 Arra durati taka maqa kiyyaani woma inkad'anne; kad'ad'a, inargattani, aka gammadi keesani qit'au." 
John16:25 Waan kana anini mammaasaani isaniti hime. Guyyaani anini dandae mammaasaani isaniti indubbanne ind'ufa, ammo diideese waan Abba isani agarsiisa." 
John16:26 Gaafasi maqa kiyyaani kad'attani; ammalle anini, Abba isanii kad'ad'a injed'u;" 
John16:27 wonti akanatiifi Abbaani ufiyu isani jaalata. Inni isani jaalata, waan isani na jaalattani aka anini gara Waaqaati d'ufe d'ugefattaniifi." 
John16:28 Anini gara Abbati bahe lafati d'ufe; ammalle anini gara lafaati bahe Abbati deebia jed'e. 
John16:29 Jari isaa waan jed'eeni, Ilaali, ati amma mammaasaani indubbattu ammo diideesite dubbatta." 
John16:30 Ammatana aka ati waan ch'ufa beetu nu la hubanne; waan nami wo si gaafatuufi inqabdu. Waan kanaafi aka atini gara Waaqaati d'ufte d'ugefanna. 
John16:31 Yesoni waan jed'eeni, Isani ammatana d'ugefattani?" 
John16:32 Ilaala, guyyaani isani gargari firfirfamtani ind'ufa, amma ya d'ufe; nami ch'ufti gargari firfirfame, koba na lakiftani. Ammo anini koba injiru; Abba wolumaani jirra." 
John16:33 Waan kana anini ya isaniti hime, aka na keesa nagaya argattani. Lafa keesa d'ipu argattani, ammo garaa jabaad'a! Anini ya lafa dabsad'e." 
John17:1 Yesoni dubbi tana jennaani gubba olmillate waan jed'e, Aabbo, hojjaani ya geete. Ilma kanke guddisi, aka Ilmi si guddisu." 
John17:2 Atini humna nama ch'ufa ira ya isaa kennite, aka inni nama ch'ufa ka atini isaa kennite jireenna hegeri kennuufi." 
John17:3 Ammalle jireenni hegeri kana: aka atini Waaqa tokocha d'uga si beekhani, Yeso Kristole ka atini ergite beekhani." 
John17:4 Huji atini naa kennite suni hobaamnaani anini ya lafa keesati si guddise. 
John17:5 Ee Aabbo, amma tana guddinna naa kenni, guddinna nu ato lafti inuumamiini woliini qamnu suni." 
John17:6 Anini maqa kanke nama atini lafa keesa naa kennite ya agarsiise. Worri qara namuma keti, atileeni ya worra naa kennite. Worri dubbi tante la guute," 
John17:7 amma waan atini naa kennite ch'ufa, aka isiini gara keti baatu, ya baratani." 
John17:8 Anini dubbi atini naa kennite yayu worraa kenne, worrileeni yayu fud'ate; aka anini gara keti bahe worri ya aka isiini d'uga beekhe, ammalle aka atini na ergite yayu d'ugefate." 
John17:9 Anini maro worraatiifi kad'ad'a. Maro nama lafaati inkad'ad'u, ammo nama ati naa kenniteefi kad'ad'a; wonti akanatiifi worri keti." 
John17:10 Wonti kiyya ch'ufti keti, wonti kankeleeni kiyya; guddinni kiyya worra keesa mullata." 
John17:11 Anini amma tana lafa keesa intau, ammo jari kunini lafa keesa taa; anini gara kanke d'ufa. Ee Aabbo qulqullo jabeenna kanke ka atini naa kennite sunini worra qorqorad'i aka worri akuma kenna taka tahu." 
John17:12 Haga anini worra woliini jiru, maqa kanke ka atini naa kennite suniini, anini yayu worra qorqorad'e. Ani layu worra tisse, tokoleeni imbanne, ilma badi suni male, aka t'aafiini guutamtu." 
John17:13 Ammatana anini gara kanke d'ufa, waan kana lafa keesati jed'a, aka gammadi kiyya garaa worraa guutu." 
John17:14 Anini dubbi tante yayu worrati kenne, nami lafa ya worra jibbe, waan worri nama lafa intahiiniifi, akuma anileeni nama lafa intahiini." 
John17:15 Aka atini lafa keesaa worra baaftu anini inkad'ad'u; ammo aka hama suni worra ira d'owartu. 
John17:16 Worri ka lafatiiniti, akuma anileeni ka lafa intahiini." 
John17:17 D'ugaani worra qulqulleesi, dubbini tante d'uga." 
John17:18 Akuma atini lafati na ergite, akasuma anileeni worra lafa keesa erge." 
John17:19 Maro worraatiifi anini ufi qulqulleesa, aka worri d'ugaani qulqullau." 
John17:20 Anini worraa ch'allaa inkad'ad'u, ammo nama maro dubbi worraatiifi na d'ugefatu ch'ufale kad'ad'a." 
John17:21 Wonti ani kad'ad'u, aka worri ch'ufti takaa tahu, akuma Aabbo, atini na keesa jirtu, anileeni si keesa jiru, aka akasuma worrileeni nu keesa jiraatu. Ammalle aka nami lafa, aka atini na ergite d'ugefatu." 
John17:22 Guddinna atini naa kennite anini yayu worraa kenne, aka worri ch'ufti takaa tahu, akuma anaafi sii takaa." 
John17:23 Anini worra keesa jira, atinileeni na keesa jirta, aka worri akuma d'ugaa taka tahu, aka nami lafa aka atini na ergite beekhe, ammalle aka atini akuma na jaalatu worrale jaalatu beekhu." 
John17:24 Ee Aabbo, aka nami atini naa kennite suni fulla anini deemu na woliini tau fed'a, aka guddinna kiyya ka atini naa kennite argani; wonti akanatiifi atini ato lafti inuumamiini na jaalatte." 
John17:25 Ee Aabbo d'uga, nami lafa qara si imbeekhu, ammo anini si beekha, jari kunileeni aka atini na ergite beekha." 
John17:26 Anileeni maqa kanke yayu worra barsiise, ammalle inuma barsiisa, aka jaalalti atini na jaalatte worra keesa teete, anileeni worra keesa tau jed'e." 
John18:1 Yesoni dubbi tana dubbannaani kae, jara ufi woliini laga Kedroni jed'ani taake. Oobruti achi jira, Yesofi jari isaa achi d'aqani." 
John18:2 Yudani, ka isa gurguruleeni fulla suni imbeekha, waan Yesoni maro heddu jara ufi woliini fulla suni d'aqeefi." 
John18:3 Tanaafi Yudani askartiifi hojattu Mana Waaqa ta qaalole gugurdofi Farisayooni ergite, ta ifse heddufi miha lolatiini yaatu, guure gara oobru suni d'aqe." 
John18:4 Yesoni waan isati d'ufa ch'ufa beennaani, worrati d'ufe waan jed'eeni, Eennu barbaaddani?" 
John18:5 Worri waan jed'eeni, Yeso Nazareti barbaanna. Yesoni, Ana jed'e. Yudaleeni ka isa gurguru worra woliini jira." 
John18:6 Yesoni, Ana jennaani rifatani lafati jigani." 
John18:7 Yesoni ammalle waan worraani jed'e, Isani eennu barbaaddani? Worri waan jed'e, Yeso Nazareti." 
John18:8 Yesoni waan jed'e, Anini layu, Ana jed'e. Yo na barbaaddani, worri kuni ha yauti." 
John18:9 Wonti inni akana jed'eefi aka dubbini inni duri jed'e, ta Aabbo, jara atini naa kennite keesaa tokole imballeesine jettu guutamtu." 
John18:10 Jennaani Simoni Petroni goraade qalqala ufi keesa luqise, tisse qaallicha gudda d'ae, gurra mirgicha iraa kute. Maqaani tisse suni Malko." 
John18:11 Yesoni waan Petroni jed'e, Goraade tante qalqalati deefad'u, mala keti, muudunu gaargala ta Aabbooni naa kenne anini ind'ugu? jed'e gaafate." 
John18:12 Jennaani askartiifi namicha gudda worraatiifi hojattuuni Yahudiini ergite Yeso qabde hiite. 
John18:13 Qara gara Anasi geesani. Inni abba niiti Kayafa, ka ganna suni qaallicha gudda tahe." 
John18:14 Kayafani sunini kauma, Nami toko biyyaafi duu male jed'e Yahuditi hime." 
John18:15 Simoni Petrofi nami Yeso toko Yeso gula yaani. Qaallichi guddaani namicha suni guddo fuula beekha, tanaafi inni Yeso woliini ch'icha qaallicha gudda gahe." 
John18:16 Ammo Petroni karra dura ala eje. Namichi kaani ka qaallichi guddaani fuula beekhu gabahe, intala karra eeddu tokooni dubbate Petro olseensise." 
John18:17 Intalti balbala eeddu taani waan Petroni jette, Atini nama nama kanatiyu? Inni waan jed'eeni, Hiyyo, ani nama isatiiniti." 
John18:18 Hojattufi askartiini waan lafti d'aamoteefi ch'ile bobeesite d'aatu ejaanjite qanqamachuti jirti. Petroleeni worra woliini eje qanqamate. 
John18:19 Jennaani qaallichi guddaani waan Yesoni jed'e, waan jara keetifi ka barsiisa teeti nati himi." 
John18:20 Yesoni waan jed'eeni, Anini diideese nama ch'ufaati dubbad'e, anini guyya ch'ufa maneeni Waaqa iti kad'ataniifi Mana Waaqa gudda keesaleti fulla Yahudiini iti wolwoldeetuti barsiise, d'ossaani woma indubbanne." 
John18:21 Maafi na gaafatta? Nama waan anini namaani jed'e d'agaye gaafad'u; worri waan ani jed'e imbeekha. 
John18:22 Akasi jennaani askartiini isa bira ejitu toko Yeso d'abanaafte waan jetteeni, Ati akami qaallicha guddati akana dubbatta?" 
John18:23 Yesoni waan jed'eeni, Yo anini waan hamtu dubbad'e, waan hamtu suni d'ugeesi; ammo yo anini waan dansa dubbad'e maafi na d'abanaafta?" 
John18:24 Duuba Anasini Yeso ka hid'aansa qabu Kayafa qaallicha guddati erge. 
John18:25 Ammalle Simoni Petroni akuma kaani oleje ibida qanqamate. Duuba, Atileeni nama isaatiiyu? jed'ani gaafatani. Inni mormate, Hiyyo, ani nama isatiiniti jed'e." 
John18:26 Tisseeni qaallicha gudda toko, ka fiit'a nama Petroni gurra iraa kute kaani, waan jed'eeni, Ani oobru keesati isa woliini si ingarre?" 
John18:27 Petroni ammalle mormate, hojuma suni kormi lukuu iye." 
John18:28 Jennaani ganama Yeso fulla Kayafati fuud'ani, gara mana Praitorio jed'ani geesani. Tatule worri ufi mana Praitorio oliinduunne, aka akasiini aada ufi dura yakani sagale Pasaka ind'amne." 
John18:29 Pilatoni worrati gabahe waan jed'eeni, Nama kana maani isa himattani?" 
John18:30 Waan isaani jed'ani, Yo sila namichi kunini nama hama intahiini sitiini ind'umnu." 
John18:31 Pilatoni waan jed'e, Isanumaani fuud'a, aada teesani gula qora. Yahudiini waan jetteeni, Aki nu nama ijeemnu fullaaniti." 
John18:32 Tunini aka dubbini Yeso guutamtu, ta inni waan duisa ufi hime." 
John18:33 Pilatoni mana Praitorio jed'ani ammalle seene Yeso yaame waan jed'eeni, Atini hayyu Yahuditi?" 
John18:34 Yesoni waan jed'eeni, Atini ufiini beete jette mo nama d'ibiti waan kiyya siti hime? jed'e gaafate." 
John18:35 Pilatoni waan jed'eeni, Anini gosa Yahuditi? Gosa tantetiifi qaalole gugurdoti si natiini d'ufe, atini maani yakite?" 
John18:36 Yesoni waan jed'eeni, Hayyumti tiyya ta lafa tanaatiiniti; yo sila hayyumti tiyya ta lafa tanaa taate, hojattuuni tiyya naa kalchiti, aka anini harka Yahudi keesa inseene. Ammo hayyumti tiyya ta armatiiniti." 
John18:37 Tanaafi Pilatoni, Atini hayyu re? jed'e gaafate. Yesoni waan jed'eeni, Atu hayyu ya naani jette. Maro waan kanatifi d'alad'e, maro waan kanatifi lafati d'ufe, aka waan kana d'ugeesu. Nami d'ugaa ch'ufti dubbi tiyya d'agaya." 
John18:38 Pilatoni waan jed'e, D'ugaani waan akamiti kana? Akasi jennaani inni ammalle Yahuditi gadibahe waan jed'eeni, Anini waan hamtu isa irati tokole ingarre." 
John18:39 Ammo isani aada toko qabdani, aka anini nama toko guyya Pasaka isanii hiikhu. Tanaafi aka anini hayyu Yahudi isanii hiikhu feetu? jed'e gaafate." 
John18:40 Worri ammalle gohe waan jed'e, Isaaniti, ammo Baraba nu hiikhi. (Barabani suni shifta.)" 
John19:1 Jennaani Pilatoni Yeso fuud'e, Lichooni d'aana jed'e." 
John19:2 Askartiini qoraati aka sure mid'aasite, mata isati marte; woya diimtu iti uyifte, iti d'iaatte," 
John19:3 Hayyu Yahudi, Lubbuuni tante ha d'eeratuuti! jette d'abanaafte." 
John19:4 Pilatoni dubbi tana d'ageennaani Yeso alati gadi baase fulla ch'icha d'akhaa jed'ani ta afaani Ebraniatiini Gabbatha jed'ani barch'uma qorsuma ira tae. 
John19:5 Jennaani Yesoni, ka woya diimtufi sure qoraati qabu, alati gadi bahe. Pilatoni waan worraani jed'e, Nama kana ilaala!" 
John19:6 Qaalole gugurdofi askartiini isa arginaani ch'aarte waan jette, Olfannisi! Olfannisi! Pilatoni waan jed'eeni, Isanumaani fuud'a, olfannisa. Anini waan hamtu isa irati ingarre." 
John19:7 Yahudiini waan jette, Nu seera qamna, seera keenna suni gula inni duu male, waan inni Ilma Waaqa ufiini jed'eefi." 
John19:8 Pilatoni dubbi suni d'ageennaani haga qarale ira sodaate. 
John19:9 Mana Praitorioti deebie waan Yesoni jed'e, Atini eesaa d'ufte? Ammo Yesoni dubbachu dide." 
John19:10 Jennaani Pilatoni waan isaani jed'e, Na jalaa indubbattu atini aka anini jabeenna siini gad'iisufi ka siini hid'u qabu imbeetu?" 
John19:11 Yesoni waan jed'eeni, Sila jabeenna wo na tolchituuni inqabdu, yo Waaqi sii kenne male. Tanaafi nama harka kanketi na kenneeti ira daba qaba." 
John19:12 Waan kanaafi Pilatoni isa gad'iisu fed'e, ammo Yahudiini ch'aarte waan jette, Yo nama kana gad'iifte atini jaala Kaisaritiiniti! Nami hayyu ufi tolchu ch'ufti nyaapa Kaisari." 
John19:13 Pilatoni dubbi tana d'ageennaani Yeso alati gadi baase fulla ch'icha d'akhaa jed'ani ta afaani Ebraniatiini Gabbatha jed'ani barch'uma qorsuma ira tae. 
John19:14 Guyyaani suni guyya waan jila Pasaka kureesani, ammalle lafti guyya gudda. Pilatoni waan Yahudiini jed'e, Hayyu keesani ilaala!" 
John19:15 Worri ch'aare waan jed'e, Armaa fuud'i, Armaa fuud'i, olfannisi! Pilatoni, Hayyu keesani olfannisa? jed'e worra gaafate. Qaaloleeni gugurdooni waan jetteeni, Nu hayyu d'ibi inqamnu, Kaisari male!" 
John19:16 Jennaani Pilatoni harka worraati kenne aka olfannisani. Jennaani worri Yeso iraa fuud'e. 
John19:17 Inni maskali ufi baate deeme, haga fulla Buqe Mata jed'aniti, ta afaani Ebraniatiini Golgotha jed'ani." 
John19:18 Achiti Yeso fannisani; isa woliini nama lama d'ibi, mirgafi bita isaa ka inni jiddu jiru fannisani." 
John19:19 Pilatoni beesisa t'aafe, maskali isaa gararoti mat'ansani. Yeso Nazareti, hayyu Yahudi jed'ani t'aafani." 
John19:20 Beesisa kana Yahudi hedduti soome, waan fullaani Yeso iti fannisani suni d'aatu dira tatefi. Ammalle afaani Ebraniatiifi ka Rumitiifi ka Grikileeni t'aafani." 
John19:21 Qaaloleeni Yahudi gugurdooni waan Pilatoni jette, Hayyu Yahudi int'aafiini, ammo nami kunini, Anini hayyu Yahudi ufiini jed'e t'aafi." 
John19:22 Pilatoni waan jed'eeni, Waan t'aafe yayu t'aafe." 
John19:23 Askartiini Yeso fannimnaani woya isaa fuute fulla afuriti toko tokooni gargari qoodate, ammalle ubaara isaale ka hod'a inqamne fuud'ani." 
John19:24 Duuba waan woliini jed'ani, Intarsaamnu ammo hit'a buufanne nama argatu ilaala jed'ani. Wonti kunini aka t'aafiini guutamtu ta, Woya tiyya gargari qoodatani, ubaara kiyyale hit'a buufatani, jette. Duuba askartiini waan kana tolchite." 
John19:25 D'aatu maskali, haad'a Yesotiifi arera isatiifi Mariamu niiti Kleopatiifi Mariamu Magdaleneeti ejaanje." 
John19:26 Yesoni haad'a ufitiifi namicha inni jaalatu kaani ka bira ejaanjani arge waan haad'a ufiitini jed'e, Ayo, ilma kanke ilaali." 
John19:27 Jennaani inni waan namicha kaaniini jed'e, Haad'a te ilaali. Haga gaafasiti nami suni mana ufiti isi galche." 
John19:28 Eegi suni Yesoni aka wonti ch'ufti guutamte beennaani, aka t'aafiini guutamtu waan jed'e, Anini d'eebu qaba." 
John19:29 Fulla suni qori daad'i qabduti jira; duuba waan aka bututu laaftu toko daad'i taani keesa kayani, hokoti fannisani, afaani isaati geesani." 
John19:30 Yesoni daad'i suni argannaani waan jed'e, La hobaate! Jennaani mataani gajed'e, lubbuuni keesaa baate." 
John19:31 Yahudiini maro guyyaani suni guyya kurfeesa jed'aniifi aka reefi guyya Sabato maskali gubbaati inhamne, Pilato kad'ate, aka miila worraa ch'ach'absani reefa achi guurani. Waan guyyaani Sabato guyya jaba tatefi." 
John19:32 Duuba askartiini d'at'e, miila nama qara kaani ch'absite, ka lameeso ka isa woliini fannisanile." 
John19:33 Ammo fulla Yeso geennaani isa ch'iche argani, miila isa inch'absine." 
John19:34 Taatule askartiini toko woraanani t'iit'a woraante jennaani d'iigafi bisaani baafatani. 
John19:35 Nami waan kana arge la d'ugeese, dubbini isaa d'uga. Aka d'uga dubbatule inni imbeekha, aka isanileeni d'ugefattani." 
John19:36 Wonti kunini aka t'aafiini guutamtu ta, Lafe isaa tokole inch'absani jette." 
John19:37 Ammalle t'aafiini d'ibiini waan jettu, Biyyiti namicha woraanani daawatti." 
John19:38 Eegi waan kana Yusufuni ka nama Arimathaya, gara Pilato d'aqe reefa Yeso kad'ate. (Yusufuni suniini nama Yesoti ammo maro Yahudi sodaateefi ufi d'osse.) Pilatoni ee jennaani inni d'aqe reefa fuud'e." 
John19:39 Nikodemoni ka halkaniini Yesoti d'ufe qayya haga kiilo sodoma qumbiifi hargeesa wolti naqe d'ufeeni. 
John19:40 Worri duuba Yeso fuud'e aka aada Yahudi ta hojja nama awaalani, booftani mamare qumbiifi qayya iti naqe." 
John19:41 Fulla isa fannisani suni oobruti jira; oobru suni keesa awaala haraati jira, ka taka nama iti inawaaliini." 
John19:42 Maro guyya Kurfeesa Yahuditiifi, ammalle waan awaali suni d'io jiruufi, achiti Yeso awaalani." 
John20:1 Guyya qara ka torbaani suni, Mariamu Magdalene, ato lafti imbariini, ganamaani gara awaala d'at'e, d'akha awaala ira gangalchani argite." 
John20:2 Jennaani isiini utaalte, gara Simoni Petrofi namicha Yesoni jaalate kaani d'at'e waan jetteeni, Aabbo ya awaala keesaa fuud'ani, ammalle fulla kayani nu imbeennu jette." 
John20:3 Jennaani Petrofi namichi kaani gara awaala d'aqani. 
John20:4 Worri lachu woliini orie, ammo namichi kaani Petro qolche, durati awaala gahe." 
John20:5 Gajed'e, keesa ilaale, woya boofta ta lafa teetu arge, ammo awaala keesa inseenne." 
John20:6 Jennaani Simoni Petroni isa gula d'ufe, awaala keesa seene, woya boofta ta achi teetufi." 
John20:7 Surele ta qara matati marani arge. Sureni suni woya boofta woliini injirtu ammo wolti dachaasani koba kayani. 
John20:8 Jennaani namichi kaleeni, ka durati awaala gahe, keesa seene arge d'ugefate." 
John20:9 Worri qara t'aafi, ta Yesoni duisa keesaa kau male jettu inhubanne." 
John20:10 Jennaani jari Yeso suni kae mana ufiti gale. 
John20:11 Ammo Mariamuni awaala bira ejite boote. Duuba ato bootu, isiini gajette awaala keesa millatte," 
John20:12 malaika lama ta woya adaadi uyifatte teteetu agarte, toko gama mata, taleeni gama miila, fulla qara reefi Yeso ch'iisu." 
John20:13 Worri waan isiini jed'e, Intala, maafi boota? Isiini waan jetteeni, Aabbo Yeso ya armaa fuud'ani, fulla isa kayanile anini imbeekhu jette." 
John20:14 Waan kana jennaani ufira mich'iramte Yeso oleju argite; ammo aka inni Yeso inhubanne. 
John20:15 Yesoni waan isiini jed'e, Intala, maafi boota? Eennu barbaadda? Isiini nama oobru eegu isa seete waan jetteeni, Aabbo, yo atini isa armaa fuute, fulla isa keete nati himi, d'aqe isa fuud'a." 
John20:16 Yesoni, Mariamu! jed'eeni. Isiini mich'iramte, afaani Ebraniatiini, Rabboni! isaani jette. (Rabboni jechaani Aabbo jechu.)" 
John20:17 Yesoni waan isiini jed'e, Naa inqabatini, anini qara gara Aabbo olindeemne. Ammo gara oboleyaani tiyya d'aqi waan jettuuni, Anini gara Abba kiyyatiifi Abba keesani, gara Waaqa kiyyatiifi gara Waaqa keesani oldeema, jed'i iti himi jed'e." 
John20:18 Mariamu Magdalene gara jara isaa d'at'e, Anini yayu Aabbo arge jetteeni, ammalle waan inni isiini jed'e worrati himte." 
John20:19 Galgaluma guyya suni, guyya qara ka torbaani suni fulla jari ergattuuni Yeso jiru ka maro soda Yahuditiifi balbalti ch'ufaansa qaabdu Yesoni d'ufe, jiddu worra keesa eje waan jed'eeni galchuumi isani nagayaa?" 
John20:20 Akasi jennaani, inni harkafi t'iit'a ufi agarsiise. Jari isaa Aabbo arginaani guddo gammade." 
John20:21 Jennaani Yesoni ammalle waan jed'eeni, Nageenni isani bad'aad'a? Akuma Aabbooni na erge anileeni isani erga." 
John20:22 Akasi jennaani, inni hafuura ufi worraa kenne waan jed'eeni, Lubbu Qulqullo argad'a." 
John20:23 Nama isani daba araaramtaniifi ch'ufa inaraaramaniifi; ka isani araaramufi diddani ch'ufti araarama inargatu. 
John20:24 Ammo Tomasoni ka laku jed'ani ka jara kud'ani lamaani keesa jiru gaafa Yesoni d'ufe, worra woliini injiru." 
John20:25 Duuba jari kaani waan jed'eeni, Nu la Aabbo argine. Ammo inni waan worraani jed'e, Yo anini harka isaa keesa gadaanisa musumaraa arge, quba kiyya fulla musumaraani woraane ke kaye, harka kiyyale t'iit'a isaa keesa kaye male, diqo haganale ind'ugefad'u jed'e." 
John20:26 Eegi torbaani toko, ka jari isaa ammalle mana keesa jiru, Tomasoleeni achi jira. Balbalti ch'ufaansa qabdi, ammo Yesoni d'ufe, jiddu worraa keesa eje waan jed'eeni, Galchuumi isani nagaya?" 
John20:27 Jennaani inni waan Tomasoni jed'e, Quba kanke achi asi gaqabad'u, harka kiyya ilaali; ammalle harka kanke asi gadi d'eerefad'u, t'iit'a tiyya keesa kayi. Ind'areefatiini, ammo d'ugefad'u!" 
John20:28 Tomasoni, Aabbo kiyyafi Waaqa kiyya! jed'eeni." 
John20:29 Yesoni waan jed'eeni, Atini na arginaani d'ugefatte? Ayyaana worra ka ato inargiini d'ugefatu jed'e." 
John20:30 Yesoni akheekha d'ibi heddu jara ufi durati tolche, ka kitaaba kana keesati int'aafini." 
John20:31 Ammo haga kana ya t'aafani, aka isani aka Yesoni Kristo Ilma Waaqa d'ugefattani, d'ugefannaani aka maqa isatiini jireenna argattani." 
John21:1 Eegi waan kana Yesoni ammalle fulla galaana Tiberia jed'aniiniti jara ufiti ufi agarsiise. Aki inni ufi agarsiise akana. 
John21:2 Simoni Petrofi Tomaso ka Laku jed'aniifi Nathanieli ka dira Kana ka lafa Galilayatiifi, ilmaani Zebedayotiifi jari isaa lama d'ibiini woliini jirani." 
John21:3 Simoni Petroni waan worraani jed'e, Anini qurt'umi guuru d'aqa. Worri waan jed'eeni, Nuleeni si gula yaana. Duuba worri kae, hobolo duude: ammo halkani suni woma tokole inarganne." 
John21:4 Lafti bariinaani, Yeso moga galaana eju argani, ammo jari isaa aka inni Yeso inhubanne." 
John21:5 Jennaani Yesoni waan jed'eeni, Isii d'iiro, waan nyaatani qabdu? Worri, Inqamnu jed'e." 
John21:6 Inni waan worraani jed'e, T'urura hobolo gama mirgati buusa, inargattani. Jennaani worri buuse, olfuud'u dad'abani, maro qurt'umiini heddu taateefi." 
John21:7 Duuba namichi Yesoni jaalatu kaani waan Petroni jed'e, Nami sunini Aabbo! Simoni Petroni aka inni Aabbo d'ageennaani, woya ufi uyifate inni qara qulla galaana ke bue." 
John21:8 Jari kaani t'urura qurt'umi miju hirkise, hobolo taani ke d'ufe. Qara lafa ira fago injirani, ammo malaafi ejata d'ibba toko ch'alla." 
John21:9 Lafa godduni baanani ibida ch'ile qabu, qurt'umi ibida ira kayanifi, qit'ale argani." 
John21:10 Yesoni waan worraani jed'e, Qurt'umi reefu qabdani armaani koota." 
John21:11 Duuba Simoni Petroni hobolo seene t'ururu qurt'umi gugurdo d'ibbaafi shantami sadi qabu mogati hirkise, ato qurt'umiini akasi heddu taatele t'ururaani inch'inne." 
John21:12 Yesoni waan worraani jed'e, Koota buud'o baafad'a. Jara isaa keesa tokoleeni ka garaa jabaate, atini eennu jed'e gaafate injiru wonti akanatiifi worri aka inni Aabbo ya beekhe." 
John21:13 Yesoni d'ufe, qit'a fuud'e worraati kenne; qurt'umile akasuma kenne." 
John21:14 Kunini amma maro sadeeso ka Yesoni jara ufiti mullate, eegi duisa keesaa isa kaasani." 
John21:15 Buud'o baafannaani, Yesoni waan Petroni jed'e, Simoni ilma Yohana, worra kana ira naa jaalatta? Petroni waan jed'eeni, Ee Aabbo, aka anini si fed'u atini imbeeta. Inni waan jed'e, Ilmoole hooliye tiyya nyaachisi." 
John21:16 Maro lameeso inni waan jed'eeni, Simoni ilma Yohana, naa jaalatta? Inni waan jed'eeni, Ee Aabbo, aka anini si fed'u atini imbeeta. Inni waan jed'eeni, Hooliye tiyya tissi." 
John21:17 Ammalle maro sadeeso Yesoni waan jed'eeni, Simoni ilma Yohana, Atini naa feeta? Petroni garaa ufi keesati lalefate waan inni maro sadeeso, Atini naa feeta? jed'eefi. Inni waan jed'eeni, Aabbo, atini waan ch'ufa imbeeta, aka anini si fed'u imbeeta. Yesoni waan jed'eeni, Hooliye tiyya nyaachisi." 
John21:18 D'uguma, waan anini siini jed'u, Gaafa kaimooma keti mart'ifatte gara feetu deemte; ammo gaafa jaartu harka kanke d'eerefatte, nami d'ibiini si hid'e gara atini imfeene si geesa jed'e." 
John21:19 (Wonti inni dubbi tana jed'eefi, aka duisa Petroni durana duuni Waaqa guddisu himu.) Akasi jennaani Yesoni, Na gula kooti jed'eeni." 
John21:20 Petroni garagale namicha Yesoni jaalatu ka Yeso gula deemu arge. (Namicha suni ka gaafa guyya eege Yesoni sagale jara ergattu isaa woliini nyaate, bobaa Yesoti hirkate Aabbo, eennu ka si gurguru? jed'e gaafate.)" 
John21:21 Petroni isa arginaani waan Yesoni jed'e, Aabbo, yoosi, nami kunini maani taha?" 
John21:22 Yesoni waan jed'eeni yo anini isa haga anini deebiuti na eegu fed'e, atini maani iraa qabda? Iyaaliini anuma gula kooti." 
John21:23 Jechi sunini jara Yeso ch'ufa gahe, ammo worri inhubanne, waan nami suni indoone sehe. Ammo Yesoni inni induu injenne, ammo wonti inni jed'e yo anini aka inni haga anini d'ufuti na eegu fed'e atini maani iraa qabda?" 
John21:24 Kunini nama waawaawaan kana d'ugeesu, ka waan kana t'aafe; aka dubbini isaa d'uga nu imbeenna." 
John21:25 Ammalle waan heddu d'ibiti jira ka Yesoni tolche. Yo sila ch'ufa t'aafani, mala kiyya, laftileeni kitaaba hagasi ch'ufa dandeete imfuutu." 
Acts1:1 Ee Theofilo kitaaba qara keesati anini waan Yesoni tolcheefi, waan inni barsiise ya sii t'aafe, haga inni huji ufi iti keyate asi," 
Acts1:2 haga inni gubbati oldeebie. Ato gubbati oliindeebiini, inni jabeenna Lubbu Qulqullotiini jara qara fohate ergattu tolfateti d'aame." 
Acts1:3 Inni eegi due guyya afurtama maro heddu ergattu ufiiti mullate aka aka jiru worra ufi agarsiisu, aka nami dandae ind'aarefanne, worri isa arge inni waan Finna Waaqa worrati hasae." 
Acts1:4 Worri woli woldeennaani, inni seera ufi worrati kenne waan jed'eeni, Yerusalemu keesaa imbahiina, ammo qarqaarsa Aabbooni isanii kennu, ka anini qara isaniti hime eegad'a." 
Acts1:5 Yohanani bisaaniini isani batise, ammo eegi bulti diqo toko isani Lubbu Qulqullooni batifamtani." 
Acts1:6 Ergattuuni wolwoldeete waan Yesoni jette Aabbo, atini ammatana guddinna lafa tana Israeliti deebifta?" 
Acts1:7 Yesoni waan worraani jed'e, Guyyafi ganni ka Aabbooni fohate harka isaa ke jira, waan isani beekhu himmalini." 
Acts1:8 Ammo eegi Lubbuuni Qulqullooni isani ira buute jabeenna argattani, Yerusalemufi Yudeafi Samaria keesafi haga muumme lafale ch'ufa na d'ugeesitani." 
Acts1:9 Eegi inni dubbi tana dubbate, ato worri ilaalu, inni gubbati oldeebie, dumansi isaani dura isa d'osse." 
Acts1:10 Ato worri ammalle tae gubba ilaalu, jari lamaani toko, ka woya adaadi qabu, worra bira ejaanje." 
Acts1:11 Jari kaani waan jed'e, D'iiro, worra Galilaya, isani maafi ejaanjitani gubba ilaaltani? Yesoni kuni, ka isani bira gubbati oldeebie, akanuma eegi tana deebia, aka isani isa gubba deemu argitani kana." 
Acts1:12 Jennaani ergattuuni gaara ejersa, ka d'aatu dira Yerusalemu, biraa yaate kaate dirati dachaate." 
Acts1:13 Achini baanaani, Petrofi Yakobofi Yohanafi Andareafi Filipofi Tomasofi Bartholomayofi Matayofi Yakobo ilma Alfayofi Simoni Zelotefi Yudani ilmi Yakobo d'aqani mana qara kee taani kaaniti dachaani." 
Acts1:14 Worri kunini ch'ufti nad'eenifi Mariamu haad'a Yesotiifi oboleyaani isaa woliini garaa tokooni Waaqa kad'ate. 
Acts1:15 Eegi bulti diqo, Petroni jiddu oboleyaani keesa olejate (ka worri ch'ufti wolti nama d'ibba tokofi diddama) waan jed'eeni," 
Acts1:16 Oboleyaani tiyya t'aafiini tuni ta Lubbuuni Qulqullooni, afaani Dauditini waan Yuda ka worra Yeso qabe Yesotiini d'ufe fadde guutamu malte." 
Acts1:17 Wonti akanatiifi Yudani qara namuma keenna ka nu huji taka woliini hojanne. 
Acts1:18 (Yudani hori inni dabaani argate kaaniini eegi oobru bitate, lafati jige, garaani tarsae, marumaani ch'ufti keesaa buani." 
Acts1:19 Nami Yerusalemu jiru ch'ufti waan kana d'agaye, afaani worratiini oobru suni maqa Akeldama iti baasani, akasi jechaani oobru d'iiga jecha.)" 
Acts1:20 Wonti akanatiifi kitaaba Faaru keesati t'aafani waan jettu, Mani isaa ha ona tahu, nami tokoleeni iti ingaliini. Ammalle nami d'ibiini ha huji isaa fud'atu jed'ani." 
Acts1:21 Tanaafi nami toko goli teenna tahu male, aka inni kaisa Aabbo Yeso nu woliini d'ugeesu, nami suni nama bara nu Aabbo woliini teenne nu woliini jiru tahu male, haga Yohana nama batisutifi haga Yesoni nu bira gubbati olgale." 
Acts1:22  
Acts1:23 Duuba worri nama lama maqa d'ae; toko Yusufu, ka Barsaba jed'ani, ka maqaani lameeso Yusto; ka lameeso Mathiya." 
Acts1:24 Jennaani Waaqa kad'atani waan jed'ani, Aabbo, atini garaa nama ch'ufa imbeeta. Nama atini fohatte, jara lamaani kana keesa nu garsiisi," 
Acts1:25 aka inni huji tana keesa qooda argate ergattu tahu ta Yudani lakise fulla isaa malte biraa deeme. 
Acts1:26 Jennaani hit'a buusani, hit'aani Mathiya ira bue, inni ergattu kud'ani tokoti darame." 
Acts2:1 Guyyaani Pentekoste geennaani, worri ch'ufti garaa tokooni fulla tokoti wolwoldae." 
Acts2:2 Maro tokotu wonti aka bubbe bubbiftu toko gubba gadi buute mana worri keesa tatau kaani guutte. 
Acts2:3 Wonti araba ibida fakaatta toko worrati mullatte worra ch'ufa ira teete. 
Acts2:4 Worri ch'ufti Lubbu Qulqullooni guutamnaani, afaani d'ibi dubbachu iti keyatani, aka Lubbuuni worra dubbachifte gula." 
Acts2:5 Yerusalemu keesa Yahuditi jira, worra aada guutu, ka lafa ch'ufaa d'ufe." 
Acts2:6 Qonqo tana d'ageennaani biyyiti guddo mamte wolti baate, nami ch'ufti ergattu afaani worraa dubbattu d'agaye." 
Acts2:7 Nami ch'ufti guddo maadefate waan jed'ani, Me ilaala, worri dubbatu kunini ch'ufti worra Galilayatiyu?" 
Acts2:8 Nu ch'ufti akami worra kana ka afaani keenna ka nu iti d'alanne dubbatu d'ageenna re? 
Acts2:9 Nu worra Parthi, worra Medi, worra Elami; ammalle ka lafa Mesopotamia, ka Yudea, ka Kapadokia; worra Ponto, ka Asia," 
Acts2:10 ka Frigia, ka Pamfilia, ka lafa Misiri, ka lafa Libia ta Kirene d'iaattu. Nu nami gari worra Rumiti," 
Acts2:11 Yahudifi gosa d'ibile ta aada Yahudi iti gale; ammalle nama lafa Kretefi lafa Arafti — ammo nuuni ch'ufti worra huji Waaqa ta mama afaani keennaani dubbatu d'ageenna! 
Acts2:12 Worri ch'ufti guddo mame, mid'aafachu dad'abani waan woliini jed'ani, Wonti kunini maani?" 
Acts2:13 Nami gari goyeese waan jed'e, Jari kunini farso haraa d'uge machae." 
Acts2:14 Ammo Petroni jara kud'ani toko kaani woliini olejate qonqo olfud'ate waan gumiini jed'e, Worra Yudeatiifi ka Yerusalemu ke tau, dubbi tiyya ch'aqasa." 
Acts2:15 Jari kuni imachoomne, dubbini akasiiniti; wonti akanatiifi ammiti saa sadi ka diiramaati." 
Acts2:16 Ammo tunini waan raagi Yoelini dubbate," 
Acts2:17 Waaqi waan jed'u, Guyya muumme anini akana tolcha: Anini Lubbu tiyya nama ch'ufa ira buusa; ilmaani teesani ta d'iiratifi ta uwaleeni imfaddi, kaimi keesani daayya arga, jaaroleeni teesanileeni oobju oobjatti." 
Acts2:18 Anini tissele tiyya ta d'iiratifi ta uwale Lubbu tiyya ira buusa, duuba imfagani." 
Acts2:19 Anini waan mama gubbati agarsiise, lafa keesaleti akheekha agarsiisa: D'iigafi ibidafi aarati lafati bua." 
Acts2:20 Aduuni indukanoofti, jiileeni aka d'iiga diimata, ato guyyaani guddaani jabaani Aabbo ingahiini." 
Acts2:21 Yoosi nami maqa Aabbo yaamatu ch'ufti imbaafama. 
Acts2:22 Dubbi tana d'agaya, worra Israeli! Yeso Nazareti, nama Waaqi fohate, waan mamatiifi huji jabdufi akheekha Waaqi isa keesa tolcheeni isani agarsiise, aka isani beetani, waan wonti kunini jiddu teesani keesa taateefi." 
Acts2:23 Waaqi, fed'ifi beekhuma ufi gula, ya aka Yeso harka keesaniti kennani buufate; isani isa fanniftani, harka nama dabaatiini ijeeftani." 
Acts2:24 Ammo Waaqi isa kaase, gaargala duisa keesaa isa baase, waan dooti dandeete isa indabsanneefi." 
Acts2:25 Wonti akanatiifi Daudini waan isaa dubbate waan jed'e, Anini guyya ch'ufa Aabbo fuula kiyya durati arga, inni harka kiyya ka mirga jira, aka anini inchochoone." 
Acts2:26 Tanaafi garaani kiyya maache, arabi kiyyaleeni guddo gammada; nafi kiyya abdiini taa." 
Acts2:27 Woni akanatiifi atini lubbu tiyya fulla ekherati illakiftu, yokhaani aka hojattuuni tante shamu atini ee injettu." 
Acts2:28 Atini kara jireenna ya na barsiifte, yo fulla tante jiru anini gammada qabu." 
Acts2:29 Oboleyaani tiyya, anini waan jaarsa Daudi qulqulleese isaniti dubbachu male. Inni ya due awaalani, awaali isaa haga guyya kanale arma fulla teenna jira." 
Acts2:30 Inni raaga, waan Waaqi isati kakhate imbeekha: Waaqi isati kakhate aka d'aloota isaa keesa nama toko aka isaa hayyu tolchu." 
Acts2:31 Daudini, waan Waaqi kakhate arginaani waan kaisa Kristo fage waan jed'e, Fulla ekherati isa illakimne, nafi isaa inshamne." 
Acts2:32 Waaqi ya Yeso kana duisa keesaa kaase, nu ch'ufti d'uga waan kanaati." 
Acts2:33 Ya harka mirgicha Waaqati olfuud'ani, inni Lubbu Qulqullo isa ira argate, akuma Abbaani kakhate; wonti isani amma argitani d'ageettani kunini qarqaarsa inni nuu kenne." 
Acts2:34 Daudini ufi gubba ind'anne, ammo inni waan jed'e, Aabbooni waan Abba kiyyaani jed'e, Harka kiyya ka mirga tai," 
Acts2:35 haga anini nyaapa kanke barch'uma miila kanketi tolchuuti. 
Acts2:36 Nami Israeli ch'ufti ha hubatuuti, aka Waaqi Yeso kana ka isani mukhati fanniftani Aabboofi Kristo tolche!" 
Acts2:37 Biyyiti waan kana d'ageennaani guddo rifatte sodaatte waan Petrofi ergattu taaniini jette, Nu maani taana, oboleyaani?" 
Acts2:38 Petroni waan jed'eeni, Daba iraa deebia, isaniini ch'ufti maqa Yeso Kristotiini batifama, aka daba keesani isanii araaramani; duuba qarqaarsa Waaqa ka Lubbu Qulqullo argattani." 
Acts2:39 Kakhu Waaqa isanifi ilmaani teesani kakhatani, ammalle ta eegi tana d'alattule — worra Aabbo Waaqi keenna ufiiti yaamu ch'ufa." 
Acts2:40 Petroni dubbi tanaafi ta d'ibileeni worra gorse waan jed'e, Gaargala d'aloota hama kanati d'ufu duraa ufi baasa!" 
Acts2:41 Nami hedduuni dubbi isaa d'ugefate batifame, nami haga kunki sadi gumiti darame." 
Acts2:42 Guyya ch'ufa ergattu ira wo baratani, woldeenna woliini tolchani, qit'a Waaqa ch'absani, woliini nyaatani Waaqa woliini kad'atani." 
Acts2:43 Ergattuuni waan mamatiifi akheekha heddu tolchite, tanaafi nami ch'ufti sodaate." 
Acts2:44 Worri d'ugefate ch'ufti wold'aqe waan ch'ufa woliini tolche woliini qoodate. 
Acts2:45 Hori yo gurgurani nami ch'ufti akuma woli ira gaargala qabuuni gargari qoodata. 
Acts2:46 Guyya ch'ufa Mana Waaqa keesati wolwoldaani sagale mana woli keesati nyaatani garaa gammadatiifi d'ugaatini woliini taani," 
Acts2:47 Waaqa faarsani, biyyiti ch'ufti worra jaalatte. Guyya ch'ufa Aabbooni nama baafamu gumiti dare." 
Acts3:1 Guyya toko Petrofi Yohanani saatiini kad'achaa geennaani qit'e saa sagali Mana Waaqa woliini d'aqani. 
Acts3:2 Nama toko ka haguma d'alate miili naafateeti jira. Guyya ch'ufa isa fuud'ani, fulla balbala Mana Waaqa ta mid'aadu jed'ani kayani, aka inni nama Mana Waaqa seenu hori kad'atu." 
Acts3:3 Inni Petrofi Yohana Mana Waaqa seenani arginaani woi kad'ate. 
Acts3:4 Petrofi Yohanani isa sonaani ilaalani waan jed'aniini, Nu ilaali!" 
Acts3:5 Inni aka woi ira argatu worra ilaale. 
Acts3:6 Petroni waan jed'eeni, Shilingifi worqi sii kennu inqabu, ammo waan qabu sii kenna: maqa Yeso Kristo ka Nazaretitiini kai deemi." 
Acts3:7 Petroni harka mirgicha isaa qabe oli kaase. Hojuma suni faanafi koometuuni isaa jabaatte," 
Acts3:8 inni olch'ee ejate deeme. Jennaani worra woliini Mana Waaqa seene, olch'ech'ee Waaqa faarse." 
Acts3:9 Nami ch'ufumaanu isa deeme Waaqa faarsu arginaani," 
Acts3:10 aka inni nama balbala Mana Waaqa ta Mid'aadu jed'ani dura tae woi kad'atu beennaani, waan inni tahe kana guddo mamani maadefatani." 
Acts3:11 Ato namichi kaani Petrofi Yohana qabate olch'ech'eu, nami ch'ufti mame balbala Solomoni jed'aniti wolwoldae." 
Acts3:12 Petroni waan kana arginaani waan biyyaani jed'e, Worra Israeli, maafi waan kana mamtani sonaani nu ilaaltani, aka waan nu jabeenna keennaani yokhaani qulqullooma keennaani nama kana fayyimne?" 
Acts3:13 Waaqa Abrahamutiifi ka Isaaqotiifi ka Yakobotiifi Waaqa aabbooti teennati jabeenna Hojattu isaa Yesoti kenne. Isani harka jara gugurdati isa kennitani Pilato durati isa mormattani, eegi Pilatoni isa lakisu fed'ele." 
Acts3:14 Inni qulqullofi dansa, ammo isa diddani Pilato kad'attani aka algala toko isani hiikhani," 
Acts3:15 Abba Jireenna ijeeftani. Ammo Waaqi duisa keesaa isa kaase, nu d'uga waan kanaati." 
Acts3:16 Jabeenna maqa isati namicha naafa kana fayyise. Waan isani argitani d'ageettani kana jabeenna maqa isaatiini tolchani. D'ugefacha inni Yeso d'ugefateti namicha kana isani durati fayyise. 
Acts3:17 Duuba, oboleyaani tiyya, anini imbeekha, aka wonti isanifi jaaroleeni teesani Yeso tolchite daalluma." 
Acts3:18 Waaqi waan duri afaani raagootatiini hime, aka Kristoni gaargalu male, akanaani guute." 
Acts3:19 Tanaafi daba iraa deebia, Waaqaati fuula deefad'a, aka inni daba isani iraa d'iqu," 
Acts3:20 jabeenni Lubbu Qulqullo Aabbo iraa d'ufa innileeni Yeso Kristo ka qara isanii fohate erga. 
Acts3:21 Inni gubba tau male, haga waan ch'ufa hareesa tolchaniiti, akuma Waaqi afaani raagoota isaa qulqullotiini duri hime." 
Acts3:22 Wonti akanatiifi Musani waan jed'e, Aabbo Waaqi keesani raaga isani erga, akuma inni na erge, gosa teesani keesa. Waan inni isaniini jed'u ch'ufa ch'aqasu maltani." 
Acts3:23 Nama waan raagi sunini jed'u inch'aqamne gumi Waaqa keesaa baasani balleesani. 
Acts3:24 Raagooti ch'ufti, Samuelifi worri eegi isaa d'ufeleeni, waan guyya kana dubbate." 
Acts3:25 Kakhuuni Waaqi afaani raagootatiini kakhate teesani, isanileeni wold'aqisa Waaqi abbooti teesani woliini tolche qoodattani. Akuma inni Abrahamuuni jed'e, D'aloota keetiini anini nama lafa ch'ufa eebisa." 
Acts3:26 Tanaafi Waaqi isa fohate, Hojattu ufi qara isaniti erge, aka isani eebise kara keesani hama ira isani gorsu." 
Acts4:1 Ato Petrofi Yohanani taani gumiini hasaanu, qaalolefi namicha gudda Mana Waaqatiifi Sadukayoni worrati d'ufani." 
Acts4:2 Duuba Waan Petrofi Yohanani maro kaisa Yesotiifi, Nami due inkaa jed'ani barsiisaniifi," 
Acts4:3 Petrofi Yohana qaqabani mana hid'aansa keesa kayani, waan lafti galgalooftefi haga boriyya achuma keesati lakisani." 
Acts4:4 Taatule nami dubbi suni d'agaye hedduuni d'ugefate; nami d'iira ka d'ugefate haga kunki shani. 
Acts4:5 Boriyya jara gugurda Yahuditiifi jaarolefi jari Seera beekhu Yerusalemu keesati," 
Acts4:6 Anasi Qaallicha Guddafi Kayafafi Yohanafi Iskandafi worra d'ibi ka fiit'a Qaallicha Guddatini wolwoldaani. 
Acts4:7 Petrofi Yohana jiddu worra keesa d'aabani waan jed'aniini, Humna tamiini yokhaani maqa eenutiini waan kana tolchitani?" 
Acts4:8 Jennaani Petroni Lubbu Qulqullooni guutamnaani waan worraani jed'e, Shumootaafi jaarole gosa Israeli," 
Acts4:9 Yo isani guyya kana waan huji dansa ta nu tolchine, namicha naafa kana fayyimne nu qortani," 
Acts4:10 isaniini ch'ufti beekhu maltani, ammalle gochiti Israeli ch'ufti hubachu malte, namichi kunini jabeenna maqa Yeso Kristo Nazareti, ka isani ijeeftani Waaqi duisa keesaa kaaseeni fayya ufitiini isani dura eja." 
Acts4:11 Yesoni kuni sunuma ka t'aafiini waan isaa dubbatte waan jettu, D'akhaani isani ijartuuni tuffattani ya d'akha jaba tahe." 
Acts4:12 Bahisi isa ch'alla keesa jira, nami d'ibiini ka Waaqi namaa kenne lafa keesa injiru, ka nu dandeenne baanuuni." 
Acts4:13 Jaaroleeni kora jannooma Petrofi Yohana arginaani, ammalle aka worri woma insoomiini hubannaani mamte, aka worri Yeso woliini tae beekhani." 
Acts4:14 Waan dubbatani d'abani, maro namicha fayyisani kaani, ka Petrofi Yohana bira eju, arganifi." 
Acts4:15 Tanaafi, Hasaa qamna, fulla korati yaa worraani jed'ani, wolmariatani waan woliini jed'ani," 
Acts4:16 Worra kana maani tolchina? Nami Yerusalemu keesa jiru ch'ufti aka worri kuni waan mama kana tolche quba qaba, nu dandeenne imorminu." 
Acts4:17 Ammo aka nama ch'ufa waan kana d'agayu d'owarru, koota, worrati seera, aka guyya d'ibi maqa kanaani nama imbarsiimne." 
Acts4:18 Petrofi Yohana yaamani iti seeraani, aka maqa Yesotiini maro d'ibi nama imbarsiimne." 
Acts4:19 Ammo worri waan jed'eeni, Isaniyu ilaala, dubbi teesani mo ta Waaqa ch'aqamna?" 
Acts4:20 Wonti akanatiifi nu waan d'ageenne argine kana d'ossu indandeenu. 
Acts4:21 Duuba kori kaani maro nami ch'ufti waan argeefi Waaqa faarseefi, waan worra tolchu d'abe iti seere galakise." 
Acts4:22 Namichi fayyisani kaani ganni isaa afurtama ira jira. 
Acts4:23 Eegi gallakisani, worri gumiti dachae, waan qaalole gugurdofi jaaroleeni worraani jette ch'ufa gumiti hasaani." 
Acts4:24 Duuba gumiini suni waan kana d'ageennaani, garaa tokooni Waaqa kad'ate waan jette, Aabbo gudda, atini Waaqa lafafi gubba uume galaanafi waan keesa jira ch'ufale uumte." 
Acts4:25 Atini afaani tisse tante, abba keenna Dauditini dubbatte waan jette, Gochiti d'ibiini maafi dalante, yokhaani biyyiti maafi ufumaa wo heredde?" 
Acts4:26 Hayyooti lafa ch'ufa kurfefatte, jari lafa fidu wold'aqe, aka Aabboofi Kristo isaa ijeesani." 
Acts4:27 Dira kana keesati Herodefi Pontio Pilatoni gosa d'ibiifi gosa Israelitiini wold'aqani, aka Yeso, hojattu tante qulqullo, ta atini Kristo tolchite ijeesani." 
Acts4:28 Worri wold'aqe aka waan ch'ufa ka atini harka kanketiifi fed'i tantetiini qara buufatte tolchani. 
Acts4:29 Ammatana, Aabbo, dubbi worri nuuni sodaachiisu tana ch'aqasi, aka tisseleeni tante jabaatte soda male dubbi tante dubbattu tolchi." 
Acts4:30 Harka kanke d'eerefad'u, nama fayyisi, aka akheekha waan mama maqa Hojattu tante qulqullo Yesotiini tolchani." 
Acts4:31 Eegi Waaqa kad'atani, fullaani worri iti kad'atu chochoote, worri ch'ufti Lubbu Qulqullooni guutame, soda male dubbi Waaqa dubbatani." 
Acts4:32 Gumiini d'ugefatte suni ch'ufti nama garaa tokotiifi qalbi tokoti. Nami tokoleeni waan qabuuni kiyya injenne, ammo waan qabani ch'ufa gargari qoodatani." 
Acts4:33 Jabeenna guddaani waan kaisa Aabbo Yeso odeesani, Waaqileeni guddise worra eebise." 
Acts4:34 Nami tokoleeni ka gaargala qabu worra keesa injiru. Nami oobru yokhaani mana qabu, ch'ufa gurgure, hori suni ch'ufa guure," 
Acts4:35 harka ergattuti kenna; duuba hori kaani nama ch'ufaa gargari qoodani. 
Acts4:36 Namichi toko ka Yusufu jed'ani, ka ergattuuni Barnaba jettuuni (Nama nama jabeesu jechu), ka gosa Lawi, ka lafa Kipro," 
Acts4:37 oobru ufi gurgure, hori suni d'ufeeni harka ergattuti kenne." 
Acts5:1 Ammo namicha toko jira, ka Anania jed'ani, niitiini isaa Safira. Inni oobru toko gurgurate," 
Acts5:2 hori haga gari, ka niitiini isaa beetu, hambifate, ka hafe kaani ergattuti kenne." 
Acts5:3 Petroni waan jed'eeni, Anania, Sheet'ani maafi garaa kanke keesa seene, atini Lubbu Qulqulloti kiyyibde, hori argatte gama toko hambifatte?" 
Acts5:4 Eegi oobru suni ingurguriini tanteti, gurgurraanile horiini kanketi. Atini maafi garaa kanke keesati aka waan kana tolchitu qulqulte? Atini nama insoomne ammo Waaqa sobde!" 
Acts5:5 Akuma waan kana d'agayeeni, Ananiani jige due; nami waan kana d'agaye ch'ufti sodaate." 
Acts5:6 Jari kaima toko d'ufe, reefa isaa woyaani mamare d'aqe awaale." 
Acts5:7 Eegi saa sadifa niitiini isaa, ta waan kana tokole quba inqamne, mana olseente." 
Acts5:8 Petroni waan isiini jed'e, Me nati himi, oobru suni woma kanati gurgurtani? Isiini waan jetteeni, Ee, woma suniti, gurgurre." 
Acts5:9 Duuba Petroni waan jed'eeni, isani akami aka lubbu Aabbo sobdani wold'at'ani? Me ilaali, miili jara d'iirsa kanke awaale ammalle fulluma balbala jira, sile imfuud'ani." 
Acts5:10 Isiini hojuma suni miila isaa durati jidde doote. Jari kaima kaani olduunnaani isi doote argani duuba baatani d'aqani d'awatu d'iirsa isiti awaalani. 
Acts5:11 Gumi Waaqatiifi nami waan kana d'agaye ch'ufti guddo sodaate. 
Acts5:12 Harki ergattu akheekhafi waan mama heddu gumi keesati tolche. Worri ch'ufti garaa tokooni balbala Solomoni jed'aniti wolwoldae. 
Acts5:13 Biyyiti ch'ufti waan dansuma worraa dubbate, ammo maro sodaatiifi nami tokoleeni worraati daramu dad'abe." 
Acts5:14 Ammo nami hedduuni, d'iirafi nad'eenileeni d'ugefannaani gumi Aabbooti darame." 
Acts5:15 Maro waan kanatifi nama fayyad'abe sireefi itile ira ch'iifsisani karaati geesani, aka yo Petroni achi dabru gandiduni isaa worra ira baatu." 
Acts5:16 Nami hedduuni Yerusalemufi dira d'awatu Yerusalemuti yae, nama fayyad'abefi ka jinni hamtu qabu worratiini d'ufani; nama ch'ufa fayyisani." 
Acts5:17 Qaallicha Guddafi nami isa woliini jiru ch'ufti, ka goli Sadukayo, guddo ergattu qot'isani," 
Acts5:18 ergattu guurani, mana hid'aansa keesa naqani." 
Acts5:19 Ammo malaikaani Aabbo toko d'ufte, halkani balbala bante, worra hid'aansa keesaa yaafte, waan jetteeni," 
Acts5:20 Beena, Mana Waaqa d'aqa, dubbi jireenna hareesa kana hasaa, nama barsiisa." 
Acts5:21 Akasi d'ageennaani worri Mana Waaqa ganamaani duude nama barsiise. Jennaani Qaallicha Guddafi waheli isaa ch'ufti d'ufani, jaarole kora wolti yaamani, akasi jechaani jaarole ch'ufa ta gosa Israeli jecha; duuba nama mana hid'aansati ergani, ergattu yaamani." 
Acts5:22 Ammo shumooti d'ufte mana hid'aansa keesaa worra d'abde, gara jaarole koraa d'at'e iti himte waan jette," 
Acts5:23 Yo nu mana hid'aansatiini baane, balbala hid'aansa qabdu agarre, askarti eedule agarre, ammo balbala banannaani nama tokole keesa d'amne." 
Acts5:24 Gudda Mana Waaqatiifi qaaloleeni gugurdooni waan kana d'ageennaani waan ergattuuni taate guddo mamte. 
Acts5:25 Jennaani namichi toko d'ufe waan worraani jed'e, Ilaala, jari isani mana hid'aansa keesa nat'ani, Mana Waaqa keesa ejaanje biyya barsiisu jira jed'e." 
Acts5:26 Jennaani namichi gudda Mana Waaqa askarti woliini ergattu fuud'u d'aqe, ammo irreeni infuune laanuma fuud'ani, wonti akanatiifi worri waan biyyiti d'akhaani d'aantu sehe sodaate." 
Acts5:27 Eegi d'ufaniini jaarole kora dura d'ad'aabani, Qaallichi Guddaani worra gaafate waan jed'eeni," 
Acts5:28 Nu ya aka isani maqa kanaani imbarsiimne isaniti seereeyu? Ammo isani ya Yerusalemu dubbi tanaani guuttani, ammalle d'iiga nama kana mata keenna ira kayu feetani!" 
Acts5:29 Ammo Petrofi ergattuuni d'ibiini waan jetteeni, Nu nama ira Waaqa ch'aqasu malle." 
Acts5:30 Waaqi ababoota teenna, Yeso ka isani ijeeftani mukha irati fanniftani kaase." 
Acts5:31 Waaqi la harka mirgicha ufitiini isa guddise, aka inni Gudda keennafi Qarqaarsa keenna tahe, gosa Israeli daba iraa deebise araarama worraa kennu." 
Acts5:32 Waan kana nuleeni isaa d'uga, nufi Lubbuuni Qulqulloleeni, ta Waaqi worra isa ch'aqasu kennu." 
Acts5:33 Waan kana d'ageennaani garaani isaani guddo gubate, aka ergattu ijeesani mariatani." 
Acts5:34 Ammo namichi Farisayo toko, ka Seera beekhu, ka nami ch'ufti saadu, ka Gamalieli jed'ani, kora jaarole keesati olejate, Ergattu diqo toko alati baasa jed'e." 
Acts5:35 Jennaani waan jaaroleeni jed'e, Isani worra Israeli, waan jara kana tolchitani eegad'a." 
Acts5:36 Duri namichi toko ka Theuda jed'ani, ka nama gudda ufi sehe, d'ufe, nami haga d'ibba afuri isati mataqe. Ammo isa ijeesani, jennaani nami isa gula yae ch'ufti gargari firfirfame." 
Acts5:37 Eegi nama suni, bara maqa nama t'aafani kaani namichi Galilaya toko ka Yuda jed'ani, nama heddu ufiti yaame. Ammo isale ijeesani, ammalle nami isa gula yau ch'ufti gargari firfirfame." 
Acts5:38 Tanaafi amma waan anini isaniini jed'u, Jara kana hanqad'a, lakisa. Yo dubbi tanaafi hujiini tuni ta namaa taate inuma baddi;" 
Acts5:39 ammo yo ta Waaqaa taate balleesu indandeetani. Hegeri isani Waaqaani morkitanifa. 
Acts5:40 Worri dubbi isaa quufe, ergattu yaamani d'aanani, aka worri deebie maqa Yeso Kristotiini nama imbarsiimne seeraani gallakisani." 
Acts5:41 Ergattuuni ta gammada qabdu kaate jaarole kora biraa yaate, waan Waaqi maro maqa Yesotiifi gaargalafi ch'eera worratiini d'ufeefi." 
Acts5:42 Guyya ch'ufa Mana Waaqatiifi mana biyya keesaleti Odu Dansa ta Yeso Kristo odeesani nama barsiisani. 
Acts6:1 Eegi suni jari Yeso heddannaani worra afaani Griki dubbatufi ka afaani Ebrania dubbatu wold'abani. Jari afaani Griki dubbatu nad'eeni teenna ta d'iirsowani iraa raawate, qooda sagale ka guyya ch'ufa keesati aka dansa inqorqoratani jed'e himate." 
Acts6:2 Tanaafi jari kud'ani lamaani kaani gumi ch'ufa wolti yaame waan jed'eeni, Aki nu Dubbi Waaqa lakimne nama gololchinu fuulaaniti." 
Acts6:3 Tanaafi oboleyaani, jiddu teesani keesa nama torba, ka d'uga, fohad'a, nama Lubbu Qulqullooni guutamefi ka qalbi qabu, duuba nu huji tana iti kennina." 
Acts6:4 Ammo nu guyya ch'ufa Waaqa kad'anne dubbi isaa hasoomna. 
Acts6:5 Dubbini tuni gumi ch'ufa gammachiifte, Stefano ka d'ugefachaafi Lubbu Qulqullooni guutame fohatani, ammalle Filipofi Prokorofi Nikanorifi Timonifi Parmenafi Nikolao, ka Antiokia, ka aada Yahuditi gale fohatani." 
Acts6:6 Jara kana ergattu duraani d'ufani, ergattuuni Waaqa kad'atte harka ira keete." 
Acts6:7 Dubbini Waaqa guddatte, ammalle henni jara Yeso ka Yerusalemu keesa guddate, qaaloleeni hedduleeni d'ugefatte gula yaate." 
Acts6:8 Stefanoni ka eebafi jabeennaani guutame, jiddu biyya keesati waan mamafi akheekha heddu tolche." 
Acts6:9 Jennaani jari mana Waaqa iti kad'atani ka balcha jed'ani tokofi, Yahudi lafa Kireneti d'ufteefi ta Iskanderia d'ufte, ammalle Yahudiini Kilikia d'ufte Stefanoni morkite." 
Acts6:10 Ammo Lubbuuni Waaqa jabeenna isaa kennite, Stefanoni morku dad'abani." 
Acts6:11 Tanaafi jara toko gumbeesani waan jed'aniini, Nu namicha kana ka Musafi Waaqa arabsu, d'ageenne jed'a namati odeesa." 
Acts6:12 Worri gumifi jaarolefi jara Seera beekhu iti kaase, d'ufani Stefano qabani, gara jaarole kora geesani." 
Acts6:13 Nama d'ara dubbatu barbaadani waan jed'aniini, namichi kunini dubbi hamtu Mana Waaqa qulqullo kanaafi waan Seera Musale dubbachu illakimne jed'a." 
Acts6:14 Nu ya d'ageenne aka inni, Yesoni Nazareti mana qulqullo kana balleese aada Musani nuu kenne tana garagalcha jed'u!" 
Acts6:15 Nami kora keesa jiru ch'ufti ila Stefanoti qabe, fuula isaa ka aka fuula malaika fakaatu argani." 
Acts7:1 Jennaani Qaallichi Guddaani, Dubbini tunini d'uga? jed'e gaafate." 
Acts7:2 Stefanoni waan worraani jed'e, Oboleyaanifi abbooti tiyya, me ch'aqasa! Waaqi Guddaani abba keenna Abrahamuti mullate, gaafa inni Mesopotamia keesa tau, ato inni lafa Haraniti ingodaaniini." 
Acts7:3 Inni waan jed'eeni, Lafa tantetiifi worra kankele keesaa godaani, lafa anini sii agarsiisuti qubad'i." 
Acts7:4 Jennaani inni lafa Kaldayo keesaa bahe lafa Harani qubate. Eegi abbaani isaa due, inni lafa tana ta isani amma keesa tetaniti qubate." 
Acts7:5 Waaqi lafa suni gaafasi ejata tokole isaa inkennine, ammo Anini siifi d'aloota kanke ka hegeri d'ufuu kenna jed'e iti kakhate ato inni ijoolle ind'alfatini." 
Acts7:6 Waaqi waan jed'eeni, D'alooti kanke lafa nyaapaa keesa taa, achiti worra boojiani haga ganna d'ibba afuri worra gaargalchani." 
Acts7:7 Ammo, anini gosa suni ta worra gaargalchitu wollaala iti mure balleesa jed'e, duuba eegi suni lafa suni keesaa bahani lafa tana keesati na guddisani jed'e." 
Acts7:8 Duuba Waaqi aada wold'aqisa ta qabanqaba Abrahamuti kenne. Tanaafi eegi torbaani toko Abrahamuuni Isaaqo qabanqaba qabe; Isaaqoni Yakobo qabanqaba qabe, Yakoboleeni ilmaani isaa kud'ani lamaani qabanqaba qabe, ta gochiti teenna iraa horte." 
Acts7:9 Ilmaani suni Yusufu d'iibifate, aka inni tisse tahu lafa Misiriti gurgurte. Ammo Waaqi isa woliini tae," 
Acts7:10 gaargala isaa ch'ufa nagayaani keesaa baase. Yusufuni Farao hayyu Misiri dura d'umnaani, Waaqi adaba dansaafi qalbi kenneefi. Faraoni Yusufu lafa Misiritiifi worra isaaleti jaallaba tolche." 
Acts7:11 Eegi suni beelafi gaargali guddaani lafa Misiritiifi ta Kanaani d'ufe ababooti teennaleeni sagale d'abde. 
Acts7:12 Ammo Yakoboni aka mid'aani lafa Misiri keesa jirani d'ageennaani ijoolle isa, ababoota teenna, lafa suniti erge, tuni imaltu worraa ta qarati." 
Acts7:13 Imaltu lameeso keesa, Yusufuni oboleyaani ufii ufi beesise, Faraoleeni worra Yusufu fuula barate." 
Acts7:14 Jennaani Yusufuni nama erge, abba ufi Yakobofi fiit'a ufii ch'ufa, nama haga torbaatami shani yaame." 
Acts7:15 Jennaani Yakobofi ilmaani isaa lafa Misiri d'at'e achiti raawate. 
Acts7:16 Haga lafa Shekemu worra baatani achiti worra awaalani, awaala Abrahamuuni jaarole Hamori ta Shekemu ira bitate keesa." 
Acts7:17 Ammo guyyaani Waaqi Abrahamuti kakhate d'iaannaani, nami keenna lafa Misiri keesati heddate." 
Acts7:18 Eegi suni hayyuuni d'ibiini ka Yusufu imbeenne lafa Misiri fide. 
Acts7:19 Inni gosa teenna sobe, ababoota teenna gaargalche, ijoolle didiqo alati gata ha hobaatu jed'e." 
Acts7:20 Bara suni Musani d'alate, inni guddo mid'aaga, haga jia sadi mana abba ufi keesati d'ossaani guddate." 
Acts7:21 Alati isa gannaani, intalti Farao fud'atte aka ilme ufii isa guddifte." 
Acts7:22 Musani barsiisa gosa Misiri ch'ufa barate, dubbifi huji keesa nama gudda tahe." 
Acts7:23 Ganni isaa afurtama geennaani, inni oboleyaani ufii, ta gosa Israeli, guddo argu fed'e." 
Acts7:24 Oboleesa gosa isaa toko ka d'aanani arginaani inni isa qarqaare, haalo baaseefi, nama Misiri kaani d'ae ijeese." 
Acts7:25 Wonti akanatiifi inni waan gochiti isaa aka Waaqi harka isatiini nyaapa worraa duraa baasu beetu sehe; ammo worri imbeenne. 
Acts7:26 Boriyya ato worri woldidu, inni ufi agarsiise, wolti araarsu fed'e waan jed'eeni, D'iiro, isani oboleyaani, maafi woldiddani?" 
Acts7:27 Ammo namichi fulla injirre kaani waan isaani jed'e, Eenuti hayyufi jaallaba keenna si tolche?" 
Acts7:28 Aka nama Misiri kaani ijeefte nale ijeesu feeta? 
Acts7:29 Dubbi tana d'ageennaani Musani baqate, lafa Midiani jed'ani keesa tae, achiti ilmaani lama d'ale." 
Acts7:30 Eegi ganna afurtama, diida gaara Sinai keesati, malaikaani Aabbo Musati mullatte, gurbi bobeetu toko keesa." 
Acts7:31 Musani arginaani guddo mame. Inni iti d'iaate aka ilaalu, ammo qonqooni Aabbo isati d'ufte waan isaani jette." 
Acts7:32 Anini Waaqa ababoota teetiti, Waaqa Abrahamutiifi ka Isaaqoti ka Yakoboti. Jennaani Musani ilaalu sodaate holate." 
Acts7:33 Aabbooni waan isaani jed'e, Kopele yaafad'u, fullaani atini ejitu tunini fulla qulqullo." 
Acts7:34 Anini gaargala jara kiyya, ka lafa Misiri keesa jiru, yayu arge, aka worri nati waakhu d'agaye baasu d'ufe. Amma kooti, anini lafa Misiriti sii erga." 
Acts7:35 Namichi gumiini Israeli didde Musa. Worri waan jed'eeni, Eenuti gudda keennafi jaallaba si tolche? Nami Waaqi aka inni gudda gumi suni tahe, qarqaarsa malaika gurbi bobeetu keesa isati mullateni worraa baase isuma;" 
Acts7:36 inni waan mamatiifi akheekha lafa Misiri keesati fulla galaana Shamutiifi ammalle ganna afurtama lafa gamooji keesaleti tolche, akasiini worra baase." 
Acts7:37 Namichi gumi Israelitiini, Waaqi isanuma keesa raaga aka kiyya isanii erga jed'e Musa." 
Acts7:38 Inni sunuma ka gaafa gumiini Israeli lafa alo keesa jiruti malaika woliini gumi suni keesa jiru. Inni ababoota teennale woliini jira gaafa malaikaani gaara Sinai gubbati isani dubbate, ammalle isumati dubbi Waaqa ta jireenna nu barsiise." 
Acts7:39 Ammo ababooti teenna dubbi isa ch'aqasu didde isa lakifte lafa Misiriti d'araate iti dachau feete. 
Acts7:40 Tanaafi worri waan Haruniini jed'e, Waaqoota nu dura yaatu nuu mid'aasi namichi Musa jed'ani ka lafa Misiri keesa nuuni d'ufe kaani gara inni jiru imbeennu." 
Acts7:41 Duuba artuma worri korma worqi mid'aase, sorio baaseefi waan harki worraa mid'aase suni jila tolche." 
Acts7:42 Duuba akasiini Waaqi worra yaala bahe, aka worri urji gubbaa kad'atu iti lakise, akuma kitaaba raagoota keesati t'aafani, Gosa Israeli, isani ganna afurtama lafa aloo keesati sorio naa inqalle." 
Acts7:43 Waaro waaqa Moloki jed'ani baatani, ammalle fakeenna urji waaqa keesani ka Refani jed'ani; wonti isani kad'attani suni waan harkaani boch'ani. Tanaafi anini lafa Babiloni mogaani isani baasa." 
Acts7:44 Ababooti teenna gaafa lafa aloo keesa jirtu, Waaro Woyyuma qabdi, ta aka Waaqi Musati hime gula mid'aasani." 
Acts7:45 Ababooti teenna ta eegi suni d'alate gaafa Yoshua woliini yaate lafa gosa Waaqi fulla ababoota teenna duraa gusse fud'ate, Waaro sunini d'ufte. Waarooni suni haga bara Daudi achi teete." 
Acts7:46 Inni Waaqa durati eeba argate, ammalle Waaqa kad'ate waan jed'eeni, Aka anini Mana Waaqa Yakoboti ijaaru na tolchi jed'e." 
Acts7:47 Ammo nami mana isaa ijaare Solomoni. 
Acts7:48 Tatule Waaqi guddaani mana harkaani mid'aasani keesa intau; aka raagi toko jed'u," 
Acts7:49 Aabbooni waan jed'u, Gubbaani barch'uma kiyya, laftileeni fulla anini miila kiyya d'aabad'u. Isani mana akami na ijaartani? Yokhaani fulla tami ta anini boqad'u?" 
Acts7:50 Harka kiyyati waan kana ch'ufa mid'aaseeniti? 
Acts7:51 Isani guddo mata jabaattani, garaani keesani ind'ugefatu! Gurri keesani dubbi Waaqa ind'agayu! Guyya ch'ufa Lubbu Qulqullo diddani; aka ababooti teesani tolchite, isanileeni akasuma tolchitani." 
Acts7:52 Raaga kami ka ababooti teesani ingaargalchiini? Ammalle worri ergattu Waaqa, ta d'ufiisa Nama d'uga himu d'ufte, ijeese. Isanileeni ammatana isa gurgurtani ijeeftani." 
Acts7:53 Isani seera Waaqi malaika ufitiini isanii erge argattani, ammo guutu diddani!" 
Acts7:54 Waan kana d'ageennaani, garaani worra gubate ch'ininnatani." 
Acts7:55 Ammo Stefanoni Lubbu Qulqullooni guutamnaani, gara gubba sonaani olilaale, guddinna Waaqa arge, Yeso harka mirgicha ka Waaqa oleju arge" 
Acts7:56 waan jed'e, Me ilaala, anini gubba banamtu arga, Ilma Nama harka mirgicha Waaqa oleju arga." 
Acts7:57 Jennaani qonqo olfud'atani ch'aarani, gurra ch'uqaalatani, isati oriani," 
Acts7:58 dira keesaa baasani, d'akhaani had'ani. Worri waan kana arge woya ufi fulla namicha kaima toko ka Saulo jed'ani naqani." 
Acts7:59 D'akhaani Stefano had'uma had'ani, ato inni Waaqa yaamate, Aabbo Yeso, lubbu tiyya fud'ad'u jed'u." 
Acts7:60 Jennaani inni jilbifate qonqo olfud'ate waan jed'e, Aabbo, ch'ubbu tana worrati inheregiini. Eegi waan kana jed'e due." 
Acts8:1 Sauloni ijeecha isaa Ee jed'e. Guyyuma suni gumi Waaqa ta Yerusalemu jirtu guddo gaargalchani. Duuba ergattu male gumiini taani ch'ufti lafa Yudeatiifi Samaria keesa gargari firfirfamte. 
Acts8:2 Jari d'ugaa toko Stefano guddo bohe awaale. 
Acts8:3 Ammo Sauloni gumi Waaqa guddo gaargalche, mana ch'ufa seene, d'iirafi nad'eenile hid'aansati guure." 
Acts8:4 Duuba worri gargari firfirfame kaani fulluma ch'ufa yae dubbi Waaqa odeese. 
Acts8:5 Jennaani Filiponi gara dira Samaria d'aqe waan Kristo worrati hasae. 
Acts8:6 Gumiini garaa tokooni waan Filiponi jed'e ch'aqafte, waan mama ka inni tolche d'ageete argite." 
Acts8:7 Jinniini hamtuuni qonqo olfud'atte iyite nama heddu keesaa yaate; nami hedduuni ka kokotaefi ka naafate fayye. 
Acts8:8 Akanaani gammadi guddaani dira suni d'ufe. 
Acts8:9 Ammo namicha tokoti jira, ka Simoni jed'ani, ka duri dira suni keesati huji yuuba tolche, worra dira Samaria, sobe, jabeenna ufi odeese." 
Acts8:10 Nami ch'ufti dubbi isaa ch'aqase, diqaafi guddaleeni waan jed'e, Namichi kunini humna Waaqa ta Humna Guddo jed'aniini." 
Acts8:11 Worri ch'ufti isa ch'aqase waan inni huji yuuboomatiini guyya heddu worra sobeefi. 
Acts8:12 Ammo worri Filipo Odu Dansa ta Finna Waaqatiifi maqa Yeso Kristo hasau d'ageennaani d'ugefate, d'iirafi nad'eenileeni batifamte." 
Acts8:13 Jennaani Simonileeni d'ugefate; eegi batifame, Filipo gula deeme, waan mamiisatiifi akheekha inni tolche arginaani guddo mame." 
Acts8:14 Ergattuuni ta Yerusalemu keesa teetu aka gumiini Samaria dubbi Waaqa d'ugefatte d'ageennaani, Petrofi Yohana iti ergite." 
Acts8:15 Worri d'ufe, Waaqa worraa kad'ate, aka Lubbu Qulqullo argatani." 
Acts8:16 Lubbuuni Qulqullooni qara worra ira imbuune, ammo maqa Aabbo Yeso ch'allaani batifamani male." 
Acts8:17 Petrofi Yohanani harka isaani worra ira keennaani Lubbu Qulqullo argatani. 
Acts8:18 Simonini aka eegi ergattuuni harka worra ira keete Lubbu Qulqullo argatani arginaani, hori worraa kennu fed'e" 
Acts8:19 waan jed'e, Humna tana nale kenna, aka nami anini harka ira kayu Lubbu Qulqullo argatu." 
Acts8:20 Ammo Petroni waan isaani jed'e, Hori kanke woliini bada, waan atini kenna Waaqa waan horiini bitatu seetefi." 
Acts8:21 Atini waan kana keesa diqole qooda inqabdu, garaani kanke fuula Waaqa durati dansaniti." 
Acts8:22 Tanaafi ch'ubbu tante tana iraa deebii, Waaqa kad'ad'u, aka herega garaa keti si araaramani." 
Acts8:23 Wonti akanatiifi anini ya arge, atini had'aa had'ooftu qabda, ammalle hid'aansa ch'ubbuu ke jirta." 
Acts8:24 Jennaani Simonini waan jed'eeni, Waaqa na kad'ad'a, aka wonti isani baantani kunini tokoleeni nati ind'umne." 
Acts8:25 Worri eegi dubbi Aabbo odeese, Yerusalemuti gale, Odu Dansa tana olla Samaria heddu keesati hasae." 
Acts8:26 Malaikaani Aabbo Filipoti dubbate waan jetteeni, kai bita deemi fulla kara Yerusalemu bahe Gaza d'aqu (karaani sunini amma injiru)." 
Acts8:27 Jennaani inni kae deeme. Namicha sangisisani toko jira, ka lafa Sidaama. Inni nama gudda ka hayyiti Sidaama ta Kandake jed'ani jala hojatu, ka hori isii qorqoratuufi. Inni Yerusalemu d'ufe, aka Waaqa kad'atu." 
Acts8:28 Ato galu, gaari ufi keesa tae, kitaaba raaga Isaya soome." 
Acts8:29 Jennaani Lubbuuni Qulqullooni waan Filiponi jette, Beeni, gaari sunti d'iaad'u." 
Acts8:30 Tanaafi Filiponi gara isaa utaale, isa kitaaba raaga Isaya soomu d'agaye waan jed'eeni, Waan soomtu kana mid'aafatta?" 
Acts8:31 Inni waan jed'eeni, Akamiini dandae mid'aafad'a, yo nami na qajeelche male? Duuba inni Filipo kad'ate aka inni gaari yaabate isa woliini tau." 
Acts8:32 Fullaani inni t'aafi keesa soomu tana, Akuma hoola qalani ijeechati isa geesani, ammalle akuma ilmeeni hoola ta abbaani rifeensa iraa ch'iru ch'alliftu, akasuma ch'allise." 
Acts8:33 Isa diqeesani, qorsuma d'uga iraa d'owani. Eenuti waan d'aloota isaa hasaa? Jireenni isaa lafa keesaa la hobae." 
Acts8:34 Namichi kaani waan Filiponi jed'e, Raagi eennu baana? Ufi baana mo nama d'ibi?" 
Acts8:35 Jennaani Filiponi fulluma t'aafi suni iti keyate waan Yeso isati hasae. 
Acts8:36 Ammalle ato worri yau, fulla bisaani toko d'ufani; namichi kaani waan jed'e, Me ilaali, bisaaniti arma jira, malti batiso argachu naa d'owa? [" 
Acts8:37 Filiponi waan jed'eeni, Yo atini garaa kanke ch'ufaani d'ugefatte si batisani, Inni waan Filiponi jed'e, Ind'ugefad'a aka Yeso Kristo Ilma Waaqa.]" 
Acts8:38 Gaari d'aabachiise, worri lachu bisaani keesa duude Filiponi isa batise." 
Acts8:39 Bisaani keesa baanaani, Lubbuuni Aabbo Filipo fuute. Namichi kaani lafaa isa d'abe, ammo gammadaani kara ufii iti d'aabate." 
Acts8:40 Ammo Filipo lafa Azototi argani; inni keesa deeme, dira ch'ufa keesati Odu Dansa odeese, Kaisarini bahe." 
Acts9:1 Ammo Sauloni ammalle jara Aabbo rifachiise, aka gaargalchu herege. Inni gara Qaallicha Gudda d'aqe," 
Acts9:2 tatabe isa iraa fud'ate, ta gara maneeni Waaqa iti kad'atani dira Damaskiti t'aafani, aka yo nama Kara Aabbo gula yau achiti arge, d'iirafi nad'eenile, hid'e Yerusalemu geesu." 
Acts9:3 Ato inni kara deemu, Damaskiti d'iaannaani, ifsaani gubbaa bahe isati ifse." 
Acts9:4 Inni lafati jige, qonqo toko d'agaye ta, Saulo, Saulo, atini maafi akana na gaargalchita? jetteeni." 
Acts9:5 Inni waan jed'eeni, Aabbo, atini eennu kana? Aabbooni waan jed'eeni, Anini Yeso kauma atini gaargalchitu." 
Acts9:6 Ammo kai, dira seeni, waan atini tolchu malte achiti siti himani." 
Acts9:7 Jari isa woliini yau akanumati ejaanje ch'allise, qonqo d'agayani male nama ingarre." 
Acts9:8 Sauloni lafaa kae, ila banannaani woma argu dad'abe, harka qabaniifi Damaskiini d'ufani." 
Acts9:9 Haga guyya sadi lafa ingarre, yokhaani nyaate ind'unne." 
Acts9:10 Nama Yeso tokoti dira Damaski keesa jira, ka Anania jed'ani. Daayya keesa Aabbooni isaani dubbate, Anania jed'e yaame. Inni waan jed'eeni, Anini kuno, Aabbo." 
Acts9:11 Aabbooni waan isaani jed'e, Kai, gara Kara Qajeela jed'ani d'aqi, mana Yuda keesa, nama toko ka Saulo jed'ani, nama lafa Tarso, barbaadi. Inni Waaqa kad'achu jira." 
Acts9:12 Ammalle daayya keesa inni la nama Anania jed'ani toko arge, ka harka isa ira kayu, aka inni lafa argu." 
Acts9:13 Jennaani Ananiani waan jed'e, Aabbo, anini ya nama heddu ira waan namicha kana d'agaye, aka inni gumi tante qulqullo Yerusalemu jirtu waan hamtu tolche." 
Acts9:14 Ammalle arma inni maqa qaalole gugurdotiini d'ufe, aka nama maqa kanke yaamatu ch'ufa hid'u." 
Acts9:15 Ammo Aabbooni waan isaani jed'e, Beeni d'aqi, anini yayu isa fohad'e, aka inni maqa kiyya gosa d'ibiifi hayyootafi ijoolle Israelile durati odeesu." 
Acts9:16 Anini gaargala gudda, ka inni maro maqa kiyyatiifi argatu, isa agarsiisa." 
Acts9:17 Ananiani d'aqe mana olseene, harka isa ira kaye waan jed'eeni, Aadda Saulo, Aabbo Yesoni, ka kara keesati siti mullate, ya na erge, aka atini lafa agarte Lubbu Qulqullooni guutamtu." 
Acts9:18 Maro tokotu wonti aka qola ila isaa iraa jidde, inni yoosu wo arge, kae batiso argate." 
Acts9:19 Duuba inni sagale nyaate jajabaate. Sauloni haga bulti diqo jara Yeso ka Damaski jiru, woliini tae." 
Acts9:20 Hojuma suni inni maneeni Waaqa iti kad'atani seene waan Yeso odeese, Yesoni Ilma Waaqa jed'e." 
Acts9:21 Ammo nami isa d'agaye ch'ufti mame waan jed'e, Kunini namicha nama maqa kana yaamatu, Yerusalemu keesati, ijeese kaaniyu? Ammalle wonti inni d'ufeefi, aka nama hid'e gara qaalole gugurdo geesu." 
Acts9:22 Ammo Sauloni haga qara ira jabaate, Yahudi Damaski teetu mamsiise, aka kunini d'uguma Kristo jabeese hime." 
Acts9:23 Eegi bulti heddu, Yahudiini aka isa ijeeftu wolmariatte." 
Acts9:24 Ammo Sauloni, aka worri isa eegu jiru, quba qaba. Kara dira halkani guyya eegani, aka isa ijeesani." 
Acts9:25 Halkani toko jari isaa isa fuud'e sabaqa ke kaye, yaabdo iraani alati isa baase." 
Acts9:26 Sauloni Yerusalemu geennaani jara Yesoti mataqu fed'e, ammo worri ch'ufumaanu isa sodaate, wonti akanatiifi aka inni nama Yeso ind'ugefanne." 
Acts9:27 Ammo Barnabani isa fuud'e gara jara Yesotiini d'ufe. Aka Sauloni Aabbo kara keesati arge, aka Aabbooni isaani dubbate, ammalle aka inni Damaski keesati soda male maqa Yeso hasae worrati hime." 
Acts9:28 Eegi suni Sauloni Yerusalemu keesa tae worra woliini fulla ch'ufa dedeeme. 
Acts9:29 Sauloni soda male maqa Aabbootiini barsiise, worra Grikile wolmormani, jennaani worri isa ijeesu fed'e." 
Acts9:30 Oboleyaani waan kana d'ageennaani haga lafa Kaisaria isa geesite, gara dira Tarso jed'ani isa ergite."
