Acts9:31 Jennaani gumiini Waaqa Yudeafi Galilayafi Samaria keesa nagaya argate eebifamte, Aabbo Waaqa sodaate qarqaarsa Lubbu Qulqullotiini jabaatte heddatte." 
Acts9:32 Ato Petroni fulluma ch'ufa jiddu worra keesa dedeemu, inni fulla gumi qulqullo, ta Lidia teetu, d'ufe." 
Acts9:33 Achiti inni nama toko ka Ainea jed'ani arge, ka haga ganna saddeeti fayyad'abe kokotae sire ira ch'iise." 
Acts9:34 Petroni waan isaani jed'e, Ainea, Yeso Kristoni si fayyisa, kai sire tante mid'aafad'u. Inni maro tokotu kae." 
Acts9:35 Nami Lidiafi Saroni keesa tau ch'ufti isa arge Aabbooti dedebie. 
Acts9:36 Dira Yafa keesa, niiti d'ugefatte tokoti jira, ta Tabitha jed'ani, yokhaani Dorkasi, akasi jechaani Guguufto jechu. Niitiini tunini waan dansa heddu tolchite hori hiyyeeyi kennite." 
Acts9:37 Bara suni isiini fayya d'abde doote. Eegi reefa isii d'iqani, mana gubba jiru toko keesa kayani." 
Acts9:38 Waan diri Lidiani Yafati d'iaattuufi, jari Yeso aka Petroni achi jiru d'ageennaani, nama lama isati erge waan jed'e, Hurrisi gara keenna kooti." 
Acts9:39 Jennaani Petroni kae worra woliini deeme. D'umnaani mana oli isa geesani. Nad'eeni d'iirsi iraa due isa bira ejaanjatte boote, ubaarafi woya Dorkasini gaafa jirtu hod'ite garsiifte." 
Acts9:40 Ammo Petroni worra ch'ufa mana keesaa yaase, jilbifate Waaqa kad'ate, gara reefa ilaale waan jed'e, Tabitha, kai! Isiini ila banatte, Petro arginaani kaate teete." 
Acts9:41 Inni harka isii qabate olfuud'e, gumi qulqullofi nad'eeni d'iirsi iraa due yaame, isi jirtu worrati kenne." 
Acts9:42 Waan kana fulluma ch'ufa Yafa keesa nami ch'ufti d'agaye, nami hedduuni Aabbo Waaqa d'ugefate." 
Acts9:43 Inni haga guyya heddu Yafa keesa tae, Simoni nama toko ka goga machaleesu woliini." 
Acts10:1 Namicha toko jira, Kaisaria keesa, maqaani isaa Kornelio; gumi askarti d'ibba toko ta Taliana jed'ani guddaani isa." 
Acts10:2 Inni nama dansaa ka Waaqa sodaatu, isaafi worri isaaleeni. Inni guddo maro Waaqatiifi wo namaa kenne, guyya ch'ufale Waaqa kad'ata." 
Acts10:3 Duuba daayya keesa malaika Waaqa ta isati diideesite d'uftu arge, saa sagali ka guyya. Isiini waan isaani jette, Kornelio!" 
Acts10:4 Inni isi arginaani rifate waan jed'eeni, Maal, Aabbo? Isiini waan jetteeni, Kad'acha teetiifi waan atini maro Waaqatiifi namaa kennitu ya fuula Waaqa durati si qaabatani." 
Acts10:5 Amma nama gara dira Yafa ergi, nama toko ka Simoni Petro jed'ani yaami." 
Acts10:6 Inni keessuma nama toko, ka Simoni jed'ani, ka goga machaleesuti; mani isaa afaani galaanati." 
Acts10:7 Malaikaani Kornelioni dubbatte taani deemnaani, inni hojattu ufi lama yaame, ammalle askarticha dansa toko ka guyya ch'ufa waan isaa ilaalule yaame." 
Acts10:8 Waan kana ch'ufa worrati hasae jennaani Yafati worra erge. 
Acts10:9 Boriyya worri dirati d'iaannaani, saa jaa ka guyya Petroni aka Waaqa kad'atu mana gubba kore." 
Acts10:10 Inni beelomnaani waan nyaatu fed'e; ammo ato sagale d'aabanu, daayya arge." 
Acts10:11 Ammalle gubba banamtufi waan aka woya ta humbi afraanu hid'ani isa dura lafati gadi buusani arge. 
Acts10:12 Waan suni keesa bineensa gosa heddu, ka miila afuri qabuti jira, ka garaani lafa ira lohuleeni, allaatileeni." 
Acts10:13 Qonqooni isati d'ufte waan jetteeni, Petro, kai, waan kana qalad'u nyaad'u." 
Acts10:14 Ammo Petroni waan jed'e, Laki Aabbo, anini haga d'alad'e waan akana kana ka qulqullo intahiini yokhaani waan hamtu akana takale inyaanne." 
Acts10:15 Qonqooni taani ammalle maro lameeso deebite waan jetteeni, Waan Waaqi qulqulleeseeni, Qulqulloniti injed'iini." 
Acts10:16 Wonti kunini maro sadi akasi taate, jennaani woyaani gubbati oldeebite." 
Acts10:17 Ato Petroni waan daayya inni arge suni heregu, jari Kornelioni erge kaani mana Simoni gaafate, balbala dura eje," 
Acts10:18 qonqo olfud'ate aka Simoni ka Petro jed'ani achi jiru gaafatani. 
Acts10:19 Ato Petroni daayya suni heregu, Lubbuuni Qulqullooni waan isaani jette, Ilaali, nami sadi sii barbaadu jira," 
Acts10:20 tanaafi kai, gadi bui, worra woliini deemi, insodaatini; anati worra erge." 
Acts10:21 Tanaafi Petroni gara jara Kornelioni isati erge kaani gadibue waan jed'eeni, Nami isani barbaadani ana; maafi d'uftani?" 
Acts10:22 Worri waan jed'e, Kornelio gudda askarti, nama d'uga, ka Waaqa d'ugefatu, ka gochiti Yahudi ch'ufti saadu, afaani malaika qulqullo tokotiini Waaqi gorse, aka inni mana isati si yaame dubbi tante d'agayu." 
Acts10:23 Jennaani Petroni, Olduuda jed'e worra bulche. Boriyya Petroni worra woliini kae deeme, oboleyaani gari ta Yafa isa woliini yaate." 
Acts10:24 Iftaani taani worri Kaisaria olduude. Kornelioni worra eeguu jira; inni ya fiit'a ufitiifi jaalaani ufi ch'ufa wolti yaame. 
Acts10:25 Ato Petroni mana seenu jiru, Kornelioni gadi bahe miila isati jige isa guddise." 
Acts10:26 Ammo Petroni isa olqabe waan jed'eeni, Oljed'i, anileeni akuma kanke namuma." 
Acts10:27 Ato Petroni tae isaani hasau, mana olseennaani nama heddu ka woltiwoldae arge." 
Acts10:28 Inni waan worraani jed'e, Isani imbeetani, aada keesa Yahudiini nama gosa d'ibi wahela tolfatte woliini inteetu. Ammo Waaqi la na garsiise, aka anini nama tokole tuffad'e yokhaani, Inni qulqulloniti injenneeni." 
Acts10:29 Tanaafi hojuma na yaamani suni anini dubbi male isaniti d'ufe; duuba anini isani gaafad'a maafi na yaamtani? 
Acts10:30 Kornelioni waan jed'eeni, Saati akana tana guyya afuri ka dabre, ato anini mana kiyya keesa tae Waaqa kad'ad'u nami woya bibilit'u toko qabu na dura eje." 
Acts10:31 Waan naani jed'e, Kornelio, kad'acha tante ya d'agayani, ammalle aki atini biyya wo kennitu la fuula Waaqa dura gahe, akasiini amma ya si qaabatani." 
Acts10:32 Tanaafi nama gara dira Yafa ergi, nama toko ka Simoni Petro jed'ani yaami, inni keessuma nama Simoni jed'ani toko ka goga machaleesuti, ka afaani galaana tau." 
Acts10:33 Duuba anini maro tokotu si yaame, ammalle ati waan dansa tolchite, ka d'ufte. Ammatana nu ch'ufumaani arma jirra, Waaqa dura, aka waan ch'ufa ka Aabbooni siti hime d'ageennu." 
Acts10:34 Jennaani Petroni waan jed'e, D'uguma anini ya hubad'e aka Waaqi nama tokole wolindabarsine ch'ufa qit'e takati heregu." 
Acts10:35 Ammo gosa ch'ufa keesa nama isa d'ugefate waan d'uga tolchu inni injaalata. 
Acts10:36 Dubbi suni ta Waaqi gara ijoolle Israeli erge, aka nagaya Yeso Kristo keesa hasaani, inni Abba nama ch'ufaati, isani imbeetani." 
Acts10:37 Isani waan jabdu lafa Israeli, arda Galilaya kana keesati eegi Yohanani, waan batiso namati hime asi tahe imbeetani," 
Acts10:38 aka Waaqi Yeso Nazareti Lubbu Qulqullofi jabeennaani muude, isani imbeetani. Inni fulla ch'ufa dedeeme waan dansa tolche, nama Sheet'ani gaargalche ch'ufa fayyise, waan Waaqi isa woliini jiruufi." 
Acts10:39 Nu d'uga waan inni tolche ch'ufa lafa Yahudi keesafi Yerusalemu keesaleti. Worri isa ijeese, mukha irati fannise." 
Acts10:40 Ammo guyya sadeeso Waaqi isa kaase, diideese nama agarsiise." 
Acts10:41 Nami ch'ufti isa ingarre, ammo jara d'uga isaa tahe, ka Waaqi qara fohateefi nuleeni ka isa woliini nyaanne d'unne, eegi inni duisa keesa kae, isa agarre." 
Acts10:42 Inni nuti d'aame aka nama barsiimne d'ugeesinu, aka nami Waaqi fohate isuma, ka dubbi nama jiruufi ka duele qoru." 
Acts10:43 Raagi ch'ufti isa d'ugeesa, aka maro maqa isatiifi nami isa d'ugefatu ch'ufti araarama argatu." 
Acts10:44 Ato Petroni ammalle dubbi tana dubbatu, Lubbuuni Qulqullooni worra dubbi tana d'agaye ch'ufa ira bute." 
Acts10:45 Worri Yahudi ka d'ugefate ka Petro woliini d'ufe, waan Waaqi Lubbu ufi Qulqullo gosa d'ibile ira buusefi guddo mame." 
Acts10:46 Wonti akanatiifi worra afaani d'ibi dubbate Waaqa guddisu d'agayani. Jennaani Petroni waan jed'e," 
Acts10:47 Eentu dandae bisaaniini worra kana batifamu d'owa, eegi worri akuma keenna Lubbu Qulqullo argate?" 
Acts10:48 Inni worra kana maqa Yeso Kristotiini batisa jed'e, Jennaani worri isa kad'ate aka inni bulti diqo achi tau." 
Acts11:1 Ergattufi oboleyaani Yudea keesa jirtu, aka gochiti d'ibileeni dubbi Waaqa d'ugefatte d'ageete." 
Acts11:2 Tanaafi Petroni Yerusalemuti d'iaannaani worri aada qabanqaba jabeesu isa goyeese waan jed'eeni," 
Acts11:3 Atini ya worra qabanqaba inqabatini woliini nyaatte d'udde. 
Acts11:4 Ammo Petroni waan ch'ufa worrati hasae waan jed'eeni. 
Acts11:5 Ato anini dira Yafa keesati Waaqa kad'achu jiru, daayya keesa anini wo arge, woya guddo, ta humbi afraanu hid'ani nati gadi buusani arge." 
Acts11:6 Aka dansa keesa ilaalani, bineensa miila afuritifi bineensa alatiifi bineensa lafa ira lohufi allaati arge." 
Acts11:7 Anini qonqo, Petro, kai, qalad'u nyaad'u naani jettu d'agaye." 
Acts11:8 Ammo anini waan jed'eeni, Aabbo laki, wonti qulqullo intahiini yokhaani wonti hamtuuni taka afaani kiyya keesa inseenne." 
Acts11:9 Ammo qonqooni gubbaa deebite waan jette, Waan Waaqi qulqulleeseeni, Qulqulloniti injed'iini." 
Acts11:10 Wonti kunini maro sadi akasi taate, jennaani wonini kaani ch'ufti gubbati oli deebite." 
Acts11:11 Hojuma suni nami sadi, ka Kaisaria nati ergani, fulla mana anini tau d'ufe." 
Acts11:12 Lubbuuni, Soda male worra woliini deemi naani jette. Ammalle oboleyaani jaani tanaani woliini yaane, mana namicha olduunne." 
Acts11:13 Inni aka malaika mana ufi keesati arge nuti hime. Malaikaani suni waan jetteeni, Nama gara Yafa ergi, nama toko ka Simoni Petro jed'ani yaami;" 
Acts11:14 inni aka siifi worri kankeleeni baafamtani siti hima. 
Acts11:15 Akuma anini dubbi tiyya iti keyad'eeni, Lubbuuni Qulqullooni worra ira buute, akuma duri nura buute." 
Acts11:16 Jennaani anini dubbi Aabbo qaabad'e, ta inni Yohanani d'uguma bisaaniini batise, ammo isani Lubbu Qulqullooni batifamtani jed'e taani." 
Acts11:17 Yo Waaqi qarqaarsa aka nuu kenne worra kanale kenne, gaafa nu Aabbo Yeso Kristo d'ugefanne, anini eennu re ka dandae Waaqa d'owu?" 
Acts11:18 Waan kana d'ageennaani dubbi isaa quufani, Waaqa faarsani waan jed'ani, Waaqi gosa d'ibile ya daba iraa deebise jireenna kenneefi." 
Acts11:19 Worri guddo gargari firfirfame maro gaargala eegi duisa Stefano d'ufetiifi, haga Foinikefi Kiprofi Antiokia yae dubbi Waaqa Yahudi ch'allati hasae." 
Acts11:20 Ammo jari gari ka Kiprofi Kirene, Antiokia d'umnaani gosa d'ibileti hasaani." 
Acts11:21 Jabeenni Aabbo worra woliini jira, nami hedduuni d'ugefate Aabbooti deebie." 
Acts11:22 Oduuni tunini gumi Yerusalemu geete, tanaafi worri Barnaba Antiokiati ergani." 
Acts11:23 D'umnaani inni eeba Waaqa arge guddo gammade nama ch'ufati hime, aka garaa tokooni Aabbo d'ugefatani." 
Acts11:24 Barnabani nama dansa, ammalle Lubbu Qulqullofi d'ugefacha qaba. Nami hedduuni Aabbooti darame." 
Acts11:25 Jennaani Barnabani gara Tarso d'aqe aka Saulo barbaadu. 
Acts11:26 Arginaani Antiokiani isa d'ufe. Haga ganna toko worri gumi Waaqatiini wolwoldae nama heddu barsiise. Ammalle Antiokia keesa qara jara Yesotiini Kristiani jed'ani. 
Acts11:27 Bara suni raagooti gari Yerusalemu baate Antiokia d'ufte. 
Acts11:28 Namichi toko, ka Agabo jed'ani, Lubbuuni guutamnaani, aka beelti guddooni lafa ch'ufa d'uftu fage. Beelti tunini bara motuma Klaudio d'ufte." 
Acts11:29 Jari Yeso ch'ufti, haga dandau, aka oboleyaani Yudea keesa jirtu qarqaaru woli gale." 
Acts11:30 Akasi tolchani, harka Barnabatiifi ka Saulotiini hori jaaroleti ergani." 
Acts12:1 Bara suni hayyuuni Herode jed'ani gumi Kristo iti kae gaargalche. 
Acts12:2 Inni Yakobo oboleesa Yohana sheeftiini ijeese. 
Acts12:3 Ammalle aka wonti kunini Yahudi gammachiiftu arginaani Petrole qabe. (Gaafasi guyya jila qit'a bukho inqamneti.) 
Acts12:4 Qamnaani mana hid'aansa keesa kaye, harka askarti kud'ani jaati kenne, aka afuri afuriini isa tissani. Eegi jilti Pasaka dabarte, inni biyya durati isa baasu fed'e." 
Acts12:5 Tanaafi Petro hid'aansati lakisani, ammo gumiini guddo Waaqa isaa kad'atte." 
Acts12:6 Halkani Herodeni sila biyya duraani isa d'ufu fed'u, Petroni jiddu askarti lama rafu jira. Haada lama ka sibiilatiini isa hid'ani, jari mana hid'aansa eegu balbala qorqorate." 
Acts12:7 Malaikaani Aabbo isa bira ejite, ifsaani manati ifse, malaikaani ch'inaacha Petro d'oofte, isa kaafte waan jetteeni, Hurrisi kai! Haadi sibiila kaani harka isaa iraa jige." 
Acts12:8 Malaikaani waan isaani jette, Hid'ad'u, kopele naqad'u. Inni akasi tolchinaani malaikaani waan isaani jette, Woya uyifad'u, na gula kooti." 
Acts12:9 Inni mana keesaa bahe isi gula deeme, aka wonti malaikaani tolchite sunini waan d'uga imid'aafanne, ammo waan oobjate sehe." 
Acts12:10 Eegi fulla qaraatifi ta lameeso ta nami eegu dabrani, balbalti sibiila toko ta yo keesa baani dira seenani ufumaani duraa banamte. Worri alati bahe, kara toko gula yae maro tokotu malaikaani isa bira deemte." 
Acts12:11 Petroni waan kana mid'aafannaani waan ufiini jed'e, D'uguma, amma imbeekha aka Aabbooni malaika ufi erge, aka harka Herodetiifi waan gochiti Yahudi na tolchu feete jalaa na baasu." 
Acts12:12 Ufi beennaani, mana Mariamu, haad'a Yohana, ka maqaani isaa d'ibiini Mariko jed'ani d'aqe, fulla nami hedduuni wolti woldae Waaqa kad'atu." 
Acts12:13 Petroni balbala harkaani d'od'oomnaani, intalti toko ta Roda jed'ani ilaalu d'ufte." 
Acts12:14 Qonqo Petro d'ageennaani, gammadafi balbala banu dad'abde, utaalte, aka Petroni balbala dura eju himte." 
Acts12:15 Worri, Ati ya maraate isiini jed'e. Ammo isiini D'uguma, isuma d'uguma jette. Jennaani worri, Yoosi malaika isaa jed'e." 
Acts12:16 Ammo Petroni balbala d'ad'auma d'ad'ae. Balbala bannaani isa argani guddo mamani. 
Acts12:17 Ammo inni harkaani akheekhe, Ch'allisa jed'eeni; duuba aka Aabbooni hid'aansa keesaa isa baase worrati hime. Ammalle waan worraani jed'e, Beena, waan kana Yakobofi oboleyaani taaniti hima. Inni duuba ufi kae gara d'ibi d'aqe." 
Acts12:18 Lafti bariinaani askartiini guddo bakhatte, waan Petroni tahe wolgaafatte." 
Acts12:19 Eegi Herodeni Petro barbaade d'abe inni nama isa qorqorate gaafate ijeecha iti mure. Eegi waan kana Herodeni Yudea keesaa deeme Kaisaria d'aqe tae. 
Acts12:20 Herodeni biyya Tirofi Sidoniti guddo dalane. Worri wolti bahe isati d'ufe, namicha Blasto jed'ani, ka mana hayyu keesa hojatu jaala tolfatani, duuba gara Herode d'aqani, nagaya kad'atani, waan lafti suni worra lafa Herode ira sagale argatuufi." 
Acts12:21 Guyya toko ka fohatani, Herodeni miha hayyu keyate, barch'uma ira tae, worrati hasae." 
Acts12:22 Gumiini lalabde waan jette, Qonqooni tuni ta Waaqati, ta namatiiniti." 
Acts12:23 Maro tokotu waan inni Waaqa ind'ugeesinifi malaikaani Aabbo isa d'oofte. Ramoni isa nyaate, inni due." 
Acts12:24 Ammo dubbini Waaqa guddatte fulla heddu geete. 
Acts12:25 Barnabafi Sauloni huji ufi hobaafannaani Yerusalemu keesaa galani, Yohana ka Mariko jed'ani woliini yaani." 
Acts13:1 Gumi Waaqa ta lafa Antiokia jirtu keesa, raagootafi nama wo barsiisu jira. Worri suni Barnabafi Simoni ka Guraacha jed'aniifi Lukio ka lafa Kirenetiifi Manaeni ka hayyu Herode woliini guddateefi Saulo." 
Acts13:2 Ato worri Aabbo hojate ufi agabsu, Lubbuuni Qulqullooni waan worraani jette, Barnabafi Saulo huji anini fohad'eefi iti na qooda jette." 
Acts13:3 Eegi ufi agabsani Waaqa kad'atani, harka worra ira kayani gara d'ibi ergani." 
Acts13:4 Lubbuuni Qulqullooni worra erginaani Seleukia d'aqani. Eegi suni hobolo seennaani Kipro d'aqani. 
Acts13:5 Ato worri fulla Salami jiru dubbi Waaqaa maneeni Waaqa iti kad'atani ta Yahudi keesati odeesani Yohanani ka Mariko jed'anileeni worra woliini jira aka worra qarqaaru. 
Acts13:6 Eegi worri lafa suni ch'ufa ke yae haga Pafo taake, falfalticha toko argani, ka Bar-Yeso jed'ani." 
Acts13:7 Inni jaala hayyu lafa suni, ka Sergio Paulo jed'ani, nama guddo qalbi qabu. Hayyuuni Barnabafi Saulo yaame, aka dubbi Waaqa d'agayu." 
Acts13:8 Ammo falfaltichi kaani ka afaani Grikitiini Eliama jed'ani Barnabafi Saulo dubbachu d'owu fed'e, aka akasiini namichi guddaani kaani suni d'agaye ind'ugefanne." 
Acts13:9 Jennaani Sauloni, ka Paulo jed'ani, Lubbu Qulqullooni guutamnaani falfalticha kana sonaani ilaale" 
Acts13:10 waan jed'eeni, Atini ka kiyyibafi ch'ubbuuni guutamte, ilma Sheet'ana, nyaapa d'uga ch'ufaa, karaa Aabbo ka d'uga balleesu illakiftu?" 
Acts13:11 Ammatana ilaali, harki Aabbo si gubbaa jira; ila d'abda, haga bulti diqo toko lafa ingartu. Maro tokotu ilti isaa sapupoofte, lafti iti dukanoofte, inni deeme nama ule isaa qabu barbaade." 
Acts13:12 Hayyuuni kaani waan kana arginaani d'ugefate, waan barsiisa Aabbo guddo mame." 
Acts13:13 Paulofi jari isa woliini jiru Pafo hobolooni kaani, Perge ta lafa Pamfilia d'ufani; ammo Yohanani ka Mariko jed'ani worra jala deebie Yerusalemuti gale." 
Acts13:14 Pergaa yaani dira Antiokia ka lafa Pisidia d'ufani; guyya Sabato mana Waaqa iti kad'atani seenani tataani. 
Acts13:15 Eegi dubbi Seeratiifi ta raaga soomani, jaaroleeni Mana Waaqaa kaani nama worrati ergite waan jetteeni, Oboleyaani, yo nama gorsu feetani, dubbad'a." 
Acts13:16 Jennaani Pauloni olkae, harka olfud'ate waan biyyaani jed'e. D'iiro, worra Israelitiifi gosa d'ibile ta Waaqa d'ugefattu, na ch'aqasa!" 
Acts13:17 Waaqi gosa Israeli ababoota teenna fohate gosa jabdu tolche, gaafa worri aka keesuma lafa Misiri keesa tau. Inni harka jabaani lafa suni keesa worra baase," 
Acts13:18 haga ganna afurtama lafa aloo keesati amala worraa hama obse woliini tae. 
Acts13:19 Inni gosa torba lafa Kanaani keesaa balleese, gumi ufi abbooti lafaa tolche." 
Acts13:20 Duuba ganna d'ibba afuritifi shantama teennaani, inni jaallaboota worraa kenne, haga bara raaga Samueli." 
Acts13:21 Worri hayyu fed'annaani Waaqi Saulo ilma Kishi ka Benjamini worraa kenne; duuba inni haga ganna afurtama worra fide. 
Acts13:22 Eege Waaqi isa lakise Daudi hayyu worraa tolche. Waaqi isa d'ugeese waan jed'e, anini yayu Daudi, ilma Yese argad'e, ka garaani kiyya maache fed'i tiyya ch'ufa guutu." 
Acts13:23 D'aloota nama kana keesa, Waaqi ya Qarqaarsa Israeli, ka duri kakhate, tolche, ka Yeso jed'ani." 
Acts13:24 Ato inni ind'ufiini, Yohanani worra barsiise waan jed'e, Daba iraa deebia, batifama." 
Acts13:25 Yohanani huji ufi ch'ufa hobaasu geennaani waan jed'e, Isani eennu na seetani? Anini isaaniti, ammo ilaala, nami toko eegi tiyya d'ufa, ka seemsa kope miila isaa anini hiikhu himmalini." 
Acts13:26 Oboleyaani, ilmaani d'aloota Abrahamufi isani ch'ufa ka Waaqa sodaattani, dubbi baafama tana gara keenna ergani." 
Acts13:27 Wonti akanatiifi worri Yerusalemu taufi jari gugurdaani worraleeni fuula isa imbeekhani yokhaani dubbi raagootatiifi ta Seera ta guyya Sabato ch'ufa soomani inhubanne. Ammo duisa Yesoti murani aka akasiini dubbini raagooti fadde guutamtu. 
Acts13:28 Ato waan inni duu maleefi d'abanile, aka isa ijeesani Pilato kad'atani." 
Acts13:29 Wonti duri, ta waan isaa t'aafani, guutamnaani, worri mukha iraa fuud'e awaale." 
Acts13:30 Ammo Waaqi duisa keesa isa kaase. 
Acts13:31 Inni guyya heddu worra duri isa woliini Galilaya bahe Yerusalemu d'ufeti mullate. Worri suni amma gumi Israeli ch'ufa durati d'uga isaati. 
Acts13:32 Nu Odu Dansa isaniti odeesina, aka kakhu suni ta ababooti teennati kakhatani," 
Acts13:33 Waaqi nuu ilmaani worraati guute, waan Yeso duisa keesaa kaaseefi. Akuma Faaru lameeso keesati t'aafani, Atini ilma kiyya, guyya kana anini ya Abba kanke tahe." 
Acts13:34 Ammalle waan duisa keesaa isa kaasiti, aka inni duisati indeebine, Waaqi waan jed'e, Anini eeba d'ugaatifi qulqullo isani kenna ta anini Dauditi kakhad'e." 
Acts13:35 Ammalle Faaru d'ibi keesati inni waan jed'e, Aka hojattuuni tante qulqullooni shamtu atini ee injettu." 
Acts13:36 Daudini d'aloota ufi keesa fed'i Waaqa guunnaani, ababoota isaa woliini awaalani shame." 
Acts13:37 Ammo nami Waaqi duisa keesaa kaase inshamne. 
Acts13:38 Tanaafi oboleyaani tiyya, aka maro nama kanatifi araarama daba isaniti hasaani beekha." 
Acts13:39 Maro isatiifi nami d'ugefatu ch'ufti waan ch'ufa keesati d'uga argata, ka duri Seera Musa gula nami d'uga argachu indandeenne." 
Acts13:40 Tanaafi eegad'a, aka wonti kunini ta raagi dubbate isaniti ind'umne ta," 
Acts13:41 Ilaala, isani ka nama tuffattani! Mama, bada! Anini huji toko bara keesani kana keesa tolcha, huji isani ind'ugefanne, ato nami isaniti odeesele! jettu." 
Acts13:42 Ato worri mana Waaqa iti kad'atani keesaa yau, gumiini aka dubbi tana Sabato d'uftule iti hasaani kad'atte." 
Acts13:43 Eegi gumiini gargari baate Yahudi heddufi nami aada Yahuditi gale hedduuni Paulofi Barnaba gula yaani. Worri worraani hasae, Eeba Waaqa keesati jabaad'a jed'e gorse." 
Acts13:44 Sabato lameeso, nami dira suni, take take male, ch'ufti woltiwoldae aka dubbi Aabbo d'agayu." 
Acts13:45 Ammo Yahudiini gumi guddo agarraani guddo d'iibifatte, dubbi Pauloni jed'e mormite isa arabsite." 
Acts13:46 Jennaani Paulofi Barnabani garaa jabaatani waan jed'ani, Dubbi Waaqa qara isaniti hasau malani. Ammo maro isani diddani jireenna hegeri ka isanii male argachu dad'abdanifi nu gara gosa d'ibii d'anna." 
Acts13:47 Wonti akanatiifi Aabbooni akasi nuti mure waan jed'e, Anini ifsa gosa d'ibi ya si tolche, aka baafama namaa taatu, haga muumme lafa." 
Acts13:48 Gochiti d'ibiini waan kana d'ageennaani gammadde dubbi Aabbo faarsite; nami aka jireenna hegeri argatu fohatani ind'ugefate. 
Acts13:49 Dubbini Aabbo lafa suni ch'ufa geete. 
Acts13:50 Ammo Yahudiini taani nad'eeni dira suni ta gurra qabdu ta beekhanifi, nama gugurda dira sunilee, Paulofi Barnabati kaafte lafa suni keesa gussite." 
Acts13:51 Ammo worri aka awaarti faana worraa d'uga worraa taatu faana d'ad'ate Ikonio d'aqe. 
Acts13:52 Jari Yeso gammadafi Lubbu Qulqullooni guutame. 
Acts14:1 Akuma suni Ikonio keesati worri lachu mana Waaqa iti kad'atani ka Yahudi olduude, ammalle maro dubbi worraatiifi gumiini guddooni ta Yahuditiifi ta Grikileeni d'ugefatte." 
Acts14:2 Ammo Yahudiini ta d'ugefachu didde, nama gosa d'ibi wolti nat'e, qalbi oboleyaani wolti yakite." 
Acts14:3 Ergattuuni guyya heddu achi teete, waan Aabbo soda male dubbatte; ammalle Aabbooni dubbi eeba ufii d'ugeese, akheekhafi waan mama harka worraatiini tolche." 
Acts14:4 Biyyiti dira suni gargari qoodamte, ta gari Yahudiini wold'at'e, ammo ta gari ergattuuni wold'at'e." 
Acts14:5 Jennaani nama gosa d'ibitiifi Yahudiini, jara gugurda isaani woliini, wold'at'e, ergattu gaargalchite d'akhaani had'u feete." 
Acts14:6 Ergattuuni waan kana d'ageennaani, haga Listrafi Derbe, dira lamaani toko, ka lafa Likaonia keesa jiruufi lafa iti aantule iti baqatte." 
Acts14:7 Odu Dansa achiti odeesite. 
Acts14:8 Fulla Listra nama tokoti jira, ka haga d'alate dandae olinkaane, ka miili naafa." 
Acts14:9 Inni Paulo dubbatu d'ageennaani, Pauloni isa sonaani ilaale, aka inni d'ugefacha fayyifamuuni qabu arge," 
Acts14:10 qonqo olfud'ate waan jed'eeni, Miilaani olejad'u! Namichi kaani olch'ee miilaani deeme." 
Acts14:11 Biyyiti waan Pauloni tolche arginaani qonqo olfud'atte, afaani Likaoniatiini waan jette, Waaqooti hedduuni ya nama fakaate nuti gadi buute!" 
Acts14:12 Worri Barnabani Zeu jed'e, Pauloni Herme jed'e. Wonti akanatiifi guddaani hasaa Paulo." 
Acts14:13 Jennaani qaalluuni Zeu, ka mani isaa dira bira jiru, sangafi daraara balbala diratiini d'ufe, biyya woliini sorio qalu fed'e." 
Acts14:14 Paulofi Barnabani waan kana d'ageennaani, woya ufii tatarsaasani, jiddu biyya oriani iyani waan jed'ani," 
Acts14:15 D'iiro, isani maafi waan akana kana tolchitani? Nu namuma aka keesaniti! Nu Odu Dansa isaniti hasoomna, aka waan kana ka woma intahiini iraa deebitani, gara Waaqa jireenna ka gubbafi lafafi galaanafi waan keesa jira ch'ufa uume deebitani." 
Acts14:16 Inni duri aka gochiti ch'ufti aada ufi gula yaate iti lakise. 
Acts14:17 Taatule inni waan isa d'ugeesa taka ind'amne ammo waan dansa tolche, isanii roobe, mid'aani isanii kenne garaa keesani sagalefi gammadaani quufsa." 
Acts14:18 Yo dubbi tana dubbatanile biyyiti diquma sorio ergattuti inqaliini, ergattuti dide male." 
Acts14:19 Yahudiini Antiokiatiifi ta Ikonio d'ufte biyya sosobde, Paulo d'akhaani haate, dira keesaa hirkifte, waan inni due seete." 
Acts14:20 Ammo ato gumiini d'ugefatte isa marsitu, inni olkae dira olseene, boriyya Barnaba woliini gara dira Derbe d'aqe." 
Acts14:21 Eegi worri dubbi Waaqa dira suni keesati hasae nama heddu barsiise, worri Listrafi Ikoniofi Antiokiati deebie," 
Acts14:22 garaa worra d'ugefate jabeese aka d'ugefacha keesa taani gorse waan jed'e, Nu gaargala guddaani Finna Waaqa argachu malle." 
Acts14:23 Gumi ch'ufa keesa jaarole fohatani, ufi agabsani, Waaqa kad'atani, harka Aabbo ka worri d'ugefate keesati lakisani." 
Acts14:24 Pisidia keesa dabrani Pamfilia d'ufani. 
Acts14:25 Eegi dubbi Waaqa Perge keesati hasaani, Attaliati gadi buani." 
Acts14:26 Achi kaani hobolo keesa duudani, Antiokiati dachaani, fullaani tunini fulla qara worra harka ira kayani eebbisani, Beena huji Waaqa hojad'a jed'aniini ergani. Huji suni worri hobaamnaani gale." 
Acts14:27 Worri d'ufnaani gumi wolti yaamani, worri waan Waaqi harka worraatiini tolche ch'ufa odeese ammalle aka inni balbala d'ugefacha gosa d'ibile bane odeesani." 
Acts14:28 Duuba guyya heddu jara d'ugefate suni woliini taani. 
Acts15:1 Jari Yudea toko d'ufe oboleyaani barsiise waan jed'eeni, Yo isani aada Musa gula qabanqaba qabattani male, baafamu indandeetani." 
Acts15:2 Paulofi Barnabani worraani wold'aqu dad'amnaani, worri aka Paulofi Barnabafi nami d'ibileeni Yerusalemu d'aqani, aka ergattufi jaarole waan kana gaafatani buufatani." 
Acts15:3 Duuba gummiini Waaqaa imaltu worra ergite; Foinikefi Samaria keesa dabrani, aka nami gosa d'ibi gara Waaqa deebie odeesani. Oduuni tuni guddo oboleyaani ch'ufa gammachiifte." 
Acts15:4 Yerusalemu geennaani, gumi Waaqatiifi ergattufi jaaroleeni worra d'ieesite, worri waan Waaqi harka worratiini tolche ch'ufa odeese." 
Acts15:5 Ammo Farisayooni gari ta d'ugefatte, kaate, Worri ha qabanqaba qabate Seera Musa guutu jette." 
Acts15:6 Duuba ergattufi jaaroleeni wolwoldeete aka waan kana ilaaltu. 
Acts15:7 Eegi dubbi guddo wolmormani, Petroni olkae waan worraani jed'e, D'iiro, oboleyaani isani imbeetani, aka gaafa qara Waaqi isani keesaa na fohate, aka afaani kiyyaani nami gosa d'ibi dubbi Odu Dansa d'agaye d'ugefatu." 
Acts15:8 Ammalle Waaqi ka garaa nama beekhu d'ugefacha worra arginaani Lubbu Qulqullo worraa kenne, akuma nuu kenne." 
Acts15:9 Ammalle nufi worra gargari inherenne, ammo maro d'ugefacha worraatiifi garaa worra qulqulleese." 
Acts15:10 Duuba maafi Waaqati gamtani, qaampara jara Yeso ira keetani, ka ababoota teennaafi nuleeni baachu indandeenne?" 
Acts15:11 Nuleeni akuma worraa aka eeba Aabbo Yesotiini baafamnu d'ugefanna. 
Acts15:12 Gumiini ch'ufti ch'allifte Barnabafi Paulo ka akheekhafi waan mama ka Waaqi jiddu gosa d'ibii harka worraatiini tolche odeesu ch'aqafte. 
Acts15:13 Worri dubbi buufate jennaani Yakoboni waan jed'e, D'iiro oboleyaani na ch'aqasa!" 
Acts15:14 Simonini ya aka Waaqi qara gosa d'ibi herege worra keesaa gumi maqa ufitiini fohatu odeese. 
Acts15:15 Dubbini raaga waan kanaani wolfakaatti. Akuma t'aafiini jettu," 
Acts15:16 Eegi waan kana anini deebie, Mana Daudi ka lafati jige ijaara; ammalle hoofa deebie olqabe, maro lameeso ijaara." 
Acts15:17 Aka nama d'ibi ch'ufaafi nami gosa ch'ufa, ka maqa kiyyaani yaamani, Aabbo barbaadu." 
Acts15:18 Aabbooni, ka duri waan kana ch'ufa nama beesise akana jed'a." 
Acts15:19 Tanaafi wonti anini heregu tana: Nu worra gosa d'ibi ka Waaqati deebie gaargalchu himmalle. 
Acts15:20 Ammo nu tatabe d'aamsa nagaya worraa t'aamna, aka worri sagale waan harkaani boch'ani baasani dide, algalooma ira ufi d'owe, waan hud'ani ijeesani yokhaani d'iigale lagatu." 
Acts15:21 Wonti akanatiifi Musani haga duriiti nama dubbi isaa hasau qaba, dira ch'ufa keesa; ammalle guyya Sabato ch'ufa maneeni Waaqa iti kad'atani keesati soomani." 
Acts15:22 Jennaani ergattufi jaarolefi gumiini ch'ufti ee jette, worra gugurda gumi Waaqaa keesaa nama ufi fohate Antiokiati ergite, Paulofi Barnaba woliini: toko Yuda ka Barnaba jed'ani kaaleni Sila." 
Acts15:23 Tatabe tana t'aafani harka worrati kennani waan jed'ani: Nu ergattufi jaaroleeni, oboleyaani teesani, nagaya oboleyaani gosa d'ibi ta Antiokiatiifi ta Shamutiifi ta Kilikiati ergina." 
Acts15:24 Nu aka jari armaa yae toko dubbini isani gaargalche lubbu teesani yaku fed'e ya d'ageenne; ammo nu seera akana kana worraa inkennine. 
Acts15:25 Nu garaa tokooni wolwoldeenne, aka nama fohanne jaalaani teenna Barnabafi Paulo woliini isaniti erginu buufanne." 
Acts15:26 Jari suni jara waan lubbu ufi inherenne, maro maqa Aabbo keenna Yeso Kristotiifi." 
Acts15:27 Tanaafi nu Yudafi Sila ergine, aka afaani ufitiini isaniti himani." 
Acts15:28 Lubbu Qulqullofi nuleeni baa d'ibi isani ira kayu imfeenu, waan tolchu malani male:" 
Acts15:29 sagale waan harkaani boch'ani baasani inyaatiina; d'iigafi waan hud'ani ijeesaniifi algalooma lagad'a. Yo isani waan kana ch'ufa lagattani waan dansa tolchitani. Nagayaati taa. 
Acts15:30 Worri kae yae Antiokia d'ufe, gumi wolti yaamani tatabe iti kennani." 
Acts15:31 Eegi soomani, maro dubbi nama jabeesitu sunitiifi gammadani." 
Acts15:32 Yudafi Silani, waan raagoota tahaniifi, dubbi hedduuni oboleyaani jabeesani gorsani." 
Acts15:33 Eegi worri diqo fulla suni tae, oboleyaani nagayaani worra gadi d'iifte, aka gara d'ufanifiti dachaani. [" 
Acts15:34 Ammo Silani achi tau fed'e.] 
Acts15:35 Paulofi Barnabani Antiokia keesa taani, dubbi Aabbo barsiisani nama d'ibi heddu woliini hasaani." 
Acts15:36 Eegi bulti diqo toko Pauloni waan Barnabani jed'e, Gara oboleyaani teenna, ta dira nu dubbi Waaqa iti hasoomne ch'ufu keesa jirtu, dachaane waan worri keesa jira ilaalu male." 
Acts15:37 Barnabani Yohana, ka Mariko jed'ani, ufi gula fuud'u fed'e." 
Acts15:38 Ammo Pauloni aka isa fuud'ani imfeene, maro inni Pamfiliati worra lakise worra woliini huji tolchu dideefi." 
Acts15:39 Worri guddo wolmorme gargari bahe. Jennaani Barnabani Mariko fuud'e haga Kiproni hobolooni d'aqe. 
Acts15:40 Ammo eegi oboleyaani aka inni eeba Aabbo argatu Waaqa kad'ateefi Pauloni sila fuud'e iti d'aabate. 
Acts15:41 Inni Shamufi Kilikia keesa dabre gumi jabeese. 
Acts16:1 Pauloni dira Derbefi Listra d'ufe. Nama Yeso tokoti jira, ka Timotheo jed'ani: inni ilma niiti Yahudi toko ta d'ugefatte, ammo abbaani isaa gosa Griki." 
Acts16:2 Oboleyaani ta Listrafi Ikonio jirtu, Nama dansa isaani jette." 
Acts16:3 Pauloni isa fohate, aka inni isa woliini deemu. Inni isa fuud'e qabanqaba qabeefi, waan Yahudiini fulla suni jirtu ch'ufti aka abbaani isaa gosa Griki beetuufi." 
Acts16:4 Worri dira ch'ufa keesa yayae aada seera ergattufi jaaroleeni Yerusalemuti murte, gumi iti kenne, Guuta jed'eeni." 
Acts16:5 Tanaafi gumiini Waaqa d'ugefacha keesa jajabaatte guyya ch'ufa heddatte. 
Acts16:6 Worri Frigiafi Galatia keesa dabre, jennaani Lubbuuni Qulqullooni aka worri Asia keesa dubbi suni inhaasoomne worrati himte." 
Acts16:7 Worri Misia geennaani Bithiniati dabru fed'e, ammo Lubbuuni Yeso worraa d'owarte." 
Acts16:8 Worri Misia bira bahe dabre Troati gadibue. 
Acts16:9 Halkani toko Pauloni daayyaani wo arge. Nami lafa Makedonia toko isa dura ejate isa kad'ate waan jed'eeni, Makedoniati kooti, nu qarqaari." 
Acts16:10 Inni daayya suni arginaani, nu maro tokotu aka Makedonia yaanu buufanne, waan aka Waaqi nu yaame, Odu Dansa iti odeesa nuuni jed'e mid'aafanneefi." 
Acts16:11 Jennaani nu Troa kaane, Samothrake iti qajeelle, boriyya Neapoli geenne." 
Acts16:12 Eegi suni nu Filipi d'umne, dira dira ch'ufa ira gudda toko lafa Makedonia suni keesa, ka Rumiini iti qubatte. Nu dira suni keesa bulti diqo toko teenne." 
Acts16:13 Guyya Sabato dira keesa yaane, moga galaana toko, fulla nami Waaqa iti kad'atu d'ageenne d'anne gadi teteenne, nad'eeni fulla suni jirtuti hasoomne." 
Acts16:14 Niitiini toko, ta Lidia jed'ani, ta woya didiimtu gurgurtu, ta dira Thiatira, ta Waaqa guddiftu, nu ch'aqafte. Aabbooni garaa isi bane, isiini waan Pauloni jed'e d'ageete." 
Acts16:15 Worra ufi ch'ufa woliini batiso argannaani waan nuuni jette yo isani aka anini Aabbo d'ugefad'e agartani, mana kiyya koota achi taa, jette nu sobate." 
Acts16:16 Ato nu fulla kad'acha yaanu, intalti toko ta jinni yuubooma qabdu, nuuni baate. Isiini abbooti ufiti guddo wo baate, waan isiini wo fadduufi." 
Acts16:17 Isiini nufi Paulo gula deemte iyite waan jette, Worri kunini hojattu Waaqa Guddaati, ta kara baha isani agarsiiftu." 
Acts16:18 Guyya heddu isiini akasuma tolchite. Ammo Pauloni lalefate isiti mich'irame waan jed'eeni, Anini maqa Yeso Kristotiini, Isi keesaa bahi siini jed'a jed'e. Hojuma suni jinniini taani isi keesaa baate." 
Acts16:19 Abbootiini isii hori duri ira argattu aka d'abdu arginaani Paulofi Sila qabani gabayati hirkisani, jaarole dura geesani," 
Acts16:20 Jara dubbi murutini d'ufani himatani waan jed'ani, worri kunini Yahudi guddo dira keenna kana yakuu jira." 
Acts16:21 Ammalle aada nu gochiti Rumi d'agayu himmalini yokhaani guutu himmalini nu barsiisa jed'ani. 
Acts16:22 Gumiini wolumaani iti ch'aarte, jari dubbi muru woya worra iraa yaase, d'aana namaani jed'e." 
Acts16:23 Eegi lichooni guddo worra d'aanani, mana hid'aansa keesa worra buusani, gudda mana hid'aansatiini, Aka dansa worra kana qorqorad'a jed'ani." 
Acts16:24 Inni seera kana d'ageennaani dinqa mana keesa worra naqe, miila worraa jabeese mukhati hid'e." 
Acts16:25 Saa jaa ka halkani Paulofi Silani Waaqa kad'atani sirbani, nami hid'aansa keesa jiru ch'ufti worra d'agaye." 
Acts16:26 Maro tokotu lafti chochoote, yayabi manaleeni chochoe. Hojuma suni balbalti ch'ufti banamte, haadi namaani hid'ani hiikhate." 
Acts16:27 Guddaani mana hid'aansa hiriiba keesa damannaani, balbala bana qabdu arge, waan nami hid'aansa keesaa baqate sehe, sheefti fud'ate ufi ijeesu fed'e." 
Acts16:28 Ammo Pauloni qonqo olfud'ate iye waan jed'eeni, Woma ufi intolchiini, nuuni ch'ufti arma jira." 
Acts16:29 Jennaani inni, Ifseeni kooti nama tokooni jed'e, mana keesa ch'ee, holate miila Paulotiifi ka Sila jalati jige." 
Acts16:30 Jennaani worra keesaa yaase waan jed'eeni, D'iiro, anini mani tolchu male aka baafamu?" 
Acts16:31 Worri waan jed'eeni, Aabbo Yeso d'ugefad'u, duuba imbaafamta, worra kanke ch'ufa woliini." 
Acts16:32 Worri dubbi Aabbo isaafi nama mana isaa keesa jiru ch'ufati odeese. 
Acts16:33 Inni hojuma suni halkaniini worra fuud'e, mada worraa d'iqe. Isaafi worri isaleeni ch'ufti hojuma suni batifamani." 
Acts16:34 Jennaani mana ufitiini worra d'aqe sagale worraa kenne waan worra ufi woliini Waaqa d'ugefateefi gammade. 
Acts16:35 Lafti bariinaani, jaaroleeni dubbi murtu gugurdooni taani askarti iti ergite waan jetteeni, Jara suni gadi lakisa." 
Acts16:36 Guddaani mana hid'aansa dubbi tana Pauloti hime waan jed'eeni, jari dubbi muru ya nama erge yaa isaniini jed'e, tanaafi amma kakaa nagayaani yaa." 
Acts16:37 Ammo Pauloni waan worraani jed'e, Worri biyya durati, nuu gosa Rumi d'aane, ato wollaala nuti imurini hid'aansa keesa nu kaye! Ammalle ammatana akanumati nu lakisu fed'a? Hiyyo, worri ha d'ufe keesaa nu yaasuuti." 
Acts16:38 Jari gugurdaani askarti dubbi tana jara dubbi muruti himnaani, aka worri gosa Rumi d'ageennaani guddo sodaatani," 
Acts16:39 d'ufani araarama kad'atani. Jennaani diidati baasani, aka worri dira suni keesaa yau kad'atani." 
Acts16:40 Paulofi Barnabani mana hid'aansa keesaa yaani mana Lidia d'aqani. Achiti oboleyaani arginaani jabeesani kaani yaani. 
Acts17:1 Eegi worri Amfipolifi Apolinia keesa dabrani, Thesalonike d'ufani, fulla mani Waaqa iti kad'atani ka Yahudi jiru." 
Acts17:2 Pauloni akuma aada ufi jiddu worraa seene, guyya Sabato sadii waan dubbi Waaqa worra woliini hasae." 
Acts17:3 Inni diideese worra agarsiise, aka Yesoni gaargale duisa keesaa kau male, ammalle, Yesoni kunini ka anini isaaniti himu d'uguma Kristo worraani jed'e." 
Acts17:4 Nami gari d'ugefate, Paulofi Sila woliini yae; jara Griki ka Waaqa sodaatufi nad'eeni gurra qabdu hedduleeni d'ugefatte." 
Acts17:5 Ammo Yahudiini maro d'iibitifi nama hamama, ka aada dansa imbeenne wolti yaamte, nama dira ch'ufa wolti baafte mana Yasoni haate, aka akasiini yo dandaani, Paulofi Sila qabani gumi duraani d'ufani." 
Acts17:6 Ammo worra d'amnaani Yasonifi oboleyaani gari qabani, gara jara gugurda hirkisani, iyani waan jed'ani, Worri lafa ch'ufa garagalche kunini yayu armaaleeni bahe," 
Acts17:7 Yasoniti worra bulche. Ammalle worri kuni ch'ufti seera Kaisari ch'abse waan jed'u, Hayyu d'ibiti jira ka Yeso jed'ani." 
Acts17:8 Dubbi tanaani dira garagalchani gumifi jara gugurda ch'ufa jarjarsani. 
Acts17:9 Jaaroleeni Yasonifi jara kaani hori iraa fuunaani galakifte. 
Acts17:10 Maro tokotu oboleyaani Paulofi Sila halkaniini haga Beroya ergite. Worri d'umnaani mana Waaqa iti kad'atani ka Yahudi olduude. 
Acts17:11 Worri lafa suni worra Thesalonike ira dansa. Dubbi Waaqa qalbi dansaani ch'aqasani, t'aafi guyya ch'ufa keesa barbaadani, aka wonti kunini d'uga ilaalani." 
Acts17:12 Duuba nami hedduuni d'ugefate, nad'eeni gurra qabdu ta gosa Yahudileeni d'ugefate, ammalle nami d'iiraleeni, hedduuni d'ugefate." 
Acts17:13 Ammo Yahudiini Thesalonike, aka Pauloni dubbi Waaqa Beroya keesati odeese d'ageennaani, achi d'ufte biyya iti kaafte." 
Acts17:14 Maro tokotu oboleyaani Paulo gara galaana ergite, ammo Silafi Timotheoni achumati hafani." 
Acts17:15 Worri Beroyati galisaa kae jennaani Pauloni aka Silafi Timotheoni hure gara isaa d'ufani worrati d'aame. 
Acts17:16 Ato Pauloni Athene keesati Silafi Timotheo eegu, aka diri suni waan harkaani boch'aniini guutame arge guddo lalefate." 
Acts17:17 Tanaafi mana Waaqa iti kad'atani keesati Yahudifi nama Waaqa sodaatu woliini hasae, dubbi mormeeni, ammalle guyya ch'ufa gabaya keesati worra gara isaa d'ufeeni hasae." 
Acts17:18 Jari woi beekhu toko, ka Epikureofi Stoiko jed'ani, isaani dubbi morme. Nami gari waan jed'e, Namichi daallichi kunini maani jechu jira? Ammo ka gari waan jed'e, Inni nama waan waaqoota ka nami imbeenne hasau jiru fakaata. Wonti worri akana jed'eefi waan Pauloni waan Yesotiifi waan kaisa isaa worrati hasaeefi." 
Acts17:19 Worri isa fuud'e, gara Areopago geesani waan jed'aniini, Barsiisa haraa atini nama barsiiftu tana d'agayu feena." 
Acts17:20 Atini dubbi mama nuti odeesita, tanaafi nu waan kana d'agayu feena jed'ani." 
Acts17:21 Nama Athentiifi keessumaani fulla suni d'ufte ch'ufti hojja ch'ufa woma intolchitu, waan haraa hasaani yokhaani ch'aqasani male." 
Acts17:22 Pauloni fulla Areopago ejate waan biyyaani jed'e, Worra Athene, aka isani guddo waan Waaqa hereddani yayu arge." 
Acts17:23 Ato anini dedeeme aada kad'acha teesani ilaalu, anini dubbi toko ta fulla isani sorio iti qalattani gubbati t'aafani arge, ta GARA WAAQA NAMI IMBEENNE jettu. Tanaafi waan isani ato imbeenne kad'attani suni anini isaniti odeesa." 
Acts17:24 Waaqi, ka lafafi waan keesa jira ch'ufa uume, waan inni Abba gubbafi lafa taheefi, mana harki nama ijaare keesa intau." 
Acts17:25 Yokhaani harki nama isa inyaachisu, aka waan inni wo fed'u. Wonti akanatiifi inni jireennafi hafuura nama ch'ufaa kenna." 
Acts17:26 Inni nama toko iraa gosa lafa ch'ufa keesa teetu uume, lafa ch'ufa keesa qubsise. Isumati qara bara gochiti suni teetufi seera lafale tolche." 
Acts17:27 Wonti inni akasi tolcheefi, aka Waaqa barbaadani aka sila isa argani beekhani. Ammo inni nu tokole iraa fago injiru;" 
Acts17:28 akuma nami toko jed'e, Nu isa keesa yaane teteenne jireenna arganna. Akuma namichi keesani toko sirba keesa jed'e, nu ijoolle isaati." 
Acts17:29 Waan nu ijoolle isaa taaneefi, waan Waaqi aka worqi yokhaani aka saldaqa yokhaani aka d'akha nami harkaani boch'u jiru nu sehu himmalle." 
Acts17:30 Haga nami isa imbeenne kana ch'ufa Waaqi ya bira namaa dabre, ammo ammatana aka nami ch'ufti daba iraa deebiu fed'a." 
Acts17:31 Inni ya guyya tolfate, aka nama lafa jiru ch'ufa d'ugaani qoru, nama inni fohateeni. Inni ya nama kana duisa keesaa kaase, waan kana kara kanaani nama ch'ufaa d'ugeese." 
Acts17:32 Waan duisa keesaa kaiti d'ageennaani, nami gari goyeese, ka gari, Waan kana guyya d'ibi iti deebine sira d'ageenna jed'e." 
Acts17:33 Duuba Pauloni jiddu worraati kae deeme. 
Acts17:34 Nami gari isati mataqe d'ugefate, toko Dionisio jed'ani, nama goli Areopago, tokoleeni niiti toko ta Damari jed'ani, ammalle nami d'ibileeni ka worra woliini jiru d'ugefate." 
Acts18:1 Eegi waan kana Pauloni Athene kae Korintho d'ufe. 
Acts18:2 Achiti nama Yahudi toko, ka Akila jed'ani, ka lafa Pontoti d'alate, ka d'io niiti isaa Prisila woliini lafa Talianati d'ufe arge. Wonti inni achi d'ufeefi waan Klaudionini aka Yahudiini ch'ufti lafa Rumi keesaa godaantu mureefi." 
Acts18:3 Ammalle waan hujiini worraa taka taateefi worra woliini tae; hujiini worraa huji waaro mid'aasani. 
Acts18:4 Sabato ch'ufa inni mana Waaqa iti kad'atani keesati hasae, Yahudifi Griki kara ufi deebise." 
Acts18:5 Silafi Timotheoni Makedonia d'ufani jennaani Pauloni halkani guyya hasae, aka Yesoni Kristo Yahuditi odeese." 
Acts18:6 Yahudiini isa didde arabsinaani, inni woya hargufate waan jed'e, D'iigi keesani mata keesani gubba ha jiraatu, anini qulqullo, arraa achi anini gara gosa d'ibi deema." 
Acts18:7 Inni kae deeme, mana nama toko, ka Tito Yusto jed'ani, ka Waaqa guddisu d'aqe. Mani isaa d'awatu mana Waaqa iti kad'atani jira." 
Acts18:8 Krisponi, ka gudda mana Waaqaa, worra ufi ch'ufa woliini Aabbo d'ugefate. Nami Korintho hedduuni waan kana d'ageennaani d'ugefate batifame." 
Acts18:9 Jennaani Aabbooni halkani toko daayyaani Pauloni dubbate waan jed'e, Insodaatini, dubbad'u, inch'aliisiini." 
Acts18:10 Anini si illakisu, wolumaani jirra, nami tokoleeni dandae woma si intolchu, anini nama heddu dira kana keesaa qaba." 
Acts18:11 Inni dira suni keesa haga ganna tokofi jia jaa tae dubbi Waaqa worra barsiise. 
Acts18:12 Gaafa Galioni jaallaba Akafa, Yahudiini Paulo qabde fulla qorsuma geesite" 
Acts18:13 waan jetteeni, Namichi kunini aada male biyya aka Waaqa kad'atani barsiisa!" 
Acts18:14 Pauloni dubbachu fed'e jennaani Galioni waan Yahudiini jed'e, Yo sila wonti kunini waan kiyyiba yokhaani waan ch'ubbu hamtu taate anini isani ch'aqasu male." 
Acts18:15 Ammo yo waan dubbitiifi maqafi waan seera keesani ch'allaa taate, isanumaani ilaalad'a. Anini waan akana kana inqoru jed'e." 
Acts18:16 Duuba fulla qorsumati worra gusse. 
Acts18:17 Nami ch'ufti Sosthene, gudda mana Waaqa iti kad'atani qabe fulla qorsumati geesani d'aanani. Ammo Galioni waan kana tokole iyaalle." 
Acts18:18 Eegi waan kana, Pauloni guyya heddu achi keesa tae, duuba nagaya oboleyaaniti d'aamate, hobolo seene lafa Shamu d'ufe, Prisilafi Akila woliini. Ato indeemini, Kenkrea keesati kakhate mata haadate." 
Acts18:19 Worri Efeso d'umnaani, Pauloni worra achiti lakise. Ammo ufii mana Waaqa iti kad'atani seene Yahuditi hasae." 
Acts18:20 Yahudiini isa kad'atte aka inni ammalle isii woliini tau, ammo inni indide." 
Acts18:21 Taatule nagaya d'aamate, Yo Waaqi jed'e anini indeebia jed'e, hobolo seene Efeso keesaa deeme." 
Acts18:22 Kaisaria geennaani Yerusalemu d'aqe, gumi Waaqa nagaya fuud'e, jennaani Antiokiale d'aqe." 
Acts18:23 Bulti diqo toko achi keesa tae kae deeme. Lafa Galatiafi Frigia keesa dedeeme gumi d'ugefatte jabeese. 
Acts18:24 Namichi Yahudi toko ka Iskanderiati d'alate, ka Apolo jed'ani, Efeso d'ufe. Inni nama arabaani qaro ammalle waan t'aafi ch'ufa guddo hubate." 
Acts18:25 Namichi kunini qara waan kara Aabbo barate, garaani isaa owinaani waan Yeso qajeelche dubbate barsiise, ammo batiso Yohana ch'allaa beekha." 
Acts18:26 Soda male mana Waaqa iti kad'atani keesati barsiise. Prisilafi Akilani waan isaa d'ageennaani fuud'ani, Kara Waaqa haga qara ira barsiisani." 
Acts18:27 Inni Akaya d'aqu feenaani, oboleyaani tatabe iti kennite aka jari Yeso isa bulchu. Achini baanaani inni guddo worra maro eeba Waaqatiifi d'ugefate qarqaare." 
Acts18:28 Wonti akanatiifi inni waan t'aafi duri keesati t'aafani aka Yesoni Kristo nama ch'ufa agarsiise, akasiini moroma Yahudi ch'ufa dabsate." 
Acts19:1 Ato Apoloni Korintho ke jiru, Pauloni arda suni ch'ufa keesa deeme Efesoni bahe. Jara Yeso ka gari arginaani" 
Acts19:2 inni waan worraani jed'e, Isani gaafa d'ugefattani Lubbu Qulqullo argattani? Worri waan jed'eeni, Hiyyo, aka Lubbuuni Qulqullooni jirtule imbeennu." 
Acts19:3 Inni duuba waan worraani jed'e, Batiso tamiini batifamtani re? Batiso Yohanatiini batifamne jed'aniini." 
Acts19:4 Jennaani Pauloni waan jed'e, Yohanani d'uguma batiso daba iraa deebianiini barsiise waan jed'e, Ka na gula d'ufu d'ugefachu maltani, nami suni Yeso." 
Acts19:5 Worri waan kana d'ageennaani maqa Aabbo Yesotiini batifame. 
Acts19:6 Pauloni harka worra ira keyanaani, Lubbuuni Qulqullooni worra ira buute afaani d'ibi dubbatani dubbi Waaqa hasani." 
Acts19:7 Worri d'iira haga kud'ani lamati. 
Acts19:8 Pauloni mana Waaqa iti kad'atani seene, haga jia sadi soda male dubbate, nama hedduuni wolmormani waan finna Waaqa nama barsiise." 
Acts19:9 Ammo nami gari mata jabaate d'ugefachu dide, gumi durati hameenna kara Aabbo dubbate. Tanaafi Pauloni worra biraa deeme, jara Yeso guure guyya ch'ufa mana Tirano keesati barsiise." 
Acts19:10 Inni haga ganna lama ch'ufa akasi tolche, tanaafi nami Asia keesa jiru ch'ufti, ka Yahuditiifi Grikileeni, dubbi Aabbo d'agaye." 
Acts19:11 Waaqi akheekha gugurda harka Paulotiini tolche. 
Acts19:12 Yo bututufi woya isaa nama fayya inqamneti geesanile, hojuma suni fayyani jinniini keesaa baati." 
Acts19:13 Yahudiini gari, ta lafa ch'ufa keesa yayaate jinni nama keesaa baafte, maqa Yeso Kristotiini jinni nama keesa yaasu iti gamte waan jette, Anini maqa Yeso, ka Pauloni barsiisuuni si abaara jed'ani." 
Acts19:14 Ilmaani torbati jira, ta Qaallicha Yahudi Gudda, ka Skewa jed'ani, ta waan kana tolchite." 
Acts19:15 Jinniini waan worraani jette, Anini Yeso imbeekha, Paulole imbeekha, ammo isani eennu kana?" 
Acts19:16 Namichi jinni qabu kaani worrati kae dabsate, mata d'od'oose woya ira tatarsaase, mana keesaa gusse." 
Acts19:17 Yahudifi Grikiini Efeso keesa jirtu ch'ufti waan kana d'ageennaani guddo sodaatte, maqaani Aabbo Yesoleeni guddifame." 
Acts19:18 Nami hedduuni ka qara d'ugefate d'ufe daba ufi himate, huji ufi diideese hime." 
Acts19:19 Falfaltuuni hedduuni kitaaba ufi wolti guurte, nama ch'ufa durati ibidaani gubde. Gati waan gubani kaani ch'ufa heregani jennaani aka isiini qarsi kunki shantama taate argani." 
Acts19:20 Akanaani dubbini Aabbo jabaatte guddatte fulla ch'ufaa geete. 
Acts19:21 Eegi waan kana Pauloni aka Makedoniafi Akaya keesa dabre Yerusalemu d'aqu kutate waan jed'e, Yo achi gahe, Rumile d'aqu male jed'e." 
Acts19:22 Tanaafi inni jara lama, Timotheofi Erasto, ka waan isaa qorqoratu, Makedoniati erge, ammo ufi Asia keesa diqo toko tae." 
Acts19:23 Eegi waan kana gaargali guddaani, maro Kara Aabbootiifi, lafati bue." 
Acts19:24 Ogeesi toko, ka Demetrio jed'ani, fakeenna mana Artemi iti kad'atani saldaqa tume, duuba hujiini tuni daldala guddo ogeeyi ch'ufaa d'ufteeni." 
Acts19:25 Inni ogeeyifi nama huji gosa suni tolchu ch'ufa wolti yaame waan jed'eeni, D'iiro, isani imbeetani, aka nu daldala kana keesa hori argannu." 
Acts19:26 Ammalle isani ya argitani d'ageettani, aka fulla Efeso ch'allaaniti, ammo fulla ch'ufa Asia keesa, Pauloni nama heddu sosobe qalbi worra garagalche, Wonti harkaani mid'aasani Waaqaaniti jed'u." 
Acts19:27 Wonti nu sodaannu aka huji teenna ch'alla tuffataniniti, ammo aka mana Artemi ta waaqa jed'anile tuffatani, aka guddinni isi badu, ta Asiafi lafti ch'ufti guddiftu!" 
Acts19:28 Dubbi tana d'ageennaani worri guddo ch'aare, waan jed'e, Artemini ta dira Efeso ha guddatu!" 
Acts19:29 Diri ch'ufti gohannaani guutame. Gayofi Aristarko, jara Makedonia, ka Paulo woliini imaltu yaani qabani, diida korati geesani." 
Acts19:30 Pauloni biyyati gadi bahu fed'e, ammo jari Yeso d'ugefate kaani isa d'owe." 
Acts19:31 Jari Asia gugurdaani toko, ka jaalaani isaa, nama iti erge, aka inni diida korati gadimbaane." 
Acts19:32 Nami gari akana iya, ka gari aka d'ibi iya, waan gumiini waan taatu wolaalteefi; ammalle nami hedduuni waan nami woltiwoldaeefi imbeekhu." 
Acts19:33 Nami gari, Iskandati wo yake jed'e, waan Yahudiini biyya dura isa d'aabdeefi. Jennaani Iskandani harkaani biyya ch'allisiisu fed'e, aka sila worrati dubbatu." 
Acts19:34 Ammo aka inni Yahudi arginaani, nami ch'ufti qonqo tokooni haga saati lama iye, waan jed'e, Artemini ka dira Efeso ha guddatu!" 
Acts19:35 Eege guddaani dira biyya ch'allisiise, inni waan jed'eeni, D'iiro, biyya Efeso, nami ch'ufti aka diri Efeso mana Artemi guddafi d'akha qulqullo ka gubba gadi bue qorqoratu imbeekha." 
Acts19:36 Aka nami waan kana dandae imormanne imbeetani, tanaafi ch'allisa, woma iyakina!" 
Acts19:37 Isani jara kana armati d'uftaniini, ka waan mana Waaqaa inhatiini, yokhaani waaqa keenna inarabsiini." 
Acts19:38 Yo Demetriofi tumtuni isa woliini jirtu dubbi nama iraa qabaate kori injira nami dubbi qoruleeni injira, ha waan fed'ani himatani." 
Acts19:39 Ammo yo isani dubbi d'ibi gaafachu feetani, akuma aada kora jaarole keesati dubbad'a." 
Acts19:40 Wonti akanatiifi waan gohanna arra tana, yo nu gaafatani, nuu waan hamtu; wonti gumiini tunini wolwoldeeteefi, ta nu himannu, injirtu." 
Acts19:41 Dubbi tanaani inni biyya galche. 
Acts20:1 Eegi gohanti ch'aamte, Pauloni gumi Yeso wolti yaame gorse nagaya d'aamate kae Makedonia d'aqe." 
Acts20:2 Lafa suni keesa dedeeme gumi guddo gorse lafa Griki d'aqe. 
Acts20:3 Jia sadii achi tae. Shamu hobolooni d'aqisa kaanaani, aka Yahudiini d'ossaani isa eedu d'agaye; duuba aka kara Makedoniatiini galu kutate." 
Acts20:4 Sopatroni ilmi Piro ka dira Beroya d'ufe isa gula deeme ammalle jari kunileeni isa gula yae; Aristakofi Sekundo, worra lafa Thesaloniketifi Gayo lafa Derbetifi Timotheofi Tikikofi Trofimo, worra Asia." 
Acts20:5 Jari kunini nu dura dabre lafa Troati nu eege. 
Acts20:6 Guyyaani Qit'a bukho inqamne dabarraani nu Filipi hobolooni kaane, eegi bulti shani Troati worra d'aqamne, haga bulti torba achi teenne." 
Acts20:7 Guyya qara ka torbaani nu woli woldeenne qit'a ch'absine. Pauloni worrati hasae, aka kaisa boriyyaati kurfefatu haga saa jaa ka halkani hasae." 
Acts20:8 Fulla nu wolti woldeenne ta mana gubba suni keesa ifse hedduti jira. 
Acts20:9 Nami kaima toko ka Eutiko jed'ani fulla dirisha tae; waan Pauloni guddo hasaeefi inni muge, haga mana sadeeso ka gubbati d'aqate lafa d'ae, isa due lafaa fuud'ani." 
Acts20:10 Pauloni gadibue isati gadijed'e, iti mamarate waan jed'e, Inahiina, inni indoone." 
Acts20:11 Eegi inni oldeebie qit'a ch'abse nyaate, haga baraaqa d'eereese hasae, duuba kae deeme." 
Acts20:12 Worri kaani kaima kaani ka jiru fuud'ani garaa jabaatani. 
Acts20:13 Pauloni haga Aso miilaani deemaa kanaani, Hobolooni koota arti na fuud'a nuuni jed'e, duuba nu hobolooni dabare Aso yaane." 
Acts20:14 Inni Asoti nuuni baanaani, hobolo keesa isa keenne Mitilene deemne." 
Acts20:15 Hobolooni achi kaane boriyya Kio d'umne. Iftaani Samo d'umne, iftaani achaantu Mileto geenne." 
Acts20:16 Pauloni aka hobolooni Efeso biraa dabru kutate, maro Asia keesati turu imfeeneefi. Inni arifate aka yo dandae, ato guyyaani Pentekoste ingahiini Yerusalemu gahu." 
Acts20:17 Ato Mileto jiru, inni nama gara Efeso erge jaarole gumi Waaqaa yaame." 
Acts20:18 Worri gara Paulo d'ufe duuba inni waan worraani jed'e: Haga guyya qara ka anini Asia d'ufe, aka anini oole bule imbeetani." 
Acts20:19 Gaafa Yahudiini na gaargalchite na ijeesu feete, ufi diqeese imimaani bohe huji Aabbo hojad'e." 
Acts20:20 Ammalle waan isani olaana tokole inhambimne, ato isanii agarsiise barsiisu, nama duraafi maneeni teesani keesaleti." 
Acts20:21 Anini Yahudifi gosa d'ibileti layu hime, aka daba lakisani Waaqati deebiani Aabbo Yeso d'ugefatani." 
Acts20:22 Amma anini gara Yerusalemu d'aquu jira, waan Lubbuuni Qulqullooni na deemsifteefi; ammo waan achiti tahu imbeekhu." 
Acts20:23 Anini imbeekha, Lubbuuni Qulqullooni ya nati himte, dira ch'ufa keesa hid'aansafi gaargalati na eegata." 
Acts20:24 Ammo anini jireenna kiyya inheregu, waan dansale insehu, aka anini deema tiyya gammadaani hobaase huji tiyya ta Aabbo Yesoni naa kenne, ta Odu Dansa ta eeba Waaqa d'ugeesu guutu." 
Acts20:25 Anini imbeekha, aka isaaniini ch'ufti, ka anini jiddu teesaniti Finna Waaqa hasae, fuula kiyya deebitani ingarre." 
Acts20:26 Tanaafi anini guyya kana isani durati hima, aka d'iigi nama tokoleeni na gubbaa injirre." 
Acts20:27 Anini fed'i Waaqa tokole isani ind'ossine. 
Acts20:28 Tanaafi ufiifi hooliye Lubbuuni Qulqullooni isaniti kennitele qorqorad'a, aka gumi Aabbo ta inni d'iiga ufitiini bitate nyaachiftani." 
Acts20:29 Anini imbeekha aka eegi anini deeme, yeyiini hamtuuni jiddu teesani d'ufte hooliye fit'u." 
Acts20:30 Ammalle jiddu teesani keesa namati d'ufa, ka waan hamtu dubbatu, aka gumi Yeso ufi gula deebisu." 
Acts20:31 Tanaafi eegad'a, qaabad'a, aka anini haga ganna sadi halkaniifi guyya nama ch'ufa imimaaniini gorse." 
Acts20:32 Ammatana harka Waaqatiifi dubbi eeba isaati isani lakisa. Isiini dandeete isani jabeesite worra qulqullo woliini d'aala isani kenniti. 
Acts20:33 Anini maldaa yokhaani worqi yokhaani woya nama tokole ind'araane. 
Acts20:34 Ee, isanileeni imbeetani, aka anini harka kiyyaani waan anini fed'ufi waan waheli kiyya fed'u ch'ufa hojad'e argad'e." 
Acts20:35 Anini ya waan ch'ufa isani agarsiise, aka nu akasi hojanne nama lalaafa qarqaaru malle. Ammalle dubbi Aabbo Yesoni jed'e qaabad'a, ta inni, Wonti kennani waan fud'atani ira eeba qabdi jed'e." 
Acts20:36 Eegi akasi dubbate, inni jilbifate worra ch'ufa woliini Waaqa kad'ate." 
Acts20:37 Worri guddo bohe qach'eera Pauloti jigani isa d'ungatani. 
Acts20:38 Maro dubbi inni dubbate, Isani deebitani fuula kiyya inargitani jed'eefi guddo lalefatani. Duuba haga hobolo isa gegeesani." 
Acts21:1 Eegi nagayaati worraani jenne, hobolo duunne Kositi qajeelle; boriyya Rodo d'umne, eegi suni Patarati dabarre." 
Acts21:2 Hobolo Foinike deemtu toko arginaani seenne iti d'aabanne. 
Acts21:3 Eegi Kipro argine, harka bitaati ufi lakimne Shamu d'anne, dira Tiro keesa seenne, waan hobolooni miha achiti buufachu feeteefi." 
Acts21:4 Jara Yeso arginaani haga guyya torba achi teenne. Worri jabeenna Lubbu Qulqullotiini Paulo iti hime aka inni Yerusalemu ind'anne. 
Acts21:5 Guyyaani hobaanaani kaane kara keenna qabanne. Nami ch'ufti ijoolle ufi woliini nu gegeese, haga nu dira keesa baanuti. Afaani galaanati jilbifanne Waaqa kad'anne." 
Acts21:6 Nagaya wolti d'aamanne hobolo duunne, worri worra ufiti gale." 
Acts21:7 Eegi nu Tiro kaane, Tolemai d'umne; duuba oboleyaani nagaya fuune, guyya toko worra woliini oolle." 
Acts21:8 Boriyya kaane Kaisaria d'umne. Mana Filipo, nama Odu Dansa hasau, seenne woliini teenne. Inni jara torbaani Yerusalemuti fohatani kaani keesa jira." 
Acts21:9 Namichi kunini ijoolle dubra afuri qaba, ta dubbi Waaqa hasooftu." 
Acts21:10 Eegi nu diqo achi turre, raagi Agabo jed'ani toko, Yudea d'ufe." 
Acts21:11 Fulla teenna d'umnaani gurda Paulo fuud'e, harkafi miila ufi hid'e waan jed'e, Lubbuuni Qulqullooni waan jettu, Yahudiini Yerusalemu jirtu, abba gurda kana fuute, akana hiite harka gosa d'ibiti kenniti jed'e." 
Acts21:12 Waan kana d'ageennaani nufi worri sunileeni Paulo kad'anne aka inni Yerusalemu ind'anne. 
Acts21:13 Jennaani Pauloni waan jed'e, Isani maani tolchitani, ka bootani garaa na yakitani? Anini aka na hid'ani ch'alla inkurfefanne, ammo aka Yerusalemuti maro maqa Aabbo Yesoti duu kurfo jira jed'e." 
Acts21:14 Inni sosobamu dinnaani Fed'iini Aabbo ha taatu jenne galakimne. 
Acts21:15 Eegi guyya suni nu miha keenna fud'anne Yerusalemu d'anne. 
Acts21:16 Jari Yeso ka gari, ka Kaisaria jiru, nu woliini yae, mana nama Yeso toko ka Nasoni jed'ani, ka lafa Kipro, ka nu sila woliini teennu, geese." 
Acts21:17 Yerusalemu d'umnaani, oboleyaani gammadaani nu bulchite." 
Acts21:18 Boriyya nu Paulo woliini yaane, fulla Yakobo d'anne; jaaroleeni ch'ufti achi jirti." 
Acts21:19 Duuba inni nagaya fuud'e, waan Waaqi jiddu gosa d'ibiti harka isatiini tolche hime." 
Acts21:20 Worri waan kana d'ageennaani Aabbo guddise waan isaani jed'ani, Oboleesa, atini ya argite, aka Yahudiini kunki heddu ta d'ugefatte jirtu, ammalle ch'ufti guddo Seera jabeesiti." 
Acts21:21 Waan worri d'agaye, atini Yahudi ch'ufa ta lafa gosa d'ibi keesa teetu, aka Seera Musa lakiftu barsiifte, ammalle aka atini worri ijoolle ufiti qabanqaba inqamne yokhaani aada gula iyaane barsiifte jed'ani." 
Acts21:22 Amma maani tolchu malani re? Worri aka atini d'ufte ind'agaya. 
Acts21:23 Atini duuba waan nu siti himnu tolchi. Nama afuri qamna, ka kakhate." 
Acts21:24 Worra fuud'i, worra woliini ufi qulqulleesi, hori aadaa baasi, aka worri mata haadatu. Duuba nami ch'ufti aka wonti waan kanke d'agayani suni woma intahiini inarga, ammo aka atini aada gula deemte Seera Musa guuttu." 
Acts21:25 Waan gosa d'ibi ta d'ugefatte, nu ya tatabe worraa t'aamne, herega keenna gula, aka worri sagale waan harkaani boch'ani qalaniifi d'iigafi waan hud'ani ijeesaniifi algalooma lagatani." 
Acts21:26 Jennaani Pauloni jara kaani fuud'e, boriyya worra woliini ufi qulqulleese, aka guyya qulqullefachaani isaa hobaate sorio worra suni ch'ufaafi qalani himu Mana Waaqa seene." 
Acts21:27 Ato torbaani diquma inhobaiini, Yahudiini Asia Mana Waaqa keesati isa argite, jennaani gumi ch'ufa iti kaafte Paulo qabde waan jette," 
Acts21:28 D'iiro, gosa Israeli, nu qarqaara! Namichi kunini sunuma, ka nama ch'ufa fulla ch'ufati barsiisu, aka gosafi Seerafi Mana Waaqaa kana tuffatani. Ammalle nama gosa Griki Mana Waaqa kanaani d'ufe, fulla qulqullo tana t'ureese." 
Acts21:29 Wonti akanatiifi worri nama Efeso, toko, ka Trofimo jed'ani, Paulo woliini dira keesati argani, waan Pauloni Mana Waaqaa isa seensise sehani." 
Acts21:30 Nami dira suni ch'ufti iti kae, nami ch'ufti orie, Paulo qabani, Mana Waaqa keesaa hirkisani. Maro tokotu balbalti ch'ufamte." 
Acts21:31 Ato worri isa ijeesu fed'u, oduuni namicha gudda askarti geete, aka gohanti Yerusalemu ch'ufa keesa jirtu." 
Acts21:32 Inni maro tokotu askartiifi jara gugurda askarti fuud'e, gara worra suni oriani. Gudda askartitiifi askarti arginaani Paulo d'aanu lakisani." 
Acts21:33 Guddaani askarti iti d'iaate, Paulo qabe, Haada sibiila lamaani hid'a jed'e. Jennaani, Nami kuni eennu, maani yake? jed'e gaafate." 
Acts21:34 Gumi keesa nami gari aka toko iye, ka gari aka d'ibi iye. Hubachu dad'amnaani, Fulla askartiini bultu geesa jed'e." 
Acts21:35 Afaani balbala geennaani, askartiini maro dalansu gumitiifi Paulo hampaarte." 
Acts21:36 Gumiini guddooni isa gula yaate, Isa ijeesa jette iyite." 
Acts21:37 Ato mana askartiti geesanu, Pauloni waan gudda askartitiini jed'e, Siini dubbachu fed'a. Inni, Afaani Griki dubbachu imbeeta? jed'e gaafate." 
Acts21:38 Atini eennu kana? Namicha lafa Misiri, ka onana nama kaase shifta kunki afuri lafa alo geeseeniti?" 
Acts21:39 Ammo Pauloni waan isaani jed'e, Anini Yahudi, nama dira Tarsoti, ka lafa Kilikia keesa jiru; ammalle diri keenna gudda. Anini sii kad'ad'a aka anini biyya tanati dubbad'u." 
Acts21:40 Inni ee jennaani, Pauloni afaani balbala eje harkaani biyya ch'allisiise. Worri ch'allimnaani, inni afaani Ebraniatiini worrati dubbate waan jed'eeni:" 
Acts22:1 D'iiro, oboleyaani, abbooti, anini amma isani durati ufii dubbachu fed'a na ch'aqasa!" 
Acts22:2 Isa afaani Ebrania dubbatu d'ageennaani haga qarale ira ch'allisani. Duuba Pauloni waan jed'e. 
Acts22:3 Anini Yahudi, dira Tarso keesati d'alad'e, ka Kilikia keesa jiru, ammo anini dira kana keesa Gamalieli jalati guddad'e. Aada Seera ababoota teenna ch'ufa akuma d'ugaa na barsiisani kara Waaqaa owise iti jabaad'e, akuma isani guyya kana tolchuuti jirtani kana." 
Acts22:4 Ammalle anini nama Kara kana gula deemu haga duisa gaargalche, d'iirafi nad'eenile hid'e, mana hid'aansa keesa naqe." 
Acts22:5 Qaallicha Guddafi jaaroleeni waan kanati naa d'uga. Anini tatabe worra ira argad'e, aka oboleyaani Yahudi ta Damaski jirtuti geesu; tanaafi anini achi d'aqe, aka nama Kara suni gula deemu hid'e Yerusalemutini d'ufu, aka achiti gaargalchani." 
Acts22:6 Anini Damaskiti d'iaannaani, guyya gudda, adu saa jaa, ifsaani toko nati ifse." 
Acts22:7 Anini lafati jige, qonqo toko d'agaye ta, Saulo, Saulo, maafi naa gaargalchita? naani jettu." 
Acts22:8 Anini, Aabbo, atini eennu kana? jed'eeni. Inni waan naani jed'e, Anini Yeso Nazareti, kauma atini gaargalchuu jirtu." 
Acts22:9 Worri na woliini jiru ifsa arge male, qonqo naani dubbattu ind'ageenne." 
Acts22:10 Anini waan jed'e, Aabbo, anini maani tolchu male re? Aabbooni waan naani jed'e, Kai, Damaski d'aqi, waan atini tolchu malte achiti siti himani." 
Acts22:11 Maro ifsa sunitiifi anini lafa argu dad'abe; tanaafi waheli kiyya harka naa qabe dira na seensise. 
Acts22:12 Namichi toko, ka Anania jed'ani, ka Seera Waaqa guutu, ka Yahudiini Damaski ch'ufti saade," 
Acts22:13 nati d'ufe na bira eje, Aadda Saulo, lafa argi naani jed'e. Hojuma suni anini lafa arge isale arge." 
Acts22:14 Inni waan naani jed'e, Waaqi ababoota teenna ya si fohate, aka atini fed'i isaa baratte Nama d'uga suni argite qonqo afaani isaa iraa d'ageetu." 
Acts22:15 Atini d'uga isaa taata, aka waan agarteefi waan d'ageete nama ch'ufati himtu." 
Acts22:16 Ammatana maani eedda? Kai, batifami, daba kanke d'iqad'u, maqa isaa yaamad'u naani jed'e." 
Acts22:17 Eegi anini Yerusalemuti deebie, ato Mana Waaqaa keesa tae kad'ad'u, daayyaani wo arge." 
Acts22:18 Anini Aabbooni, Hurrisi, Yerusalemu keesaa bahi, worri kuni dubbi tante ind'ugefatu naani jed'u d'agaye." 
Acts22:19 Anini waan jed'eeni, Aabbo, worri aka anini maneeni Waaqa iti kad'atani ch'ufa keesati nama si d'ugefate hid'e d'aane imbeekha." 
Acts22:20 Gaafa Stefano, ka d'uga teeti, maro teetifi ijeesani, anini bira eje duisa isaa ee jed'e woya worra isa ijeesele qorqorad'e jed'e." 
Acts22:21 Inni waan naani jed'e, Kai, deemi, anini lafa fago gara gosa d'ibi si erga." 
Acts22:22 Haga inni dubbi tana jed'u ch'ufa ch'aqasani jennaani qonqo olfud'atani waan jed'ani, nama kana lafa tana keesa balleesa jiraachu himmalle." 
Acts22:23 Ato worri gohe woya hargufe biyye oli dadarbatanu," 
Acts22:24 guddaani askarti aka mana askartitiini Paulo d'ufani hime, ammalle aka lichooni isa d'aanani mure, aka inni waan worri Pauloti iyeefi beekhu." 
Acts22:25 D'aanicha isa hiinaani Pauloni, waan namicha isa bira ejuni jed'e, aki isani nama gosa Rumi ka wollaala iti imurini d'aantani fullaa?" 
Acts22:26 Guddaani askarti akasi d'ageennaani d'aqe gudda ufiti hime waan jed'e, Atini maani tolchu feeta? Namichi kunini gosa Rumiti." 
Acts22:27 Guddaani askarti d'ufe waan Pauloni jed'e, Ila, atini gosa Rumiti? Pauloni, Ee jed'e." 
Acts22:28 Guddaani askarti waan jed'eeni, Anini hori gudda baase nama Rumi tahe. Pauloni waan jed'eeni, Ammo anini lafa suniti d'alad'e." 
Acts22:29 Jennaani jari sila isa himsisu maro tokotu isa biraa yae. Guddaani askartileeni, aka Pauloni ka inni sibiilaani hid'e gosa Rumi d'ageennaani sodaate." 
Acts22:30 Guddaani askarti waan Yahudiini Paulo himateefi beekhu fed'e, tanaafi boriyya inni haada Paulo iraa hiikhe, jaarole koraa wolwoldeesise, Paulo fuud'e jiddu worra ejachiise." 
Acts23:1 Pauloni jaarole kora sonaani ilaale waan jed'e, Oboleyaani, anini qalbi tiyya keesati imbeekha, aka anini, wollaala male, Waaqa dura deeme haga arrale." 
Acts23:2 Qaallichi Guddaani, ka Anania jed'ani, worra isa bira ejaanjuuni, Afaani keesa d'aa jed'e." 
Acts23:3 Pauloni waan isaani jed'e, Waaqumaani si d'ainna, atini aka naabo d'akhaani jaraani ta daara dibani adeesani jirta; aka sila Seera gula na qortuufi arma teete ammo Seera male afaani keesa d'aa namaani jetta?" 
Acts23:4 Worri Paulo bira ejaanjatu waan jed'eeni, Atini Qaallicha Waaqa Gudda arabsita!" 
Acts23:5 Pauloni waan jed'eeni, Oboleyaani tiyya, anini aka inni Qaallicha Gudda imbeekhu. T'aafiini waan jettu, Worra isani fidu waan hamtu injed'inaani." 
Acts23:6 Pauloni aka jari gari Sadukayo ammalle ka gari Farisayo arginaani, kora keesati qonqo olfud'ate waan jed'e, Oboleyaani, anini Farisayo, ammalle ilma Farisayooti. Wonti na qoraniifi maro anini kaisa nama due abdad'uufi." 
Acts23:7 Inni akana jennaani, jiddu Farisayootiifi ta Sadukayo moramaani d'ufte gumiini gargari qoodamte." 
Acts23:8 Sadukayoni, Kaisi nama due injiru jetti; ammalle malaikafi ekheraani injirtu jetti, ammo Farisayooni, wonti kuni sadeenu injirti jetti." 
Acts23:9 Guddo iyani, jari Seera beekhu ka gama Farisayo kae morme waan jed'e, Daba nama kana irati ingarre, hegeri d'uguma ekheraani yokhaani malaikaani isaani dubbatte jed'ani." 
Acts23:10 Moromaani aka taka inargiini d'umnaani guddaani askarti waan worri Paulo qabe gargari tarsaasu sehe. Tanaafi askarti iti erge, aka isiini gadi buute harka isaani keesa irreeni isa fuute mana ufiti isa galchitu." 
Acts23:11 Halkani lameeso Aabbooni isa bira ejate waan jed'e, Garaa jabaad'u, akuma Yerusalemu keesati na d'ugeesite suni, Rumile keesati na d'ugeesu malte." 
Acts23:12 Lafti bariinaani jari Yahudi toko wold'aqe, kakhu jabdu toko wolti kakhatani waan jed'ani, Haga Paulo ijeemnuti nyaane ind'unnu jed'ani." 
Acts23:13 Worri kakhate sunini nama afurtama ira jira. 
Acts23:14 Gara qaalole gugurdofi jaarole d'aqani waan jed'ani, Nu ya kakhu jabdu kakhanne, aka woma inyaanne haga Paulo ijeemnuti." 
Acts23:15 Tanaafi isani, jaarole kora woliini, gudda askartiti hima, aka inni Paulo fuula keesa duraani d'ufu, aka waan dubbi ira mid'aafachu feetani. Ammo ato inni armaani imbaane, nu kurfo jirra, aka isa ijeemnu." 
Acts23:16 Ammo ilmi oboleeti Paulo dubbi tana d'ageennaani mana askarti olseene Pauloti hime. 
Acts23:17 Pauloni askarticha toko yaame waan jed'eeni, Kaima kana gara gudda askarti geesi. Inni woi iti himu fed'a jed'eeni." 
Acts23:18 Askartichi isa fuud'e, gara gudda askarti isa geese waan jed'eeni, Pauloni, namichi hid'aansa keesa jiru kaani, na yaame, Kaima kana gara gudda kanketi geesi naani jed'e; inni dubbi jabdu ta siini jed'u qaba." 
Acts23:19 Guddaani askarti harka qabe, fulla nami injirre isa geese. Maani nati himu feeta? jed'e gaafate." 
Acts23:20 Inni waan jed'eeni, Yahudiini ya wold'ate ammalle si kad'achu feeti, aka atini bori Paulo gara kora geesitu, aka isiini waan kora keesati dubbi isaa d'agayu feetu ufi tolchitu." 
Acts23:21 Ammo dubbi worra inch'aqasiini, nama haga afurtamati isa eegu jira. Worri ch'ufti ya kakhate, aka nyaatani ind'unne haga isa ijeesaniti. Kurfo jirani aka waan suni tolchani, ammo qonqo tante eegachu jirani." 
Acts23:22 Guddaani askarti, Aka atini waan kana nati himte nama tokoleti inhimini, kaima kaaniini jed'e, ufi biraa deemsise." 
Acts23:23 Jennaani inni jara gugurda askarti lama yaame waan jed'eeni, askarti d'ibba lamatifi nama fardaa torbaatamafi nama worraani ka d'ibba lama ka Kaisaria yau kurfeesa aka worri saa sadi ka halkani yau." 
Acts23:24 Fardoole Pauloni yaabatule kurfeesaafi, nagayaani harka jaallaba Felikiti kenna." 
Acts23:25 Inni tatabe t'aafe waan jed'e," 
Acts23:26 Klaudio Lisia, gara jaallaba dansa Feliki: Nagaya qabda?" 
Acts23:27 Yahudiini nama kana qabde diquma inijeesiini. Anini askarti woliini d'ufe isa baase, aka inni gosa Rumi d'ageennaani." 
Acts23:28 Waan isa himataniifi beekhu feenaani, fulla jaarole koraa isa geese." 
Acts23:29 Aka worri waan seera ufitiifi isa himatani arge, ammo waan isa ijeesu malaniifi yokhaani waan isa hid'u malaniifi tokole ingarre." 
Acts23:30 Aka Yahudiini nama kana eegu jirtu nati himnaani anini maro tokotu gara kanke isa erge. Worra isa himatule ya iti hime, aka si durati wolhimatani." 
Acts23:31 Askartiini Paulo fuute Antipatri halkaniini isa geesite. 
Acts23:32 Boriyya askartiini miilaani yaatu worrati dachaate, ammo askartiini fardo yaabattu dabarte." 
Acts23:33 Kaisaria d'umnaani tatabe jaallabati kennani Paulole isa dura geesani. 
Acts23:34 Jaallabi kaani tatabe soomnaani, Namichi kunini nama lafa tami? jed'e gaafate. Aka inni nama Kilikia d'ageennaani" 
Acts23:35 waan isaani jed'e, Yo jari si himatu d'ufu, dubbi tante ilaala. Jennaani mana hayyu Herode keesati isa qorqorad'a jed'e." 
Acts24:1 Eegi guyya shani Ananiani, Qaallichi Guddaani, jaarole woliini d'ufe, nama Paulo himatu toko, ka Tertulo jed'ani woliini. Duuba waan Paulo himataniifi jaallabati hasaani." 
Acts24:2 Paulo yaamani jennaani Tertuloni isa himate waan jed'e, Ee Feliki gudda, waan maro tantetiifi nagaya keesa teennuufi, ammalle maro qarqaarsa kanketitiifi huji dansa ta gosa tana tolchanifi," 
Acts24:3 nu guyya ch'ufa fulla ch'ufati waan nu waan kana arganneefi galata sii deebimna. 
Acts24:4 Dubbi d'eertuuni si gaargalchu imfed'u, tanaafi amma si kad'ad'a, dubbi teenna diqo tana d'agayi." 
Acts24:5 Nu nama kana ka nama gaargalchu argine; inni fulla deemu ch'ufati Yahudi yaka; inni gudda worra Nazarayoti. 
Acts24:6 Ammalle inni Mana Waaqale t'ureesu feenaani nu isa qamne. Nu akuma aada teenna gula duuba isaa qoru feene," 
Acts24:7 ammo guddaani keenna Lisiani d'ufe irre guddooni harka keenna keesaa isa fuud'e. 
Acts24:8 Ammalle Lisiani seera baase, aka nami isa himatu si dura d'ufu. Yo atini namicha kana wo gaafate, dandeete waan nu isa himannu kana ch'ufa isa irati ingarta." 
Acts24:9 Yahudiini ch'ufti wold'ate, Himachaani tunini d'uga jette." 
Acts24:10 Jaallabi harka Pauloti qabe, Dubbad'u, jed'eeni. Pauloni waan jed'e, Anini aka atini dubbi lafa tana ganna heddu qorte imbeekha, tanaafi anini ingammada, maro si durati ufii dubbad'uufi." 
Acts24:11 Atini yo biyya gaafatte ind'ageeta, guyya kud'ani lama ka dabre, anini Waaqa kad'achu Yerusalemu d'aqe." 
Acts24:12 Yahudiini ana nama tokoleeni wo mormu inagarre yokhaani ana biyya wolti baasule ingarre, Mana Waaqa keesafi dira keesaleti." 
Acts24:13 Waan na himatani kana tokole d'uga inqabani. 
Acts24:14 Anini waan toko si durati fud'ad'a. Anini Waaqa ababoota teenna Kara worri d'ara jed'uuni gula kad'ad'a. Anini waan Seera Musatiifi kitaaba raagoota keesati t'aafani ch'ufa ind'ugefad'a. 
Acts24:15 Akuma worri Waaqa abdatu, anileeni akasuma abdad'a, aka nama ch'ufa, hamafi dansale, duisa keesaa kaasani." 
Acts24:16 Tanaafi anini guyya ch'ufa Waaqafi nama duraleti aka wollaala male deemu ufi d'owa. 
Acts24:17 Ganna heddu Yerusalemu iraa tae jennaani horifi sorio gosa tiyya baasu d'ufe. 
Acts24:18 Anaa waan kana tolchu jiru Mana Waaqa keesati na argani, eegi anini aada qulqullefacha hobaafad'e. Gumiini na woliini injirtu, gohantileeni injirtu." 
Acts24:19 Ammo Yahudiini lafa Asia achi jirti, worri si dura eje na himachu male, yo waan na himataniifi qabaate." 
Acts24:20 Yokhaani worri kunini ha wollaala anini gaafa gumi kora dura eje dubbad'e tolche himuti, waan tokoti" 
Acts24:21 anini worra durati olkae jennaani jed'e male. Wonti na qoraniifi maro anini kaisa nama due d'ugefad'uufi na qorani. 
Acts24:22 Jennaani Felikini, ka waan kara kana aka dansa beekhu, kora baase dubbi teesani inilaala yo guddaani askarti ch'ufa ka Lisia jed'ani d'ufe jed'e." 
Acts24:23 Askarticha Paulo tissuuni, Aka dansa isa eegi ammo inhid'iini, aka jaalaani isaa waan inni fed'u kennituufi ind'owiini jed'e." 
Acts24:24 Eegi bulti diqo toko Felikini, niiti ufi Drusila ta gosa Yahudi, woliini d'ufe. Inni Paulo yaame waan d'ugefacha ta Yeso Kristo d'ugefatani nati himi jed'e, isa ch'aqase." 
Acts24:25 Ato Pauloni tae waan d'ugaatifi ka obsaatifi ka qorsuma hegeri d'uftu dubbatu, Felikini sodaate waan jed'e, amma beeni, yo isiini naa fuute si yaama." 
Acts24:26 Inni waan Pauloni beeseni isa gumbeesu sehe. Tanaafi maro heddu isa yaame hasaeeni. 
Acts24:27 Eegi ganna lama Porkio Festoni huji Feliki iraa fuud'e. Duuba Felikini aka Yahudi gammachiisu Paulo hid'aansa keesati lakise. 
Acts25:1 Guyya sadi lafa suni keesa teennaani Festoni Kaisaria kae Yerusalemu d'aqe. 
Acts25:2 Qaalole gugurdofi Yahudiini waan Paulo isati hasoofte, isa kad'atte," 
Acts25:3 aka inni worra qarqaare haga Yerusalemu nama erge Paulo fuud'u. Wonti akanatiifi Yahudiini qara aka kara keesati isa eegani ijeesani mariatte. 
Acts25:4 Festoni waan jed'e, Paulo la Kaisaria keesati hid'ani, anileeni d'iotu achi d'aqa." 
Acts25:5 Yo isani dandeetani, na woliini koota, aka nama kana himattani, yo inni hameenna tolche jed'e." 
Acts25:6 Jennaani Festoni guyya saddeeti yokhaani kud'anfa worra woliini tae Kaisariati gadi bue. Boriyya barch'uma abba qorsuma ira tae Paulo yaama jed'e. 
Acts25:7 Eegi inni d'ufe, Yahudiini Yerusalemu d'ufte isa bira ejatte waan jabdu hedduuni Paulo himatte, ammo waan tokole ta d'uga fakeesa d'abani." 
Acts25:8 Pauloni ufii dubbate waan jed'e, Anini Seera tokole iyakine aada Yahuditiifi Mana Waaqatiifi hayyu Kaisari duraleti." 
Acts25:9 Ammo waan Festoni Yahudi gammachiisu fed'eefi, waan Pauloni jed'e, aka anini Yerusalemu si geese achiti dubbi tante qoru feeta?" 
Acts25:10 Jennaani Pauloni waan jed'e, Anini barch'uma kora ka hayyu Kaisari dura ejad'a, fulla iti na qoru malani. Anini Yahudi dura woma iyakine, akuma atini beetu." 
Acts25:11 Yo anini wollaala qabaad'e yokhaani waan duu maleefi tolche, anini duisa indidu. Ammo yo wonti na himataniifi kunini injirre, nami tokoleeni dandae harka worrati na inkennu. Anini Kaisari kad'ad'a." 
Acts25:12 Eegi Festoni worra kora ka isa woliini tauni dubbate, inni waan jed'e, Atini ya dubbi tiyya Kaisarini naa ga jette, fulla isaa inuma deemta." 
Acts25:13 Eegi bulti diqo toko hayyu Agripafi Bernikeni Kaisaria d'ufani, aka Festo nagaya fuud'ani." 
Acts25:14 Eegi worri guyya heddu achi tae, Festoni waan Paulo hayyuti hasae waan jed'eeni, Namicha tokoti jira, ka Felikini hid'aansa keesati lakise." 
Acts25:15 Gaafa anini Yerusalemu jiru, qaalole gugurdofi jaaroleeni Yahudi waan isaa nati himte aka isa dubbi qorani wollaala iti murani feete." 
Acts25:16 Ammo waan anini worraani jed'e, aki ato nama himataniifi worra isa himatu wolti ind'ufiini wollaala namati murani aada Rumitini, aka inni qoomni waan himataniini suni ufi dubbatuni argattu." 
Acts25:17 Tanaafi eegi worri armati wolwoldae, anini diqole inture, ammo boriyya barch'uma kora ira tae, Nama suni natiini koota jed'e." 
Acts25:18 Worri isa himatu olejanje, ammo aka anini qara sehe diqole inhimanne." 
Acts25:19 Wonti worri wolmormu waan aada worraa toko, ammalle waan namicha due toko, ka Yeso jed'ani, ka Pauloni, Injira jed'u." 
Acts25:20 Maro anini gaafacha akana tana inquufiniifi, Paulo aka inni Yerusalemu deemu fed'u gaafad'e, aka achiti waan kana qorani." 
Acts25:21 Ammo Pauloni aka kora Kaisari eegatu kad'ate. Jennaani anini, Isa qorqorad'a, haga anini Kaisariti isa erguuti jed'e." 
Acts25:22 Agripani waan Festoni jed'e, Anini sila nama kana d'agayu fed'a. Festoni, Bori isa d'ageeta jed'eeni." 
Acts25:23 Boriyya Agripafi Bernikeni woya hayyuma naqatani ulfinna guddaani shumootaafi jara gugurda dira suni woliini fulla dubbi iti d'agayani olduudani. Jennaani Festoni nama erge Paulo yaame gadini koota jed'e. 
Acts25:24 Festoni waan jed'e, Hayyu Agripafi worra arra arma nu woliini jirru: isani nama kana inargitani, ka gumiini Yahudi ch'ufti Yerusalemufi armaleti na kad'atte, Inni jiraachu himmalle jette iyite." 
Acts25:25 Ammo anini waan inni duu maleefi inargine, ammalle maro inni aka gara Kaisari deemu kad'ateefi, anini ya aka isa ergu buufad'e." 
Acts25:26 Ammo anini waan gara hayyu gudda t'aafu inqabu; tanaafi anini isani duraani d'ufe, keesuma si duraani, Ee hayyu Agripa, aka eegi nu isa qorre, anini sila waan t'aafu argad'u." 
Acts25:27 Aki nama hid'aansa keesa jiru ergani, ka waan isa himataniifi imbeesisiini, fullaaniti jed'e." 
Acts26:1 Agripani waan Pauloni jed'e, Atini ufii dubbad'u. Pauloni harka dirirfate ufii dubbate waan jed'e:" 
Acts26:2 Anini ingammada, ee hayyu Agripa waan guyya kana si durati ufii dubbad'uufi; maro waan Yahudiini naani himate ch'ufatiifi. Anini guddo gammada," 
Acts26:3 waan atini aadafi gaafacha Yahudi ch'ufa guddo beetuufi. Tanaafi anini si kad'ad'a, aka atini obsite na ch'aqaftu." 
Acts26:4 Aada tiyya, haga kaimooma kiyya, ka qara anini jiddu gosa tiyya keesa Yerusalemu tae, Yahudiini ch'ufti imbeeti." 
Acts26:5 Worri haga duriiti na beekha, aka anini aada teenna ta Farisayo guddo jabeese gula deeme yo fed'e dandae ind'ugeesa." 
Acts26:6 Anini amma arma eje aka dubbi tiyya qorani maro anini kakhu Waaqi ababoota teennati kakhate abdad'uufi 
Acts26:7 kakhu suni gochiti teenna kud'ani lamaanu aka argatani abdatti, ato halkani guyya Waaqa kad'atanu. Maro abdi tanaatiifi, ee hayyicha, Yahudiini na himatte." 
Acts26:8 Isii, isani Yahudi, aka Waaqi nama due kaasu maafi ind'ugefanne?" 
Acts26:9 Anini herega kiyya keesa, aka maqa Yeso Nazareti balleesu guddo wolaaneeni." 
Acts26:10 Waan kana Yerusalemu keesati tolche. Jabeenna Qaallicha Gudda ira argannaani, worra Waaqaa heddu hid'aansa keesa naqe; hojja duisa iti murani anileeni ee jed'e." 
Acts26:11 Maro heddu mana Waaqa iti kad'atani keesati worra gaargalche, aada worraa worra mormachiise. Anini guddo worrati dalane dira lafa ch'ufa d'aqe, worra gaargalche." 
Acts26:12 Tanaafi ato anini tatabe jaarole gugurdo harkati qabad'e Damaski deemu," 
Acts26:13 saa jaa ka guyya, ee hayyicha, anini ifsa gubba nati ifsu, ka adu ira ifsu, kara keesati arge, ka naafi jara na woliini yauti ifsu." 
Acts26:14 Nuuni ch'ufti lafati jinnaani anini qonqo toko ta afaani Ebraniatiini naani dubbatu d'agaye, ta Saulo, Saulo maafa na gaargalchita? Atini ka aka qotiyo ule nama oofu d'iitu, teete, d'ugaa d'iitu ufuma ufi balleesita naani jettu." 
Acts26:15 Anini waan jed'eeni, Aabbo, atini eennu kana? Aabbooni waan naani jed'e. Anini Yeso kauma atini gaargalchu jirtu." 
Acts26:16 Ammo kai, olejad'u. Wonti anini siti mullad'eefi aka hojattu naa taate waan atini argite kanaafi ta anini hegeri siti himuni na d'ugeesitu." 
Acts26:17 Anini harka biyyatiifi harka gosa d'ibi, ta anini ammatana iti si ergu, keesaa si baasa." 
Acts26:18 Atini ila worraa bante, dukana ira gara ifsa worra deebifta, ammalle jabeenna Sheet'ana iraa Waaqati worra deebifta; aka d'ugefacha worri na d'ugefateeni daba worraa araaramaniifi, gumi Waaqi fohate keesati fulla argatani." 
Acts26:19 Tanaafi, ee hayyu Agripa, anini daayya gubba suni ch'aqasu indinne." 
Acts26:20 Qara worra Damaski barsiise, ammalle worra Yerusalemu barsiise, duuba eege nama lafa Yudea ch'ufaafi ka gosa d'ibile ch'ufa barsiise aka worri daba lakise Waaqati deebie huji daba iraa deebiti garsiisu." 
Acts26:21 Maro waan kanatifi Yahudiini Mana Waaqa keesati na qabde na ijeesu feete. 
Acts26:22 Qarqaarsa Waaqa argannaani anini arra nama diqaafi gudda duraleti d'ugeesu jira, waan raagafi Musani, Intaati jed'ani male, anini waan d'ibi ind'ugeesu:" 
Acts26:23 aka Kristoni gaargale nama qara ka duisa keesaa kau tahe, ifsa biyyaafi nama gosa d'ibileti odeesu." 
Acts26:24 Ato inni dubbatu, Festoni qonqo olfud'ate waan jed'eeni, Paulo, atini ya maraate; waan atini guddo wo baratteefi qalbiini tante ya hamaatte." 
Acts26:25 Ammo Pauloni waan jed'e, Anini imaraanne, ee Festo gudda, ammo anini dubbi d'uga ch'alla dubbachuu jira." 
Acts26:26 Hayyuuni waan kana imbeekha, anini isa durati soda male dubbachu jira. Anini imbeekha, aka wonti kunini tokoleeni isa dura indahanne; waan kana fulla d'ossati intolchine." 
Acts26:27 Hayyu Agripa, atini ya raaga d'ugefatteyu? Anini imbeekha, aka atini d'ugefatte." 
Acts26:28 Agripani waan Pauloni jed'e, Atini dubbi diqo tanaani waan Kristiana na tolchitu seeta?" 
Acts26:29 Pauloni waan jed'eeni, Ha dubbi diqo taatu, ha guddo taatu, woni anini Waaqa kad'ad'u, aka si ch'allaaniti, ammo worri na ch'aqasu jiru kunini ch'ufti, aka anini jiru tahu, haada naani hid'ani kana male." 
Acts26:30 Jennaani hayyufi jaallabafi Bernikefi worri isaani woliini jiru ch'ufti olkakae. 
Acts26:31 Eegi worri kakae, woliini hasaani waan jed'ani, Namichi kunini waan duisatiifi ka hid'aniifi tokole intolchine." 
Acts26:32 Agripani waan Festoni jed'e, Nama kana sila gadi lakisani, ato inni Kaisari kad'achu d'ibaate." 
Acts27:1 Aka nu lafa Taliana hobolooni deemu buufannaani worri Paulofi nama hid'aansa keesa jiru d'ibile harka namicha gudda askarti toko ka Yulio jed'aniti kenne, Yulioni gumi askarti Rumi ta askarti hayyu jed'ani keesa guddinna qaba." 
Acts27:2 Nu hobolo dira Andramitio ta aka lafa Asia deemtu kurfefate toko duunne iti d'aabanne. Namichi Aristarko jed'ani toko ka gosa Makedonia ka lafa Thesalonike nu woliini jira. 
Acts27:3 Boriyya nu Sidoni d'umne. Yulioni Paulo qarqaare, aka inni gara jaalaani isaa deeme waan fed'u barbaadatu ee jed'e." 
Acts27:4 Lafa suni kaanaani waan bubbeeni nu d'owiteefi lafa Kipro jala baane. 
Acts27:5 Eegi nu baariini d'awatu kilikiatifi Pamfilia dabarre, nu dira Likia toko ka Mira jed'ani d'umne." 
Acts27:6 Achiti guddaani askarti hobolo toko ta Iskanderia, ta lafa Taliana deemtu arge nu yaabachiise."
