1Corinthians5:7 Bukho dullati tana balleesa, aka qulqullo taatani. Yoosi aka qit'a hareesa ka bukho inqamne taatani, akuma isani d'uguma jirtani. Wonti akanatiifi jilti teenna ta Pasaka ya kurfoofte, Kristo hoola keenna ka Pasaka ya qalani." 
1Corinthians5:8 Koota, amma sagale jila teenna nyaanna, qit'a bukho dullati qabu inyaannu, ka dabaafi hameenna qabu; ammo qit'a bukho inqamne, qit'a qulqullo ka d'ugaa nyaanna." 
1Corinthians5:9 Tatabe anini isanii t'aafe keesati, Algaloota lagad'a jed'e." 
1Corinthians5:10 Anini worra Waaqa imbeenne ka algalatiifi sabdifi ka seera ch'absufi ka waan harkaani boch'ani kad'atu injenne. Yo worra kana lagatani lafa keesaa bahu maltani! 
1Corinthians5:11 Wonti anini jechu jiru tana: nama oboleesa ufiini jed'e, ammo algalooma deeme, sabdae, waan harkaani boch'ani kad'ate, nama arabse, machae, seera ch'absu lagad'a. Nama akana sagalele woliini inyaatiina." 
1Corinthians5:12 Anini nama ala wollaala iti muru himmalle. Waaqati worra qora. Ammo isani nama gumi teesani wollaala iti muru himmalle? Akuma t'aafiini jettu, Nama akana hama kana gumi teesani keesa baasa." 
1Corinthians5:13  
1Corinthians6:1 Yo nami toko oboleesa ufitiini woldide, inni akamiini jaarole Waaqa imbeenne d'aqa, ato gumiini Waaqa worra wolti inaraarsiini?" 
1Corinthians6:2 Aka gumiini Waaqa lafa qortu imbeetani? Tanaafi yo lafa qortani, woldidiisa didiqa toko qoru indandeetani?" 
1Corinthians6:3 Aka nu waan malaikale qorru imbeetani? Yo akasi taate, nu waan lafa tana hagasi ira qoraaniti?" 
1Corinthians6:4 Yo wonti akana kunini d'ufte, nama gumiini inulfeesineti geesitani?" 
1Corinthians6:5 Waan ch'eeraa taatani! Nami qalbi qabu ka dandae wolti isani araarsu tokoleeni gumi teesani keesa injiru? 
1Corinthians6:6 Ammo akasi diddani, oboleyaani teesani kora worra Waaqa imbeenneti woli geesiti!" 
1Corinthians6:7 Wolhimachaani isani himatani tunini aka isani laaftani haga hanqattani agarsiisa. Yo sila isaniti wollaalaani, ira isani injirtu? Yo sila isani dura woi saamani ira isanii injirtu?" 
1Corinthians6:8 Ammo isani wolti wollaaltani wolsaamtani, oboleyaani teesanile saamtani." 
1Corinthians6:9 D'uguma isani aka worri daba tolchu Finna Waaqa inarganne imbeetani. Ufi insobina! Worri ch'eera foko inqamne, ka waan harkaani boch'ani kad'atu, ka nad'eeni biyya awadatu yokhaani midiisani," 
1Corinthians6:10 yokhaani hattufi sabdiini yokhaani nami machaufi ka nama arabsufi ka nama sobe wo fud'atu, worri kunini tokoleeni Finna Waaqa inargatu." 
1Corinthians6:11 Isaniini garileeni duri akasi. Ammo amma ya isani d'iqani, ya isani qulqulleesani, ya maqa Aabbo Yeso Kristotiifi Lubbu Waaqa keennatiini Waaqaani wolti araaramtani." 
1Corinthians6:12 Nami toko, Wonti ch'ufti na halaala jed'a; ammo wonti suni ch'ufti isa inqarqaartu. Anini, Wonti ch'ufti na halaala jechu dandaa; ammo aka wonti tokoleeni tisse na tolfatu anini ee injed'u." 
1Corinthians6:13 Nami d'ibiini, Sagaleeni garaa malte, garaaleeni sagale male jed'a. Ammo Waaqi waan suni lachu imballeesa. Nafi namaa ka hameennaatiniti, ammo ka Aabbooti; Aabboleeni ka nafaati." 
1Corinthians6:14 Waaqi ka Aabbo duisa keesaa kaase, akasuma nule jabeenna ufitiini kaasa." 
1Corinthians6:15 Isani aka nafi keesani mita Kristo imbeetani? Anini mita Kristo toko fuud'e nafa sharmut'a tolcha? Hiyyo, intaatu!" 
1Corinthians6:16 Yokhaani aka nami sharmut'a woliini rafe nafa isaatiifi ka isii takaa tolchu imbeetani? T'aafiini diideesite himti, Worri lamaani takaa taha jetti." 
1Corinthians6:17 Ammo nami Aabbooti ufi mat'ansu lubbu keesa isaani toko taha. 
1Corinthians6:18 Huji sharmut'oma lagad'a. Dabi d'ibiini nami tolchu tokoleeni nafa woma intolchu; ammo nami sharmut'oma deemu nafa ufiti daba. 
1Corinthians6:19 Aka nafi keesani mana Lubbu Qulqullo, ta Waaqi isanii kenne, ta isani keesa teetu imbeetani? Nafi keesani keesaniiniti, ammo ka Waaqaati;" 
1Corinthians6:20 inni isani bite, Tanaafi nafa keesani suniini Waaqa guddisa." 
1Corinthians7:1 Amma maro waan isani t'aaftani dubbachu fed'a. Nami nad'eeni infuune sila waan dansa ya tolche. 
1Corinthians7:2 Ammo maro hameenni guddaani jiruufi, nami ch'ufti niiti ufi qabaachu male, nad'eeni ch'uftileeni d'iirsa ufi qabaachu malte." 
1Corinthians7:3 D'iirti ha huji ufi ta d'iirsa guutuuti, nad'eeni ha huji ufi ta uwa guutuuti, namu ch'ufti woli quufsu male." 
1Corinthians7:4 Niitiini abba nafa ufitiiniti, ammo d'iirsati abba nafa isiiti; akasuma d'iirsileeni abba nafa ufitiiniti, ammo niititi abba nafa isaati." 
1Corinthians7:5 Wolind'owatiina yo haga diqa toko, aka Waaqa kad'atani wold'agetani, ee woliini jettani male, ammo eegi suni huji teesani ta d'iirsaa nitii guuta, aka ufi qorqorti d'abdani akasiini ilaalacha Sheet'ana keesa imbuumne." 
1Corinthians7:6 Anini waan kana aka seera injenne ammo aka gorsa isaniini jed'a. 
1Corinthians7:7 Anini sila nama ch'ufa ka aka kiyya jiru fed'a; ammo nami ch'ufti kenniti Waaqi kenneefi qaba, nami toko kenniti tana qaba, ka lameeso kenniti d'ibi qaba." 
1Corinthians7:8 Anini amma waan kana maro worra nad'eeni inqamnetiifi nad'eeni d'iirsa inqamnee jed'a: sila yo akuma kiyya koba taani ira dansa. 
1Corinthians7:9 Ammo yo dandaani ufi ind'owarre yo fuud'ani ira dansa, fulla d'araa hamtuuni gubatani." 
1Corinthians7:10 Worra woli fuud'e anini seera toko tolcha; seeri kunini kiyyaaniti ammo ka Aabbooti. Niitiini d'iirsa qabdu d'iirsa jala bahu himmalle; 
1Corinthians7:11 ammo yo baate ha koba ufi teetu yokhaani ha d'iirsaani wolti araaramani; d'iirsileeni niiti ufi lakisu himmalle. 
1Corinthians7:12 Worra d'ibiini anini waan jed'u (anati jed'e male, Aabbooniti): yo nami Kristiana toko niiti ind'ugefanne qabaate, duuba isiini isa woliini tau feete, inni niiti suni lakisu himmalle." 
1Corinthians7:13 Yo niiti Kristiana toko nami ind'ugefanne toko fuud'e, duuba inni isi woliini tau fed'e, isiini isa lakisu himmalle." 
1Corinthians7:14 Wonti akasitiifi d'iirsi ind'ugefanne niiti ufitiini qulqullaa, akasuma niiti ind'ugefanneleeni d'iirsa ufitiini qulqulloofti. Yo sila akasi intahiini ijoolleeni worraa aka ta worra Waaqa imbeenne taati; ammo amma ya qulqulloofte." 
1Corinthians7:15 Ammo yo ka ind'ugefanne suni wahela isaa ka d'ugefate lakisu fed'e, ha akasi tolchuuti. Yo akasi taate namichi Kristianatiifi yokhaani niitiini Kristianaleeni ha waan fed'ani tolchaniiti. Wonti akasitiifi Waaqi isanii nagayaani teetani fed'a." 
1Corinthians7:16 Ati niiti, d'iirsa kanke baaftuuti beeta? Yokhaani ati d'iirsa, niiti tante baafatuuti beeta?" 
1Corinthians7:17 Nami ch'ufti kenniti Waaqi isaa kenne gula tau male, ammalle akuma gaafa Waaqi isa yaame jiru tau male. Seeri anini gumi ch'ufa barsiisu kana." 
1Corinthians7:18 Yo nami qabanqaba qaabate yaamicha Waaqa d'agaye, gadaanisa qabanqaba ufira balleesu himmalle; ammalle yo nami qabanqaba inqabatini yaamicha Waaqa d'agaye inni qabanqaba qabachu himmalle." 
1Corinthians7:19 Qabanqaba qabachafi qubacha d'abi woma keesa injiru, ammo seera Waaqa guutu malani." 
1Corinthians7:20 Nami ch'ufti ha akuma gaafa Waaqi isa yaame jiru tauuti. 
1Corinthians7:21 Gaafa Waaqi si yaame, atini tisse? Iyaaliini; ammo yo balchooma argatte, fud'ad'u." 
1Corinthians7:22 Wonti akasitiifi tisseeni Aabbooni yaame ya balcha taate; akasuma nami balchaani ka Aabbooni yaame tisse isaa taha. 
1Corinthians7:23 Waaqi gatiini isani bitate; tanaafi tissele nama intahiina. 
1Corinthians7:24 Oboleyaani, nami ch'ufti ha akuma gaafa duri yaamani jiru Waaqa woliini tahuuti." 
1Corinthians7:25 Amma waan uwaafi d'iira ka woli infuud'iini ka isani, nati t'aaftani: wonti isaani ka Aabbooni nati hime injirtu, ammo aka nama naasu Aabbootiini d'ugefachu malani jed'a." 
1Corinthians7:26 Yo gaargala ammatana lafa jiru herenne sila dansa yo nami ch'ufti akuma amma jiru kana tae. 
1Corinthians7:27 Amma niiti qabda? Yoosi ufi jala imbaasiini. Amma niiti inqabduyu? Yoosi niiti imfud'iini. 
1Corinthians7:28 Ammo yo dubra fuute daba intolchine; ammalle yo dubra fuud'ani, isiini daba intolchine. Ammo anini gaargala guyya ch'ufa ka jari kunini argatu isani lagu fed'a." 
1Corinthians7:29 Wonti anini jechu fed'u tana, oboleyaani: hojjaani alati inhamne. Armaa achi worri nad'eeni qabu aka nama nad'eeni inqamne ha tahuuti;" 
1Corinthians7:30 worri bohu aka nama lalala inqamne ha tahuuti; worri koblu aka nama gammada inqamne ha tahuuti; worri woi bitatu aka waan wonti bitani suni ka worraa intahiini ha tahuuti; 
1Corinthians7:31 worri wo gurguru aka waan woma ira inqamne ha yauti. Wonti akanatiifi lafti tunini aka jirtu kanati guddo inturtu. 
1Corinthians7:32 Anini isanii woi yaaddani imfed'u. Nami nad'eeni inqamne waan huji Aabbo herega, waan inni Aabbo gammachiisu fed'uufi;" 
1Corinthians7:33 ammo nami niiti qabu waan lafaa herega maro inni niiti ufi gammachiisu fed'uufi; 
1Corinthians7:34 tanaafi moga lama gula isa hirkisani. Niitiini d'iirsa inqamne yokhaani intalti dubra huji Aabbo hereddi, maro isiini nafafi lubbu ufi Aabbo kennu feetuufi. Ammo niitiini d'iirsa qabdu waan lafa hereddi, maro isiini d'iirsa ufi gammachiisu feetuufi." 
1Corinthians7:35 Anini waan kana maro isani qarqaaru fed'uufi jed'a. Anini woma isani d'owu imfed'u. Ammo aka isani waan qajeelatiifi ka fullaa tolchitani, huji Aabbo garaa tokooni hojattani fed'a." 
1Corinthians7:36 Waan nama wolkad'ate, ammo eege wolfuud'u dide, ka isani nati t'aaftani, ani akana jed'a; yo namichi intala fuud'u fed'u d'araani isaa ta intala suni guddo jabdu taate, inni intala suni iraa ufi d'owu dad'abe intala suni ha fuud'u." 
1Corinthians7:37 Ammo yo namichi, ka nami tokoleeni ind'owiini, intala fuud'u dide; yo inni d'araa nafa ufi d'owu dandae, waan tolchu malani garaa ufi keesati kutate, yo fuud'u didele womaniti." 
1Corinthians7:38 Tanaafi nami intala suni fuud'u waan fullaa tolcha, ammo ka fuud'u didu waan hagasi ira qajeela tolcha." 
1Corinthians7:39 Niitiini d'iirsa qabdu, haga d'iirsi jiru nami d'ibiini isi infuud'iini ammo yo d'iirsi due, ha nami isiini feetu fuud'uuti; taatule fuud'i sunini fuud'a Kristiana tau male." 
1Corinthians7:40 Ammo sila ira isii jirti, yo isiini d'iirsa male teete. Wonti anini heregu tana, anileeni waan Lubbu Waaqaa qabu ufi seha." 
1Corinthians8:1 Amma anini waan sagale waan harkaani boch'ani baasani dubbad'a: D'uguma nuuni ch'ufti hubacha qamna. Ammo hubachaani akana tunini nama ufi guddisiifti, ammo jaalalti nama jabeesiti." 
1Corinthians8:2 Nami waan wo beekhu ufi sehu haga sila beekhu male imbeekhu. 
1Corinthians8:3 Ammo nama Waaqa jaalatu Waaqileeni imbeekha. 
1Corinthians8:4 Tanaafi amma waan sagale waan harkaani boch'ani baasani: nu imbeenna aka wonti harkaani boch'ani suni fakeenna waan injirre; ammalle nu imbeenna aka Waaqi toko ch'allaani jiru. 
1Corinthians8:5 Yo nami, Waaqa hedduti jira jed'ele, gubbafi lafale, ato Waaqafi abbootiini hedduuni jiraatele," 
1Corinthians8:6 nu Waaqa toko ch'alla beena; inni Abba, ka waan ch'ufa uume, nu isaafi jiraanna; ammalle Aabbo toko ch'allati jira, Yeso Kristo, ka wonti ch'ufti isaani uumamte, nuleeni isaani jirru." 
1Corinthians8:7 Ammo nami ch'ufti d'uga tana imbeekhu. Nami gari ya waan harkaani boch'ani kana aka male barate, yo sagale akana tana nyaatani ch'ufa sagale waan harkaani boch'ani baasani sehani; heregi worraa waan laafa, waan sagaleeni suni worra t'ureesitu sehani." 
1Corinthians8:8 Ammo sagaleeni Waaqati nu ind'ieesitu; yo nyaachu baannele woma imfitannu, yo nyaannele woma nuu indartu." 
1Corinthians8:9 Ufi eegad'a, aka yo waan feetani tolchitani worra d'ugefacha didiqo kaani ingufachiimne." 
1Corinthians8:10 Fakeenna yo nami heregi isaa laafa toko, sii hubacha qaba jed'ani mana waaqa d'ara keesati sagale waan harkaani boch'ani nyaatu arge. Wonti atini taatu suni duuba aka innileeni sagale suni nyaatu intolchitu?" 
1Corinthians8:11 Duuba namichi laafaani kunini, oboleesi kanke ka Kristoni duefi, maro hubacha teetiifi bada." 
1Corinthians8:12 Kara kanaani Kristoti dabdani waan oboleyaani teesani ta qalbi laaftu qabduti dabdanifi. 
1Corinthians8:13 Yo sagaleeni anini nyaad'u oboleesa kiyya gufachiifte, anini ituma deebie inyaad'u, aka oboleesa kiyya ingufanne." 
1Corinthians9:1 Anini balchayu? Anini ergattuniti? Anini Yeso Aabbo keenna ingarre? Isani mid'aani huji tiyyatiiniti Aabbo keesa? 
1Corinthians9:2 Ato nami gari ergattu naani injennele, isani inuma naani jettani! Isanumaani, maro jireenna keesani ka Aabbootiifi, aka anini ergattu ingarsiiftani." 
1Corinthians9:3 Yo nami nati game, kara kanaani ufira d'owa:" 
1Corinthians9:4 Anini waan nyaad'e d'ugu huji tiyya keesa, yo fed'e, inargad'u?" 
1Corinthians9:5 Anini waan ergattuuni d'ibiini tolchitu, aka oboleyaani Aabbo yokhaani Petroleeni niiti ufi fud'ate imaltuuni deeme, yo fed'e intolchu?" 
1Corinthians9:6 Anaafi Barnaba ch'allati hojate sagale teenna barbaadachu malle? 
1Corinthians9:7 Eentu askarti hori male hojatu d'agaye? Yokhaani abba oobru kamiti mid'aani oobru isaa inyaanne? Yokhaani abba ree ka aanani ree ufi ind'unne? 
1Corinthians9:8 Fakeenni kunini waan guyya ch'ufa, ammo Seerileeni akanuma jed'a." 
1Corinthians9:9 Seeri waan jed'u, Afaani qotiyo mid'aani d'aantu inhid'iina. Waaqi d'uguma waan qotiyo iyaala?" 
1Corinthians9:10 Waan kana inni nu imbaane? Waan kana nuufi t'aafani! Nama qotufi ka muruleeni abdi mid'aani argachaatiini hojachu male. 
1Corinthians9:11 Nu ya mid'aani lubbuu jiddu teesaniti oobrine. Yo woi isani ira fud'anne isani dabsina? 
1Corinthians9:12 Yo biyyiti waan kana isani iraa fud'atte, nuleeni hagasi iraa isani iraa fud'achu himmalle? Taatule nu ammalle waan kana imfud'anne. Ammo nu waan ch'ufa obsine, aka gufu tokole daandi Odu Dansa ta Kristo dura inkeenne." 
1Corinthians9:13 D'uguma isani aka worri Mana Waaqa keesa hojatu sagale ufi achi argatu imbeetani. Ammalle aka worri sorio qalu qooda fooni sorio qabu imbeetani. 
1Corinthians9:14 Akasuma Aabbooni ya worra Odu Dansa odeesule, Waan jiraataniini achi argad'a jed'eeni." 
1Corinthians9:15 Anini waan kana tokole imfud'anne, yokhaani anini waan kana aka argad'uufi tatabe tana int'aamne. Fulla ufi guddisiiti tiyya bilaasha tolchani duisati ira na jira!" 
1Corinthians9:16 Anini maro Odu Dansa odeesuufi ufi guddisu himmalle. Yo d'uga dubbanne, dandae odeesu indidu. Sila guddo na hamtu yo anini Odu Dansa inodeesiini!" 
1Corinthians9:17 Yo sila anini huji tiyya fed'iini tolche, hori na baasu malani; ammo waan na tolchisiisaniifi, akasi aka anini huji nati kennani tolchu male agarsiisa." 
1Corinthians9:18 Maal keesa argad'a re? Woni ani argad'u aka Odu Dansa hori male odeesu, ato waan kiyya tokole Odu Dansa keesa imbarbaanne." 
1Corinthians9:19 Anini balcha, tisse nama tokoletiiniti; ammo anini tisse nama ch'ufa ufi tolcha, aka nama heddu argad'u." 
1Corinthians9:20 Yo Yahudi woliini jirru aka Yahudi taa, aka worra hirkisu; ato anini Seera Musa gula deemu d'ibaad'ele, yo worri gula yau woliini jirru, aka nama gula deemu ufi tolcha, aka worra hirkisu." 
1Corinthians9:21 Akasuma yo gosa d'ibi woliini jirru anini aka gosa d'ibi ufi tolcha, Seera Yahudi jala injiru, aka gosa d'ibi hirkisu. Anini seera Waaqa guutu indidu ammo seera Kristo jala jira." 
1Corinthians9:22 Yo worra d'ugefacha diqo qabu woliini jirru anileeni ufi laafisa, aka worra hirkisu. Anini nama ch'ufa ya waan ch'ufa tahe, aka anini nama gari kara dandau ch'ufaani baasu." 
1Corinthians9:23 Waan kana ch'ufa anini maro Odu Dansaatiifi tolcha, aka eeba isii qoodad'u." 
1Corinthians9:24 Woldogoomsu keesa nama hedduti oria, ammo toko ch'allati wo argata. Akasi imbeetaniyu? Aka wo argattani utaala duuba." 
1Corinthians9:25 Nami utaalcha barachu fed'u ch'ufti waan infakaanne iraa ufi d'owu male; inni aka sure haga jirtu inteenne mata gubba keyatufi akasi tolcha; ammo nu, aka ta haga hegeri teetu argannuufi akana tolchina." 
1Corinthians9:26 Maro waan kanatifi anini fulla hobaatiiti utaala; anini aka nama wold'aanu ka tontomo woli ira ingorsine jira. 
1Corinthians9:27 Nafa kiyya tume mohad'a, aka eegi anini dubbi Waaqa biyyati odeese na indinne." 
1Corinthians10:1 Anini aka isani waan ababoota teenna ta Musa gula yaate taate qabatani fed'a, oboleyaani. Gaafasi dumansi worra ch'ufa qorqorate, worri ch'ufti galaana Shamu nagayaani taake." 
1Corinthians10:2 Dumansafi bisaani keesaleti worra Musa gula yau jed'ani, worra batisani." 
1Corinthians10:3 Worri ch'ufti qit'a mama suni nyaate 
1Corinthians10:4 bisaani mama sunuma d'uge; wonti akanatiifi d'akha mama ka worra gula deeme keesaa bisaani d'ugani; d'akhaani suni Kristo. 
1Corinthians10:5 Ammo taatule Waaqi worrati dalane, reefi worraa lafa aloo ch'ufa keesa firfirfame." 
1Corinthians10:6 Wonti kunini ch'ufti akheekha nuu taati, aka nu akuma worraa waan hamtu ind'araane," 
1Corinthians10:7 yokhaani aka nu akuma worraa waan harkaani boch'ani inkad'anne, akuma t'aafiini jettu, Biyyiti teteete nyaate d'udde kaate sirbite," 
1Corinthians10:8 nu algalooma tolchu himmalle aka worri gari tolche, guyya tokooni nami kunki diddami sadii raawate." 
1Corinthians10:9 Aabbole lalaachu himmalle, aka worri nami gari tolche, duuba bofi ide worra balleese." 
1Corinthians10:10 Yokhaani gungumu himmalle, aka worri nami gari tolche, duuba Malaikaani Dua worra balleesite." 
1Corinthians10:11 Wonti kunini ch'ufti aka nama d'ibi akheekha taatuufi taate, ammalle aka nu gorsanifi t'aafani. Wonti akanatiifi nu bara muummeeni d'iaate keesa jirra." 
1Corinthians10:12 Nami waan eju ufi sehu ha ufi eegatuuti aka injinne. 
1Corinthians10:13 Ilaalachaani namati d'uftu woma qara lafa jiraati. Ammo Waaqi kakhu ufi jabeesa. Inni ilaalacha isani ira hafu indandeenne isaniti inllakisu. Ammo hojja isani ilaalatani, inni jabeenna isani obsitani keesaa batani isanii kenna." 
1Corinthians10:14 Tanaafi jaalaani tiyya, waan harkaani boch'ani inkad'atiina, biraa fagaad'a." 
1Corinthians10:15 Anini aka waan isani nama qalbi qabu isaniti dubbad'a; waan anini jed'u herega. 
1Corinthians10:16 Hojja mudunu eeba ta Waaqaa galata deebimnuuni d'unnu, d'iiga Kristo qoodachuuti injirru? Hojja qit'a ch'absine nyaannu, nafa Kristo qoodachuuti injirru?" 
1Corinthians10:17 Waan qit'aani toko ch'allaani jiruufi, nuuni ch'ufti, ato heddu taanele, nafa toko; wonti akanatiifi qit'a toko qoodanna." 
1Corinthians10:18 Gosa Israeli qaabad'a; worri waan sorio baasani nyaatu huji fulla sorio iti qalani inqoodata. 
1Corinthians10:19 Anini maani jechu jira? Waan harkaani boch'aniifi sagaleeni isii baasani woma keesa jirtu jechu jira? 
1Corinthians10:20 Hiyyo! Wonti anini jechu jiru, sorio worri Waaqa imbeenna qalu Waaqaa imbaasani ammo jinnii baasani. Anini isani wahela jinni taatani imfed'u." 
1Corinthians10:21 Mudunu Aabbootiifi ta jinni keesaa d'ugu indandeetani; sagale Aabbootiifi ta jinni wolti nyaachu indandeetani. 
1Corinthians10:22 Yokhaani Aabbo qot'isisu feena? Waan nu isa ira jajabo 
1Corinthians10:23 Nami gari, Wonti ch'ufti nu halaala jed'a; ammo wonti suni ch'ufti isanii dansaaniti. Wonti ch'ufti nu halaala jed'ani, ammo wonti ch'ufti inqarqaartu." 
1Corinthians10:24 Nami tokoleeni waan ufi ch'alla yaalu himmalle, ammo waan nama d'ibile yaalu male." 
1Corinthians10:25 Fooni gabaya keesati gurgurani ch'ufa nyaad'a, sodaattani nama tokole ingaafatiina." 
1Corinthians10:26 Akuma t'aafiini jettu, Lafafi wonti keesa jira ch'ufti ta Aabbooti." 
1Corinthians10:27 Yo nami Kristo ind'ugefanne mana ufiti isani yaame d'aqu feetani, waan isani dura kayani ch'ufa nyaad'a, gaafi male." 
1Corinthians10:28 Ammo yo nami toko, Sagale tana ya waan harkaani boch'ani baasani isaniini jed'e inyaatiina, maro nama waan suni isaniini jed'eetifi maro herega namaatiifi," 
1Corinthians10:29 anini herega keesani imbaanu, ammo herega isaa baana. Nami gari waan jed'u anini maafi waan fed'u herega nama dibiti jed'e lakisa?" 
1Corinthians10:30 Eegi anini sagale tiyyaafi galata Waaqaa deebise nyaad'e, nami tokoleeni maafi waan hamtu naani jed'a?" 
1Corinthians10:31 Duuba waan tolchitani ch'ufa, yo nyaattani d'uuddanile, maro guddinna Waaqaatiifi tolcha." 
1Corinthians10:32 Yahudifi gosa d'ibiifi gumi Waaqaa ingufachiisina. 
1Corinthians10:33 Akuma anini tolchu tolcha: waan tolchu ch'ufaani anini nama gammachiisu fed'a, waan dansooma tiyya inheregu, ammo dansooma nama ch'ufa herega, aka nami ch'ufti baafamu." 
1Corinthians11:1 Akuma anini Kristo akeesu isanileeni na akeesa. 
1Corinthians11:2 Anini isani guddisa waan isani hojja ch'ufa na qaabattani barsiisa anini isaniti kenne jabeesitaniifi. 
1Corinthians11:3 Ammo anini aka isani aka Kristoni nama ch'ufa ira jiru barattani fed'a, d'iirsi niiti ufi ira jira, Waaqileeni Kristo ira jira." 
1Corinthians11:4 Tanaafi nami d'iira fulla gumiini jirtuti mata hagogate kad'ate yokhaani dubbi Waaqa hasau mata ufi ch'eersa. 
1Corinthians11:5 Nad'eeni fulla gumiini jirtuti hagogo male kad'atte yokhaani dubbi Waaqa hasooftu mata ufi ch'eersiti; isiini nad'eeni mata haadattu fakaatti. 
1Corinthians11:6 Yo nad'eeni mata hagogachu didde, ha haadattuuti. Ammalle yo nad'eeni mata haadatte yokhaani ch'iratte waan ch'eeraati, tanaafi hagogachu malte." 
1Corinthians11:7 D'iirti mata hagogachu himmalle, waan inni fakeennafi guddinna Waaqa agarsiisufi. Ammo nad'eeni guddinna d'iira agarsiifti;" 
1Corinthians11:8 wonti akanatiifi d'iira nad'eeni ira inuumne ammo nad'eeni d'iira ira uumani. 
1Corinthians11:9 Maro nad'eenitiifi d'iira inuumne, ammo nad'eeni d'iirafi uumani." 
1Corinthians11:10 Maro malaikatiifi nad'eeni mata hagogachu malte, aka aka jabeenna d'iirsa isii jala jirtu agarsiiftu." 
1Corinthians11:11 Taatule Aabbo keesa nad'eeni d'iirsa male woma keesa injirtu, d'iirtileeni nad'eeni male woma keesa injirtu." 
1Corinthians11:12 Akuma nad'eeni d'iira ira uumani akasuma nad'eeni d'iira d'alti; ammalle wonti ch'ufti Waaqa iraa d'ufti. 
1Corinthians11:13 Ufii teesanii herega: aki nad'eeni yo hagogo mata inqamne Waaqa kad'attu fullaa? 
1Corinthians11:14 Aka rifeensi d'eeraani d'iiraa ch'eera," 
1Corinthians11:15 ammo nad'eeni faaya, uumami nu imbarsiisu? Rifeensi d'eeraani kunini akuma woya isii kennani." 
1Corinthians11:16 Ammo yo nami tokoleeni naani mormu fed'e, wonti anini jed'u, nufi gumiini Waaqaleeni aada d'ibi imbeennu." 
1Corinthians11:17 Gorsa kana keesati, Isani waan dansa tolchitani injed'u; wonti akanatiifi woldeennaani teesani waan dansa intolchitu ammo waan hamtu tolchiti." 
1Corinthians11:18 Ta qaraa fiit'e, aka nami woli ind'ageenne jiddu teesani jiru la d'agaye; wonti kunini, mala kiyya, hagi toko d'uga." 
1Corinthians11:19 (Wonti suni tahu malte aka nama qajeela jiru argani.) 
1Corinthians11:20 Isani yo wolwoldeetani sagale Aabbo nyaachu ind'umne. 
1Corinthians11:21 Wonti akanatiifi yo sagale nyaattani, nami ch'ufti hurrise sagale ufi nyaata, tanaafi nami gari beelaani gala, ato ka gari machau." 
1Corinthians11:22 Worra keesati nyaattani d'uddani inqabdani? Yokhaani gumi Waaqa tuffattani, worra gaargala qabu ch'eersu feetani? Ana maani isaniini jed'u feetani? Ana waan dansa isaniini jed'u feetani? Anini waan dansa tokole injed'u." 
1Corinthians11:23 Wonti akanatiifi anini waan isani barsiise Aabbo ira argad'e: aka halkani isa gurgurani suni Aabbo Yesoni qit'a fuud'e," 
1Corinthians11:24 Waaqaa galata deebise ch'ach'abse waan jed'e, kunini nafa kiyya ka isanii jed'ani baasani. Waan kana tolcha na qaabad'a." 
1Corinthians11:25 Akasuma eegi sagale nyaatani inni mudunu fuud'e waan jed'e, Mudunuuni tunini wold'aqisa haraa ka d'iiga kiyya beesisu. Yo d'uddani ch'ufa naa qaabad'a jed'e." 
1Corinthians11:26 Wonti akanatiifi haga Aabbooni d'ufuuti, yo qit'a kana nyaattani mudunu tana keesa d'uddani ch'ufa isani duisa isaa odeesitani." 
1Corinthians11:27 Tanaafi yo nami adaba hamaani qit'a Aabbo nyaate yokhaani mudunu Aabbo d'uge, inni ya nafa Aabbootiifi d'iiga Aabboleti dabe." 
1Corinthians11:28 Nami ch'ufti ufi qorqorachu male, duuba qit'a nyaate mudunu ha d'ugu." 
1Corinthians11:29 Wonti akanatiifi yo inni ulfinna nafa Aabbo hojja inni sooratu ingarre, yo nyaate d'ugu ch'ufa qorsuma ufitiini d'ufa." 
1Corinthians11:30 Maro waan kanatifi isaniini hedduuni fayyaa d'abdani laaftani, hagi tokoleeni raawattani." 
1Corinthians11:31 Nu yo sila qaraa fiit'e ufi ilaale, qorsuma Waaqa keesa induunu." 
1Corinthians11:32 Ammo Aabbooti nu qore nu qajeelcha, aka nama lafa woliini nu inqorre." 
1Corinthians11:33 Tanaafi oboleyaani tiyya, yo wolwoldeetani sagale Aabbo nyaattani, woli eega." 
1Corinthians11:34 Yo nami beela qabaate ha mana ufiti sagale nyaatu, aka yo wolwoldeetani qorsuma Waaqa keesa inseenne. Waan hafe kaani anini hojja d'ufu mid'aasa." 
1Corinthians12:1 Amma waan kenniti Lubbu ta isani na gaafatani anini aka isani waan isii ka d'ugaa baratani fed'a, oboleyaani." 
1Corinthians12:2 Isani imbeetani, aka gaafa isani Waaqa imbeenne, wonti harkaani boch'ani, ta woma imbaane, isani mohatte kara ira isani gorsite." 
1Corinthians12:3 Hubachu maltani aka nami Lubbuuni Waaqaa deemtuni tokoleeni dandae Yeso inabaare, ammalle nami tokoleeni dandae Yesoni Aabbo injed'u, yo Lubbuuni Qulqullooni isaani deemtu male." 
1Corinthians12:4 Wonti Lubbuuni namaa kennitu aka heddu jirti, ammo Lubbu tokoti namaa kenna." 
1Corinthians12:5 Kara hedduti ka woiini hojatani jira, ammo Aabbo tokocha hojatani." 
1Corinthians12:6 Humna hedduti ta woiini hojatani jira, ammo Waaqa toko ch'allati humna woiini hojatani nama ch'ufaa kenna." 
1Corinthians12:7 Nama ch'ufaa beesisa Lubbu toko kennani, aka woli wo bahu." 
1Corinthians12:8 Lubbuuni nama toko dubbi qalbi kenniti, ammo nama d'ibi Lubbumaani suni dubbi hubacha kennitiifi." 
1Corinthians12:9 Lubbuuni nama toko d'ugefacha kennite, ka d'ibi ch'irruma kennitiifi;" 
1Corinthians12:10 toko jabeenna inni waan mamatiini tolchu kennite, ka d'ibi jabeenna dubbi Waaqatiini dubbatu kennitiifi; ammalle nama d'ibi jabeenna inni kenniti Lubbu iraa d'ufteefi ta iraa ind'ufiini himu kennitiifi. Nama toko jabeenna afaani d'ibi dubbatu kennite, ka d'ibi qalbi afaani suni deebisu kennitiifi." 
1Corinthians12:11 Ammo Lubbu takatiti waan kana ch'ufa tolcha; isiini akuma feetu nama ch'ufa kenni aka aka kenniti. 
1Corinthians12:12 Wonti akanatiifi Kristoni aka nafa toko jira, ka mita heddu qabu; inni nafa toko ch'alla, ato mita heddu qabaatele." 
1Corinthians12:13 Akasuma nu ch'ufa, Yahudifi gosa d'ibile, tisseefi balchale, ya Lubbuuni nafa tokocha kanati nu batifte, ammalle nuu ch'ufa ya Lubbu taka quufsani." 
1Corinthians12:14 Nafi mita toko ch'alla inqabu ammo mita heddu qaba. 
1Corinthians12:15 Yo sila miili, Anini harkaaniti, tanaafi mita nafaatiniti ufiini jed'e, sunini mita tahu ind'owartu." 
1Corinthians12:16 Yo sila gurri, Anini ilaaniti, tanaafi anini mita nafaatiniti ufiini jed'e, tunini mita nafa tahu ind'owartu." 
1Corinthians12:17 Yo sila nafi ch'ufti ila ch'allaa taate, maanti wo d'agaya? Yokhaani yo sila gurra ch'alla taate, maanti wo suufa?" 
1Corinthians12:18 Ammo Waaqi mita ch'ufa, aka fed'u, nafa ke naqe." 
1Corinthians12:19 Yo nafi ch'ufti mita toko tahe nafi wo jira? 
1Corinthians12:20 D'uguma mita hedduti jira, ammo nafi taka." 
1Corinthians12:21 Tanaafi ilti dandeete mataani, Anini si imfed'u injettu. Yokhaani mataani miilaani, Anini si imfed'u injed'u." 
1Corinthians12:22 Diqole akasi intaatu; mita lalaaftu nafa keenna male, nu dandeenne injiraannu," 
1Corinthians12:23 mita nu womanu inseenne guddo qorqoranna; ammalle mita guddo imid'aanne guddo jabeesina. 
1Corinthians12:24 Mita tamiti mid'aaguma guddo infeene! Waaqi mita nafa keenna, aka dansa wolti naqe uume, aka mitaani ulfinna feetu ulfinna argatu." 
1Corinthians12:25 Tanaafi nafi keenna gargari qooda inqabu, ammo mitaani ch'ufti woli qorqoratti." 
1Corinthians12:26 Yo mitaani toko d'ukubde, nafi ch'ufti ind'ukubsata; yo mita toko ulfeesani, nafi ch'ufti gammada argata." 
1Corinthians12:27 Tanaafi isaniini ch'ufti nafa Kristoti, nami ch'ufti mita isaati." 
1Corinthians12:28 Gumi keesaleti Waaqi ya nama ch'ufa fulla ufi kenneefi: qaraa fiit'e ergattu, ta lameeso raagoota, ta sadeeso barsiiftu; duuba jara waan mama tolchuufi ka d'ukuba fayyisufi ka nama qarqaarufi ka nama dura deemuufi jara afaani d'ibiini dubbatu." 
1Corinthians12:29 Nami ch'ufti ergattu wo taate? Yokhaani raagoota wo taate? Yokhaani barsiiftu wo taate? Nami ch'ufti jabeenna waan mamatiini tolchu wo qaba? 
1Corinthians12:30 Yokhaani waan fayyad'abaani fayyisu wo qaba? Yokhaani waan afaani d'ibiini dubbatu wo qaba? Yokhaani waan qalbi afaani suniini deebisu wo qaba? Hiyyo. 
1Corinthians12:31 Tanaafi garaa keesani waan jabdu ira keyad'a. Ammo wonti waan kana ch'ufa ira jabdu kara kana. 
1Corinthians13:1 Ato anini dandae afaani gosa ch'ufatiifi afaani malaikale dubbad'e, ammo jaalala inqamne, dubbini tiyya iyana bilbilatiifi qonqo dibele fakaatti." 
1Corinthians13:2 Ato anini guddo hasau beekhe, qalbi ch'ufa qabaad'e waan d'ossani ch'ufa beekhe d'ugefacha gaara buqiftu qabaad'e, ammo jaalala inqamne, anini woma keesa injiru." 
1Corinthians13:3 Yo anini waan qabu ch'ufa biyyaa kenne, Nafa kiyyale guba jed'e, ammo jaalala inqamne woma naa imbaatu." 
1Corinthians13:4 Jaalalti wo obsite namaa naati; jaalalti inqotiftu, ufi insaadu, ufi inguddiftu;" 
1Corinthians13:5 jaalalti miira guddinna, ufooniti, hure indalantu; jaalalti hameenna namati inhereddu;" 
1Corinthians13:6 hameenna namati ingammaddu, ammo d'ugaati gammaddi." 
1Corinthians13:7 Jaalalti ufi injibaattu: d'ugefachaafi abdifi obsi isii muumme inqabu. 
1Corinthians13:8 Jaalalti haga jiru jireennale teeti. Dubbi Waaqa indubbatani ammo wonti suni hagu inteetu; afaani d'ibi inuma dubbatani ammo yoosu hobaani; hubachaani injirti ammo indabarti. 
1Corinthians13:9 Wonti akanatiifi hubachaani teenna qit'eniti, dubbini Waaqa ta nu odeesinuleeni qit'eniti;" 
1Corinthians13:10 ammo yo wonti qit'e d'ufte, ta qit'e intahiini imbaddi." 
1Corinthians13:11 Gaafa anini ijoolle hasaa kiyyafi herega kiyyafi hubachaani tiyya ta ijoolleeti ammo amma anini nama gudda, waan ijoolluma la keesaa bahe." 
1Corinthians13:12 Wonti nu amma agarru kunini fakeenna dawiti keesaa ka aka dansa imullanne fakaatti; ammo gaafasi aka dansa wolagarra. Wonti anini amma tana beekhu qit'eniti; ammo gaafasi qit'oofti, akuma Waaqi naani beekhu qit'oofti." 
1Corinthians13:13 Duuba ammatana wonti kunini sadeenu inteeti: d'ugefachaafi abdifi jaalala; ammo ta waan ch'ufa ira jirtu jaalala. 
1Corinthians14:1 Jaalala barbaadu maltani. Abdi teesani kenniti Lubbu gubba keyachu maltani, keesuma kenniti dubbi Waaqaatiini hasaani." 
1Corinthians14:2 Nami afaani d'ibiini dubbatu namaani indubbatu ammo Waaqaani dubbata, waan nami tokoleeni waan inni jed'u inhubanneefi. Jabeenna Lubbutiini inni d'uga d'ossani dubbata." 
1Corinthians14:3 Ammo nami Dubbi Waaqa dubbatu namaani dubbateti qarqaare garaafi qalbi jabeesa. 
1Corinthians14:4 Nami afaani d'ibiini dubbatu ufi ch'alla qarqaara, ammo ka dubbi Waaqa dubbatu gumi ch'ufa qarqaara." 
1Corinthians14:5 Anini isani ch'ufa ka afaani d'ibiini dubbattani fed'a; ammo sule ira anini isani ch'ufa ka dubbi Waaqa hasooftani fed'a. Wonti akanatiifi nami dubbi Waaqa hasau ka afaani d'ibiini dubbatu ira jira, yo nami afaani deebisuufi jiraate male, aka gumi ch'ufa qarqaarani." 
1Corinthians14:6 Tanaafi oboleyaani, yo anini gara keesani d'ufe afaani d'ibiini dubbad'e maani isanii baati? Woma tokole, yo anini dubbi Waaqi mulliseeni d'ufe male, yokhaani qalbi woi, yokhaani d'aamsa Waaqaa yokhaani barsiisa woitiini d'ufe male." 
1Corinthians14:7 Me; miha sirba ka aka magalatatifi kiraari herega; yo aka dansa d'ahani male sirba d'au jirani suni nami tokoleeni inhubata? 
1Corinthians14:8 Iyanale yo aka dansa iyani male nami lola wo kurfefata? 
1Corinthians14:9 Akasuma nami akamiini dandae waan atini dubbattu hubata, yo atini afaani d'ibiini dubbi nami hubachu indandeenne dubbatte? Dubbini tante qilleensa keesa baddi!" 
1Corinthians14:10 Afaani gosa hedduti lafa keesa jira, ammo ch'ufti wo jed'ani." 
1Corinthians14:11 Yo afaani nami dubbatu anini ind'ageenne, nami suni naa nyaapa, anileeni isaa nyaapa." 
1Corinthians14:12 Waan isani kenniti Lubbu feetaniifi, waan ch'ufa ira ta gumi qarqaarte jabeesitu barbaadu maltani." 
1Corinthians14:13 Tanaafi nami afaani d'ibiini dubbatu ha Waaqa kad'atuuti, aka Waaqi kenniti afaani deebisani isaa kennu." 
1Corinthians14:14 Wonti akanatiifi yo anini kara kanaani Waaqa kad'ad'e, lubbuuni tiyyaleeni inkad'atti, ammo qalbiini tiyya keesa injirtu." 
1Corinthians14:15 Yoosi maani tolcha? Anini lubbu tiyyaani kad'ad'e qalbi tiyyaleeni inkad'ad'a; anini lubbu tiyyaani sirbe qalbi tiyyaleeni sirba. 
1Corinthians14:16 Yo atini lubbu ch'allaani Waaqa galata deebifte, nami gumi teesani keesa tau kaani akami dandae, Amini jed'a? Inni kara waan atini jettuuni hubatu inqabu." 
1Corinthians14:17 Yo kad'achaani tante ta atini galataani deebiftu dansa taatele, namichi kaani qarqaarsa inargatu." 
1Corinthians14:18 Anini Waaqaa galata deebisa waan anini afaani d'ibiini isanii ch'ufa ira dubbachu dandaufi. 
1Corinthians14:19 Ammo kad'acha gumi keesati anini sila dubbi shani ta nami ch'ufti hubachu dandau dubbachu fed'a, aka nama d'ibi barsiisu, fulla dubbi kunki shani afaani d'ibiini dubbad'u." 
1Corinthians14:20 Herega keesani keesa aka ijoolle intahiina, oboleyaani tiyya; waan hameennati ijoolle taha, ammo herega keesani keesati nama gudda taha." 
1Corinthians14:21 Seera Waaqa keesati waan t'aafani. Aabbooni waan jed'u, Anini worra kanati dubbad'a; nama afaani d'ibi dubbatuufi hid'i nyaapatiini iti dubbad'a. Ammo yo sunile gumiini tiyya na inch'aqaftu." 
1Corinthians14:22 Tanaafi afaani d'ibiini dubbachaani worra ind'ugefatiini akheekha, worra d'ugefacha qabu woma keesa injirtu. Ammalle dubbi Waaqa dubbachaani waan worra d'ugefateti, worra d'ugefacha inqamne woma keesa injirtu." 
1Corinthians14:23 Yo gumiini ch'ufti wolwoldeete nami ch'ufti afaani d'ibiini dubbate — yo nami diida ka ind'ugefatiini olseene, Isaniini ch'ufti ya maraattani injed'u?" 
1Corinthians14:24 Ammo yo nami ch'ufti dubbi Waaqa hasae, nami diida ka ind'ugefatiini, yo olseene, maro dubbi teesanitiifi aka daba qabu ufi arge ufi qora." 
1Corinthians14:25 Herega isaa ka d'ossa mullisaniti, inni gadi jed'e Waaqa kad'ate waan jed'u, Waaqi d'uguma arma isani woliini jira." 
1Corinthians14:26 Wonti anini jechu jiru kunini maani, oboleyaani? Hojja isani wolwoldeetani, nami toko sirba qaba, toko barsiisa qaba, toko waan Waaqi iti mullise qaba, ka d'ibiini afaani d'ibiini dubbata, kaani afaani deebisaafi. Wonti ch'ufti sila gumi qarqaaru malte." 
1Corinthians14:27 Yo nami afaani d'ibiini dubbachu fed'e, nami lamaa sadi ha woli gula dubbatuuti, nami d'ibileeni ha afaani deebisuufi." 
1Corinthians14:28 Yo nami afaani deebisu injirre, nami tokoleeni woldeenna keesa indubbatiini, ammo ha ufiifi Waaqati dubbatuuti." 
1Corinthians14:29 Nami lamaa sadi ka dubbi, Waaqa barsiisu ha dubbatuuti, ato jari kaani waan worri jed'u ch'aqasu." 
1Corinthians14:30 Ammo yo nami gumi keesa tau toko d'aamsa Waaqa ira argate, nami dubbachu jiru ha ch'allisuuti." 
1Corinthians14:31 Nami ch'ufti ha dubbi Waaqa toko tokooni dubbatuuti, aka nami ch'ufti wo barate jabaatu." 
1Corinthians14:32 Kenniti dubbi Waaqatiini dubbatani ha nama dubbatu jala jiraatuuti. 
1Corinthians14:33 Wonti akanatiifi Waaqi aka nu wolti goonu infed'u, ammo inni aka nu nagayaani teennu fed'a. Akuma woldeenna gumi ch'ufa keesa," 
1Corinthians14:34 nad'eeni ch'allisu malte woldeenna keesa. Isiini dubbachu himmalle; akuma Seeri duri jed'e biyya dura deemu himmalle. 
1Corinthians14:35 Yo woi barachu feete ha manati d'iirsa ufi gaafatuuti. Waan guddo ch'eeraati yo nad'eeni woldeenna gumi keesati hasoofte. 
1Corinthians14:36 Dubbini Waaqa fulla teesanii baate? Gara keesani ch'allaa d'ufte? 
1Corinthians14:37 Yo nami tokoleeni ergattu Waaqa ufi sehe yokhaani waan kenniti Lubbu qabu ufi sehe, aka wonti anini t'aafu jiru kunini Seera Waaqa hubachu male." 
1Corinthians14:38 Ammo yo inni waan kana ch'aqasu dide, dubbi isaa inch'aqasiina." 
1Corinthians14:39 Tanaafi oboleyaani tiyya, garaa keesaniini aka dubbi Waaqa hasooftani jaalad'a, ammo afaani d'ibiini dubbacha nama ind'owiina." 
1Corinthians14:40 Waan ch'ufa kara qajeelatiifi ka adabatiini tolchu malani. 
1Corinthians15:1 Amma oboleyaani tiyya, Odu Dansa anini duri isaniti odeese ta isani fud'attani jabaattaniini isani qaabsiisu fed'a." 
1Corinthians15:2 Odu Dansa suniini baafamtani, yo jabeesitani, yo ufumaa d'ugefattani male." 
1Corinthians15:3 Dubbi jabdu ta nati odeesani anileeni isaniti dabarse: ta Kristoni maro daba keennatiifi due jettu, akuma t'aafi keesati t'aafani;" 
1Corinthians15:4 jennaani isa awaalani, gaafa sadeeso isa kaasani, akuma t'aafi keesati t'aafani;" 
1Corinthians15:5 inni Petroti mullate, duuba eegi suni jara kud'ani lamati mullate." 
1Corinthians15:6 Eegi suni inni guyya toko oboleyaani nama d'ibba shaniti mullate; ta gari ammalle injirti ato ta gari dootele. 
1Corinthians15:7 Eegi suni Yakoboti mullate, ammalle eegi sunile ergattu ch'ufati mullate." 
1Corinthians15:8 Eege qit'isu nati mullate, ato anini aka nama kara mamatiini d'alate jiraad'ele." 
1Corinthians15:9 Wonti akanatiifi anini maand'a ergattu ch'ufaati, ergattu naani jechu himmalle, maro anini gumi Waaqa gaargalcheefi." 
1Corinthians15:10 Ammo maro eeba Waaqaatiifi anini akuma jiru jira, eebiti inni naa kenne ufumaa imbanne. Ammo, anini ergattu ch'ufa ira jabaad'e hojad'e, ato waan anini ufiini tolche tahu d'ibaatele, ammo eeba Waaqaati na keesa tolche." 
1Corinthians15:11 Tanaafi ato naraa d'ufte yokhaani worra iraa d'ufte, nuuni ch'ufti waan kana barsiimna, isanileeni waan kana d'ugefattani." 
1Corinthians15:12 Yo d'aamsi keenna, Kristoni duisa keesaa ya kae jed'u, isaniini gari akamiini, Nami due inkau jettani?" 
1Corinthians15:13 Yo wonti sunini d'ugaa taate, yoosi Kristole duisa keesaa inkaamne;" 
1Corinthians15:14 ammalle yo Kristo duisa keesa inkaasiini nu waan odeesinu inqamnu, isanileeni waan d'ugefattani inqabdani." 
1Corinthians15:15 Waan hagasi ira, nu waan Waaqaani kiyyibu jirru fakaanna, waan nu, Inni Kristo duisa keesaa kaase jenneefi. Inni isa inkaamne, yo aki worra due inkaamne d'ugaa taate." 
1Corinthians15:16 Yo worra due duisa keesaa inkaasiini, Kristole duisa keesaa inkaamne." 
1Corinthians15:17 Ammalle yo Kristo duisa keesaa inkaasiini d'ugefachaani teesani waan d'araati, isani ammalle daba keesa jirtani." 
1Corinthians15:18 Ammalle worri duri Kristo d'ugefate due ya bade. 
1Corinthians15:19 Yo abdiini teenna ta Kristo jireenna kana ch'alla keesa jiraatte, nu nama lafa tana ch'ufa ira naasu feena." 
1Corinthians15:20 Ammo dubbini d'uga tana — Kristo ya duisa keesaa kaasani, inni worra due keesa nama qara ka duisa keesaa kaasani." 
1Corinthians15:21 Akuma nami duani d'ufe, dua keesaa kaitile nami d'ufeeni." 
1Corinthians15:22 Akuma nami ch'ufti Adamu keesa duu, akasuma Kristo keesale nama ch'ufa duisa keesaa kaasani." 
1Corinthians15:23 Ammo nami ch'ufti fulla ufii qaba: Kristoni nama ch'ufa dura jira, eegi suni worra Kristoti, gaafa inni d'ufu." 
1Corinthians15:24 Gaafa muummeeni d'uftu Kristoni hayyootafi jabeennaafi humna ch'ufa dabsateti Finna ch'ufa harka Waaqa Abbati kenna. 
1Corinthians15:25 Kristoni fidu male, haga Waaqi nyaapa ch'ufa dabsate miila isaa jala naquuti." 
1Corinthians15:26 Nyaapi eege qit'isu balleesani duisa. 
1Corinthians15:27 Wonti akanatiifi t'aafiini waan jettu, Waaqi ya waan ch'ufa miila isaa jala naqe. Yo waan ch'ufa jed'ani, Waaqi ka waan ch'ufa miila Kristo jala naqe keesa injiru. Suni waan gaafi qabaatiiniti." 
1Corinthians15:28 Yo waan ch'ufa miila Kristo jala naqani, yoosi Ilmileeni, Waaqa jala ufi kaya, ka waan ch'ufa isa jala naqe; duuba Waaqi waan ch'ufa kara ch'ufaani fida." 
1Corinthians15:29 Worra maro nama duetiifi batisani maani tolchani re? Worri maani tolchu fed'a? Yo aki worri, Nami due duisa keesaa inkau jed'u d'ugaa taate, maafi maro worra duetiifi batifamani re?" 
1Corinthians15:30 Nu maanifu hojja ch'ufa gaargala dua keesa ufi seensimna? 
1Corinthians15:31 Oboleyaani hojja ch'ufa duati harka na qaba! Waan anini maro teesaniifi Kristo Yeso Aabbo keenna keesati ufi guddisuufi anini waan kana jed'a. 
1Corinthians15:32 Ato sila anini Efeso keesati bineensa ala had'e, maro fed'i namaatiifi, anini maani argad'e? Yo sila nama due jireennati inkaamne mammaasi toko waan jed'u, Arra nyaanne d'unna, bori indoona." 
1Corinthians15:33 Insobamiina: waheli hamaani adaba dansa iyaka. 
1Corinthians15:34 Qalbi teesaniti deebia, kara keesani ka daba lakisa. Nami gari waan Waaqa imbeekhu; anini aka isani ch'eertanifi jed'a." 
1Corinthians15:35 Nami toko hegeri akana gaafata, Nama due akamiini kaasani? Nafa akami horata?" 
1Corinthians15:36 Atini daalle! Yo mid'aani fach'aafte haga biqilaniti imbaani. 
1Corinthians15:37 Wonti atini oobritu sunini sanyuma, hegeri dargaye yokhaani mid'aani d'ibi ammo mid'aani bahu jiruniti." 
1Corinthians15:38 Waaqati nafa fed'u mid'aani suni kenna, isumati nafa maleefi kennaafi." 
1Corinthians15:39 Fooni waan ch'ufa aka takaa injirani: nami fooni ufi qaba, bineensi ka ufi qaba; simpirreeni ka ufi qabdi, qurt'umileeni ka ufi qabdi." 
1Corinthians15:40 Ammalle nafa lafatiifi ka gubbati jira; mid'aagumti ta lafatiifi ta gubbaleeni injirti. 
1Corinthians15:41 Aduuni mid'aaguma ufi qabdi; jiileeni mid'aaguma ufi qaba; urjileeni mid'aaguma ufi qabdi; wonti akanatiifi urji keesale isiini ch'ufti takaaniti. 
1Corinthians15:42 Gaafa worra due jireennati kaasani akana. Reefi awaalani waan duati; hojja kaasani iti deebie induu. 
1Corinthians15:43 Hojja awaalani fuuli hamafi laafa; gaafa kaasani mid'aagaa dansa. 
1Corinthians15:44 Hojja awaalani nafa d'aloota, gaafa kaasani nafa lubbuu. Yo nafi d'aloota jiraate, nafi lubbuleeni injira." 
1Corinthians15:45 Wonti akanatiifi t'aafiini waan jettu: Nama qara, Adamu, nama jiru uumani; ammo Adamuni muumme lubbu jireenna namaa kennitu." 
1Corinthians15:46 Lubbuuni durati ind'uftu, ammo nafi d'aloota d'ufeti, duuba lubbuuni faana d'ufti." 
1Corinthians15:47 Adamu qara biyye lafatiini uumani: Adamuni lameeso gubbaa d'ufe. 
1Corinthians15:48 Worri biyye aka nama biyyeeni uumani jira; worri gubbaa aka nama gubbaa d'ufe jira. 
1Corinthians15:49 Akuma amma nama biyye fakaannu, akasuma eegi tana nama gubbaa fakaanna." 
1Corinthians15:50 Wonti anini jechu jiru tana, oboleyaani: wonti nafafi d'iiga qaba qooda Finna Waaqa inargatu, ammalle wonti dua dandeete duu ufi ind'owartu." 
1Corinthians15:51 Waan d'ossa kana ch'aqasa: nuuni ch'ufti indoonu, ammo nu jijirani, maro tokotu," 
1Corinthians15:52 aka ila lifsattu, hojja magalata muumme d'aani. Wonti akanatiifi hojja d'aani, worra due aka deebiani indoone duisa keesaa kaasani, nuuni ch'ufti jijiramna." 
1Corinthians15:53 Wonti hobaa waan inhobaane keyachu malte; wonti dua waan indoone keyachu malte. 
1Corinthians15:54 Duuba hojja wonti hobaa waan inhobaane keyatte, ammalle hojja wonti dua waan indoone keyatte, gaafasi d'ugaani t'aafi mullatti ta, Dua la liqimsani; dabsachaani ya qit'oofte! jettu." 
1Corinthians15:55 Ee Duisa dabsachaani tante me? Ee Duisa d'ukubiitini tante me? 
1Corinthians15:56 Duisi jabeenna namaani d'ukubsu daba ira argata, dabileeni jabeenna ufii Seera ira argata." 
1Corinthians15:57 Ammo galati Waaqa imbadiini, ka dabsacha nuu kennu maro Aabbo keenna Yeso Kristotiifi!" 
1Corinthians15:58 Tanaafi oboleyaani tiyya, jabaad'a, ejad'a. Huji Aabbo hojja ch'ufa hojad'a, jabeesa; wonti akanatiifi isani imbeetani, hujiini Aabbo ta isani hojattani dandeete lafati inhaftu." 
1Corinthians16:1 Amma waan hori gumi Waaqa ta Yudea jirtuni qarqaarani ka isani na gaafattani, anini akana jed'a: waan anini gumi Galatiatini tolcha jed'e tolchuu maltani." 
1Corinthians16:2 Guyya qara ka torbaani ch'ufa isaniini ch'ufti hori lafa kayu maltani, waan argattani gula, aka yo anini d'ufe hori wolti inguurre." 
1Corinthians16:3 Eegi anini d'ufe jara isani fohattaniti tatabe kenne, Hori suni Yerusalemu geesa jed'aani." 
1Corinthians16:4 Yo anileeni worra woliini deemu male woli yaana. 
1Corinthians16:5 Eegi Makedonia keesa dabre anini gara keesani d'ufa, wonti a akanatiifi anini Makedonia keesa dabru male." 
1Corinthians16:6 Anini bara d'aamocha ch'ufa fulla teesani taa, duuba isani woreega naa tolchitani, anini imaltu tiyya deema, fulla deemu fed'u ch'ufa." 
1Corinthians16:7 Anini haga diqa toko ch'alla isani bira tau imfed'u, haga gudda isani woliini tau fed'a, yo Aabbooni jed'e." 
1Corinthians16:8 Ammo haga guyya Pentekoste arma Efeso keesa tau fed'a. 
1Corinthians16:9 Balbalti huji jabduuni hojad'u ya armati naa banamte, ato nami naani morku hedduuni jiraatele." 
1Corinthians16:10 Yo Timotheoni isaniini bahe, isa bulcha, maro inni akuma anini Aabbo hojad'u hojatuufi." 
1Corinthians16:11 Nami tokoleeni isa intufatiini; ammalle woreega isaa tolcha, aka inni imaltu ufi nagayaani deeme gara kiyya deebiu; wonti akanatiifi anini oboleyaani woliini isa eegu jira." 
1Corinthians16:12 Amma waan oboleesa keenna Apolo: anini guddo iti dubbad'e aka inni oboleyaani d'ibi woliini gara keesani d'aqu, ammo inni ammatana diqole deemu imfed'u. Yo qoomni argate indeema." 
1Corinthians16:13 Kurfo taa, d'ugefacha teesani keesa jabaad'a, insodaatiina jabaad'a." 
1Corinthians16:14 Huji teesani ch'ufa jaalalaani tolcha. 
1Corinthians16:15 Waan Stefanatiifi worra isaa imbeetani; Kristiani qara lafa Griki keesa worra, ammalle ya huji gumi Waaqaati ufi baasani." 
1Corinthians16:16 Anini isani kad'ad'a, oboleyaani tiyya, worra akana kana ch'aqasa, gula yaa, ammalle nama aka worra hojate gaargalu ch'ufale." 
1Corinthians16:17 D'ufiisi Stefanatiifi ka Fortunatotiifi ka Akaiko guddo na gammachiise; ya fulla isani injirre buani," 
1Corinthians16:18 ammalle garaa na jabeesani, akuma isanile garaa jabeesani. Nama akana kana ch'ufa ulfeesu malani." 
1Corinthians16:19 Gumiini Asia nagaya isani d'aamti; Akilafi Priskafi gumiini mana worra keesati wolwoldeetu guddo nagaya d'aamti, maqa Aabbootiini." 
1Corinthians16:20 Oboleyaani ch'ufti nagaya isani d'aamti. D'ungo oboleyaanitiini nagaya wolfuud'a. 
1Corinthians16:21 Waan kana anini harkuma kiyyaani t'aafa: Pauloni nagaya isanii d'aama. 
1Corinthians16:22 Nami Aabbo injaalanne ch'ufti ha abaaramuuti! Maranatha — Aabbo keenna, kooti!" 
1Corinthians16:23 Eebiti Aabbo Yeso isani woliini jiraatiinna. 
1Corinthians16:24 Jaalalti tiyya Kristo Yeso keesa isani woliini tahinna. 
2Corinthians1:1 Maqaani kiyya Paulo, ergattu Kristo Yeso fed'i Waaqa gula, ammalle oboleesa keenna Timotheo woliini jirra. Gara gumi Waaqa ta Korintho jirtuufi gumi Waaqa ch'ufa ta Akaya keesa jirtu:" 
2Corinthians1:2 Waaqi Abba keennafi Aabbo Yeso Kristoni eebafi nagaya isanii kennina. 
2Corinthians1:3 Waaqa Abba Aabbo keenna Yeso Kristoti galata deebimna, inni Abba naasu, Waaqa qarqaarsa aka ch'ufa namaa kennu!" 
2Corinthians1:4 Gaargala keenna ch'ufa keesati nu qarqaara, aka nuleeni dandeenne nama gaargala qabu ch'ufa qarqaarru, qarqaarsa nu Waaqa ira arganne suniini." 
2Corinthians1:5 Akuma nu gaargala Kristo gudda qoodannu, akasuma maro Kristotiifi qarqaarsa isaa guddale qoodanna." 
2Corinthians1:6 Yo nu gaargalle, maro qarqaarsafi baafama keesanitiifi gaargalla; yo nu qarqaarani isanile ya qarqaarani, irre ta isani gaargala aka keenna obsitaniini isani kennani." 
2Corinthians1:7 Tanaafi abdiini nu isani abdannu diqole inchochoone; nu imbeenna aka, akuma gaargala keenna qoodattani, akasuma qarqaarsa nu argannule qoodattani." 
2Corinthians1:8 Oboleyaani, nu gaargala lafa Asia keesati arganne isani qaabsiisu feena. Baani nura kayani waan guddo, ammalle aka male nuti ulfaate, tanaafi nu waan jiraannu ufi inseene." 
2Corinthians1:9 Waan ijeecha nuti murani seene. Ammo wonti kunini aka nu ufi inabdanne ammo Waaqa ka nama due kaasu abdannufi taate. 
2Corinthians1:10 Inni gaargala duisa kana keesaa nu baase, hegerile nu baasa; nuleeni abdi teenna isa ira keyanne aka inni ammalle nu baasu," 
2Corinthians1:11 akuma isanileeni kad'acha teesaniini nu qarqaartani. Kara kanaani kad'acha heddu ta nuu kad'atani d'agayani, Waaqileeni nu eebisa; duuba nami hedduuni qonqo olfud'ate maro teennaafi galata deebisa." 
2Corinthians1:12 Wonti nu ufi guddimnuufi tana: heregi keenna aka dansa nu beesisa, aka lafa tana keesa, keesuma jiddu teennaafi teesani, nu garaa tokooni d'uga Waaqi nu kenneefi eeba Waaqaatiini teenne, ammo qalbi namatiini inteenne." 
2Corinthians1:13 Nu waan isani soomtani hubattani ch'alla isani t'aamna. Anini inheregad'a aka isani waan ammatana aka dansa inhubatiini 
2Corinthians1:14 hegeri hubattani, aka Guyya Aabbo Yeso isanileeni akuma nu maro teesaniifi ufi guddimnu maro teennaafi ufi guddiftani." 
2Corinthians1:15 Waan kana aka dansa beennaani, anini aka imaltu gara keesani d'aqu herege, aka maro lama eeba argattani." 
2Corinthians1:16 Gaafa Makedonia deemuufi gaafa galule isani ira bahu fed'e, aka imaltu tiyya ta Yudea keesa na qarqaartani." 
2Corinthians1:17 Gaafa waan kana herege anini waan aka injirre tahe? Anini yo woi heregu, aka nama lafa herega? ka Ee, Ee yokhaani Hiyyo, Hiyyo fulla tokotu jed'u?" 
2Corinthians1:18 Waaqi ka d'ugaati, kakhuuni tiyya gara keesani Ee yokhaani Hiyyoniti." 
2Corinthians1:19 Wonti akanatiifi Yeso Kristoni Ilmi Waaqa ka anaafi Silafi Timotheoni isaniti odeesine, ka Eetiifi Hiyyo jed'uuniti. Inni Eeti Waaqaati;" 
2Corinthians1:20 wonti akanatiifi waan Waaqi kakhate ch'ufa inni ee jed'a. Maro waan kanatifi maro Yeso Kristotiifi nu Amini jenne Waaqa guddimna. 
2Corinthians1:21 Waaqati nu jabeesa isani woliini, jireenna keenna ka Kristo keesa; ammalle isumati biyya ira koba nu baase," 
2Corinthians1:22 beesisa ufi nura kaye, ammalle Lubbu Qulqullo ufi nuu kenne, aka qabdo nuu taatu." 
2Corinthians1:23 Anini Waaqa ka d'uga tiyya yaamad'a, inni garaa kiyya imbeekha! Anini aka isani ingaargalchineefi Korintho d'aqu dide." 
2Corinthians1:24 Waan isani d'ugefachaani jabaatanifi nu waan isani d'ugefachu maltani isaniti himuti injiru. Ammo nu aka gammada argattani isani woliini hojachuuti jira. 
2Corinthians2:1 Tanaafi anini waan kana kutad'e: iti deebie fulla teesani d'ufe isani ilaalefachiisu. 
2Corinthians2:2 Wonti akanatiifi yo anini isani lalefachiise, eennuti na gammachiisa, worruma anini lalefachiise suni male?" 
2Corinthians2:3 Maro waan kanatifi anini tatabe taani isanii t'aafe, aka yo anini fulla teesani d'ufe, worri sila na gammachiisu na ilaalefachiimne. Anini imbeekha, aka yo anini gammada qabaad'e isanileeni gammada argattani." 
2Corinthians2:4 Anini garaa hamaani tatabe isanii t'aafe, imimaani guddoleeni, aka isani lalefachiisuuniti ammo aka jaalala tiyya guddo isani garsiisu." 
2Corinthians2:5 Yo nami tokoleeni nama lalefachiise inni na ilaalefachiimne ammo isani lalefachiise; yokhaani inni isani keesa nama gari lalefachiise, taatule dubbi tana owisu imfed'u." 
2Corinthians2:6 Aki isani nami hedduuni nama kana akana gaargalchitani ingeeti. 
2Corinthians2:7 Ammo isani ammatana isaa araaramtani jabeesu maltani, aka inni guddo lalefate ufi injibaanne." 
2Corinthians2:8 Aka isani aka dansa isa jaalattani isa beesisu maltani. 
2Corinthians2:9 Maro waan kanatifi anini tatabe taani isaniti t'aafe: aka isani ilaalad'e, ammalle aka isani barsiisa tiyya gula yaatani hubachu fed'e." 
2Corinthians2:10 Yo isani nama tokoo araaramtani anileeni ya isaa araarame. Hojja anini namaa araaramu, yo anini d'uguma nama araarame, anini maro teesaniifi araarama fuula Kristo durati," 
2Corinthians2:11 aka Sheet'ani nu indabsanne; wonti akanatiifi nu malte isaa imbeenna. 
2Corinthians2:12 Anini aka Odu Dansa Kristo odeesu Troani bahe, jennaani aka Aabbooni kara huji naa bane arge." 
2Corinthians2:13 Ammo waan oboleesa keenna Tito achiti inargiiniifi anini guddo lalefad'e. Tanaafi anini biyyaani Nagayati jed'e, Makedonia d'aqe." 
2Corinthians2:14 Ammo galati Waaqa imbadiini! Yo nu Kristo keesa jirru, Waaqi hojja ch'ufa aka nama Kristoni boojie dabsachaani galchu nu yaasa. Aka urgaa qayyaa ka fulla ch'ufaa yaatu, Waaqi nama ch'ufati Kristo nuuni mullisa." 
2Corinthians2:15 Wonti akasitiifi nu aka urgaa qayya ka Kristoni Waaqaa aarse duuba worra baafamufi ka baduleti aaru fakaanna. 
2Corinthians2:16 Worra badu ajaani tuni inijeefti; worra baafamu urgaani tunini injireesiti. Eentu huji tana tolchu dandaa re? 
2Corinthians2:17 Nu aka worra dubbi Waaqaatiini daldalu injirru; ammo maro Waaqi nu ergeefi, nu aka nama d'uga dubbanna fuula isaa durati, aka hojattu Kristo." 
2Corinthians3:1 Nu waan ufi guddisu jirru fakaanna? Yokhaani aka biyya gari tatabe ufiini beesimnu isaniti d'umne yokhaani isani ira fud'achu malle? 
2Corinthians3:2 Tatabeeni teenna isani, ta garaa keenna keesati t'aafani, aka nami ch'ufti soome baratu." 
2Corinthians3:3 Kristoti tatabe tana t'aafe harka keennaani erge. D'akha gubbati kalaamuuni int'aamne ammo garaa nama keesati t'aafani Lubbu Waaqa jirutiini. 
2Corinthians3:4 Wonti nu waan kana jennuufi maro d'uga Waaqa Kristo keesa qamnuufi. 
2Corinthians3:5 Wonti nu keesa jira, ta aka nu waan kana tolchu dandeennu agarsiiftu injirtu. Jabeenni nu qamnu fulla Waaqati d'ufa:" 
2Corinthians3:6 isati nu dandeesise aka wold'aqisa hareesa kanaani hojannu, wold'aqisi kuni waan seera t'aafaniitiniti ammo waan Lubbuuti. Seeri t'aafani duisaani d'ufa, ammo Lubbuuni nama jireesiti." 
2Corinthians3:7 Seera duri d'akha gubbati t'aafani, hojja seera suni kennani guddinni Waaqa imullate. Ato guddinni suni badele, fuuli Musa guddo ch'ululuqe, gochiti Israeli isa ilaalu dad'abde. Yo Seeri, ka hujiini isaa duisaani d'uftu, guddinna kana ch'ufaani d'ufe," 
2Corinthians3:8 guddinni Lubbuuni d'uftuuni, hagasi ira jira!" 
2Corinthians3:9 Hujiini wollaala namatiini murani waan guddo, ammo hujiini namaani, Wollaala inqabdu jed'ani hagasira guddo." 
2Corinthians3:10 Nu waan kana maro guddinna gudda amma jiruufi jenna, guddinni duri jiru amma injiru." 
2Corinthians3:11 Yo guddinni waan haguma diqa toko taa keesa jiraate, waan haga hegeri taa hagasi ira keesa jira!" 
2Corinthians3:12 Maro abdi tana qamnuufi nu guddo garaa jabaanna. 
2Corinthians3:13 Nu aka Musa injirru, ka hagogo matati uyifate aka gochiti Israeli ch'ululuqa fuula isaa ka baddu ingarre." 
2Corinthians3:14 Qalbi worraa gaafasi dukaneesani; haga arrale hagogooni suni qalbi worraa gubbuma teeti, ato kitaaba wold'aqisa duri soomanu. Yo nami Kristo keesa jiraate ch'alla hagogo suni nama iraa fuud'ani." 
2Corinthians3:15 Haga arrale yo worri Seera Musa soomu hagogooni qalbuma worra gubba teeti. 
2Corinthians3:16 Ammo daandaani iraa fuud'ani, akuma t'aafiini jettu, Musani Aabbooti deebinaani hagogo iraa fuud'ani jed'ani." 
2Corinthians3:17 Aabbooni armati baanaani Lubbu; fulla Lubbuuni Aabbo jirtu balchoomati jira. 
2Corinthians3:18 Nuuni ch'ufti guddinna Aabbo fuula hagogo inqamneeni akuma dawiti mullimna; kara kanaani gara nu galchani, aka isa fakaannu guddinna muumme inqamneeni; Aabbooni ka akana tolchu Lubbu." 
2Corinthians4:1 Maro naasu ufitiifi Waaqi ya huji tana nuu kenne, tanaafi nu ufi injibaannu." 
2Corinthians4:2 Huji d'ossatiifi ta ch'eera la lakimne; nama insomnu, dubbi Waaqale ind'aareesinu. D'uga diidati dubbanne aka d'uga qamnu nama ch'ufa agarsiimna, Waaqa duraleeti." 
2Corinthians4:3 Yo oduuni dansaani nu odeesinu d'ofamte, worra badu jiru ch'alla duraa d'ofamti." 
2Corinthians4:4 Wonti worri ind'ugefanneefi waan hamaani lafa tana keesa jiru qalbi worra dukaneeseefi. Inni ifsa worrati ifsu argu worra d'owa, ifsa Odu Dansa ta guddinna Kristo keesa d'ufu, inileeni akuma Waaqa jira." 
2Corinthians4:5 Nu waan keenna odeesuti injirru: ammo aka Yeso Kristoni Aabbo, ammalle aka nu maro teesaniifi tissele isaa taane odeesina." 
2Corinthians4:6 Waaqi, Dukana keesa ifsaani ha ifsu jed'eti ifsa kana garaa keenna keesati ifse, aka ifsa hubacha guddinna Waaqa nuu kennu ka fuula Kristoti ifsu." 
2Corinthians4:7 Ammo nu worri hori lubbu kana qabu aka okote faara jirra, aka nu jabeenna inqamne ammo Waaqi jabeenna gudda qabu agarsiisani." 
2Corinthians4:8 Maro heddu nu gaargalchani ammo taka nu imach'arsinne; maro gari irinch'ich'ina ammo taka ufi injibaanne; 
2Corinthians4:9 nyaapa heddu qamna ammo taka jaala ind'amne; maro heddu madoomna ammo taka nu imballeesine. 
2Corinthians4:10 Hojja ch'ufa nafa keenna gubbati duisa Yeso baana, aka jireenni isaa nafa keenna keesati mullatu." 
2Corinthians4:11 Haga jirru ch'ufa diquma maro Kristotiifi indoone, aka jireenni isaa nafa keenna ka duu kana keesati mullatu." 
2Corinthians4:12 Tanaafi dooti nu bira ejiti, ammo jireenni isani bira eja." 
2Corinthians4:13 T'aafiini, Maro d'ugefad'eefi dubbad'e jetti. Akasuma nuleeni garaa d'ugefachaatiini maro d'ugefanneefi dubbanna." 
2Corinthians4:14 Nu imbeenna aka Waaqi ka Aabbo Yeso duisa keesaa kaase, Yeso woliini nule duisa keesaa kaase isani woliini fuula ufi duraani nu d'ufu." 
2Corinthians4:15 Wonti kunini ch'ufti maro teesaniifi taate; duuba akuma eebiti Waaqa nama heddu geetuuni, nami galata Waaqaa deebisa, aka maqa Waaqa guddisani." 
2Corinthians4:16 Maro waan kanatifi nu garaa ilaamnu. Ato nafi keenna guyya ch'ufa shamele, garaani keenna guyya ch'ufa haraa taha." 
2Corinthians4:17 Gaargali diqaani, ka yoosu hobau, ka nu qamnu kunini eegi tana guddinna hegeritiini nu d'ufa, ka gaargala suni ira jiru." 
2Corinthians4:18 Nu waan mullata abdachuti injirru, ammo waan imullanne abdachuu jirra. Wonti mullata haga diqa toko ch'alla teeti, ammo wonti imullanne haga hegeri teeti." 
2Corinthians5:1 Nu imbeenna aka yo waaro nu keesa teennu tana tarsaasani — waarooni tuni nafa keenna — Waaqi mana nu keesa teennu nu mid'aasa, mana inni harka ufitiini mid'aasu, ka haga hegeri tau." 
2Corinthians5:2 Amma guddo lalefanna waan worra keenna ka gubba jiru iti galu feenuufi; 
2Corinthians5:3 wonti akasitiifi yo nu worra suni iti galle nama alati galu imfakaannu. 
2Corinthians5:4 Haga nafa keenna kana qamnu aka nama gaargalchani lalefanna; nu nafa keenna injibinu, ammo nafa gubbaa fed'achu feena, aka jireenni waan dua dabsatu." 
2Corinthians5:5 Waaqati waan kanaafi nu kurfeese, duuba inni Lubbu ufi nuu kenne, aka qabdo nuu taatu." 
2Corinthians5:6 Tanaafi nu hojja tokole insodaannu. Nu imbeenna aka haga nu nafaani jirru nu mana Aabbo ira fago jirru. 
2Corinthians5:7 Wonti akanatiifi jireenni keenna waan d'ugefachaati, waan ilaani arganiiniti." 
2Corinthians5:8 Nu insodaannu, worra keenna nafa kanaani biraa yaane Aabbo woliini sila tau feena." 
2Corinthians5:9 Waan ch'ufa ira nu isa gammachiisu feena, worra keenna kana keesafi achileti." 
2Corinthians5:10 Nuuni ch'ufti Kristo dura eju malle, aka inni dubbi teenna qore, nami ch'ufti waan argachu male argatu, waan inni nafaani tolche gula, hamtuufi dansale." 
2Corinthians5:11 Nu aka Aabbo sodaachu malani imbeenna, tanaafi biyya garsiimna. Waaqi nu beekha, anileeni waan isanileeni guddo na beetani seha." 
2Corinthians5:12 Nu ammalle isani durati ufi d'ugeesu imfeenu; ammo waan isani maro teennaafi ufi guddisu maltanifi isaniti himna, aka isani worra nafa hameennatifi ufi koorsu ka ammo adaba hameennatifi ufi inkoorsine woi iti himatani." 
2Corinthians5:13 Yo nu maraannele maro Waaqatiifi maraanna. Yo fayya qabaanele maro teesaniifi fayya horanna. 
2Corinthians5:14 Jaalala Kristoni nu jaalatuuti nu mitisa, amma aka nami toko maro nama ch'ufatiifi due imbeenna, akasi jechaani nami ch'ufti ya due jechu." 
2Corinthians5:15 Wonti inni nama ch'ufaa duefi aka nami tokoleeni ufiifi injiraanne, ammo maro nama due duisa keesaa kaasaniifi jiraatu." 
2Corinthians5:16 Nu armaa achi aada nama gula nama tokole inqorru. Yo duri aada nama gula Kristo qorrele, armaa achi intolchinu." 
2Corinthians5:17 Yo nami Kristoni taka tahe inni uumama haraa: wonti dullatiini ya dabarte, hareetiini ya d'ufte." 
2Corinthians5:18 Waan kana ch'ufa Waaqati nu tolche, ka maro Kristotiifi wolti nu araarse, Beena, nama wolti araarsa nuuni jed'e." 
2Corinthians5:19 D'aamsi keenna aka Waaqi Kristo keesa nama ufiti araarsu. Waaqi daba worrati int'aamne, ammalle ya d'aamsa nagaya kana harka keennati kenne." 
2Corinthians5:20 Kuno, nu teenne maro Kristotiifi dubbanna, aka waan Waaqi afaani keenna tahe isaniti dubbatu: maro Kristotiifi isani kad'anna, Waaqaani wolti araarama." 
2Corinthians5:21 Kristoni daba inqabu, ammo Waaqi maro teennaafi isaa daba tolche aka nu maro Kristotiifi d'uga Waaqa argannu." 
2Corinthians6:1 Huji teenna ta nu Waaqa woliini hojannu keesati nu isani kad'anna: ya eeba Waaqa argattani, imballeesina." 
2Corinthians6:2 Waan Waaqi jed'e ch'aqasa: Anini hojja jed'e si ch'aqase, guyya baafama si qarqaare. Ch'aqasa! Hojjaani fed'i Waaqa barbaadattani tana, guyyaani baafama kana!" 
2Corinthians6:3 Nu nama tokole ka wollaala huji teenna argu imfeenu, tanaafi gufu daandi nama tokole keesa kayu imfeenu." 
2Corinthians6:4 Ammo waan tolchinu ch'ufa keesati aka hojattu Waaqa ufi agarsiisu feena. Gaargalafi d'ipufi hameenna ch'ufa inoobsina. 
2Corinthians6:5 Ya nu d'aanani, nu hid'ani, d'akhaani nu had'ani; ya hujiini ufi dad'absinne, hiriibafi sagale male yaane." 
2Corinthians6:6 Qulqulloomafi beekhumafi obsafi arjoomaani, aka nu hojattu Waaqa, ya ufi agarsiimne; Lubbu Qulqullofi jaalala d'ugatiifi" 
2Corinthians6:7 d'aamsa keenna ka d'ugatiifi jabeenna Waaqaatiini. D'ugaani woraana wonte teenna, ta haanunifi ta ufira d'owarrunile." 
2Corinthians6:8 Nu guddisani, nu ch'eersani; nu arabsani, nu faarsani. Kiyyibdoole nuuni jed'ani, ammo nu d'uga dubbanna;" 
2Corinthians6:9 nama nami imbeenne nuuni jed'ani, ammo nami ch'ufti fuula nu beekha; waan nu doone sehani, ammo aka isani gartani nu injirra. Ato nu gaargalchanile, nu inijeemne;" 
2Corinthians6:10 ato nu lalefannele, nu hojja ch'ufa gammada qamna; hiyyeeyi fakaanna ammo nama heddu duroomsina; waan woma qamnu imfakaannu ammo waan ch'ufa inqamna." 
2Corinthians6:11 Jaalaani teenna ta Korintho jirtu! Nu ya diideesine waan ch'ufa isaniti himne, ya garaa keenna isaniti mullimne." 
2Corinthians6:12 Garaa keenna isani dura inhiinne; isaniti garaa keesani hid'e male. 
2Corinthians6:13 Anini aka waan isani ijoolle tiyya isaniti dubbad'a. Waan nu isani seenu isanileeni nu seha. Garaa keesani nuu bana! 
2Corinthians6:14 Nama ind'ugefatiinini haga taka inhojatiina, wonti suni intaatu. D'ugaafi wollaali wahela woli tahu indandaa? Ifsaafi dukantileeni woliini taati? Hiyyo." 
2Corinthians6:15 Kristofi Sheet'ani wold'aqu indandaani? Nama d'ugefateefi ka ind'ugefatiini maal woli iraa qabani? 
2Corinthians6:16 Mani Waaqa, waan harkaani boch'ani ka worri Waaqa imbeenne kad'atuuni wolintaani? Nu Mana Waaqa jiruuti! Akuma Waaqi ufiini jed'e, Anini mana kiyya worra woliini jaarad'e worra woliini taa, anini Waaqa worraa tahe, worrileeni gumi tiyya taha." 
2Corinthians6:17 Tanaafi Aabbooni waan jed'u, Worra lakisa, biraa yaa. Waan t'uri qaba intuqiina, yoosi anini isani fud'ad'a." 
2Corinthians6:18 Anini abba keesani tahe, isani ilmaani tiyya ta d'iiratifi ta dubra taatani, Aabbo Guddaani akana jed'a." 
2Corinthians7:1 Kakhu tana ch'ufa nuu khakhatani, jaalaani tiyya! Tanaafi waan nafafi lubbu t'ureesa laganna, qulqulloomne soda Waaqaa keesa tau malle." 
2Corinthians7:2 Garaa keesani keesati fulla nuu mid'aasa. Nu wollaala namutu intolchine, namu imballeesine, yokhaani woma nama ira imfud'anne." 
2Corinthians7:3 Anini waan kana aka wollaala isaniti muru injed'u; akuma anini qara jed'e, waan nu guddo isani jaalannuufi nu hojja ch'ufa woliini jirra, yo jirruufi yo doonele." 
2Corinthians7:4 Anini guddo waan keesani beekha, maro teesaniifi ufi koorsa! Gaargala keenna ch'ufa keesati anini garaa illaafu ammo gammadaani qilit'ama." 
2Corinthians7:5 Eegi Makedoniani baanele nafi keenna boqota inarganne. Fulla ch'ufa gaargalafi woldidiisafi sodati jira garaa keenna keesa. 
2Corinthians7:6 Ammo Waaqi, ka worra garaa laafu jabeesu, nu jabeese Tito nuti arge." 
2Corinthians7:7 D'ufiisa isaa ch'allaaniti, ammo inni aka isani isa jabeesitani nuti odeese. Ammalle inni aka isani guddo na argu feetaniifi aka isani maro tiyya lalefatanifi ammalle aka isani kurfo jirtani aka na qarqaartani nati hime, tanaafi anini guddo gammade." 
2Corinthians7:8 Ato tatabeeni tiyya ta qara isani lalefachiiftele, anini waan t'aafeefi ingaabu. Yo sila aka tatabeeni suni haga diqa toko ch'alla isani lalefachiifte arge ufii gaaba." 
2Corinthians7:9 Ammo amma anini ingammada, maro isani lalefachiiseeniti, ammo maro lalefachaani teesani daandi teesani iraa isani gorsiteefi. Lalefacha suni Waaqati hujiini hojate, ammo nu woma isani intolchine." 
2Corinthians7:10 Lalefacha Waaqi hujiini hojate suniti garaa keesani gaargalche baafama isanii kenne, maro waan sunitiifi nu ufi ingaabinu! Ammo lalefachaani nama duisaani d'ufti." 
2Corinthians7:11 Waan Waaqi lalefacha teesani tolche ilaala: isani jabaattani ufi dubbattani, dalantani, rifattani, na hereddani, owitani aka d'uga tolchani barbaaddani! Dubbi tana ch'ufa keesa aka nama wollaala inqamne ufi mulliftani." 
2Corinthians7:12 Tanaafi ato anini tatabe suni t'aafele, anini maro nama wollaala tolcheefi maro nama wollaala iti tolchanifile int'aamne. Ammo woni anini t'aafeefi aka fuula Waaqa durati aka isani nu jaalattani diideese agarsiisu." 
2Corinthians7:13 Maro waan kanatifi nu garaa jabaanne. Nu garaa ch'alla injabaanne; ammo gammada Tito arginaani guddo ufile gammanne; isani ch'ufti Tito qarqaartani gammachiiftani. 
2Corinthians7:14 Anini guddo waan keesani isati odeese, isanileeni na inch'eersine. Nu hojja ch'ufa ya d'uga isaniti dubbanne. Akasuma wonti nu Titoni jenne ya d'uga taate." 
2Corinthians7:15 Jaalalti inni isani jaalatu ya iti daramte duuba, yo inni aka isaniini ch'ufti kurfo jirtani qaabate, aka isani sodaafi naasuuni isa fud'attani." 
2Corinthians7:16 Anini guddo gammada waan anini dandae garaa tokooni isani heregad'uufi. 
2Corinthians8:1 Oboleyaani, nu waan eebiti Waaqa gumi Makedoniati tolchite isani beesisu feena." 
2Corinthians8:2 Gaargali worri argate guddo worra ilaalate; ammo guddo gammadani arjoomaani namaa wo kennani, ato hiyyeeyi tahanile." 
2Corinthians8:3 Waan anini isaniti himu, haguma dandaani kennani, ammalle waan suni ira;" 
2Corinthians8:4 worri fed'i ufitiini aka gumi Yudea qarqaarani guddo nu kad'ate. 
2Corinthians8:5 Nu waan worri waan kana tolchu inseene! Qaraa fiit'e Aabbo ufi kennani; lameesole, fed'i Waaqa gula nule ufi kennani." 
2Corinthians8:6 Tanaafi nu Tito, ka huji tana iti keyate, kad'anne, aka inni dura dabre isani qarqaare huji jaalala tana woliini hobaaftani." 
2Corinthians8:7 Isani waan qabdani ch'ufa keesa guddo dureeyi: d'ugefachaafi hasaafi hubachaafi qarqaarsa aka ch'ufatiifi jaalala teenna keesaleti. Tanaafi nu isani kad'anna, aka huji jaalala tana keesaleti jabaattani." 
2Corinthians8:8 Anini seera isanii tolchuuti injiru. Ammo haga biyyiti d'ibiini qarqaaru feete isani agarsiise, duuba aka jaalalti teesani ta d'uga argu fed'a." 
2Corinthians8:9 Isani eeba Aabbo keenna Yeso Kristo imbeetani: inni dureesa, ammo maro teesaniifi ufi hiyyoomse, aka hiyyuma ufitiini isani duroomsu." 
2Corinthians8:10 Waan kana anini akana herega: sila ira isanii goomti yo waan ganna dabre iti keyatani hobaaftani. Isani worra qaraa ka waan kana tolche; suni ch'allaaniti, ammo isani worruma qara ka fed'i ufitiini waan kana tolchu fed'e." 
2Corinthians8:11 Dura deema hobaasa! Jabaad'a, aka akuma iti keyattani hobaaftani, ammalle waan qabdaniini hobaasa." 
2Corinthians8:12 Yo isani guddo wo kennu feetani, Waaqi waan isani qabdani ka isani baaftani fud'ata, waan isani inqamne imbarbaadu." 
2Corinthians8:13 Anini baa ulfo nama d'ibi iraa fuud'e isani ira kayuuti injiru; ammo waan isani amma guddo wo qabdaniifi nama gaargala qabu qarqaaru maltani. Yoosi gaafa isani gaargala qabdani ammo worri waan guddo qabu worrileeni isani qarqaara. Kara kanaani nama ch'ufa wolqitt'eesani. 
2Corinthians8:14  
2Corinthians8:15 Akuma t'aafiini jettu, Nami nama ch'ufa ira guurate guddo inqabu arge, ammo ka diqo guurate guddo qaba arge." 
2Corinthians8:16 Nu guddo galata Waaqaa deebimna ka Tito aka nu isani qarqaarre isani qarqaarsiise! 
2Corinthians8:17 Inni waan nu isa kad'anne ch'alla ee injenne; ammo ufi baase, aka gara keesani deemu heregate." 
2Corinthians8:18 Isa woliini oboleesa gumiini ch'ufti saade aka inni Odu Dansa odeesu beetu ergina. 
2Corinthians8:19 Suni malele, gumiini isa fohate, aka inni haga nu huji jaalala ta guddinna Aabbo hojanne nama qarqaarru nu woliini deemu." 
2Corinthians8:20 Nu guddo ufi qorqoranna, aka nami tokoleeni haga nu hori baasani kana harkaa qamnu nu inhimanne." 
2Corinthians8:21 Nu waan qajeela fuula Waaqa dura ch'allaaniti ammo fuula namale durati tolchu feena. 
2Corinthians8:22 Tanaafi nu oboleesa keenna worra woliini ergine; nu ya maro heddu isa ilaalanne, aka inni hojja ch'ufa aka nama qarqaaru kurfo jiru argine. Amma maro inni guddo isani d'ugefatuufi haga qarale ira kurfo jira aka isani qarqaaru." 
2Corinthians8:23 Yo isani waan Tito d'agayu feetani, inni wahela kiyya, ka na woliini hojatu, aka isani qarqaaru; ammo oboleyaani d'ibi ta isa woliini deemtu gumiti fohate, isiileeni Kristo guddifti." 
2Corinthians8:24 Jaalala teesani worra agarsiisa, aka gumiini ch'ufti quufte, aka wonti nu ufi guddimnuufi ch'ufti d'uga agartu." 
2Corinthians9:1 Wonti waan qarqaarsa gumi Waaqa ta Yudea keesa jirtuuti ergani ka anini t'aafuufi injirtu. 
2Corinthians9:2 Anini aka isani nama qarqaaru feetani imbeekha, tanaafi anini waan kana worra Makedoniati odeese. Anini waan jed'e, Oboleyaani Akaya jirtu haga ganna dabreti kurfo jirti aka worra qarqaartu. Hujiini teesani tunini ya nama heddu kokhorsite." 
2Corinthians9:3 Anini amma oboleyaani tana gara keesani erga, aka wonti nu waan keesaniini ufi guddimneefi d'ara intaane; ammo, akuma anini jed'e, isani qarqaarsa keesaniini kurfo taha." 
2Corinthians9:4 Yo akasi intahiini, gaafa worri Makedonia na woliini d'ufe aka isani kurfo intahiini arge, guddo nuu ch'eera, ch'eera keesani lafa d'aaba, waan nu guddo isani d'ugefanneefi!" 
2Corinthians9:5 Tanaafi anini herege oboleyaani tana kad'ad'e, aka worri nu dura dabre waan inkennina jettani durati kurfeesani. Gaafa anini d'ufe ya kurfo taate, Duuba wonti sunini aka isani irre male kennu feetani agarsiifti." 
2Corinthians9:6 Waan kana qaabad'a: nami sanyi diqo oobru mid'aani diqo murata; ka sanyi guddo oobru mid'aani guddo murata. 
2Corinthians9:7 Tanaafi nami ch'ufti waan kutate ha baasuuti, garaa tokooni, irreeni injirtu, waan Waaqi nama gammadaani wo kennu jaalatuufi." 
2Corinthians9:8 Waaqi waan isani feetani ira isanii kennu indandaa, aka isani waan feetani ch'ufa argattani ammalle ira isanii haftu, aka huji dansa ch'ufaani guutattani." 
2Corinthians9:9 Akuma t'aafiini jettu, Inni arjoomaani hiyyeeyii kenna, dansumti isaa haga hegeri teeti." 
2Corinthians9:10 Waaqi ka sanyi oobranifi qit'a nyaatani namaa kennu, sanyi isani feetani ch'ufa isanii kenna ammalle inni sanyi suni imbaasa, aka mid'aani guddo d'altu; maro arjooma keesanitiifi." 
2Corinthians9:11 Waaqi isani duroomsa aka isani hojja ch'ufa arjaa taatani; duuba nami hedduuni maro waan isani baaftani harka keennati kennitani, ka nu worraa kenninnefi galata Waaqa deebisa." 
2Corinthians9:12 Hujiini isani hojatani tunini, gumi Waaqati, waan isiini feetu ch'alla intolchitu, ammo galata gudda Waaqa deebifti." 
2Corinthians9:13 Hujiini teesani tunini d'ugefacha teesani agarsiifti, tanaafi nami hedduuni Waaqa guddisa, waan isani akuma d'uga Odu Dansa ta Kristo jaalattani guuttaniifi, ammalle waan isani arjoomtani worraafi nama d'ibile geetaniifi." 
2Corinthians9:14 Tanaafi worri garaa jaalalatiini isani kad'ata, maro eeba guddo ta Waaqi isanii kenneefi." 
2Corinthians9:15 Maro qarqaarsa gudda kanatifi galata Waaqaa deebisu malle. 
2Corinthians10:1 Anini Pauloni, isani kad'ad'a, yo anini isani woliini jiru diqo daafana naani jed'ani, ammo yo fago jiru guddo janna naani jed'ani. Anini isani kad'ad'a, dansoomafi naasu Kristotiini:" 
2Corinthians10:2 Gaafa anini d'ufu aka anini jannooma kiyya suni agarsiisu na intolchiina; wonti akanatiifi anini worra, Isani waan lafa tanaatiifi hojattani nuuni jed'u diqole insodaad'u." 
2Corinthians10:3 D'uguma nu lafa tana keesa teenna; ammo nu maro waan lafatiifi inhaanu. 
2Corinthians10:4 Mihi nu waan lafa tanatiini haanu ka lafatiiniti, ammo ka jabeenna Waaqaati, ka fulla jabdu ch'ufa balleesu dandau. Nu wolmormiti d'ara ch'ufa balleesine," 
2Corinthians10:5 waan nu gufachiisa ka kara keesa jira, ka Waaqa hubachu nama d'owa balleesina: herega keenna ch'ufa Kristo kennina, aka inni mohatu." 
2Corinthians10:6 Eegi isani aka nama d'uga ufi agarsiiftani, nu kurfo jirra aka huji hamtu ch'ufa balleesinu." 
2Corinthians10:7 Isani waan ch'ufa gama ala laltani. Eennu nami nama Kristo ufi sehu? Nami suni ha ammalle waan ufi hereguuti, wonti akasitiifi nuleeni akuma isaa nama Kristoti." 
2Corinthians10:8 Anini diqo haganale inch'eerfad'u, ato jabeenna Aabbooni nuu kenne kanaafi diqo ufi guddisele — jabeenna isani ijaaru male, ka isani balleesuniti." 
2Corinthians10:9 Anini nama tatabe tiyyaani isani sodaachiisu tahu imfed'u. 
2Corinthians10:10 Nami gari waan jed'u, Tatabeeni Paulo guddo jajabdu, ammo yo inni nu woliini jiru inni guddo laafa, dubbini isaa woma imbaatu jed'ani." 
2Corinthians10:11 Nami akana kunini, aka dubbini yo nu fago jirru t'aamnuufi yo nu d'io jirru dubbannu taka, ha hubatuuti." 
2Corinthians10:12 Nu jara ufi guddisuuni diqole dandeenne wolbira ufi inqamnu. Worri guddo daalle! Worri seera ufumaani tolfate, duuba seera suniini ufi qorani!" 
2Corinthians10:13 Nu haga dabarre ufi inguddimnu; haguma Waaqi nu herege ch'alla ufi herenna, heregi suni huji nu jiddu teesaniti hojannu." 
2Corinthians10:14 Isanileeni herega suni keesa jirtani, tanaafi nu gaafa gara keesani d'umne herega suni indabarre, gaafa Odu Dansa ta Kristo isanii d'umneeni." 
2Corinthians10:15 Tanaafi nu waan huji nami d'ibiini hojateefi, ta qooda keenna keesa injirre jenne ufi inguddimnu. Ammo, nu inabdanna aka d'ugefachaani teesani guddatte nu huji hagasi ira dansa hojachu dandeennu, ammo qooda Waaqi nu herege gula." 
2Corinthians10:16 Yoosi dandeenne Odu Dansa lafa isani duuba keesaleti odeesina, aka nu huji oobru abba d'ibi keesati hojataniifi ufi inguddimne." 
2Corinthians10:17 Ammo akuma t'aafiini jettu, Nami ufi guddisu fed'u, ha huji Aabbooni hojatefiini ufi guddisu." 
2Corinthians10:18 Wonti akanatiifi nami, yo Waaqi waan isaa dansa heregu ch'alla dansa taha, yo inni waan ufi dansa hereguuniti." 
2Corinthians11:1 Yo anini diqo daalle tahele naa obsa, anini isani kad'ad'a." 
2Corinthians11:2 Anini maro teesaniifi hinaafa akuma Waaqi maro teesani hinaafu; wonti akanatiifi isani intala game ta anini nama toko ch'alla kenne fakaattani; nami sunileeni Kristo. 
2Corinthians11:3 Anini insodaad'a; hegeri qalbiini teesani hamaatte jaalala Kristo qulqullo lakiftani — akuma bofi Hawai malteeni sobe. 
2Corinthians11:4 Isani nama d'ufe waan Kristo d'ibi isaniti hasau ch'ufa imfud'attani, ka nu isaniti hasoomneniti; ammalle isani lubbufi odu d'ibi ta Lubbufi Odu Dansa nu isaniti odeesine imfakaanne fud'attani." 
2Corinthians11:5 Waan ani sehu, anini worra ergattu ufiini jed'u suni kara tokoleeni maand'aniti!" 
2Corinthians11:6 Anini hegeri guddo dubbachu imbeekhu, ammo hubacha inuma qaba; waan kana nu ya maro ch'ufaafi kara ch'ufaani isaniti himne." 
2Corinthians11:7 Anini gaafa Odu Dansa ta Waaqa isaniti odeese woma tokole isani ira imfud'anne; anini ufi diqeese aka isani guddisu. Waan kana anini wollaala tolche? 
2Corinthians11:8 Gaafa anini jiddu teesani hojad'e, gumi fulla d'ibiti hori na baase. Anini worra dura wo fud'ad'e isaniini qarqaare." 
2Corinthians11:9 Gaafa isani woliini jiru, anini yo hori fed'ele, isani ingaargalchine; wonti akanatiifi oboleyaani Makedonia d'ufte waan anini fed'u ch'ufa naa kennite. Akuma duri tolche hegerile intolcha: Anini haguma jiru baa ulfo isaniti imfahu!" 
2Corinthians11:10 D'uga Kristotiini kakhad'a, haga anini lafa Akaya tana keesa jiru nami tokoleeni dandae dubbi tiyya tana ind'aareesu." 
2Corinthians11:11 Anini maafi waan kana jed'a? Maro anini isani injaalanneefi? Aka anini isani jaalad'u Waaqileeni imbeekha! 
2Corinthians11:12 Anini waan amma tolchu kana dura deeme tolchu fed'a, aka ergattuuni d'ibiini taani qoomni argatte, Aka keesani hojanna jette ufi inodeesine." 
2Corinthians11:13 Worri sunini ergattu d'ugatiiniti, worri ergattu d'ara, ta waan huji ufi d'ara dubbate ergattu Kristo ta d'uga ufi fakeesitu." 
2Corinthians11:14 Dubbini tuni mama inqabdu! Sheet'anileeni ufi jijire ergattu ifsaa ufi tolchu indandaa! 
2Corinthians11:15 Tanaafi yo ergattuuni isaa ufi jijirte ergattu d'uga ufi tolchitele waan diqole jabaatatiiniti. Gaafa muumme waan worraa male argatani. 
2Corinthians11:16 Anini dubbi tana ammalle iti deebie jed'a: nami tokoleeni daalle na insehiini. Ammo yo na seetanile, akuma daalle na fud'ad'a, aka anini waan diqo toko ta ufiini guddisu argad'u." 
2Corinthians11:17 Wonti anini amma dubbad'u kunini waan Aabbooni fed'uniti; waan ufi guddisiiti kana anini aka daalle dubbachu jira. 
2Corinthians11:18 Ammo maro nami hedduuni waan lafatiifi ufi guddisuufi anileeni akasi tolchu male. 
2Corinthians11:19 Isani guddo qalbi qabdani, tanaafi waan daalleeni jed'u dubbi male obsitani!" 
2Corinthians11:20 Nama isani mohatuufi ka isani koofisufi ka t'urura keesa isani buusufi ka isani tuffatufi ka isani d'abanaasu ch'ufa inu obsitani. 
2Corinthians11:21 Yo ch'eerale taate: nu waan akasi tolchu sodaanne! Ammo yo nami ufi guddisu dandae — aka daalle dubbad'a beekha — anileeni ufi guddisu indandaa. 
2Corinthians11:22 Yo worri Ebrania taate, anileeni Ebrania. Yo worri gosa Israeli taate, anileeni gosa Israeliti. Yo worri ilmaani Abrahamu taate, anileeni ilma Abrahamuti." 
2Corinthians11:23 Worri hojattu Kristoti? Aka maraata dubbad'a — ammo anini hojattu Kristo ka worra ira jiru. Anini ya worra ira hojad'e, ya worra ira na hid'ani, ya worra ira na d'aanani, ya worra ira duisati d'iaad'e." 
2Corinthians11:24 Guyya shani Yahudiini maro sodomi sagali lichooni na d'aante; 
2Corinthians11:25 Rumiini maro sadi uleeni na d'aante, maro toko d'akhaani na d'oosani; maro sadi hobolooni naani ch'ach'abde, gaafa toko guyya tokofi halkani toko bisaani keesa bule." 
2Corinthians11:26 Imaltu tiyya heddu keesati ya lubbu arge, maro bisaanitifi hattule; gosa tiyya ta Yahuditiifi gochiti d'ibileeni ya lubbu na nat'e; diraafi raasafi Galaanafi jaallani d'ara biraleeti ya lubbu arge." 
2Corinthians11:27 Hojja ch'ufa huji hojad'e gaargale; maro heddu hiriiba d'abe; ya beelae d'eebod'e; maro heddu sagalefi daofi woya fed'u d'abe. 
2Corinthians11:28 Waan d'ibi lafuma d'aabi, guyya ch'ufa baa ulfo qaba, hujiini gumi Waaqa ch'ufti na gubba jirti." 
2Corinthians11:29 Yo nami toko laafe, anileeni ya laafe; yo nami toko daba keesa buu, anini ilaalefad'a." 
2Corinthians11:30 Yo anini ufi guddisu male, waan laafinna kiyya agarsiisufi ufi guddisa." 
2Corinthians11:31 Maqaani Waaqa Abbaani Aabo keenna Yeso Kristo ha eebifamuuti, aka anini inkiyyimne inni imbeekha." 
2Corinthians11:32 Gaafa anini Damaski jiru, jaallabi hayyu Areta jala hojatu askarti kara dira keesa naqe, aka na qabdu." 
2Corinthians11:33 Ammo dadu keesa na kayani, qaa girgidaa keesaani lafa na buusani, jennaani kae baqad'e." 
2Corinthians12:1 Ato woma bahu d'ibaatele anini ufi guddisu male. Ammo anini amma waan daayyatiifi waan Aabbooni nati mullise dubbachu male. 
2Corinthians12:2 Anini nama Kristiana toko fuula beekha, ka ganna kud'ani afuri ka dabre gara Waaqa gubbati olfuud'ani (anini wonti kunini d'uguma taatule imbeekhu, hegeri inni daayya arge, Waaqa ch'allati beekha)." 
2Corinthians12:3 Anini ammalle iti deebie jed'a, Anini aka nama kana gara Waaqaa gubbati olfuud'ani imbeekha (ammalle, wonti kunini d'uguma taatule anini imbeekhu, wonti sunini daayya taatule imbeekhu Waaqa ch'allati beekha)," 
2Corinthians12:4 achiti inni waan arabi dandae injenne, ka afaani nama sila indubbanne d'agaye." 
2Corinthians12:5 Tanaafi anini waan nama kanatifi ufi guddisa; ammo waan kiyyaani ufi inguddisu, waan laafinna kiyya agarsiisa male." 
2Corinthians12:6 Yo anini ufi guddisu fed'e, anini sila daalle intahu; maro d'uga dubbad'eefi; ammo anini ufii inguddisu; wonti akanatiifi anini nama tokole ka na saadu infed'u, ammo aka inni waan anini tolcheefi ka anini jed'e ch'alla arge saadu fed'a." 
2Corinthians12:7 Ammo aka ufi guddisu na d'owani maro waan dansa ka anini argeetiifi, nafa kiyya keesa qoraatiini na woraante; wonti na d'ukubse suni aka ergattu Sheet'ana taate na gaargalchite ufi guddisu na d'owarte." 
2Corinthians12:8 Maro sadi anini waan kana Waaqa kad'ad'e, Nara fuud'i jed'eeni."
