2Corinthians12:9 Inni waan naani jed'e, Eebiti tiyya sii geeti; jabeenni kiyya hojja atini laafa waan gudda. Maro waan kanatifi anini guddo laafinna kiyyafi ufi guddisa, aka jabeenni Kristo na gubba tau." 
2Corinthians12:10 Anini laafinnafi arabaafi d'ibafi d'ipufi gargala maro Kristotiifi indidu. Wonti akasitiifi yo anini laafa anini guddo jabaad'a. 
2Corinthians12:11 Anini aka daalle tahu jira, ammo isaniti na tolche. Nami sila na owisu male isani. Ato anini woma tahu d'ibaad'ele, anini ergattu teesani suni maand'aniti." 
2Corinthians12:12 Waan aka anini ergattu na agarsiisu ch'ufa kara obsatiini jiddu teesani keesati tolchani; akheekhafi huji jabdufi waan mama jiddu teesaniti tolchani. 
2Corinthians12:13 Wonti d'ibiini anini isanii tolche taka gumi d'ibi intolchiini maani? Qarqaarsa ch'alla naa kenna isani injed'iini. Naa araarama, yo anini waan hamtu isani tolche!" 
2Corinthians12:14 Marooni sadeeso ta anini imaltu gara keesani d'ufu tana, anini diqole ulfinna isaniti tahu imfed'u. Anini isani fed'a male, hori keesani imfed'u. Ijoolleeni abbaafi haad'a ufi nyaachisu himmalle ammo abbaafi haati ijoolle ufi nyaachisu malte." 
2Corinthians12:15 Anini waan qabu ch'ufa gammadaani baasa, nafa kiyyale, aka isani qarqaaru. Yo anini guddise isani jaalad'e, jaalalti teesani dandeete diqaatti?" 
2Corinthians12:16 Yo anini duri baa ulfo isaniti tahu d'ibaad'ele, nami gari waan jed'u, Inni malte worrati d'aate worra sobe." 
2Corinthians12:17 Akamiini? Anini nama tokole isaniti erge karaa suniini isani dabse? 
2Corinthians12:18 Anini Tito kad'ad'e, aka inni deemu, oboleesa d'ibile isa woliini erge. Titoti isani dabse? Anaafi inni herega takafi adaba taka inqamnu?" 
2Corinthians12:19 Hegeri isani waan nu haguma duriiti ufi dubbachu jirru nu seetani. Hiyyo, nu waan Kristoni nuu dubbachu fed'u dubbanna, fuula Waaqa durati, ammalle waan nu tolchinu ch'ufa, jaalaani tiyya, isaniini qarqaara." 
2Corinthians12:20 Anini insodaad'a aka yo ani achiini bahe isani aka anini fed'u injirtani, anileeni hegeri aka isani feetani injiru. Hegeri anini woldidiisafi qotefi dalansufi ufi jaalachafi arabaafi woli hamachafi ufi g guddisiitifi hameenna arga." 
2Corinthians12:21 Insodaad'a, aka yo anini ammalle d'ufu, Waaqi kiyya fuula keesani durati na diqeesa, ammalle aka anini worra duri daba tolche, ammo hameenna suni ka aka daba algaloomatiifi ka d'araa hamtu ira indeebiini bohu." 
2Corinthians13:1 Marooni sadeeso ta anini imaltu gara keesani d'ufu tana. Kajellaani ch'ufti d'uga lama sadi qabaachu malte, akuma t'aafiini jettu." 
2Corinthians13:2 Anini worra duri daba tolcheefi nama kaani ch'ufa gorsu fed'a; anini durile ya jed'e, gaafa imaltu lameeso gara keesani, d'ufe, ammo ammalle injed'a, ka amma isani iraa fago jiru: gaafa anini taka tana ammalle d'ufu, nami tokoleeni gaargala duraa imbahu." 
2Corinthians13:3 Hojja suni aka Kristoni afaani kiyyaani dubbatu inargitani. Yo inni woi isani tolchu inni laafaaniti, ammo jabeenna ufi agarsiisa." 
2Corinthians13:4 Ato laafinnaani maskali gubbati isa ijeesanile, jabeenna Waaqaatiini amma jira. Nuleeni isa keesa lalaafo; ammo jabeenna Waaqa ka gara keesani jiruuni isa woliini teenna." 
2Corinthians13:5 Ufi ilaala, ufi qora, aka, d'ugefacha keesa teetani ufi agartani. Isani aka Kristo Yesoni isani keesa jiru beetu? Yo isani ufi injibaatiini." 
2Corinthians13:6 Hegeri aka nu ufi injibaatiini inagartani. 
2Corinthians13:7 Nu Waaqa kad'anna, aka isani daba keesa inseenne — aka nu waan dansa hojanne dabsanne agarsiiftuuniti, ammo aka isani waan qajeela tolchitani, ato nu nama ufi jibbaate fakaannele." 
2Corinthians13:8 Nu dandeenne d'uga Waaqa iyakinu, ammo inhojannaafi." 
2Corinthians13:9 Nu hojja laamne ammo isani jabaattani ingammanna. Tanaafi nu Waaqa kad'anna, aka isani qit'e taatani." 
2Corinthians13:10 Maro waan kanatifi anini tatabe tana, ato fago isani ira jiraad'ele, isaniti t'aafa; aka yo d'ufu, anini jabeenna Aabbooni na kenneeni isaniti indalanne, jabeenna isaniini jabeesu ka isaniini balleesuniti." 
2Corinthians13:11 Amma, oboleyaani tiyya nagayati! Waan qit'ooma barbaada; waan inni jed'u ch'aqasa; wold'aqa, nagayaani woliini taa. Yoosi Waaqi nagayaatiifi ka jaalala isani woliini taa." 
2Corinthians13:12 D'ungo oboleyaanumatiini wold'ungad'a. 
2Corinthians13:13 Gumiini Waaqa ch'ufti nagaya isanii d'aamti. 
2Corinthians13:14 Eebiti Aabbo keenna Yeso Kristo, jaalalti ta Waaqa wold'aqisi Lubbu Qulqulloleeni ha nuu ch'ufa woliini tau." 
Galatians1:1 Maqaani kiyya Paulo, ka yaamichi aka anini ergattu tahu namaani ind'ufiini yokhaani nama ira ind'ufiini, ammo Yeso Kristofi Waaqa Abba, ka duisa keesaa isaa kaase, iraa d'ufe." 
Galatians1:2 Oboleyaani arma na woliini jirtu ch'ufti gumi Galatia jirtu nagaya d'aamti. 
Galatians1:3 Waaqa Abba keennafi Aabbo Yeso Kristoni eebafi nagaya isanii kennina. 
Galatians1:4 Aka d'aloota hama kana keesaa nu baasu Kristoni maro daba keennatifi ufi baase, fed'i Waaqa Abba keennati guute." 
Galatians1:5 Guddinni haga hegerile gara Waaqa tahinna! Amini. 
Galatians1:6 Isani guddo na mamsiiftani! Yoosu nama eeba Kristotiini isani yaame lakiftani, odu d'ibi gula yaatani." 
Galatians1:7 Oduuni d'ibiini injirtu, ammo anini waan kana, waan nami gari ka isani gaargalche odu Kristo garagalchu fed'u jiruufi jed'e." 
Galatians1:8 Ammo yo nuu, yokhaani malaikaani gubbaa baate, odu ta nu isani barsiimne isani ira gorsite ta d'ibi isaniti odeesite, nami sunini ha abaaramu." 
Galatians1:9 Nu waan kana qara jenne, ammalle anini injed'a: Yo nami tokoleeni odu isani qara fud'attani ira ta d'ibi isaniti odeese, nami suni ha abaaramu!" 
Galatians1:10 Wonti kunini waan anini jaalala namaa barbaadu fakaatti? Hiyyo! Anini jaalala Waaqa ch'alla barbaada! Anini nama heddu ka na owisu fed'a? Yo sila waan suni fed'e, anini hojattu Kristo intahu." 
Galatians1:11 Waan kana isaniti hima, oboleyaani. Dubbini dansaani anini odeesu ta nami mata ufitiini baafateeniti." 
Galatians1:12 Anini nama tokole ira inarganne, yokhaani nami tokoleeni na imbarsiimne, ammo Yeso Kristoti nati mullise." 
Galatians1:13 Aka anini duri tahe, gaafa aada Yahudi keesa jiru, ya d'ageetani, aka anini naasu male gumi Waaqa gaargalche, aka balleesu iti kae." 
Galatians1:14 Anini hariya tiyya ch'ufa aada Yahudi keesati ira jira. Aada ababoota teenna aka male jabeese. 
Galatians1:15 Ammo Waaqi, eeba isaatiini, ato anini ind'alatiini na yaame na fohate, aka anini isaa hojad'u." 
Galatians1:16 Gaafa inni Ilma isaa nati mullise, aka anini gosa d'ibiti Odu Dansa odeesu, anini gara nama tokole gorsa ind'anne," 
Galatians1:17 yokhaani Yerusalemu d'aqe worra na durati ergattu tahe argu ind'anne. Ammo, maro tokotu, lafa Arafti d'aqe, jennaani Damaskiti deebie." 
Galatians1:18 Eegi ganna sadi anini Yerusalemu d'aqe, aka odu Kefa iraa fuud'u, torbaani lama fulla isaa tae." 
Galatians1:19 Anini ergattu d'ibi tokole ingarre, Yakobo oboleesa Aabbo male." 
Galatians1:20 Wonti anini t'aafu kunini waan d'ugaati, anini kiyyibuuti injiru, Waaqi na didinna!" 
Galatians1:21 Eegi suni anini lafa Shamutiifi ta Kilikia keesa deeme. 
Galatians1:22 Haga kana ch'ufa gumiini Kristiana ta Yudea keesa jirtu fuulale na imbeetu. 
Galatians1:23 Waan biyyiti wolti hasoofte ch'alla beekhani: Namichi duri nu gaargalche kaani amma d'ugefacha duri balleesu fed'e taani tae barsiisa! jed'ani. 
Galatians1:24 Tanaafi maro tiyyaafi worri Waaqaa gaalata deebise. 
Galatians2:1 Eegi ganna kud'ani afuri Barnaba woliini Yerusalemu d'anne, Titole woliyaane." 
Galatians2:2 Wonti anini deemeefi waan Waaqi, aka anini deemu male, na garsiiseefi. Kora koba keesati anini odu duri gosa d'ibiti odeese jaaroleti hasae. Anini huji tiyya ta duritiifi ta ammalle aka isiini baddu imfeene." 
Galatians2:3 Wahela kiyya Tito, ato inni Griki tahele, nami tokoleeni Qabanqaba qabad'u injenneeni," 
Galatians2:4 ammo jari gari oboleyaani ufi tolche, qabanqaba qabuufi fed'e worri suni aka jajuusa gumi teenna seene, aka balchooma nu Kristo Yeso keesa qamnu argani, Tisse nu tolchu fed'ani." 
Galatians2:5 Nu diqo tokole worra jala illaamne, waan nu d'uga Odu Dansa balleesu imfeeneefi." 
Galatians2:6 Ammo worri nama gugurda fakaattu anini waan kana maro waan worra iyaaleefi jed'a: Waaqi nafa nama gula nama inqoru jaaroleeni tuni waan haraa ka heredde tokole na indarre. 
Galatians2:7 Ammo worri, aka Waaqi huji Odu Dansa gosa d'ibiti odeesani nati kenne arge, akuma inni ta Yahuditi odeesani Petroti kenne." 
Galatians2:8 Jabeenna Waaqaatiini anini ergattu gosa d'ibi barsiiftu tahe, akuma Petroni ta Yahudi tahe." 
Galatians2:9 Yakobofi Petrofi Yohanani, jari jaarole fakaatu, aka Waaqi huji tana naa kenne arginaani, naafi Barnabale ee jed'ani nu gula galani, nu nama taka taane, gosa d'ibi keesa hojanna, worri ha Yahudi keesa hojatu jenne woliti buufanne." 
Galatians2:10 Wonti worri nuuni jed'e, Nama keenna ka gaargala qabu ch'alla qaabad'a; sunileeni woma qara garaani na fed'e." 
Galatians2:11 Gaafa Petroni Antiokia d'ufe, anini gumi durati isaani morme, waan inni wollaala tolcheefi." 
Galatians2:12 Ato nami Yakoboni erge achiini imbahiini, Petroni gosa d'ibi woliini sagale nyaate. Ammo worri kaani d'umnaani inni gosa d'ibi woliini sagale nyaachu dide, waan inni jara gosa d'ibi qabanqaba qabuufi fed'e kaani sodaateefi." 
Galatians2:13 Oboleyaani Yahudi taani Petro woliini sodaate; Barnabaleeni sodaate worra gula deebie. 
Galatians2:14 Aka worri daandi qajeela waan d'uga ta Odu Dansa gula indeemne arginaani, anini gumi durati waan Petroni jed'e, Atini gosa Yahuditi, ammo qara ufiyu aka gosa d'ibi tau jirta, aka Yahuditiiniti. Akamiini duuba dandeete gosa d'ibiini, Aka Yahudi taa jetta re?" 
Galatians2:15 D'uguma, d'alooti keenna Yahudi, gosa d'ibi ta dabdeeniti." 
Galatians2:16 Ammo nu imbeenna, aka d'ugefacha Yeso Kristotiini d'uga namaa heregani, Seera guutitiini woma keesa injirtu. Wonti nuleeni Kristo Yeso d'ugefanneefi aka d'ugefacha nu Kristo d'ugefanneeni d'uga nuu heregani, ammo Seera guutitiini intaatu. Wonti akanatiifi Seera guutitiini nama tokole d'uga inheregani." 
Galatians2:17 Yo, ato nu Kristo keesa d'uga nuu heregani barbaannu, ammo akuma gosa d'ibi daba nurati argani Kristoni waan dabaatiini d'ufe re? Hiyyo, akasiiniti!" 
Galatians2:18 Yo anini waan duri ch'abse deebie ijaare, aka anini nama Seera ch'absuu jiru agarsiifti." 
Galatians2:19 Seera gula anini ya due Seerati na ijeese aka anini Waaqaa jiraad'u. Ya Kristo woliini mukha irati na fannisani," 
Galatians2:20 nami amma jiru ananiti, Kristoti na keesa jira male. Jireenna anini amma jiru kana maro d'ugefacha Ilma Waaqaatiifi jira, ka na jaalate jireenna ufi naa baase." 
Galatians2:21 Anini eeba Waaqa indidu. Yo Seera guutitiini d'uga namaa heregani, yoosi Kristoni ufumaa due!" 
Galatians3:1 Isani worri Galatia guddo daalle! Entu isani falfale? Aka Yeso Kristoni maskali gubbaa due! Isani ya iluma teesaniini agartani. 
Galatians3:2 Waan toko ch'alla nati hima: Seera guunnaani Lubbu Waaqa argatani mo, Odu Dansa d'ageetani d'ugefannaani argattani?" 
Galatians3:3 Akami akana daallooftani? Qara Lubbu Waaqaatiini iti keyattani; akamiini jabeenna keesaniini hobaaftani? 
Galatians3:4 Wonti isani barattani tokoleeni woma isanii imbaane? D'uguma, ya wo isanii baate!" 
Galatians3:5 Hojja Waaqi Lubbu ufi isanii kenne waan mama jiddu teesaniti tolchu, inni maro isani Seera guuttaniifi waan kana tolcha mo waan isani Odu Dansa d'ageetani d'ugefattaniifi tolcha?" 
Galatians3:6 Akuma t'aafiini waan Abrahamu dubbatte waan jettu: Inni Waaqa d'ugefannaani maro d'ugefacha isaatiifi Waaqi d'uga heregeefi. 
Galatians3:7 Isani hubachu maltani aka worri d'ugefacha qabu ch'ufti d'aloota Abrahamu. 
Galatians3:8 T'aafiini, aka Waaqi d'ugefachaani gosa d'ibi d'uga hereguufi duru argite, jennaani t'aafiini Odu Dansa duriyu Abrahamu barsiifte waan jette, Maro teetiifi Waaqi nama lafa jiru ch'ufa eebisa." 
Galatians3:9 Abrahamuni d'ugefateti eeba argate; tanaafi nama d'ugefatu ch'ufa akuma isaa eebisani. 
Galatians3:10 Worri Seera guutiti heregatu ya abaarame. Wonti akanatiifi t'aafiini waan jettu, Nami waan Seera keesati t'aafani ch'ufa gula indeemne ya abaarame jetti." 
Galatians3:11 Nama dandaani Seeraani, Waaqa durati, d'uga inhereganiifi, tuni dare inqabdu; wonti akanatiifi t'aafiini, Nami d'ugefachaani d'uga hereganiifi injiraata jetti." 
Galatians3:12 Ammo Seeri d'ugefacha imfed'u. Taatule akuma t'aafiini jettu, Nami waan Seeri jed'u ch'ufa guutu sunumaani jiraata jetti." 
Galatians3:13 Ammo Kristoni, ufi abaarsa nu tahe, abaarsa Seeri nutiini d'ufu jala nu baase. Akuma t'aafiini jettu, Nami mukha irati fannisani ya abaarame." 
Galatians3:14 Wonti Kristoni waan kana tolcheefi aka eeba Waaqi Abrahamu kakhate, maro Yeso Kristotiifi gosa d'ibilee kennani, ammalle aka nuleeni maro d'ugefachatiifi Lubbu Waaqi kakhate arganu." 
Galatians3:15 Oboleyaani me, fakeenna kanaani hubad'a: Yo nami lama woi ira wold'aqe tatabe gubba t'aafani, nami tokoleeni dandae wold'aqisa suni inch'absu, yokhaani iti indaru." 
Galatians3:16 Waaqi kakhu ufi Abrahamufi ilma isaati khakhate. Ilmaani isaa injettu, ammo Ilmuma kanke jetti, akasi jechaani nama toko ch'alla, Kristo, jechu." 
Galatians3:17 Wonti anini jechu fed'u tana: Waaqi wold'aqisa tolche aka guutu kakhate. Seeri ka ganna d'ibba afuritifi sodoma eegi suni d'ufe dandae wold'aqisa balleesee kakhu Waaqa guutamu ind'owu. 
Galatians3:18 Wonti akanatiifi yo d'aalti Seeraani taate, yoosi kakhuuni intaatu. Taatule Waaqi Abrahamuti kenne, waan inni isaati kakhateefi." 
Galatians3:19 Seera maafi kennani re? Aka wollaalaani agarsiisanifi iti darani ammalle Seeri haga ilmi Abrahamu ka iti kakhatani immullatini ch'alla jira. Seera amma nama jiddu jiru kana harka malaikatini nama kennani. 
Galatians3:20 Ammo nama jiddu suni imfed'ani, yo nami toko ch'alla jiraate. Tokochi suni Waaqa." 
Galatians3:21 Wonti kunini aka Seeri khakhu Waaqaatiini morku agarsiifti? Hiyyo, akasiiniti! Wonti akanatiifi yo Seera nama jireesu namaa kennani, nama dandaani Seeraani d'uga hereganiifi." 
Galatians3:22 Ammo t'aafiini, Lafti ch'ufti jabeenna dabaa jala jirti yayu jette, aka worri d'ugefatu galata worra Yeso Kristo d'ugefatuuti kakhatani argatu." 
Galatians3:23 Ato hojjaani d'ugefacha ingahiini, Seeri nuu ch'ufa hid'e, haga d'ugefacha mullisaniti." 
Galatians3:24 Tanaafi gaafasi Seera suniti nu qorqorate, aka haga Kristoni d'ufuuti nu barsiisu, aka d'ugefachaani d'uga nuu heregani." 
Galatians3:25 Ammo amma d'ugefachaani ya d'ufte, nu barsiisa suni jala injirru." 
Galatians3:26 Wonti akanatiifi maro d'ugefachatiifi isani Yeso Kristo keesa ilmaani Waaqa taatani. 
Galatians3:27 Isaniini ch'ufti ka Kristo keesati batisani ya Kristo aka woya uyifattani. 
Galatians3:28 Tanaafi Yahudifi gochiti d'ibileeni takuma tisseefi balchaleeni takuma, d'iirafi nad'eenileeni takuma; Kristo Yeso keesati nami ch'ufti taka." 
Galatians3:29 Yo isani ka Kristo taatani, isani d'aloota Abrahamuti, waan Waaqi kakhate inargattani." 
Galatians4:1 Ilaala, gurba abba d'aalu haga inni diqa ch'ufa hojja ch'ufa akuma tisse tolchani, ato wonti ch'ufti ta isaa taatele." 
Galatians4:2 Haga inni diqa, nama isa qorqorate waan isaa ch'ufa tissuti jira, haga guyyaani abbaani d'aamatu gahuuti." 
Galatians4:3 Akasuma nuleeni duri, gaafa ijoolle, tisse qilleensa lafa fidu." 
Galatians4:4 Ammo hojjaani geennaani, Waaqi Ilma isaa erge. Haad'a namati isa d'ale, Seera Yahudi keesaa d'alate," 
Galatians4:5 aka worra Seera jala jiru balchoomsu, aka nu ilmaani Waaqaa taanu." 
Galatians4:6 Waaqi aka, aka nu ilmaani isaa agarsiisu, Lubbu Ilma ufi erge garaa keenna ke kaye, ta Aabbo, Aabbo kiyya jettu." 
Galatians4:7 Tanaafi armaa achi atini tisseeniti, ammo ilma. Waan atini ilma isaa taateefi, Waaqi d'aala ufi ch'ufa sii kenna." 
Galatians4:8 Duri isani Waaqa imbeetani, tanaafi tissele waan waaqa intahiini taatani." 
Galatians4:9 Ammo amma waan isani Waaqa beetaniifi yokhaani waan Waaqi isani beekhufi akamiini dandeetani herega lafa ka woma imbaane ka due deebitani? Maafi deebitani tissele worra tahu feetani? 
Galatians4:10 Isani guyyafi jiafi gannafi bara hereddani! 
Galatians4:11 Anini waan keesani insodaad'a. Hujiini anini jiddu teesaniti hojad'e ch'ufti ufumaa baddi? 
Galatians4:12 Anini isani kad'ad'a, oboleyaani tiyya, aka kiyya taha. Anileeni akuma keesani jira. Isani nati iwolaalle." 
Galatians4:13 Isani waan anini Odu Dansa qaraa fiit'e isaniti odeeseefi imbeetani; waan anini fayya d'abeefi. 
Galatians4:14 Taatule gaafasi isani na intufanne yokhaani na indinne, ato nafi kiyya gufu isani tahele. Ammo akuma sila malaika Waaqa fud'attani nale fud'attani; akuma Kristo Yeso fud'attani nale fud'attani." 
Galatians4:15 Isani gaafasi guddo gammaddani! Ammo amma maanti lafa d'ufe re? Wonti anini waan keesani jed'u tana: yo dandeetani gaafasi sila ilale ufi keesaa fuutani naa kennitani! 
Galatians4:16 Amma ya d'uga isaniti himnaani nyaapa keesani tahe? 
Galatians4:17 Jari kaani guddo isani sosoba, ammo dansumti keesa injirtu. Worri gargari nu baasu fed'a, aka waan worri isani sehu isanileeni worrale seetani." 
Galatians4:18 Duuba guddo dansa, yo waan dansaafi nama jaalatani wonti kunini yo ch'ufa dansa, yo anini isani woliini jiru ch'allaaniti." 
Galatians4:19 Ijoolle tiyya, akuma haati nama d'altu ch'ininfatte d'ukubsattu, anileeni isanifi d'ukubsad'a, haga Kristoni isani keesati uumamuuti." 
Galatians4:20 Yo sila isani woliini jiraad'e, guddo fed'a, aka waan keesani kara d'ibiini heregu. Anini guddo waan keesani yaada!" 
Galatians4:21 Isani worra Seera gula yau fed'u, anini wo gaafad'a: waan Seeri jed'u ind'ageetaniiyu?" 
Galatians4:22 Abrahamuni ilmaani lama qaba jed'a, toko niiti tisseti d'aleefi, kaani niiti balchaati d'ale." 
Galatians4:23 Ilmi niitiini tisse d'alte aada namaa gula d'alate, ammo kaani kakhu Waaqa gula d'alate." 
Galatians4:24 Waan kana aka mammaasa hima: nad'eeni lamaani wold'aqisa lama, toko Hajiri ta gaara Sinai ira d'ufte, d'alooti isii tissele." 
Galatians4:25 Hajiri gaara Sinai ka lafa Arafti keesa jiru fakaatti; isiini fakeenna dira gudda Yerusalemu amma jiru qabdi, ka nami isa keesa jiru ch'ufti tisse." 
Galatians4:26 Ammo Yerusalemuni gubbaa balcha, isiini haad'a teenna." 
Galatians4:27 Wonti akanatiifi t'aafiini waan jettu, Gammadi, niiti taka ilmaani ind'aliini! Iyi, qilit'ami, atini nami taka ch'ininfacha d'alisaa inargiini! Niitiini d'iirsi lakise niiti d'iirsa qabdu taani ira ilmaani d'alti." 
Galatians4:28 Amma isani, oboleyaani tiyya, ilmaani Waaqaati, maro kakhu isaatiifi, akuma Isaaqo." 
Galatians4:29 Gaafasi ilmi aada nama gula d'alate ilma Lubbu Waaqaatiini d'alate gaargalche; arrale akasuma. 
Galatians4:30 Ammo t'aafiini maani jetti? Niiti tissetiifi ilma isii gati, wonti akanatiifi ilmi niiti tisse ilma niiti balcha woliini abba ind'aalu jetti." 
Galatians4:31 Tanaafi oboleyaani tiyya, nu ilmaani niiti tissetiiniti, ammo ta niiti balchaati." 
Galatians5:1 Nu balchooma inqamna, Kristoni ya balcha nu tolche! Aka balcha ejaanja, iti deebitani tisse intahiina." 
Galatians5:2 Ch'aqasa! Anini, Pauloni, waan kana isaniti hima: yo isani qabanqaba qabattani, Kristoni woma isanii imbahu." 
Galatians5:3 Waan kana anini jabeesu fed'a, aka nama qabanqaba qabatu ch'ufati himu: nami suni Seera ch'ufa gula deemu male." 
Galatians5:4 Isani, worri Seeraani aka d'uga hereganiifi feetani, la Kristo iraa ufi kuttani. Isani eeba Waaqa ira ala jirtani." 
Galatians5:5 Nu inhereganna aka Waaqi d'uga nuu heregu; nu waan kana eeganna, jabeenna Lubbu Waaqa ta d'ugefacha teenna keesa hojattu suniini." 
Galatians5:6 Wonti akanatiifi yo nu Kristo Yeso keesa jiraanne, qabanqaba qabachafi qabachu baannaanile haga tokotu; wonti jabduuni d'ugefacha ta jaalalaani hojattu." 
Galatians5:7 Isani qara waan dansa tolchitani! Eentu d'ugaa guutu isani d'owe? Inni akamiini isani sobate? 
Galatians5:8 Waaqi ka isani yaame akasi intolchine. 
Galatians5:9 Bukho diqo tokoti sagale guddo bukheesa jed'ani. 
Galatians5:10 Ammo anini guddo Aabbo keesa isani d'ugefad'a, aka isani waan d'ibi inherenne; ammalle nama isani gaargalchu, abba fed'u taanaanile, Waaqi ingaargalcha." 
Galatians5:11 Ammo oboleyaani tiyya, yo anini Qabanqaba qabachu maltani jed'e barsiise, maafi ammalle na gaargalchani?" 
Galatians5:12 Yo sila worri isani gaargalchu ufi kolaase ira dansayu! 
Galatians5:13 Oboleyaani tiyya, isani aka balchaa taataniifi isani yaamani. Ammo d'araani nafa keesani balchooma dabsatte isani imohatiini. Ammo jaalalti woli isani hojachiisiina." 
Galatians5:14 Seeri ch'ufti Seera kana keesa jira: nama ch'ufa aka ufi jaalattu jaalad'u. 
Galatians5:15 Ammo yo isani aka bineensa taatani wolhaatani, eegad'a, yokhaani wolballeesitani." 
Galatians5:16 Wonti anini jed'u tana: Lubbuuni ha isani qajeelchituuti, d'araani nafa keesani isani imohatiini." 
Galatians5:17 Wonti nafi keenna fed'u waan Lubbuuni feetuuniti; waan Lubbuuni feetule nafi imfed'u: worri wolii nyaapa, tanaafi waan tolchu feetani dandeetani intolchitani." 
Galatians5:18 Yo Lubbuuni isani qajeelchite Seera jala injirtani. 
Galatians5:19 Wonti nafi fed'u diiduma teeti: wolbaraachafi t'urifi huji hamtu; 
Galatians5:20 falfalumafi waan harkaani boch'ani kad'atani. Nami nyaapa wolti tahe wolhad'e, wolqot'isani, wolti dalanani, ufo tahani, gargari woli qoodani," 
Galatians5:21 wolmorkani, farso d'ugani machaani, wolballeesani, waan hamamtu akana heddu tolchani. Anini amma isani gorsa akuma duri tolche: nami waan akana kana tolchu Finna Waaqa inargatu." 
Galatians5:22 Ammo Lubbuuni jaalalafa, qilit'amafa, nagayafa, obsafa, naasufa, d'uga gula deemitifa, dansoomafa," 
Galatians5:23 ufi diqeesitifi ufi qorqoracha d'alti. Wonti kuni tokoleeni seera inqabdu. 
Galatians5:24 Worri Kristo Yeso gula yau ya nafa ufi ijeese, d'araafi fed'i isaa ch'ufa woliini." 
Galatians5:25 Lubbuuni ya jireenna nuu kennite; jireenna keennale qajeelchu malte. 
Galatians5:26 Nu ufi saadu himmalle, woldalansiisu himmalle yokhaani wolqot'isule himmalle." 
Galatians6:1 Oboleyaani tiyya, yo nami ato imbeekhiini wollaala seene, isani worri Lubbu Waaqa qabu ha isa qajeelchuuti; ammo kara laanatiini tolchu malani. Ufi tissi, aka atileeni ilaalacha keesa inseenne." 
Galatians6:2 Ulfinna woli baad'a, kara kanaani seera Kristo guuttani." 
Galatians6:3 Yo nami woma intahiini wo ufi sehe, inni ufi daalleesu jira." 
Galatians6:4 Nami ch'ufti huji ufi laalu male. Yo dansa taate, ha waan tolcheeni ufi guddisuuti, ato waan nami d'ibiini tolcheeni wolbira inqamne." 
Galatians6:5 Wonti akanatiifi nami ch'ufti baa ufi baachu male. 
Galatians6:6 Nami dubbi Waaqa barsiisani ha waan dansa qabu ch'ufa nama isa barsiiseeni gahuuti. 
Galatians6:7 Ufi insobina: nami tokoleeni dandae Waaqa indaalleefatu. Nami ch'ufti waan oobre murata. 
Galatians6:8 Yo inni waan nafi isaa fed'u ch'alla oobrate, duisa murata. Yo inni waan Lubbuuni feetu ch'alla oobrate, Lubbu suni ira jireenna hegeri argata." 
Galatians6:9 Tanaafi waan dansa tolchu dad'abu himmalle; wonti akanatiifi yo nu indad'amne, hojjaani nu murannu ind'ufti." 
Galatians6:10 Tanaafi haga qoomni qamnu nama ch'ufaa waan dansa tolchu malle, keesuma worra d'ugefacha aka teenna qabu." 
Galatians6:11 Aka anini harka kiyyaani gugurdise t'aafu ilaala! 
Galatians6:12 Worra ufi guddisu fed'u, ka waan mullatatiini kiyyibuuti, qabanqaba isanii qabu fed'a. Wonti worri akasi tolchuufi aka maskali Kristotiifi ingaargalle." 
Galatians6:13 Worri qabanqaba qabatule seera gula iyau, worri aka isani aada q qabanqaba tana qabattani fed'a, aka akasiini aada nafa ta isani tolfatani tanaani, ufi korsu." 
Galatians6:14 Ammo, anini waan maskali Aabbo Yeso Kristo ch'alla saada; maskali tanaafi lafti gara kiyyaani doote, anileeni gara lafaatiini due." 
Galatians6:15 Qabanqaba woma keesa injirtu. Wonti fed'ani uumama haraa. 
Galatians6:16 Worri aada tana gula yau, nagayafi naasuuni ha worra woliini teetu, worraafi gumi Waaqa ch'ufale!" 
Galatians6:17 Armaa achi, nami tokoleeni na ingaargalchiini; wonti akanatiifi gadaanisi nafa kiyya aka anini tisse Yeso agarsiisa." 
Galatians6:18 Eebiti Aabbo keenna Yeso Kristo isani ch'ufa woliini jiraatinna, oboleyaani tiyya. Amini." 
Ephesians1:1 Maqaani kiyya Paulo; anini fed'i Waaqaatiini ergattu Kristo Yeso tahe. Gara gumi Waaqa ta Efeso keesa jirtu, ta jireenna ufitiini Kristo Yeso d'ugefate tatabe tana t'aafa." 
Ephesians1:2 Waaqa Abbaafi Aabbo Yeso Kristoni eebafi nagaya isanii kenniina. 
Ephesians1:3 Waaqa, Abba Aabbo keenna Yeso Kristo galata deebimna! Inni Kristo keesa nu eebise eeba ch'ufa ta lubbu gubbaa nuu kenne." 
Ephesians1:4 Ato lafa inuumiini, Waaqi ya Kristo keesa nu fohate, aka nu qulqulloomne wollaala male isa dura yaanu. Maro jaalala isaatiifi" 
Ephesians1:5 Waaqi ya qara nu fohate, aka kara Yeso Kristotiini ufitiini nu d'ufe ilmaani ufi nu tolfatu, fed'i isaa gula." 
Ephesians1:6 Koota, Waaqa galata deebimna, maro eeba isaatiifi, waan inni Ilma isaa ka inni jaalatu keesa nu eebiseefi." 
Ephesians1:7 Inni d'iiga ufitiini nu bite nu baase, daba keenna nu araarame. Eebiti Waaqa," 
Ephesians1:8 ta inni guddise nuu kenne waan guddo! Qalbifi malte isaatiini 
Ephesians1:9 Waaqi waan qara herege tolche, waan d'ossa, ka inni Kristoni, guutu duratu nu beesise." 
Ephesians1:10 Wonti Waaqi tolchu fed'u, aka yo hojjaani geete, uumama lafa ch'ufa ka lafafi gubba jiru woltiini d'ufe Kristo mataa tolchu." 
Ephesians1:11 Waan ch'ufa fed'i herega Waaqa gula tolchani ammalle Waaqi fed'i ufitiini Kristo keesa nu fohate nama ufi nu tolfate, herega isaa ka qara kaani gula." 
Ephesians1:12 Tanaafi nu worri qara Kristo heregatu guddinna Waaqa faarsina! 
Ephesians1:13 Isanileeni akasuma: gaafa dubbi d'uga d'ageetani, Odu Dansa ta baafamaani isanii d'ufte, isani Kristo d'ugefattani, jennaani Waaqi beesisa ufi isani ira keyate Lubbu Qulqullo ta kakhate isani kenne." 
Ephesians1:14 Lubbuuni tuni qabdo teenna, aka nu waan Waaqi nu kakhate argannu nu agarsiifti, ammalle aka Waaqi balchoomsa d'uga worra ufiti kennu himti. Guddinna isaa faarsina!" 
Ephesians1:15 Maro waan kanatifi anini haguma d'ugefacha isani Aabbo Yeso d'ugefattaniifi jaalala isani gumi Waaqa jaalattani d'agaye," 
Ephesians1:16 maro teesaniifi Waaqaa galata deebisu illakimne. Anini hojja ch'ufa kad'acha tiyya keesati isani qaabad'a," 
Ephesians1:17 ammalle Waaqa, Abba guddinna, ka Aabbo keenna Yeso Kristo, kad'ad'a, aka inni lubbu isani qaroomsite Waaqa isaniti mulliftu isanii kennu, aka isani baratani." 
Ephesians1:18 Wonti anini kad'ad'u, aka qalbiini teesani banamte ifsa isaa argitani, aka isani abdi inni iti isani yaameefi eeba durooma ta inni gumi isaati kakhate hubattani," 
Ephesians1:19 ammalle aka jabeenni isaa, ka nu worra isa d'ugefate keesa hojatu gudda hubattani. Jabeenni kunini" 
Ephesians1:20 kauma inni Kristo duisa keesa kaaseeni, harka ufi ka mirga gubba fulla ufi teesiseeni." 
Ephesians1:21 Kristoni achiti hayyoota gubbafi jabeennaafi irreefi nama jaba ch'ufa fida; inni maqa ulfinna ka lafa tanaatiifi ka hegerile ch'ufa ira jira. 
Ephesians1:22 Waaqi waan ch'ufa ya miila Kristo jalati deebise, aka inni Mata waan ch'ufaa tahu inni ya gumi Waaqati kenne." 
Ephesians1:23 Gumiini Waaqa nafa Kristoti; qit'ooma isaati, ka waan ch'ufa fulla ch'ufati qit'eesu." 
Ephesians2:1 Duri isani dabaafi wollaalaani lubbu dootani. 
Ephesians2:2 Hojja suni kara lafa ka daba gula yaatani, hayyu jabeenna ka qilleensa ch'aqaftani, ka lubbu amma worra Waaqa inch'aqamne mohatu." 
Ephesians2:3 Nuuni ch'ufti duri aka worra suni jirra, d'araa nafa keenna gula yaane waan nafafi qalbiini teenna feetu ch'alla tolchine, ka sila akuma nama ch'ufa Waaqi nuleti dalanu male." 
Ephesians2:4 Ammo naasuuni Waaqa guddo; inni guddo nu jaalata; 
Ephesians2:5 ato nu dabaani diquma induiini, Kristo woliini duisa keesaa nu kaase; isani eeba Waaqaatiini baafamtani." 
Ephesians2:6 Inni Kristo woliini duisa keesaa nu kaase, aka isa woliini gubba nu teesisu." 
Ephesians2:7 Wonti inni waan kana tolcheefi, aka hojja ch'ufa durooma eeba isaa, ta inni Kristo Yeso keesa qabu, nu agarsiisu." 
Ephesians2:8 Maro eeba Waaqaatiifi isani baafama argattani, kara d'ugefacha gula. Waan isani ufiini tolfattaniiniti, ammo tola Waaqi isanii kenne." 
Ephesians2:9 Wonti isani ufi guddiftaniifi injirtu, wonti akanatiifi wonti kunini waan isani ufiini tolfattaniiniti." 
Ephesians2:10 Nu uumama Waaqaati, ammalle Kristo Yeso keesa inni ya nu uume, aka huji dansa ta inni herege nu kurfeese ke teennu." 
Ephesians2:11 Isani worri d'aloota gula gosa d'ibi, ka Yahudiini worra qabanqaba inqabanne jettuuni, ammo ufiini, Nu worra qabate jed'u (ta waan nami nafa ufi tolchu), waan duri keesa jirtani qaabad'a." 
Ephesians2:12 Gaafasi isani Kristo iraa fago jirtani. Isani nyaapa, gumi Waaqa ta fohatani keesa injirtani. Wold'aqisa Waaqi gumi isati khakhate keesaa inqabdani. Lafa tana keesa abdifi Waaqa male teetani!" 
Ephesians2:13 Ammo amma Kristoni takaa taanaani, isani worri duri fago jiru ya d'iiga Kristotini gadi d'iaattani." 
Ephesians2:14 Wonti akanatiifi Kristoni ya Yahudifi gosa d'ibile taka tolche nagayaani nu d'ufe. Nafa ufitiini dallaa ka worra gargari qoode nyaapa woli tolche ch'abse. 
Ephesians2:15 Seera Yahuditiifi aada seera suni balleese, aka gosa tana lamaani takaa tolche akasiini nagayaani nu d'ufe." 
Ephesians2:16 Duisa isaa ka maskali gubbatiini Kristoni woljibiti balleese; maskali ufitiini inni gosa lachu takaa tolche Waaqati deebise. 
Ephesians2:17 Tanaafi Kristoni d'ufe, Odu Dansa ta nagaya gosa ch'ufati odeese isani gosa d'ibi ta Waaqa ira guddo fago jirtaniifi Yahudileti, ta isati d'iaattu." 
Ephesians2:18 Maro Kristotiifi nuuni ch'ufti, gosa d'ibiifi Yahudileeni, Lubbu takaani fuula Abba dura d'umna." 
Ephesians2:19 Tanaafi isani worri gosa d'ibi arraa achi nyaapaaniti yokhaani keessumaaniti; amma isani worra qulqullo woliini gumi Waaqaati, worra Waaqa!" 
Ephesians2:20 Isanile yayabuma ergattufi raagooti keete irati isani ijaarani, d'akhaani jabaleeni Kristo Yeso." 
Ephesians2:21 Isati mana ch'ufa wolti qaba, aka mani suni mana Aabbo qulqullo tahe guddatu." 
Ephesians2:22 Isa keesa isanile, nama d'ibi woliini, ijaaru jirani, aka mana Waaqi Lubbu ufitiini keesa tau taatani." 
Ephesians3:1 Maro waan kanatifi anini Pauloni, ka maro Kristo Yesotiifi hid'ani, isani gosa d'ibiti Waaqa kad'ad'a." 
Ephesians3:2 D'uguma, isani ya d'ageetani, aka Waaqi eeba isatiini huji tana naa kenne, aka isanii jed'e hojad'u." 
Ephesians3:3 Waaqi herega isaa ka d'ossa nati mullise na beesise. Anini waan kana ya diqo toko t'aafe," 
Ephesians3:4 yo waan anini t'aafe soomtani, aka anini waan d'ossa ka Kristo barad'e inargitani." 
Ephesians3:5 Duri waan d'ossa kana namati inhimani, ammo amma Waaqi ya Lubbu ufitiini ergattu ufi qulqullofi raagootati mullise." 
Ephesians3:6 Wonti d'ossani tana: maro Odu Dansatiifi gochiti d'ibileeni, akuma Yahudiini argatte, eeba Waaqa argatti; worri ch'ufti mita nafa tokoti, kakhu Waaqi Kristo Yeso keesati tolchele inargata." 
Ephesians3:7 Waaqi eeba ufitiini hojattu Odu Dansa na tolche, eeba suni jabeenna huji ufitiini naa kenne." 
Ephesians3:8 Anini gumi Waaqa ch'ufa maand'a qit'issu, ammo Waaqi huji gosa d'ibiti Odu Dansa odeesani nati kenne, aka durooma Kristo ka ind'umanne barsiisu," 
Ephesians3:9 ammalle aka nami ch'ufti mala Waaqa ka d'ossani amma guutani argu. Waaqi, ka waan ch'ufa uume, duri mala ufi d'ofate," 
Ephesians3:10 aka hojja tana, gumi Waaqaatiini, hayyoota malaika fakaattufi jabeenni gubba jiru ch'ufti qalbi Waaqa ta aka aka jirtu baratu." 
Ephesians3:11 Waaqi herega ufi ka hegeri gula waan kana tolche, ka inni Kristo Yeso Aabbo keennaani guute." 
Ephesians3:12 Isa keesa waan nu isaa d'ugefanneefi, fuula Waaqa dura d'ufu indandeenna, ch'eerafi soda male." 
Ephesians3:13 Tanaafi anini isani kad'ad'a, waan anini maro teesaniifi gaargaleefi ufi injibaatiina; wonti kuni ch'ufti isanii olaanti." 
Ephesians3:14 Maro waan kanatifi anini Aabbo durati jilbifad'a," 
Ephesians3:15 inni abba worra ch'ufa, ka nami lafafi gubba jiruleeni maqa d'ugaa ira argatu." 
Ephesians3:16 Anini Waaqa kad'ad'a, aka inni durooma guddinna ufitiini jabeenna Lubbu Qulqullo ta garaa keesani jabeesitu isanii kennu," 
Ephesians3:17 aka Kristoni, garaa keesani keesati qubatu, maro d'ugefachatiifi. Anini inkad'ad'a, aka hiddafi yayabi keesani jaalala keesa tau," 
Ephesians3:18 ammalle aka isani, gumi Waaqa woliini, hubacha jaalala Kristo argatani, aka jaalalati suni fulla ch'ufa geetu, ballinnafi d'eerinnafi gadi qilumale ch'ufa keesa." 
Ephesians3:19 Ee, aka jaalala isaa barattani ato nami dandae ch'ufa imbarannele akanaani qit'ooma Waaqaatiini guutamtani." 
Ephesians3:20 Gara isa, ka dandae waan nu kad'annu ira nuu kennu yokhaani waan nu herennule ira, maro jabeenna nu keesa hojatuufi:" 
Ephesians3:21 gara Waaqa, gumifi Kristo Yeso keesa, guddinni ha tahuuti, haga d'aloota ch'ufa, ammafi hegerile! Amini." 
Ephesians4:1 Anini ka maro anini Aabbo hojad'uufi na hid'ani, isani kad'ad'a yaamicha Waaqi isani yaame gula yaa." 
Ephesians4:2 Ufi olimfuud'ina, laana yaa, waan ch'ufa obsa. Jaalala teesani wolqarqaarsaani agarsiisa." 
Ephesians4:3 Takaa tahiti Lubbuuni namaa kennitu jabeesa qorqorad'a, nagaya takaa isani tolchu suniini." 
Ephesians4:4 Nafa tokofi Lubbu toko ch'allati jira, akuma abdiini toko, ta Waaqi iti isani yaame." 
Ephesians4:5 Aabbo tokofi d'ugefacha tokofi batiso toko ch'allati jira; 
Ephesians4:6 Waaqa toko ch'allati jira ka Abba nama ch'ufaa; inni waan ch'ufa ira jira, waan ch'ufa keesa hojate waan ch'ufa keesa jira." 
Ephesians4:7 Nu nami ch'ufti yayu herega Kristo gula eeba arganne. 
Ephesians4:8 Akuma t'aafiini jettu, gaafa inni gubba olkore worra hid'ani heddu ufi gula fuud'e, namale wo kenne." 
Ephesians4:9 Duuba, Inni gubbaa olkore jechuuni maani? Qaraa fiit'e inni gadi bue jetti lafa jalati." 
Ephesians4:10 Namuma gadi bue suniti ammalle achi gubbati oldeebie, aka waan ch'ufa guutu." 
Ephesians4:11 Isati wo namaa kenne; nama gari ergattu tolche, ka gari raaga tolche, ka gari odeesitu dubbi tolche, ka gari tissitu tolche, ka gari barsiiftu tolche." 
Ephesians4:12 Wonti inni waan kana tolcheefi aka gumi Waaqa ch'ufa huji Waaqaati kurfeesu, aka nafa Kristo jaarani." 
Ephesians4:13 Duuba nuuni ch'ufti garaa tokooni, d'ugefacha teennafi beekhuma teenna ta Ilma Waaqaatiini wolti d'umna; nama gugurda taane, haga Kristoni gahu geenna." 
Ephesians4:14 Iti deebine ijoolle d'awaani galaana d'od'ooftu intaanu yokhaani ta barsiisaani nama d'ara ch'ufti chochooftu intaanu, ka malteeni nama d'ibi kara ira gorsu." 
Ephesians4:15 Ammo jaalalaani d'uga dubbanne kara ch'ufaani Kristo, ka mata keenna, keesa guddachu malle." 
Ephesians4:16 Jabeenna isaatiini nafi keenna ch'ufti taka, ammalle nafi ch'ufti mita ufitiini wolti eja. Tanaafi yo mitaani ch'ufti garaa ufitiini hojate, nafi ch'ufti guddate jaalalaani jabaata." 
Ephesians4:17 Maqa Aabbootiini anini waan kana jabeese jed'a: aka worra Waaqa imbeenne, ka qalbiini worraa woma imbaanne," 
Ephesians4:18 ka qalbiini ammalle dukana keesa jirtu intahiina. Worri jireenna Waaqi kennu keesa qooda inqabu; wonti akanatiifi worri daalle woma imbeekhu. 
Ephesians4:19 Ch'eera inqabu huji dabati ufi kenne, waan ch'eera ka aka ch'ufa ka ira ufi ind'owine taha." 
Ephesians4:20 Wonti isani waan Kristo barattani akasiiniti! 
Ephesians4:21 Isani ya waan isaa d'ageetani, ammalle aka nama isa gula yau ya d'uga Yeso keesa jirtu barattani." 
Ephesians4:22 Tanaafi jireenna keesani dullacha duri, ka waan isani duri taatani isani tolche — jireenna duri ka d'araani hamtuuni balleesite baafad'a." 
Ephesians4:23 Garaafi qalbi teesani hareesa tolchu malani. 
Ephesians4:24 Jireenna hareesa aka woya fud'ad'a, ka fakeenna Waaqa gula mid'aasani, ammalle ka finna d'uga ka qajeelumafi qulqulloomaani mullatu." 
Ephesians4:25 Iti deebitani inkiyyibiina duuba! Nami ch'ufti ha oboleesa ufiti d'uga dubbatuuti; wonti akanatiifi nuuni ch'ufti nafa Kristo keesati mita. 
Ephesians4:26 Yo dalantani, dalansuuni teesani daba keesa isani inseensisiini; dalansuuni aduuni isaniti ind'iini." 
Ephesians4:27 Sheet'ani qoomni inargatiini. 
Ephesians4:28 Nami duri wo hatu ha hanna lakise hojatuuti, aka harka ufitiini ufi bulche hiyyeeyile qarqaaru." 
Ephesians4:29 Hasaa keesati dubbi hamtu injed'ina. Dubbi dansa, ta nama qarqaarte jabeesitu ch'alla jed'a, aka worri d'agayu eeba argatu." 
Ephesians4:30 Lubbu Qulqullo Waaqa ilaalefachiisiina; Lubbuuni tunini beesisa Waaqa ka isani gubba jiru, ka aka guyyaani isani balchoomsani d'ufu agarsiisu." 
Ephesians4:31 Garaa hameennafi, d'araafi dalansu ch'ufa lakisa. Iti deebitani woli loltani woli inarabsina! Ammalle wolinjibiina!" 
Ephesians4:32 Ammo arja taha, woli naha, woli araarama, akuma Waaqi maro Kristotiifi isani araarame." 
Ephesians5:1 Isani ijoolle Waaqaati, tanaafi aka isaa tahu maltani." 
Ephesians5:2 Jaalala keesa yaa, akuma Kristoni nu jaalate jireenna ufii nuu baase, sorio dansa fooleeni isii Waaqa gammachiiftu nuu tahe." 
Ephesians5:3 Maro isani gumi Waaqa taataniifi waan algaloomatiifi ka t'uritiifi ka sabdooma jiddu teesaniti maqale ind'aiina. 
Ephesians5:4 Dubbi t'uritiifi ta daallumatiifi ta imfakaanne jechu himmalle. Ammo waan ch'ufa keesati sila Waaqaa galata deebisu maltani. 
Ephesians5:5 Waan kana aka dansaa beekhu maltani: nami algali, t'urichi, sabdiini (ka Waaqa wollaale waan nami harkaani mid'aasu kad'atu) qooda Finna Kristotiifi ka Waaqa keesaa inqabu." 
Ephesians5:6 Nami tokoleeni dubbi kiyyiba ta d'aratiini isani insobini: maro waan kanatifi dalansuuni Waaqa worra isaa inch'aqamneti d'ufti. 
Ephesians5:7 Tanaafi nama akana kana lagad'a. 
Ephesians5:8 Isanumanu duri dukana keesa jirtani, ammo haga gumi Aabbo taatani, ifsa ke jirtani. Tanaafi aka nama ifsa keesa jiru tahu maltani." 
Ephesians5:9 Ifsati mid'aani dansoomatiifi ka d'ugatiifi ka qajeelumatiini d'ufa. 
Ephesians5:10 Waan Waaqa gammachiisa jabaad'a barad'a. 
Ephesians5:11 Nama waan woma imbaane tolchu, ka dukana fed'u, lagad'a. Ammo waan suni diidati baasa." 
Ephesians5:12 Yo waan worri d'ossaani tolchu hasaani waan ch'eeraati. 
Ephesians5:13 Ammo wonti ifsati baasani ch'ufti aka dansa mullatti; 
Ephesians5:14 wonti mullisani suni ch'ufti ifsaa taati. Wonti, Kai, nama rafe, duisa keesaa kai, Kristoni siti ifsa jed'aniifi tana." 
Ephesians5:15 Tanaafi deema teesani keesa aka dansa ufi qorqorad'a. Aka nama woma imbeenne intahiina, aka nama qaro taha." 
Ephesians5:16 Yo qoomni argattani ch'ufa waan dansa tolcha, bari kuni hama." 
Ephesians5:17 Indaallaina, fed'i Aabbo Waaqaa hubad'a." 
Ephesians5:18 Daad'iini imachaiina, wonti kuni isani balleesiti; ammo Lubbuuni Waaqaa isani guutiinna." 
Ephesians5:19 Dubbi faarutiifi ta sirba Waaqaatiini wolhasaa; faaru Aabbo garaa keesani keesati gammadaani d'ahad'a. 
Ephesians5:20 Waan ch'ufa keesafi hojja ch'ufa Waaqa Aabbo galata deebisa, maqa Aabbo Yeso Kristotiini." 
Ephesians5:21 Woli ch'eera, maro Kristo saalfattaniifi." 
Ephesians5:22 Nad'eeni ha d'iirsole ufiti ch'eerfatuuti, akuma Aabbo ch'eerfattu." 
Ephesians5:23 Akuma Kristoni mata gumi isaa, d'iirsileeni mata niiti isaati; Kristoleeni ufi isaati Qarqaarsa gumi, ta nafa isaa." 
Ephesians5:24 Tanaafi nad'eeni aka dansa d'iirsole ufiiti ch'eeru malte, akuma gumiini Waaqa Kristo ch'eertu." 
Ephesians5:25 D'iirsole, akuma Kristoni gumi ufi jaalate nafa ufi kenneefi, isanileeni akasuma nad'eeni teesani jaaladlad'a." 
Ephesians5:26 Inni aka gumi ufi qulqulleesu waan kana tolche, dubbi ufitiini, eegi bisaaniini d'iqe," 
Ephesians5:27 aka gumi isaa ila ufi duraani d'ufu, mid'aagumafi qulqulloomaani, wollaalafi bobotolefi waan qit'e intahiini male." 
Ephesians5:28 D'iirti aka ufi jaalattu niiti ufi jaalachu malte. Nami niiti ufi jaalatu ufi jaalata. 
Ephesians5:29 Nami ufi jibbu injiru, ammo namu ufi bulcha, akuma Kristoni gumi Waaqaa tolchu;" 
Ephesians5:30 wonti akanatiifi nu mita nafa isaati. 
Ephesians5:31 Maro waan kanatifi t'aafiini, d'iirti abbaafi haad'a ufi lakifte niiti ufitiini taka taati, jari lamaani nafa takaa taha jetti." 
Ephesians5:32 Dubbi d'uga guddoti t'aafi tana keesa mullata; isiini, mala kiyya, Kristofi gumi Waaqale baanti." 
Ephesians5:33 Ammo isanile imbaanti: d'iirti ch'ufti niiti ufii aka ufi jaalattu jaalachu malte; nad'eenileeni d'iirsole ufiiti ha saalfattu. 
Ephesians6:1 Ijoolle, maro Kristotiifi worra keesani saalfad'a, wonti kunini waan tolchu malani." 
Ephesians6:2 Jechi abbeetiifi haateti saalfad'a jed'u kakhu d'ibi iti darani qaba; 
Ephesians6:3 kakhuuni suni waan jettu, aka lafa Aabbo Waaqi sii kennu keesati lubbuuni tante d'eeratu jetti." 
Ephesians6:4 Aabbooti, ijoolle teesani imufachisiina, ammo barsiisafi gorsa Aabbootiini guddisa." 
Ephesians6:5 Tissele, abbooti teesani, sodaafi holachani ch'aqasa, akuma waan Kristo hojattani garaa tokooni hojad'afi." 
Ephesians6:6 Hojja worri isani ilaalu ch'alla inhojatiinaafi, ammo garaa keesani ch'ufaani waan Waaqi fed'u tolcha, aka tissele Kristo." 
Ephesians6:7 Huji teesani ta tisse gammadaani tolcha, akuma waan nama inhojanne ammo Aabbo hojatanu." 
Ephesians6:8 Qaabad'a, aka Aabbooni nama ch'ufaa galata kennu, tisseefi balchale, maro huji dansa ta inni tolchuufi." 
Ephesians6:9 Aabbooti tisselee, tissele teesani akuma suni tolcha, insodaachiisiina. Qaabad'a, aka isanifi tisseleeni teesanileeni abba taka gubbaa qabdani, ka nama ch'ufa waan takaa tolchu." 
Ephesians6:10 Dubbi buufata, Aabbo keesa jabaad'a, irre isaa guddooni." 
Ephesians6:11 Miha lola ka Waaqi isanii kennu ch'ufa guurad'a, aka malte Sheet'ana dabsattani." 
Ephesians6:12 Wonti akanatiifi nu namaani woli had'uuti injirru, ammo qilleensa hama lafafi gubbatiini wolhad'u jirra, jabeennaafi irre gubba ta bara dukana kanale." 
Ephesians6:13 Tanaafi ammatana miha lola ka Waaqa olfud'ad'a! Duuba yo guyyaani hamaani d'ufe dandeetani irre nyaapa dabsattani, aka eegi haatanile duddaduuba indeebine." 
Ephesians6:14 Tanaafi kurfo taa, eegad'a: d'uga aka gurda hid'aanati hid'ad'a; dubbi d'ugatiini hameenna qoma teesani iraa d'owad'a," 
Ephesians6:15 kurfo taa, aka hojja ch'ufa Odu Dansa ta nagaya aka kobe keyattani." 
Ephesians6:16 Hojja ch'ufa d'ugefacha aka wonte baad'a; aka t'iya bobeetu ta Hamaani Kaani darbatu d'aamfitani. 
Ephesians6:17 Baafama aka ruufa marad'a, dubbini Waaqaleeni ha sheefti Lubbuuni isanii kennitu taatu." 
Ephesians6:18 Waan kana ch'ufa kad'achaani tolfad'a qarqaarsa Waaqa kad'ad'a. Hojja ch'ufa Waaqa kad'ad'a, akuma Lubbuuni isani agarsiiftu. Maro waan kanatifi hojja ch'ufa kurfo eegad'a; ufi injibaatiina, hojja ch'ufa gumi Waaqati kad'ad'a." 
Ephesians6:19 Anale Waaqa kad'ad'a, aka Waaqi, hojja anini dubbachu fed'u, dubbi anini jabeennaani dubbad'u naa kenne d'ossa Odu Dansa mullisu." 
Ephesians6:20 Maro Odu Dansa tanaatiifi gara na ergani, ato anini amma hid'aansa keesa jiraad'ele. Tanaafi Waaqa naa kad'ad'a, aka anini jabeese dubbad'u, akuma tolchu male." 
Ephesians6:21 Tikikoni, oboleesa keennafi hojattuuni teenna ta d'uga huji Aabbo keesa, odu tiyya ch'ufa isaniti odeesa, aka isani waan anini keesa jiru hubattani." 
Ephesians6:22 Maro waan kanatifi anini isa gara keesani erga, aka waan nuuni ch'ufti keesa jirru inni isani beesise garaa isani jabeesu." 
Ephesians6:23 Waaqa Abbaafi Aabbo Yeso Kristoni nagayafi jaalala oboleyaani ch'ufaa kenniina, d'ugefacha woliini." 
Ephesians6:24 Eebiti Waaqa nama Aabbo Yeso Kristo guddo jaalatu ch'ufa woliini tahinna. 
Philippians1:1 Maqaani keenna Paulofi Timotheo, hojattu Kristo Yeso. Gara gumi Waaqa ta lafa Filipi keesa jirtu, ta Kristo Yeso d'ugefattu, jaarole gumitiifi jara gumi Waaqa hojatu woliini:" 
Philippians1:2 Waaqa Abba keennafi Aabbo Yeso Kristoni eebafi nagaya isani kenninna. 
Philippians1:3 Anini hojja isani qaabad'u ch'ufa Waaqa kiyya galata deebisa; 
Philippians1:4 hojja isani kad'ad'u ch'ufa anini gammadaani kad'ad'a," 
Philippians1:5 waan isani huji Odu Dansa keesati na qarqaartani, haguma guyya qaraati haga arrale." 
Philippians1:6 Tanaafi anini waan kana aka dansa beekha: Waaqi ka huji dansa tana jiddu teesaniti iti keyate, gaafa Guyyaani Kristo Yesoni gahu hobaasu male illakisu." 
Philippians1:7 Isani hojja ch'ufa qalbi tiyya keesa jirtani! Tanaafi anini hojja ch'ufa waan keesani akasi heregu male. Isaniini ch'ufti ya eeba Waaqi naa kenne tana qoodattani, ana ka amma hid'aansa keesa jiruufi gaafa anini duri diida jirule, aka Odu Dansa suniifi dubbad'e isi jabeesu." 
Philippians1:8 Yo anini, Jaalalti anini garaa kiyya keesa qabu garaa Kristo Yeso keesaa d'ufte jed'e, Waaqileeni naa d'uga." 
Philippians1:9 Kad'achaani anini isani kad'ad'u tana: aka jaalalti teesani hagasira guddatte hubacha dansaafi qalbi d'uga woliini," 
Philippians1:10 aka isani waan ira dansa gula baatani. Yo suni Guyya Kristo wollaalafi t'uri tokole inqabdani. 
Philippians1:11 Jireenni keesani waan dadansa ka Yeso Kristoni fed'uuni guutama, aka maqa Waaqa guddisani faarsani." 
Philippians1:12 Anini wo isaniti himu fed'a, oboleyaani tiyya; yo d'ugaa dubbanne, wonti na tolchani ya Odu Dansa durati deemsifte." 
Philippians1:13 Maro waan kanatifi askarti mana hayyutiifi nami arma jiru ch'ufti aka maro huji Kristotiifi na hid'ani imbeekha. 
Philippians1:14 Anini hid'aansa keesa seennaani, oboleyaani ch'ufti guddo huji Aabbooti jabaatte jannoomte, dubbi Waaqa soda male odeesite." 
Philippians1:15 Nami gari d'uguma qot'eefi woldidafi waan Kristo odeesa, ammo ka gari garaa dansaani odeesa." 
Philippians1:16 Worri kunini maro jaalalatiifi waan kana tolcha, waan worri aka Waaqi arma na kaye, Odu Dansa jabeesi naani jed'e beekhufi." 
Philippians1:17 Nami gari garaa dansaani waan Kristo inodeesu, ammo garaa d'iibitiini odeesa, waan haga anini hid'aansa keesa jiru na gargalchani sehaniifi." 
Philippians1:18 Ammo yo akasile taate, wonti sunini woma keesa injirtu, anini guddo gammada, yo kara ch'ufaanu waan Kristo hasaani, kara qajeelafi hamaleeni. Anini ammalle ingammada." 
Philippians1:19 Wonti akanatiifi anini imbeekha, waan kad'acha teesanitiifi maro qarqaarsa Lubbu Yeso Kristotiifi inuma gadi na lakisani." 
Philippians1:20 Wonti akanatiifi abdifi fed'iini tiyya tana — aka anini inch'eerfanne, ammo aka hojja ch'ufa, keesuma ammatana, anini garaa jabaad'u, aka jabeenna kiyya ch'ufaani Kristo ulfeesu, yo duefi yo jiraad'ele." 
Philippians1:21 Jireenni maani? Naa jireenni Kristo; duisileeni naa dansa. 
Philippians1:22 Ammo yo lubbuuni na d'eerate huji dansa hojad'e, anini ta gula bahu imbeekhu." 
Philippians1:23 Gama lachuyu woljaji jira. Anini jireenna kana lakise Kristo woliini tau fed'a, tanati ira na jira;" 
Philippians1:24 ammo maro teesaniifi anini lafa tana gubbati hafu male. 
Philippians1:25 Anini waan kana aka dansa beekha, armati hafe isani woliini taa, aka isani d'ugefachaani gammaddani dura deemtani." 
Philippians1:26 Tanaafi yo anini ammalle fulla teesaniti deebie, isani maro kiyyafi ufi koorsitani, Kristo Yeso keesa." 
Philippians1:27 Wonti jabduuni, adabi keesani aka Oduuni Dansaani ta Kristo jettu ha jiraatu, aka ato anini d'ufe isani argu d'ibaad'ele, aka isani garaa tokooni jabaattani ejaanjattani yaada toko ch'allaani woliini haatani d'agayu, maro d'ugefacha odu dansaatiifi." 
Philippians1:28 Nyaapa keesani insodaatiina; hojja ch'ufa jannooma, wonti kunini aka isani worra dabsatani agarsiifti Waaqati dabsacha isanii kenna!" 
Philippians1:29 Ayyaana keesani ka, Kristo d'ugefad'a ch'alla isaniini injenne, ammo, Maro isaatiifi gaargala isaniini jed'ani." 
Philippians1:30 Amma koota, wolumaani haana. Akuma qara aka anini had'e na agartani ammalle akasuma jira, akuma isani d'ageetani." 
Philippians2:1 Jireenni keesani ka Kristo keesaa isani jabeesa mo? Jaalalti isaa garaa keesani jabeesiti? Lubbuuni wold'aqisa qabdu? Woli naatu? 
Philippians2:2 Herega takafi jaalala takafi lubbu takafi qalbi takaani na gammachiisa duuba. 
Philippians2:3 Waan tokole ufi jaalalafi yokhaani ufi guddisitiini intolchiina, ammo woldurati ufi diqeesa, waan nama d'ibi ira jirtani ufi insehiina." 
Philippians2:4 Waan nami d'ibiini fed'u barbaada, waan keesani ch'alla imbarbaadiina." 
Philippians2:5 Heregi keesani ka Kristo Yesoni qabu ha tahu: 
Philippians2:6 Inni haguma jiru jireenna Waaqa, ammo aka irreeni haga Waaqaatiini ufi gahu inherenne." 
Philippians2:7 Ammo fed'i ufitiini waan ch'ufa lakise tisse ufi tolche. Aka nama ufi tolche, fakeenna namatiini mullate;" 
Philippians2:8 ufi diqeese, duale ee jed'e fud'ate dua maskali gubba." 
Philippians2:9 Maro waan kanatifi Waaqi fulla fulla ch'ufa ira guddo, ta gubba isa geese. Maqa maqa ch'ufa ira jiru isaa kenne." 
Philippians2:10 Aka, maro ulfinna maqa Yesotiifi, wonti gubba jiratiifi ka lafa jiratifi ka lafa jala jira ch'ufti jilbifate," 
Philippians2:11 nami ch'ufti diideese, Yeso Kristoni Aabbo jed'u, aka maqa Waaqa Abba guddisani." 
Philippians2:12 Tanaafi oboleyaani tiyya, akuma duri gaafa anini isani woliini jiru na ch'aqaftani, ato isani ira fago jiraad'ele, ammatana hagasile ira na ch'aqasa. Sodaafi holachaani hojad'a aka baafami keesani qit'au." 
Philippians2:13 Wonti akanatiifi Waaqi hojja ch'ufa isani keesa hojachu jira, aka, aka fed'i isaa guuttani, isani feesise dandeesisu." 
Philippians2:14 Waan ch'ufa dubbifi gungumsu male tolcha," 
Philippians2:15 aka ijoolle Waaqa dadansa, ta wollaalafi ch'ubbu inqamne, ammo ta d'aloota hamafi ka daba keesa teteetu. Aka urjiini gubba ifsitu jiddu worrati ifsa," 
Philippians2:16 d'aamsa jireenna iti hima. Yo isani akasi tolchitani, anini Guyya Kristo, waan keesani dansa ka dubbad'u qaba; wonti akanatiifi aka gaargala kiyyafi hujiini tiyya bilaasha intahiini agarsiifti." 
Philippians2:17 Mala kiyya, d'iiga kiyya aka sorio ta aadaani teesani maro d'ugefachatiifi Waaqaa baaftu akasuma jissani. Yo akasi taate, anini gammade duuba nu ch'ufti wolumaani qilit'amna." 
Philippians2:18 Akasuma isanileeni gammaddani, wolumaani qilit'amna." 
Philippians2:19 Anini Aabbo Yeso keesa inheregad'a, aka Timotheo d'iotu isaniti ergu, aka eegi odu teesani d'agaye gammadu." 
Philippians2:20 Isa ch'allati waan anini heregu herege waan keesani qorqorata. 
Philippians2:21 Nami kaani ch'ufti waan ufi ch'alla herega, nami waan Yeso Kristo heregu injiru." 
Philippians2:22 Isani aka inni guddo wo bahu imbeetani, ammalle aka anafi inni aka abbaafi ilma maro Odu Dansaatiifi woliini hojanne imbeetani." 
Philippians2:23 Aka d'iotu isa gara keesani ergu la heregad'e, eegi waan anini ke jiru hubad'e;" 
Philippians2:24 anileeni waan d'iotu d'ufu ufi seha, yo Aabbooni jed'e." 
Philippians2:25 Mala kiyya, oboleesa keenna Epafrodito isaniti ergu male. Inni wahela naa tahe na woliini hojate, isanileeni isa ergattani aka inni na qarqaaru." 
Philippians2:26 Inni guddo isani ch'ufa argu fed'a, ammalle aka inni fayya intahiini isani d'ageetani jennaani inni guddo lalefate." 
Philippians2:27 Inni guddo fayya d'abe, diquma induiini d'uguma ammo Waaqi isaa nahe, isa ch'allaaniti ammo nalee nahe, aka anini hagasi ira illaalefanne." 
Philippians2:28 Tanaafi anini guddo gara keesani isa ergu fed'a, aka hojja isa argitani gammaddani, naasuuni tiyya baddu." 
Philippians2:29 Aka oboleesa Aabbo keesa isa fud'ad'a. Nama akana kana ch'ufa ulfeesa; 
Philippians2:30 wonti akanatiifi inni jireenna ufi baase, diquma induiini maro huji Kristotiifi, aka qarqaarsa isani naa kennu indandeenne naa kennu." 
Philippians3:1 Dubbi buufata, oboleyaani tiyya, Aabbooni, gammada gudda, isani kenninna. Waan duri jed'e, jechaani na ind'iibdu, ammo guddo wo isanii baati." 
Philippians3:2 Worra waan hamtu tolchu fed'u, sareele, nama intahiini, ka nafa namaa ch'iru fed'u eegad'a." 
Philippians3:3 Wonti akanatiifi nami qabanqaba d'uga argate nuu, worraaniti; nu Waaqa lubbu isaatiini kad'anna, ammalle jireenna keenna ka Kristo Yeso keesatiifi gammanna; aada namaa ta nafa ind'ugefannu." 
Philippians3:4 Yo fed'e anini sila dandae waan akana d'ugefad'a. Yo nami tokoleeni aada namaa ta nafa d'ugefate, ka nara d'ugefatu injiru." 
Philippians3:5 Eegi d'alad'e torba bule qabanqaba na qabani. Gochiti tiyya Israeli, balbala Benjamini, Ebrania d'ugaati. Aada Yahudi gula anini Farisayo." 
Philippians3:6 Tanaafi anini guddo owe gumi Yeso balleesu malad'e. Yo nami Seera gula deemu d'uga argate, yoosi anini wollaala tokole inqabu." 
Philippians3:7 Ammo waan duri ira jirti heregad'e ch'ufa amma woma keesa na injirtu, maro Kristotiifi." 
Philippians3:8 Waan kana ch'allaaniti; maro lubbu Aabbo kiyya Yeso Kristo ta waan ch'ufa ira guddotiifi: maro isiitifi anini ya waan ch'ufa lakise. Waan ch'ufa anini aka huura herega aka akasiini Yeso argad'e," 
Philippians3:9 isaani takaa tahu. Anini ammatana d'uga nami Seera guutu argatu tokole inqabu. Anini amma d'uga ta d'ugefacha Yeso Kristotiini argatani qaba, d'uga Waaqa biraa d'uftu, ta d'ugefachaani argatani." 
Philippians3:10 Anini Kristo beekhe jabeenna kaisa isaa ch'alla argachu fed'a; gaargala isaa argad'e duisa isaa keesa aka isaa tahu fed'a," 
Philippians3:11 aka yo sila naa taate, nale duisa keesaa jireennati kaasani." 
Philippians3:12 Anini waan kana qara argad'e injed'u, yokhaani Ya qit'oome injed'u. Ammo guddo barbaada aka argad'u, waan Kristo Yesoni duriyu na barbaade na argateefi." 
Philippians3:13 D'uguma oboleyaani, anini waan argad'e ufi insehu; ammo wonti anini barbaadu, aka waan na duuba jira lakise waan na dura jira iti hit'efad'u." 
Philippians3:14 Tanaafi anini inutaala, aka nama ch'ufa qolche wo argad'u: wonti suni yaamicha Waaqa, Kristo Yeso keesa, gara jireenna gubba." 
Philippians3:15 Nuuni nami gugurdaani ch'ufti sila herega kana qabaachu malle. Ammo yo isani hagi gari herega d'ibi qabaattani, Waaqi isani agarsiisa." 
Philippians3:16 Akuma taatefu, d'uga nu qara arganne gula nu yaasa." 
Philippians3:17 Wold'aqa, na fakaad'a, oboleyaani isaniini ch'ufti. Nu ya kara d'uga isani agarsiimne; worra gula yau ilaala." 
Philippians3:18 Anini waan kana maro heddu isaniti hime, ammalle imimaaniini iti deebie hima: nama hedduti jira, ka jireenni worraa nyaapa Kristo maskali gubbati due tolchu." 
Philippians3:19 Eegeeni worra badi, Waaqi worra d'araa garaa worraati, fulla sila ch'eeru malani ufi saadani, waan lafa tana ch'alla heregani." 
Philippians3:20 Ammo worri keenna gubba; Qarqaarsa keenna Aabbo Yeso Kristo ka gubba gadi d'ufu eegachu jirra. 
Philippians3:21 Inni nafa keenna lalaafa garagalche, aka nafa isaasaa ka guddinna, tolcha, irre inni waan ch'ufa harka ufi jalati deefatuuni." 
Philippians4:1 Tanaafi duuba, oboleyaani tiyya, anini guddo isani jaalad'a, ammalle guddo na ch'ekheesitani! Maro teesani guddo gammade, huji teesani guddo maache! Oboleyaani tiyya, aki isani jabaattani jireenna keesaniini Aabbo keesa oleju maltani akana." 
Philippians4:2 Euodiafi Sintike oboleyaani tiyya ta uwa anini isani kad'ad'a, Aabbo keesa wold'aqa." 
Philippians4:3 Atileeni, wahela kiyya dansa, nad'eeni tana qarqaari; wonti akanatiifi worri na woliini hojate, aka odu dansa odeesani, Klementifi worra na woliini hojatu ch'ufa woliini, ka maqa worraa kitaaba jireenna keesati t'aafani." 
Philippians4:4 Maro Aabbootiifi hojja ch'ufa gammada. Anini ammalle isaniini injed'a: Gammada! 
Philippians4:5 Adabi keesani ka laana ha namati mullatu. Aabbooni d'iotu d'ufa. 
Philippians4:6 Waan tokole inqulqulliina, ammo kad'acha teesani ch'ufa keesati waan feetani ch'ufa Waaqa kad'ad'a guyya ch'ufa galata Waaqaa deebisa." 
Philippians4:7 Nageenni Waaqaa, ka nami hubachu indandeenne, garaa keesaniifi qalbi teesani inqorqorata, Kristo Yeso keesati." 
Philippians4:8 Dubbi buufata, oboleyaani tiyya hojja ch'ufa dansumafi qajeelumumafi d'ugaafi balchumafi qulqulloomafi waan dansa mirgiti ta faarsu malani herega." 
Philippians4:9 Waan dubbi tiyyaafi huji tiyyale keesa, nara argattani nara barattani guuta. Duuba Waaqi nagaya nuu kennu isani woliini taa." 
Philippians4:10 Anini maro Aabbootiifi guddo gammada! Eegi guyya heddu isani ammalle aka waan kiyya hereddani ya agarsiiftani. Anini qara isani waan kiyya yaalu lakiftani injenne qoomni agarsiiftanii d'abdani male. 
Philippians4:11 Isani ya na deetani injed'u; wonti akanatiifi anini aka waan qabu quufu ya barad'e," 
Philippians4:12 d'ipufi ballinna anini imbeekha. Waan kana ya barad'e, tanaafi hojja ch'ufa quufa qaba, ato beela qabaad'e, waan diqo guddo qabaad'ele." 
Philippians4:13 Anini irre waan ch'ufaani dabsad'u qaba, jabeenna Kristoni naa kenneeni." 
Philippians4:14 Ammo isani waan dansa tolchitani, ka gaargala kiyya keesati na qarqaartani." 
Philippians4:15 Isani worri Filipi, imbeetani aka gaafa anini qara Makedoniaa bahe, Odu Dansa odeese gumiini Waaqa ta na qarqaarte isani ch'alla, naafi isani ch'allati, d'ipufi ballinna kiyya woliini qoodate." 
Philippians4:16 Maro heddu Thesalonike keesati anini d'ipannaani isani qarqaarsa naa ergitani. 
Philippians4:17 Anini qarqaarsa ch'alla argachu imfed'u; ammo aka isanileeni keesaa wo argattani fed'a. 
Philippians4:18 Tatabeeni aka isani waan kana ch'ufa naa kennitani agarsiiftu tana isiini waan guddo! Anini waan fed'u ch'ufa ya argad'e, maro Epafroditoni waan isani ergitani ch'ufa naa d'ufeeniifi. Wonti kunini aka sorio urgooftu ta Waaqaa baasani jirti, ta inni fud'ate gammaduuni." 
Philippians4:19 Waaqi kiyya, durooma Kristo Yeso keesa jiru ch'ufaani waan isani feetani ch'ufa isani kenna." 
Philippians4:20 Gara Waaqa Abba keenna guddinni ammafi hegerile ha jiraatu. Amini. 
Philippians4:21 Gumi Waaqa ta Kristo Yeso ch'ufa nagaya naa fuud'a. Oboleyaani arma na woliini jirtu nagaya d'aamti. 
Philippians4:22 Gumiini Waaqa ch'ufti nagaya d'aamti, keesuma worri mana hayyu gudda." 
Philippians4:23 Eebiti Aabbo Yeso Kristo isani ch'ufa woliini jiraatiinna. 
Colossians1:1 Maqaani kiyya Paulo, ka fed'i Waaqatiini ergattu Yeso Kristo tahe; ammalle oboleesa keenna Timotheo woliini jirra." 
Colossians1:2 Gara gumi Waaqa ta Kolosai jirtu, oboleyaani teenna ta d'uga Kristo keesa jirtu. Waaqi Abbaani keenna eebafi nagaya isanii kenninna." 
Colossians1:3 Nu hojja ch'ufa Waaqa, Abba Aabbo keenna Yeso Kristo galata deebimna, hojja nu isanii kad'annu ch'ufa." 
Colossians1:4 Nu aka isani Kristo Yeso d'ugefattani ya d'ageenne, ammalle aka isani gumi Waaqa ch'ufa jaalattani." 
Colossians1:5 Gaafa dubbini d'uga, Oduuni Dansaani, gara keesani qara d'ufte, abdi isiini qabdu ya d'ageetani. Tanaafi d'ugefachaafi jaalalti teesani waan isani abdattani keesa jirti, ta gubba isanii olkayani." 
Colossians1:6 Oduuni Dansaani eebaani d'ufte lafa ch'ufa gahuu jirti, akuma gaafa isani guyya qara eeba Waaqa d'ageetani waan isii hubattani taate." 
Colossians1:7 Isani waan kana Epafra ira barattani; inni huji teenna keesa wahela dansa nuu tahe maro teennaafi aka dansa Kristo hojata. 
Colossians1:8 Inni aka Lubbuuni jaalala isanii kennite nuti odeese. 
Colossians1:9 Maro waan kanatifi nu haguma waan keesani d'ageenne Waaqa isanii kad'anna. Nu Waaqa kad'anna, aka inni fed'i ufi aka dansa isani barsiisu, hubachaafi qalbi Lubbuuni isaa namaa kennitu ch'ufaani." 
Colossians1:10 Yoosi aka Aabbooni fed'u teetani, hojja ch'ufa waan inni jaalatu tolchitani. Jireenni keesani waan isani hojattani ch'ufa keesati mid'aani baasa, isanileeni beekhuma Waaqa keesa guddattani." 
Colossians1:11 Irreeni guddinna isaa keesaa baatu ha isani jabeesitu, aka waan ch'ufa obsuma obsitani." 
Colossians1:12 Ammalle aka Abbaa galata deebiftani qilit'amtani, ka isani qit'eese qooda waan inni gumi isati khakhate isani kennu, finna ifsa isaa keesati." 
Colossians1:13 Inni ya jabeenna dukana keesaa nu baase, nagayaani finna Ilma isaatiini nu gahe." 
Colossians1:14 Ilma suniti nu balchoomse daba keenna nu araarame. 
Colossians1:15 Kristoni Waaqa imullanne fakaate Waaqa nu agarsiisa. Inni Ilma angafati, waan uumani ch'ufa ira jira." 
Colossians1:16 Wonti akanatiifi Waaqi waan lafafi gubba jira ch'ufa isaani uume, waan mullatafi ka imullannelle, hayyootafi, worra irre qabuufi, ka wo mohatuufi, ka jabeenna qabu ch'ufa. Waaqi waan lafafi gubba jira ch'ufa isaafi uume, isaani uume." 
Colossians1:17 Inni waan ch'ufa dura jira, isa keesa wonti ch'ufti fulla ufi qabdi." 
Colossians1:18 Inni mata nafa isaati, gumi isaati: inni yayaba gumiti, Ilma angafa ka duisa keesaa kaasani, aka inni waan ch'ufa keesa fulla qara argatu." 
Colossians1:19 Maro fed'i Waaqaatiifi Ilmi qit'ooma Waaqaa ufi keesaa qaba. 
Colossians1:20 Ilma isaatiini, Waaqi uumamaa ch'ufa gara ufi deebise. D'iiga Ilma isaa ka maskali gubbati jigeeni nagaya tolche, akanaani waan lafafi gubba jira ch'ufa gara ufi deebise." 
Colossians1:21 Duri wonti hamtuuni isani tolchitaniifi ta isani hereddani Waaqa ira isani fageesite, nyaapa isaa isani tolchite." 
Colossians1:22 Ammo amma maro duisa nafa Ilma isaatiifi Waaqi ya ufiti isani araarse aka isaani qulqulleese qit'oomse wollaala male fuula isaa duraani d'ufu. 
Colossians1:23 Tanaafi isanileeni d'ugefacha keesa jabaattani dura yau maltani, aka yayaba Oduuni Dansaani isanii kennite iraa inchochoone, ammalle aka abdi gaafa Odu Dansa d'ageetani argattani iraa ingorre. Oduuni Dansaani ta nama lafa ch'ufati odeesani tana; anini Pauloleeni ya hojattu isii tahe." 
Colossians1:24 Anini amma waan maro teesanii gaargaleefi gammada. Wonti akanatiifi, maro gaargala nafa kiyyatiifi, anini gaargala Kristoni maro nafa isaatiifi gaargale ka hafe hobaasa. Nafi isaa gumi isaati." 
Colossians1:25 Waaqi ya hojattu gumi isaa na tolche; inni huji tana aka dansooma keesaniifi tolchu naa kenne. Hujiini tuni aka dubbi Waaqa tana ch'ufa odeesu. 
Colossians1:26 Wonti kunini waan inni duri d'aloota ch'ufa d'osse ammo amma gumi ufiti mullise. 
Colossians1:27 Heregi Waaqa kana: aka waan guddo mama ka duri d'ossani amma gumi ufiti mullisu. Wonti qara d'ossani suni tana: Kristoni isani keesa jira, wonti kunini aka isani guddinna Waaqa argattani agarsiifti." 
Colossians1:28 Tanaafi nu waan Kristo nama ch'ufati odeesina. Nama ch'ufa gorsineti barsiimna, qalbi teenna ch'ufaani, aka nami ch'ufti Kristo keesati guddate fuula Waaqa duraani d'umnu." 
Colossians1:29 Aka waan kana guutu anini gaargale hojad'e irre jabdu ta na keesa hojatu; ta Yeso Kristoni na kenneeni. 
Colossians2:1 Eega me, aka anini isanifi worra Laodikia keesa jiru ch'ufaafi worra na imbeennele hojad'e isaniti hima." 
Colossians2:2 Wonti anini waan kana tolchuufi aka garaani worraa jabaate, worri ch'ufti jaalalaani wolti mataqe, dubbi d'uga ta hubachaani d'uga d'uftuuni argatu. Kara kanaani waan Waaqi duri d'osse argatani, wonti sunileeni Kristo." 
Colossians2:3 Isati qalibifi herega Waaqa ka d'ossani, namaa mullisa." 
Colossians2:4 Tanaafi anini amma isaniti hima: nami tokoleeni hasaa d'aratiini isani insobini, ato akuma fed'u dansa fakaatele." 
Colossians2:5 Wonti akanatiifi ato nafaani isani woliini injirrele lubbuuni woliini jirra; aka isani d'ugefachaani jabaattani Kristo keesa ejattani arginaani anini guddo gammada. 
Colossians2:6 Waan isani Kristo Yeso Aabbo keesani tolfattaniifi, isa keesa taa." 
Colossians2:7 Hidda keesani isa keesati baasa, jireenna keesani isa gubbati jaarad'a, d'ugefacha teesani keesati jabaad'a, akuma duri isani barsiisani. Hojja ch'ufa galata deebisa." 
Colossians2:8 Eegad'a, aka nami tokoleeni qalbi nama ta woma imbaaneeni isani insomne. Qalbiini suni waan nami wolbarsiisufi waan herega lafaa iraa d'ufti, Kristo ira ind'uftu." 
Colossians2:9 Wonti akanatiifi qit'oomi Waaqa ch'ufti nafuma Kristo keesa jira," 
Colossians2:10 isanileeni ya jireenna mijuu isa keesa argattani. Inni mohachafi jabeenna ch'ufa ira jira. 
Colossians2:11 Isa keesa qabanqaba isani qabani, qabanqaba nami tolchuuniti ammo qabanqaba Kristoti, ta jabeenna nafa dabdicha kana jala nama baasu." 
Colossians2:12 Wonti akanatiifi gaafa isani batisani, Kristo woliini isani awaalani, ammalle batiso teesani keesa Kristo woliini duisa keesaa isani kaasani, waan isani jabeenna Waaqaa, ka duisa keesaa isa kaase, d'ugefattaniifi." 
Colossians2:13 Duri isani maro daba keesanitiifi, ammalle waan gosa d'ibi ta Seera qabanqaba jala injirre taataniifi dootani. Ammo amma Waaqi ya kristo woliini isani ijeese! Waaqi ya daba keenna ch'ufa nu araarame." 
Colossians2:14 Inni ya gati hamtu nu qamnu balleese, seera isii ch'ufale balleese, mukha maskali gubbati fannise." 
Colossians2:15 Maskali gubbati Kristoni jabeenna mohachafi irre gubba balleese, waan suni ch'ufa aka waan duuli boojie galche diidati nama agarsiise." 
Colossians2:16 Tanaafi nami tokoleeni d'ufe waan nyaattani d'uddanifi, jila teesaniifi, yokhaani jila teesani ta baatitifi ta Sabatole, keesa seera isaniti intolchiini." 
Colossians2:17 Wonti suni ch'ufti gandidu waan hegeriiti; wonti d'uga Kristo. 
Colossians2:18 Nami tokoleeni waan daayya arguufi waan isani ira jiru ufi sehe waan keesani isani inhanqisiini, yokhaani kara d'aratiini, Ufi diqeesa, malaika kad'ad'a isaniini injed'iini. Nami akana kunini kiyyiba, waan qalbi qabu ufi sehe ammo waan ufi saaduufi inqabu;" 
Colossians2:19 ammalle Kristo, ka mataa isaatu ya jabeesu lakise. Qorqorti Kristo jalati nafi ch'ufti inquufa, mitafi maach'eerati wolti qaba, akuma Waaqi fed'u guddata." 
Colossians2:20 Isani ya Kristo woliini dootani, herega lafa la jalaa baatani. Eesaa aka nama lafa jirtani re? Isani maafi seera," 
Colossians2:21 Waan kana intuqiina, yokhaani Waan suni inuuniina, yokhaani Waan kaani inqabatina jed'u gula yaatani?" 
Colossians2:22 Wonti kunini ch'ufti barsiisafi seera nami tolche; yo gula deemanile ufuma baddi. 
Colossians2:23 Seeri kunini d'uguma waan qalbi qabu fakaata, yoyu irreeni malaika kad'ad'a, ufi diqeesa, nafa keesani garagalcha jed'u, Ammo dandae d'araa nafa nama ind'owu." 
Colossians3:1 Kristo woliini ya duisa keesaa isani kaasani. Tanaafi waan gubba jira barbaada, fulla Kristoni barch'uma ufi gubba tau, harka Waaqa ka mirga." 
Colossians3:2 Qalbi teesani waan lafa ira inkeyatiina, ammo waan gubba ira keyad'a." 
Colossians3:3 Wonti akanatiifi isani qara ya dootani, jireenna keesani Kristo woliini ya Waaqa keesati d'ossani." 
Colossians3:4 Jireenni keesani ka d'ugaa Kristo, gaafa inni mullatu, isanileeni isa woliini mullattani guddinna isaa qoodattani!" 
Colossians3:5 Yaada lafa, ka isani keesa jiru ka aka sharmut'oma fa t'urifa, d'araafa, fed'i hamtufi sabdooma, awaalu maltani. (Sabdoomi aka waan harkaani boch'ani kad'atani jira.)" 
Colossians3:6 Maro waan kanatifi dalansuuni Waaqa worra isa inch'aqamneti d'ufti. 
Colossians3:7 Isani duri waan akana kana keesa teetani, gaafa d'araa tana gula deemtani." 
Colossians3:8 Ammo amma waan kana ch'ufa lakisu maltani: dalansufi d'araafi woljibiti. Arabaafi murach'aani tokoleeni afaani keesani keesaa imbahiini. 
Colossians3:9 Wolinsobiina, waan isani finna dullachafi adaba isaa ka duri lakiftani" 
Colossians3:10 hareesa fud'attaniifi. Finni hareesi kunini waan Waaqi, aka isa uume fakeenna ufi gula haraa tolchu aka akasiini ufi isani beesisu." 
Colossians3:11 Maro waan kanatifi Yahudiini yokhaani gochiti d'ibiini injirtu, nama qabanqaba qabatefi ka inqabatini injiru, nyaapafi nami aada imbeenneleeni injiru, tisseefi balchaani injiru, ammo Kristo ch'allati jira, ammalle waan ch'ufa isumati keesa jira!" 
Colossians3:12 Isani gumi Waaqaati; inni isani jaalate, isani fohate. Tanaafi naasufi arjoomafi ufi diqeesitifi laana deemtifi obsa qabaachu maltani." 
Colossians3:13 Woli qarqaara, wolii araarama, yo nami wold'abe ch'ufa. Akuma Aabbooni isani araarame, isanileeni wolii araarama." 
Colossians3:14 Waan kana ch'ufa jaalalati darad'a, ta wold'aqisaani isanii d'uftu." 
Colossians3:15 Nagayi Kristoni namaa kennu ha garaa keesani qoruti; wonti akanatiifi Waaqi garaa tokooni nagaya kanati isani ch'ufa yaame. Ammalle galata isa deebisa. 
Colossians3:16 Dubbini Kristo, ha guddatte, garaa keesani keesa ha teetu. Qalbi ch'ufaani wolbarsiisa, wolgorsa. Waaqaa faarsa, sirba isaa sirba, faaru isaa d'ahad'a, garaa keesaniini Waaqa galata deebisa." 
Colossians3:17 Waan isani jettaniifi waan tolchitani ch'ufa keesa maqa Aabbo Yesotiini tolcha, ammalle maqa isaatiini Waaqa Abba galata deebisa." 
Colossians3:18 Nad'eeni ha d'iirsole ufiti ch'eertu, wonti suni waan aada Kristiana keesa tolchu malani." 
Colossians3:19 D'iirsole, nad'eeni teesani jaalad'a, gaargalchitani imitisiina." 
Colossians3:20 Ijoolle, waan ch'ufa keesa worra keesani saalfad'a; wonti akanatiifi Aabbooni akana fed'a." 
Colossians3:21 Abbooti, ijoolle teesani imufachisiina, hegeri garaa hamaatti." 
Colossians3:22 Tissele, aka abbooti teesani gammachiiftani, hojja worri isani ilaalu ch'alla inch'aqasiina, ammo hojja ch'ufa ga ga garaa dansa ka Waaqa sodaatuni ch'aqasa." 
Colossians3:23 Waan tolchitani ch'ufa keesa garaa tokooni tolcha, aka waan nama inhojanne ammo Aabbo hojattani." 
Colossians3:24 Qaabad'a, Aabbooni galata isanii deebisa; waan inni gumi ufiti olkaye inargattani. Wonti akanatiifi Abbaani isani hojattaniifi Kristo." 
Colossians3:25 Nama waan hamtu tolchu, abba ufi taanaanile waan hamtu isa tolchani, Waaqi nama ch'ufa aka tokotu herega." 
Colossians4:1 Abbooti, tissele teesani waan dansa tolcha. Aka isanileeni Abba gubba qabdani qaabad'a." 
Colossians4:2 Hojja ch'ufa kad'ad'a, indad'abiina, ilaafiina, Waaqaa galata deebisa." 
Colossians4:3 Nule Waaqa kad'ad'a, aka inni balbala nu bane nu dubbi isaa odeesine waan d'ossa Kristo himnu. Maro waan sunitiifi anini hid'aansa keesa jira." 
Colossians4:4 Waaqa kad'ad'a, aka anini kara qajeelaani odeese nami hubatu." 
Colossians4:5 Qalbefad'a, worra d'ugefacha inqamne dura adabaani yaa, qoomni argattani ch'ufa imballeesina, woiini tolcha." 
Colossians4:6 Yo hasooftani dubbi dansa miooftu hasaa. Ammalle nama woi isani gaafate qajeelcha deebisaafi. 
Colossians4:7 Oboleesi keenna Tikikoni, ka aka dansa ufi baase huji Aabbo na woliini hojate odu tiyya ch'ufa isaniti odeesa." 
Colossians4:8 Maro waan kanatifi anini isa gara keesani erga, aka inni waan nu keesa jirru isaniti hime isani gammachiisu." 
Colossians4:9 Onesimoni, oboleesa keenna ka d'uga ka gumi teesani keesa jiru, wahela isaati. Waan nu keesa jirru ch'ufa worrati isaniti odeesa." 
Colossians4:10 Aristarkoni, ka hid'aansa keesa na woliini jiruufi Marikoni, dubriini Barnaba, nagaya isanii d'aamani. Isani ya qara d'aamsa waan isaa d'ageetani, aka yo inni d'ufu isa bulchitani." 
Colossians4:11 Yesoni ka Yusto jed'anileeni nagaya d'aama. Worri Yahudi ka d'ugefate, ka Finna Waaqati jed'e nu woliini hojatu jara kana ch'alla; worri guddo na qarqaare." 
Colossians4:12 Epafraleeni ka gumi teesani, ka hojattu Kristo Yeso, nagaya d'aama. Inni hojja ch'ufa guddo Waaqa isanii kad'ata, aka isani jabaattani guddattani aka dansa d'ugefattani fed'i Waaqa ch'aqaftani." 
Colossians4:13 Anini waan huji inni isanii hojate isaniti himu indandaa, ta gumi Laodikiafi Hierapolile." 
Colossians4:14 Luka ch'ireesa keennatiifi Demani nagaya isani d'aamani. 
Colossians4:15 Oboleyaani Laodikia keesa jirtu nagaya nu fuud'a, ammalle Nimfafi gumi mana isii keesati wolwoldeetule." 
Colossians4:16 Eegi tatabe tana soomtani, qorqorad'a aka gumi Laodikialeti soomani. Tatabe gumiini Laodikia isanii t'aaftule sooma." 
Colossians4:17 Arkiponi, Huji Aabbo ta harka keetiti kennani hojad'u guuti jed'iini." 
Colossians4:18 Anini waan kana harka kiyyaani t'aafa: Pauloni nagaya isani fuud'a. Haada naani hid'ani inded'ina. Eebiti Waaqa isani woliini jiraatiinna. 
1Thessalonians1:1 Paulofi Silwanofi Timotheoti tatabe tana gara gumi Thesalonike, ta Waaqa Abbatiifi Aabbo Yeso Kristoni taka taate t'aafa. Eebafi nagayi ha keesani tahu." 
1Thessalonians1:2 Nu hojja ch'ufa maro teesaniifi Waaqaa galata deebimne kad'acha teenna keesa maqa keesani d'oomna. 
1Thessalonians1:3 Wonti akanatiifi nu Waaqafi Abba keenna durati qaabanna, aka isani d'ugefacha teesani hujiini hojattani, aka jaalalti teesani huji guddo isani tolchisiifte, ammalle aka abdiini teesani Aabbo Yeso Kristo keesa jabdu." 
1Thessalonians1:4 Nu imbeenna, oboleyaani teenna, aka Waaqi isani jaalate isani fohate, aka nama isaa taatani." 
1Thessalonians1:5 Nu Odu Dansa afaani ch'allaani isanii ind'umneeni, ammo jabeennaafi Lubbu Qulqullofi d'uga malaikatini isanii d'umne. Aka nu gaafa isani woliini jiru teenne imbeetani; nu maro dansuma teesaniifi teenne." 
1Thessalonians1:6 Nuufi Aabbo ufi fakeesitani; ammo ato guddo gaargaltanile, gammada Lubbu Qulqullo iraa argataniini dubbi aka dansa fud'atani." 
1Thessalonians1:7 Tanaafi isani jara d'ugefate ka Makedoniatiifi ka Akaya akheekha taatani. 
1Thessalonians1:8 Wonti akanatiifi dubbini Aabbo isani ira baate, Makedoniafi Akaya ch'alla ingeenne ammo oduuni d'ugefacha isani Waaqa d'ugefattani ya fulla ch'ufa geete. Wonti nu jechu malle injirtu." 
1Thessalonians1:9 Nami ch'ufti waan gaafa nu gara keesani d'umne, ka isani aka dansa nu bulchitani, dubbata, aka isani waan harkaani boch'ani lakiftani Waaqati deebitani, Waaqa d'uga ka jiru hojattani," 
1Thessalonians1:10 Ilma isaa ka gubba gadi d'ufu eegattani, Ilma isaa Yeso, ka inni duisa keesaa kaase, dalansu Waaqa ta hegeri d'uftu duraa nu baasu." 
1Thessalonians2:1 Isaniyu imbeetani, oboleyaani teenna, aka imaltuuni nu gara keesani d'anne guddo wo baate." 
1Thessalonians2:2 Isaniyu imbeetani, aka Filipi keesati nu d'aanani nu arabsani, ato fulla teesani Thesalonike ind'ufiini. Ammo Waaqi keenna jabeenna nuu kenne, aka Odu Dansa ta gara isaati d'ufte isaniti hasau insodaanne, ato nami hedduuni didele." 
1Thessalonians2:3 Wonti akanatiifi woni nu isani kad'annu wollaalafi d'araa hamtuufi sobisa tokole inqabdu. 
1Thessalonians2:4 Ammo nu hojja ch'ufa aka Waaqi fed'u hasoomna, maro inni nu jaalate Odu Dansa nuu kenneefi. Nu nama gammachiisu imfeenu, ammo Waaqa ka herega garaa keenna ilaalu gammachiisu feena." 
1Thessalonians2:5 Isani imbeetani, aka nu hasaa namaani sosomnuuni ind'ufiini, yokhaani sabdooma keenna hasaani ind'ossine Waaqaati d'uga teenna!" 
1Thessalonians2:6 Nu nama nu faarsu, isanifi nama d'ibile imbarbaanne," 
1Thessalonians2:7 ato aka ergattu Kristo nu waan feenu sila dandeenne isani ira barbaannele. Ammo nu gaafa isani woliini jirru guddo isani qorqoranne, akuma haati ijoolle ufi qorqorattu." 
1Thessalonians2:8 Maro jaalala nu isani jaalanneefi, nu kurfo jirra aka Odu Dansa ta Waaqa ch'alla isanii kenninuuniti, ammo aka jireenna keennale isanii kenninu. Nu guddo isani jaalanne!" 
1Thessalonians2:9 Aka nu gaargalaani hojanne isani inqaabattaniiyu? Nu halkani guyya hojanne aka, ato Odu Dansa ta Waaqa hasoomnu, isani ingaargalchine." 
1Thessalonians2:10 Isani nu d'uga, Waaqileeni nu d'uga: adabi keenna isani worra d'ugefateti qulqullo qajeela, wollaalale inqabu." 
1Thessalonians2:11 Isani imbeetani, nu isani ch'ufa akuma abbaani ilmaani ufi heregu herenne." 
1Thessalonians2:12 Isani jabeesine, isani qarqaare, jireenna Waaqa isani yaame finnafi jabeenna isaa isanii qoodu gammachiisu, keesa taa jenne." 
1Thessalonians2:13 Ammalle maro waan kanatifi nu hojja ch'ufa galata Waaqa deebimna. Gaafa nu dubbi Waaqa isanii d'umneeni, isani aka dubbini suni ta namatiini, ammo d'uguma dubbi Waaqaa ch'aqaftani d'ugefattani. Waaqi jiddu isani worra d'ugefate hojachu jira." 
1Thessalonians2:14 Isanileeni, oboleyaani tiyya, akuma gumiini Waaqa ta Kristo, Yeso, ta Yudea keesa jirtu taate, taatani. Akuma worri lafa teesani isani gaargalche, akuma suni worrale Yahudiini" 
1Thessalonians2:15 ta Aabbo Yesofi raagoota ijeefte nule d'ibde worrale gaargalchite. Guddo Waaqa dalansiisani! Nama ch'ufa guddo jibbani! 
1Thessalonians2:16 Worri dubbi baafama namaa kennitu aka gosa d'ibiti hasoomnu nu d'owu fed'e. Dabi worri guyya ch'ufa tolchu la ammatana muumme bahe. Amma eege dalansuuni Waaqa ya worra d'aqabde. 
1Thessalonians2:17 Ammo oboleyaani, gaafa nu diqo toko gargari baane heregaani gargari imbaane ammo nafaani gargari baane guddo ch'ekhoofne sila isani argu feene!" 
1Thessalonians2:18 Gara keesani deebiu feene. Anini Pauloni maro heddu deebiu fed'e, ammo Sheet'anati nu d'owe." 
1Thessalonians2:19 Taatule abdi teennaafi gammada keennafi wonti nu fuula Aabbo Yeso durati, yo inni deebiu, ufi guddimnuufi isanumaaniti?" 
1Thessalonians2:20 Guddinnaafi gammachuuni teenna isani! 
1Thessalonians3:1 Obsu dad'amnaani nu aka Athene keesa koba teennu buufanne," 
1Thessalonians3:2 oboleesa keenna Timotheo, ka nu woliini Waaqa hojate Odu Dansa ta Kristo odeesu ergine. Nu isa ergine, aka inni isani jabeese d'ugefacha teesani qarqaaru," 
1Thessalonians3:3 aka isaniini tokoleeni maro ilaalachatiifi ilaalaamne. Isani imbeetani aka gaargali akana kunini fed'i Waaqa. 
1Thessalonians3:4 Wonti akanatiifi, ato isani woliini jirru, aka nu gaargalchani durati isaniti himne; aka isani beetani wonti sunini ya taate." 
1Thessalonians3:5 Maro waan kanatifi anini obsu dad'abe Timotheo erge, D'aqi, d'ugefacha worra suni ilaali jed'eeni, aka Sheet'ani isani ilaalate, hujiini teenna ch'ufti lafati inhamne!" 
1Thessalonians3:6 Timotheoni amma ya fulla teesani nuti deebie, ya Odu Dansa ta d'ugefachaafi jaalala teesani nutiini gale. Inni ya aka isani hojja ch'ufa waan keenna dansa hereddani nuti hime, ammalle akuma nu isani argu feenu isanileeni nu argu feetani." 
1Thessalonians3:7 Tanaafi gaargalafi lalefacha teenna ch'ufa keesati ya maro teesaniifi garaa jabaanne, oboleyaani teenna. D'ugefacha teesaniti nu jabeese;" 
1Thessalonians3:8 wonti akanatiifi yo isani jireenna keesani keesati Aabbo keesa jabaattani nu injiraanna. 
1Thessalonians3:9 Ammatana maro teesaniifi galata Waaqa deebisu indandeenna. Nu galata Waaqaa deebimna waan isanii jenne gammada arganeefi. 
1Thessalonians3:10 Nu halkani guyya garaa keenna ch'ufaani kad'anna, aka nu woli agarre waan d'ugefachaani teesani feetu isanii kenninu." 
1Thessalonians3:11 Waaqa Abba keennafi Aabbo Yesoni kara nu hariinna, aka nu gara keesani d'umnu!" 
1Thessalonians3:12 Aabbooni jaalala isani woli jaalattani nama d'ibile jallattani isanii guddisiina, akuma nuleeni isani jaalannu." 
1Thessalonians3:13 Kara kanaani inni garaa isani jabeese, fuula Waaqafi Abba keenna durati qit'ooftani qulqullo taatani, gaafa Aabbo Yesoni jara isa d'ugefatu ch'ufa woliini d'ufu." 
1Thessalonians4:1 Dubbi buufata, oboleyaani, isani aka teetani Waaqa gammachiiftani nura ya barattani. Haguma duriiti isani akasuma teetani. Amma nu isani kad'anna, maqa Aabbo Yesotiini, aka isani hagasile ira jabaattani." 
1Thessalonians4:2 Wonti akasitiifi waan nu jabeenna Aabbo Yesotiini isani barsiimne imbeetani. 
1Thessalonians4:3 Wonti Waaqi isani iraa fed'u tana: inni isanii qulqullooftani algalooma lagattani fed'a. 
1Thessalonians4:4 Nami d'iira ch'ufti aka worra Waaqa imbeenne, ka d'araa nafaa hamtu gula yau intolchiini; ammo ha kara dansa qulqullooni niiti ufi woliini tau." 
1Thessalonians4:5  
1Thessalonians4:6 Akanaani nami tokoleeni oboleesa ufiti dabe waan isaa iraa imfud'atiini. Nu waan kana qara isaniti himne, ya isani guddo gorsine, aka Aabbooni worra waan akana kana tolchu balleesu." 
1Thessalonians4:7 Waaqi, Algalooma keesa taa nuuni injenne, ammo Qulqullooma keesa taa jed'e." 
1Thessalonians4:8 Tanaafi nami barsiisa tana dide ch'ufti nama indinne ammo Waaqa ka Lubbu ufi Qulqullo isanii kennu dida. 
1Thessalonians4:9 Wonti anini, Nama d'ugefatu jaalad'a jed'e t'aafuufi injirtu. Waaqi ya aka isani woli jaalattani isani barsiise." 
1Thessalonians4:10 Ammalle oboleyaani Makedonia keesa jirtu ch'ufa ya akasi jaalattani. Tanaafi nu isani kad'anna, oboleyaani, aka hagasira jaalattani." 
1Thessalonians4:11 Jabaad'a, nagayaani taa, waan biyyaa keesa inseeniina, harka keesaniini hojad'a, akuma nu qara isaniti himne." 
1Thessalonians4:12 Akanaani worri ind'ugefatiini isanii ch'eere foka, duuba akasiini waan feetani nama tokole inkad'attani." 
1Thessalonians4:13 Oboleyaani, nu isanii waan d'uga ka worra due dabre barattani feena, aka isani aka worra abdi inqamne ilaalefanne." 
1Thessalonians4:14 Nu aka Yesoni due kae d'ugefanna; tanaafi aka Waaqi worra d'ugefate ka duele isa woliini d'ufuuni ind'ugefanna. 
1Thessalonians4:15 Barsiisaani Aabbo ta nu isani barsiimnu tana: nu worri gaafa Aabbooni deebiu jirru, worra qara due kaani dura iyaanu." 
1Thessalonians4:16 Qonqo jabeennati d'ufa, qonqo malaika guddo, qonqo magalata Waaqa, Aabbooni gaafasi gubbaa gadi bua! Worri ato Kristo d'ugefatu due qara duisa keesaa kaa;" 
1Thessalonians4:17 nu worra gaafasi jirru ch'ufa dumansa keesati worra kaani woliini wolti guurani, gubbati Aabbooni wolwoldeenna. Duuba guyya ch'ufa Aabbo woliini teena." 
1Thessalonians4:18 Tanaafi dubbi tanaani woljabeesa. 
1Thessalonians5:1 Wonti hojja woni kunini ch'ufti taatu isanii t'aafuufi injirtu. 
1Thessalonians5:2 Wonti akanatiifi isani imbeetani, aka Guyyaani Aabbo aka hattuuni halkaniini d'uftu d'ufu."
