1Thessalonians5:3 Yo nami, Wonti ch'ufti nagaya bad'aad'a jed'u, badiini tassa d'ufti! Nami tokoleeni duraa imbahu. Aka nad'eeni ch'iniinfatu jirti." 
1Thessalonians5:4 Ammo oboleyaani, isani dukana keesa injirtani, guyyaani suni tassa isaniti ind'ufiini." 
1Thessalonians5:5 Isaniini ch'ufti worra ifsa, ka guyyaati. Nu ka halkanitiiniti yokhaani ka dukanaatiiniti." 
1Thessalonians5:6 Tanaafi nu aka biyya d'ibi rafu himmalle; hojja ch'ufa kurfo teenne eegu malle. 
1Thessalonians5:7 Nami halkani rafe halkani machaa. 
1Thessalonians5:8 Ammo nu ka guyyaati, kurfo tau malle. D'ugefachaafi jaalala aka ubaara qomati keyachu malle, d'aabu teenna ta baafamale aka ruufa marachu malle." 
1Thessalonians5:9 Waaqi aka nu dalansu isaatiini gaargalu nu imfohanne, ammo aka baafama maro Aabbo keenna Yeso Kristotiifi argannuufi nu fohate." 
1Thessalonians5:10 Inni maro teennaafi due, aka nu isa woliini teennu, ato gaafa inni d'ufu nu jiraanne yokhaani doonele." 
1Thessalonians5:11 Maro waan kanatifi woljabeesa, wolqarqaara, akuma amma tolchitani kana." 
1Thessalonians5:12 Nu isani kad'anna, oboleyaani, aka isani worra Aabbooni fohate, ka isani barsiise gorsu, ch'eertanifi fokitani." 
1Thessalonians5:13 Ulfeesa, jaalad'a, maro huji worri hojatuufi. Nagayaani woliini taa." 
1Thessalonians5:14 Nu isani kad'anna, oboleyaani, worra woma inhojanne gorsa, nama ch'eeru jabeesa, lalaafa qarqaara, nama ch'ufa obsa." 
1Thessalonians5:15 Qorqorad'a, aka nami tokoleeni haalo woli imfuune, hojja ch'ufa waan dansa wolifi nama d'ibile tolcha." 
1Thessalonians5:16 Guyya ch'ufa gammada," 
1Thessalonians5:17 hojja ch'ufa Waaqa kad'ad'a," 
1Thessalonians5:18 waan ch'ufa keesati galata deebisa. Wonti Waaqi isani ira fed'u tana, jireenna keesani ka Kristo keesa jiru." 
1Thessalonians5:19 Lubbu Qulqullo ind'aamfiina; 
1Thessalonians5:20 dubbi hafuura Waaqa qabdu intufatiina. 
1Thessalonians5:21 Waan ch'ufa laalad'a: waan dansa olkeyad'a," 
1Thessalonians5:22 hameenna aka ch'ufa lagad'a. 
1Thessalonians5:23 Waaqi nagaya nuu kennu, ka is isaa isani tolfatiinna, lubbufi onneefi nafa keesani wollaala ira d'owiina, gaafa Aabbo Yeso Kristoni d'ufu." 
1Thessalonians5:24 Nami isani yaamu jiru waan suni dandae intolcha, inni ka d'ugefatani!" 
1Thessalonians5:25 Nule Waaqa kad'ad'a, oboleyaani tiyya." 
1Thessalonians5:26 Oboleyaani ch'ufa d'ungo oboleyaanitiini nagaya fuud'a. 
1Thessalonians5:27 Anini isani kad'ad'a, jabeenna Aabbootiini, aka isani tatabe tana oboleyaani ch'ufaa soomtani." 
1Thessalonians5:28 Eebiti Aabbo Yeso Kristo isani woliini tahinna. 
2Thessalonians1:1 Paulofi Silwanofi Timotheoti tatabe tana gara gumi Thesalonike, ta Abba keennafi Aabbo Yeso Kristoni taka taate t'aafa." 
2Thessalonians1:2 Waaqa Abbaafi Aabbo Yeso Kristoni eebafi nagaya isanii kenninna. 
2Thessalonians1:3 Nu hojja ch'ufa maro teesaniifi Waaqa galata deebisu malle, oboleyaani. Nu akasi tolchu malle, maro d'ugefachaani teesani guddo daramte, ammalle jaalalti isani woljaalattani guddatteefi." 
2Thessalonians1:4 Maro waan kanatifi nu gumi Waaqa keesa dansooma keesani dubbanna. Aka isani obsitani d'ugefattani dubbanna, gaargalafi d'ipu isani argattani keesa." 
2Thessalonians1:5 Beesisi qorsuma Waaqa ta d'ugaa kana, maro waan kana ch'ufatiifi isani Finna Waaqa ka isani amma gaargalufiti jirtani kana ya maltani." 
2Thessalonians1:6 Waaqi waan qajeela intolcha: inni worra isani gaargalchu ingaargalcha," 
2Thessalonians1:7 gaargaltanile isanifi nule inqarqaara. Inni gaafa Aabbo Yesoni malaika isaa guddo woliini gubba mullatu waan kana tolcha," 
2Thessalonians1:8 ibida bobauuni, aka worra Waaqa imbeenneefi ka d'aamsa qulqullo Yeso Kristo inch'aqamne gaargalchu." 
2Thessalonians1:9 Worri Waaqa imbeenne suni fuula Waaqaatiifi jabeenna isaa gudda duraa kaasani gaargala haga jiru jireenna argata. 
2Thessalonians1:10 Guyya Yesoni guddinni gumi ufitiifi ulfinna nama isaa d'ugefate, ch'ufa ira argachu d'ufu, isanileeni worra suni keesa jirtani, maro isani d'aamsa nu isaniti hime d'ugefataniifi." 
2Thessalonians1:11 Wonti nu hojja ch'ufa Waaqa isanii kad'annuufi tana. Nu Waaqa keenna isanii kad'anna, aka isani jireenna inni iti isani yaame argattani. Jabeenna isaatiini inni yaada dansa ka isani feetani isanii kenne huji teesani dansa ta d'ugefacha guutinna." 
2Thessalonians1:12 Kara kanaani maqaani Aabbo keenna Yeso guddinna isani ira argata, isanileeni isa ira argattani, eeba Waaqaatiifi ta Aabbo Yeso Kristotiini." 
2Thessalonians2:1 Waan d'ufiisa Aabbo keenna Yeso Kristotiifi woldeenna nu isa woliini wolwoldeennu: anini isani kad'ad'a, oboleyaani," 
2Thessalonians2:2 aka iworere yokhaani indalanne, yo guyyaani Aabbo ya d'ufe jed'ani. Hegeri waan kana nama fage yokhaani ka barsiisuti jed'e, yokhaani nuti tatabe tana keesati t'aafa jed'anifa." 
2Thessalonians2:3 Nami tokoleeni kara tokoleeni isani insobini. Guyyaani ind'ufu, haga Loli guddaani tahe Nami Hamaani ka fulla ibidati male mullatuuti." 
2Thessalonians2:4 Waan nami kad'atuufi ka nami guddisu ch'ufa inni indida. Inni waan ch'ufa ira ufi guddise, d'aqe Mana Waaqa keesa tae Waaqa ufiini jed'a!" 
2Thessalonians2:5 Inqaabattaniiyu? Waan kana ch'ufa anini ato isani woliini jiru isaniti hime. 
2Thessalonians2:6 Ammo woiti waan kana amma tahu d'owa, isani waan suni inuma beetani. Yo hojjaani geete Hamaani suni imullata." 
2Thessalonians2:7 Hameenni nami hubachu indandeenne amma lafa jira, ammo wonti tahu malte intaatu, haga namicha waan suni d'owu kara keesaa gorsaniti." 
2Thessalonians2:8 Jennaani Hamaani Suni mullate, Aabbo Yesoni hafuura afaani isaatiini isa ijeese, d'ufiisa isaa ka guddinnatiini lafaa isa balleesa." 
2Thessalonians2:9 Hamaani Kaani jabeenna Sheet'anatiini d'ufe mamisa gosa heddutiifi akheekha d'ara aka heddu tolche," 
2Thessalonians2:10 soba hedduuni worra badu soba. Maro d'uga worra baaftu jaalachu didaniifi badani. 
2Thessalonians2:11 Maro waan kanatifi Waaqi badi hamtu worrati erga, aka waan d'ara d'ugefatani." 
2Thessalonians2:12 Duuba namaama ind'ugefatiini, ka daba jaalatu ch'ufa, wollaala iti murani." 
2Thessalonians2:13 Hojja ch'ufa maro teesaniifi Waaqaa galata deebisu malle, isani oboleyaani Aabbooni jaalatu. Wonti akanatiifi Waaqi haguma qara isani fohate, aka baafamtani, waan Lubbuuni isani qulqulleesite isani d'uga fud'attaniifi." 
2Thessalonians2:14 Waaqi Odu Dansa ta nu isaniti hasoomneeni isani yaame; wonti inni isani yaameefi aka isani qooda guddinna Aabbo Yeso Kristo argattani. 
2Thessalonians2:15 Tanaafi oboleyaani, jabaad'a, ejad'a, d'uga nu barsiisafi tatabe teenna keesaleti isani barsiimne qaabad'a." 
2Thessalonians2:16 Aabbo Yeso Kristofi Waaqi Abba keenna, ka nu jaalate eeba ufitiifi jannooma hegerifi abdi dansa nuu kenne," 
2Thessalonians2:17 garaa keesani jabeese isani kibina, aka waan dansa ch'alla dubbattani tolchitani." 
2Thessalonians3:1 Tanaafi, dubbi buufata, oboleyaani, Waaqa nuu kad'ad'a, aka dubbini Aabbo fulla ch'ufa geete dabsattu, akuma jiddu teesaniti taate." 
2Thessalonians3:2 Ammalle Waaqa kad'ad'a, aka inni harka nama hamamatiifi ka dabaati nuu baasu. Wonti akanatiifi nami ch'ufti d'ugefacha inqabu." 
2Thessalonians3:3 Ammo Aabbooni ka d'ugaati. Inni isani jabeeseti Sheet'anale isani iraa d'owa. 
2Thessalonians3:4 Aabbooni ya isani nu d'ugefachiise; ammalle nu imbeenna, aka isani waan nu isaniti himnu ch'ufa arrafi hegerile guuttani:" 
2Thessalonians3:5 Aabbooni jaalala Waaqaatiifi obsa Kristoni namaa kennuti isani akheekhiina. 
2Thessalonians3:6 Maqa Aabbo Yeso Kristotiini isaniti himna, oboleyaani teenna: oboleyaani huji hojachu diddu ch'ufa lagad'a, ka waan nu barsiimne gula indeemne." 
2Thessalonians3:7 Isaniyu imbeetani, aka waan nu tolchine tolchu maltani. Gaafa isani woliini jirru nu huji hojachu indinne." 
2Thessalonians3:8 Qarqaarsa nama tokole bilaasha imfud'anne. Ammo halkani guyya gaargalle hojanne, aka nu nama tokole ind'imne." 
2Thessalonians3:9 Nu waan kana maro waan nu argachu malle nuu kenna jechu indandeenneefi, jechu indinne, ammo aka akheekha dansa isani agarsiimnuufi dinne." 
2Thessalonians3:10 Gaafa isani woliini jirru, Nami hojachu didu sagale inyaatini jenne." 
2Thessalonians3:11 Wonti nu waan kana jennuufi, waan aka nami gari jiddu teesani keesa huji hojachu dide waan nama d'ibi ch'alla yaku jiru d'ageenneefi." 
2Thessalonians3:12 Maqa Aabbo Yeso Kristotiini jara suni himne gorsina: Huji teesani laana hojad'a, ufi bulcha." 
2Thessalonians3:13 Ammo isani, oboleyaani teenna, waan dansa tolchu indad'abiina." 
2Thessalonians3:14 Nami toko hegeri d'aamsa nu tatabe tana keesati t'aamnu inguutufa. Nama suni ilaala, lagad'a, aka inni ufumaani ch'eeru." 
2Thessalonians3:15 Ammo aka nyaapa isa intolchiina, aka oboleesa gorsa." 
2Thessalonians3:16 Aabbooni, ka nagaya namaa kennu, hojja ch'ufaafi guyya ch'ufa nagaya isani guutinna. Aabbooni isani ch'ufa woliini ha tau." 
2Thessalonians3:17 Waan kana anini harkuma kiyyaani t'aafa: Pauloni nagaya isani fuud'a. Anini tatabe ch'ufa akana maqa kiyya jalati t'aafa; anini akana t'aafa. 
2Thessalonians3:18 Eebiti Aabbo Yeso Kristo isani ch'ufa woliini tahinna. 
1Timothy1:1 Maqaani kiyya Paulo, anini ergattu Kristo Yeso, fed'i Waaqa Qarqaarsa keennatiifi ta Kristo Yeso abdi keenna gula." 
1Timothy1:2 Gara Timotheo, ilma kiyya ka d'uga d'ugefacha keesa: Waaqa Abbaafi Kristo Yesoni, Aabbooni keenna, eebafi naasufi nagaya si kenninna." 
1Timothy1:3 Anini si Efeso keesa teetu fed'a, akuma anini gaafa Makedonia deeme siti hime kaani. Nami gari achiti dubbi d'ara barsiisu jira, jara suniini, Lakisa jed'i." 
1Timothy1:4 Odu duritiifi maqa heddu ka ababoota, Lakisa jed'iini; wonti kunini wolmormiti ch'allaani d'ufti; fed'i Waaqa ta d'ugefacha ch'allaani beekhani inguutu." 
1Timothy1:5 Wonti nu seera kana baamneefi, aka jaalalti ta garaa dansa keesaa baatuufi ta qalbi dansaafi d'ugefacha dansa keesaa baatu, mullattu." 
1Timothy1:6 Nami gari ya waan kana lakise, hasaa daalluma gula bade." 
1Timothy1:7 Barsiiftu seera Waaqa tahu fed'ani, ammo dubbi ufitiifi waan jabeesani odeesani suni inhubatani." 
1Timothy1:8 Aka Seeri dansa imbeenna, yo aada gula tolfatani." 
1Timothy1:9 Ammo wonti hubachu malani, seera nama dansaafi imid'aasine ammo worra akana tolchuufi mid'aasani — ka seera ch'absufi, ka wo yakufi ka Waaqa imbeenneefi ka daba tolchuufi worra aada Waaqa qulqullo gula iyaanefi worra abbaafi haad'a ufi ijeesufi ka nama fit'ufi" 
1Timothy1:10 sharmut'afi midiisafi, nama nama d'ibi hatufi ka d'ara dubbate kiyyibu, yokhaani ka barsiisa d'uga lakise waan d'ibi tolchu." 
1Timothy1:11 Barsiisaani Odu Dansa ta harka kiyyati kennani tana, Odu Dansa ta Waaqa gudda abba eeba iraa d'uftu." 
1Timothy1:12 Anini Kristo Aabbo keenna galata deebisa, ka jabeenna anini huji isaatiini hojad'u naa kenne. Anini waan inni na herege, aka anini huji isaa hojad'u na fohateefi, galata deebisaafi," 
1Timothy1:13 ato anini duri isa tufad'e gaargalche arabsele. Ammo Waaqi na nahe, maro anini d'ugefacha d'abe ato inhubatiini wollaaleefi." 
1Timothy1:14 Ammalle Aabbooni eeba ufi guddise naa kenne, d'ugefachaafi jaalala ta Kristo Yeso keesati teenna taate woliini." 
1Timothy1:15 Jechi kuni ka d'ugaati, fud'atani d'ugefachu malani: Kristo Yesoni aka nama daba baasuufi lafa d'ufe. Guddaani worra suni ana," 
1Timothy1:16 ammo maro tanaafi Waaqi ka ana gudda worra dabati nahe, aka Kristo Yesoni obsa ufi narati agarsiisu, aka anini worra hegeri isa d'ugefate jireenna argatu akheekha tahu." 
1Timothy1:17 Gara Hayyu haga hegeri tau, ka indoonefi ka imullanne, Waaqa tokocha, guddinnaafi ulfinni ha isaa tahu, ammafi hegerile! Amini." 
1Timothy1:18 Ilma kiyya, Timotheo, anini d'aamsa kana siti d'aamad'a. Dubbi fagiisa ta duri waan kanke faddu gula d'aamad'a. Dubbini sunini ha woraanaa wonte sii taatu, hojja atini had'iisa dansa haate," 
1Timothy1:19 d'ugefachaafi herega dansa horattu. Nami gari herega ufi dansa suni gula yau dide, d'ugefacha ufi balleese." 
1Timothy1:20 Himenayofi Iskandani jara kana keesa jirani anini ya harka Sheet'anati worra kenne, aka worri iti deebie Waaqa inarabsine." 
1Timothy2:1 Qaraa fiit'e, waan anini jed'u, kad'achaafi yaamachafi galata Waaqa deebisiti maro nama ch'ufatiifi tolcha;" 
1Timothy2:2 ammalle hayyootafi worra lafa fidu ch'ufa kad'ad'a aka nu jireenna dansa ka nagayaa ke teennu, Waaqa beekhitiifi adaba dansaani." 
1Timothy2:3 Wonti kunini dansa, ammalle Waaqa Qarqaarsa keenna gammachiifti." 
1Timothy2:4 Inni nama ch'ufa ka baafame d'uga baratu fed'a. 
1Timothy2:5 Wonti akanatiifi Waaqa toko ch'allati jira, ammalle ka Waaqafi nama woltiini d'ufu namicha toko, ka Kristo Yeso jed'ani," 
1Timothy2:6 ka nafa ufii kenne akasiini nama ch'ufaa baasu. Guyyaani geennaani, dubbi suni ya d'ugeesani." 
1Timothy2:7 Maro waan kanatifi aka anini ergattufi, barsiiftu gosa d'ibi tahu na ergani, aka d'aamsa d'ugefachaatifi ka d'ugaa odeesu. Anini kiyyibuuti injiru d'uga dubbachuu jira!" 
1Timothy2:8 Anini nama ch'ufa ka fulla ch'ufati Waaqa kad'atu fed'a, nama Waaqa jaalatu ka dalansufi wolmormiti male harka olqabate kad'atu." 
1Timothy2:9 Anini nad'eenile ta ch'eerte woya isi fakaattu keyattu fed'a; mata aka shooba filatani, worqifi dooqafi woya gati gugurdo keyachu himmalle," 
1Timothy2:10 ammo isiini huji dansa aka nad'eeni aada beetu ha hojattuuti. 
1Timothy2:11 Nad'eeni ch'alleesafi obsaani wo barachu malte. 
1Timothy2:12 Anini nad'eeni d'iira barsiiftu yokhaani ta d'iira fiddu imfed'u; ch'allisu malte. 
1Timothy2:13 Wonti akanatiifi duri qara Adamu uumani, eege Hawai uumani." 
1Timothy2:14 Adamuni insobamne, ammo niitiini sobamte, seera Waaqa ch'absite." 
1Timothy2:15 Ammo nad'eeni yo ijoolle d'alte baafamti, yo isiini d'ugefachaafi jaalalafi qulqulloomafi adaba dansaani teete." 
1Timothy3:1 Jechi kunini ka d'ugaati, yo nami jaarsa gumi Waaqatiini deemu tahu fed'e, inni waan dansa barbaada." 
1Timothy3:2 Nami suni nama wollaala qabu intahiini; ha niiti toko ch'alla qabaatu, nama qalbi dansa qabu tahu male, ka ufi qorqoratu, adaba qabu, ka amala dansa qabu; inni keessuma bulchu male, namale aka dansa barsiisu male;" 
1Timothy3:3 inni nama machau ka namaani woldidu intahiini, ammo nama laana ka nagaya fed'u ha tahuti, nama hori jaalatu intahiini;" 
1Timothy3:4 ha worra ufi aka dansa qorqorate ijoolle ufi saala foko barsiisu. 
1Timothy3:5 Wonti akanatiifi nami ka dandae worra ufi injabeesine akami dandae gumi Waaqa tissa? 
1Timothy3:6 Inni nama d'io d'ugefate intahiini; hegeri ufi guddise, aka Sheet'ani duri tahe wollaala iti murani taha." 
1Timothy3:7 Inni nama nami alaleeni saaddu ha tahuti, aka ch'eere t'urura Sheet'ana keesa inseenne." 
1Timothy3:8 Nami huji gumi Waaqa hojatu ha adaba dansaafi d'uga qaabaatu; guddo farso d'uge insabdaiini; 
1Timothy3:9 herega dansaani aada d'uga ta d'ugefacha teenna ha jabeesuti. 
1Timothy3:10 Qara ha ilaalani, yo quufani ha huji iti kennaniti." 
1Timothy3:11 Nad'eeni worraleeni ha adaba dansa qabaattuuti, isiini nama inhamaatiini; ha qalbi dansaafi d'uga qabaattuuti waan ch'ufa keesati." 
1Timothy3:12 Nami huji gumi Waaqa hojatu ha niiti toko ch'alla qabaatuuti, ha ijoolleefi worra ufi aka dansa qorqoratuuti." 
1Timothy3:13 Worri huji dansa hojatu maqa dansa argate, d'ugefacha nu kristo d'ugefannu waan isii aka dansa odeesu dandaa." 
1Timothy3:14 Yo tatabe tana sii t'aafu waan d'iotu d'ufe si argu seha. 
1Timothy3:15 Ammo yo anini turele, tatabeeni tunini aka nu mana Waaqa adaba dansaani keesa tau malle siti himti. Mani suni gumi Waaqa jireenna, utubafi yayaba waan d'uga." 
1Timothy3:16 Nami tokoleeni dandae aka aadaani teenna d'ossa qabdu imormu! Inni nafa namatiini d'ufe, aka inni qajeela Lubbuuni himte, malaikaleeni isa agarte. Gosa ch'ufati waan isaa odeesani, lafa keesati isa d'ugefatani, guddinnaani gubbati olfuud'ani." 
1Timothy4:1 Lubbuuni Waaqa akuma dansa himti, aka nami gari eegi tana d'ugefachu lakise; lubbu d'aratiifi barsiisa jinni gula yau." 
1Timothy4:2 Barsiisaani tunini soba nama d'aratiifi ka heregi worra aka waan ibidaani gubani jiru iraa d'ufti. 
1Timothy4:3 Worri kunini nad'eeni fuud'itiifi sagale gosa gari nyaati fullaaniti jed'a. Ammo Waaqi sagale tana aka, eegi galata deebisani, worri d'ugefate d'uga baratu nyaatufi mid'aase." 
1Timothy4:4 Wonti Waaqi uume ch'ufti dansa; waan tokole didu himmalle, ammo waan ch'ufa galata deebisani fud'achu malani;" 
1Timothy4:5 wonti akasitiifi dubbi Waaqaatiifi kad'achati waan kana Waaqa durati qulqulleesa. 
1Timothy4:6 Yo barsiisa tana oboleyaaniti himte, hojattu Kristo Yeso dansa taata, ka dubbi d'uga fud'ate barsiisa d'uga gula deemu." 
1Timothy4:7 Ammo odu duri ta aada Waaqa intahiini, ta nami himu himmalini lagad'u. Jireenna Waaqi fed'u barad'u." 
1Timothy4:8 Fayyafi irreeni nafaa wo namaa darti, ammo fayyafi irreeni lubbu kara ch'ufaani wo namaa darti, maro jireenna ka ammatiifi ka hegerile namaa kennituufi." 
1Timothy4:9 Jechi kunini ka d'ugaati, ka fud'atani d'ugefachu malani." 
1Timothy4:10 Maro waan kanatifi aka jaba hojanna, waan nu abdi teenna Waaqa jiru ka nama ch'ufa baasu, keesuma worra d'ugefatu, gubba keyanneefi." 
1Timothy4:11 Waan kana namati himi aka dansa barsiisi. 
1Timothy4:12 Nami tokoleeni maro atini kaimatiifi si intufatiini, ammo akheekha jara d'ugefate tahi, dubbifi adabaafi jaalalafi d'ugefachaafi qulqulloomaani." 
1Timothy4:13 Haga anini d'ufuuti, T'aafi Waaqa namaa soomi, dubbi Waaqa hasai, nama barsiisi, jabeesi hojad'u." 
1Timothy4:14 Kenna lubbu si keesa jirtu inded'ini, ta gaafa raagooti dubbatte jaaroleeni harka sira keete argatte." 
1Timothy4:15 Waan kana iti jabaad'u, guuti, aka nami ch'ufti, aka atini dura deemte, si argu." 
1Timothy4:16 Ufiifi barsiisa teetile eegi. Waan kana guuti: wonti akanatiifi yo atini waan kana guute ufiifi jara si ch'aqasule imbaafta. 
1Timothy5:1 Nama jaarsa fakatu tokole inch'ersini, ammo aka abbeeti saalfad'ufi gorsi. Kaimale aka oboleyaani teeti tolfad'u." 
1Timothy5:2 jaarole nad'eeni aka hawaani teeti tolfad'u, kaima nad'eeni aka oboleyaani tanteti tolfad'u, qulqulloomaani." 
1Timothy5:3 Nad'eeni d'iirsi d'uguma iraa due ch'eerifi qorqorad'u. 
1Timothy5:4 Ammo yo nad'eeni d'iirsa inqamne ijoolleefi akowaani qabaatte, ijoolleeni suni qara ha aada Waaqa gula worra ufi guutu, kara kanaani worra ufitiifi akowaani ufi galata guddisa baafti, akasi ch'allaani Waaqa gammachiisani." 
1Timothy5:5 Niiti d'iirsa inqamne, ta nama qorqoratu inqamne, ya abdi ufi Waaqa ira keyatte, halkani guyya qarqaarsa isaa kad'atti." 
1Timothy5:6 Ammo niitiini d'iirsa inqamne, ta gammada feetu, ato nafaani jiraatele ya doote." 
1Timothy5:7 Seera kana iti kenni, aka nami tokoleeni wollaala isiiti imurre." 
1Timothy5:8 Ammo yo nami fiit'a ufi inqorqoranne, keesuma abbaafi haad'a isaa, inni ya d'ugefacha lakise, jara ind'ugefannele ingahu." 
1Timothy5:9 Haga nad'eeni ganna jaatama geetuuti maqa isii nad'eeni d'iirsa inqamneti indariini. Ammalle nad'eeni maro toko ch'alla fuud'ani ha taatu," 
1Timothy5:10 ammalle duri huji dansa hojatte gurra dansa qabaachu malte: niiti ijoolle ufi aka dansa guddifatte, keessuma gololchite, miila gumi Waaqa d'it'e, nama gaargala qabu qarqaarte, ufi baafte, huji dansa ch'ufa hojatte ha taatu." 
1Timothy5:11 Nad'eeni kaima maqa nad'eeni d'iirsa inqamneti indariini, wonti akanatiifi yo akanumati tau dad'abde isiini nama fuud'u feete, akasiini Kristo iraa badde," 
1Timothy5:12 kakhu ufi ta qara lakifte, wollaala keesa seenti." 
1Timothy5:13 Ammalle isiini aka woma inhojanne baratte mana ch'ufa iraa yaate waan hasau, himmalini hasoofte ufuma teteete. Tanaafi aka kiyya nad'eeni kaima fuud'u malani, aka ilmaani d'alte worra ufi qorqoratte, aka nyaapi keenna qoomni argate waan hamtu nuuni injenne." 
1Timothy5:14  
1Timothy5:15 Wonti akasitiifi nad'eeni d'iirsa inqamne ta gari amma ya Sheet'ana gula yaate. 
1Timothy5:16 Yo niitiini Kristiana nad'eeni d'iirsa inqamne worra ufi keesaa qabaatte, isumaani ha qorqorattu, gumi ingaargalchiini, aka nad'eeni d'iirsa inqamne ta kobaa jirtu qarqaarttu." 
1Timothy5:17 Jaarole ta nama dura yaate huji dansa hojattu hori gudda baasuufi malani, keesuma worra aka dansa hojate nama barsiise dubbi odeesu." 
1Timothy5:18 Wonti akanatiifi t'aafiini waan jettu, Afaani qotiyo inhid'iini, yo isiini mid'aani d'aantu, ammalle, Nami hojatu gati ufi argachu hu male jetti." 
1Timothy5:19 Yo jaarsa gumi himatani haga nami lama sadi d'uga iti bahuti dubbi suni inch'aqasiina. 
1Timothy5:20 Nama daba tolchu ch'ufa diida keesati gorsi, aka nami d'ibiini sodaatu." 
1Timothy5:21 Fuula Waaqaatiifi ka Kristo Yesotiifi, ka malaika qulqullo durati, anini si kad'ad'a, barsiisa tana gula deemi, nama tokole jaalatte gargari imfiliini." 
1Timothy5:22 Hurrifte nama tokole harka ira inkayiini. Daba nama tokole keesa inseeniini, ufi qulqulleesi." 
1Timothy5:23 Bisaani ch'alla ind'ugiini, ammo daad'i diqo toko d'ugi, aka isiini garaa kanke qarqaartu, maro atini hojja ch'ufa fayya d'abduufi." 
1Timothy5:24 Dabi nama gari guddo mullata, dabi worraa, worra durati, qorsuma d'aqa; ammo dabi nama gari eege mullata." 
1Timothy5:25 Akasuma huji dansale yoosu argani, ta guddo imullannele dandaani ind'ossani." 
1Timothy6:1 Tisseleeni ch'ufti ha aabbooti isiiti saalfatu, aka nami tokoleeni waan hamtu maqa Waaqaatiifi barsiisa teennaani injenne." 
1Timothy6:2 Tisseleeni abbooti ufi ta Kristiana intufatiini maro worri oboleyaantifi. Ammo ha aka dansa hojattufi, wonti akanatiifi hujiini worraa, abbooti worraa ta d'ugefate ta worra jaalatu suni wo baati. Waan kana nama barsiisi, odeesi." 
1Timothy6:3 Nami barsiisa d'ibi barsiisu, ka dubbi Aabbo Yeso Kristo ka d'ugatiifi waan aadaani teenna nama barsiiftu didu" 
1Timothy6:4 kiyyiba, woma imbeenne. inni dubbi wolmormitifi woldidda ch'alla beekha, wonti kunini qot'eefi woldiddafi arabaafi wolsehacha hamtuuni d'ufti." 
1Timothy6:5 Ammalle wolmormiti nama qalbi inqamne ka d'uga inqamneeni d'ufti. Worri waan aadaani Waaqa nama duroomsitu seha. 
1Timothy6:6 D'uguma aadaani Waaqa guddo nama duroomsiti, yo nami suni waan qabu quufe." 
1Timothy6:7 Nu maaniini lafa d'umne? Womaniti. Maani dandeenne lafa keesaa fud'anna? Womaniti. 
1Timothy6:8 Tanaafi yo woyafi sagale qabaanne nuu geeti. 
1Timothy6:9 Ammo worri dureesa tahu fed'u ilaalacha keesa seene, t'urura daallumatiifi ka d'araa hamtu keesa seenani, ka baditi nama hirkisu." 
1Timothy6:10 Wonti akanatiifi jaalalti hori hamenna aka ch'ufaatini d'ufti. Nami gari guddo dureesa tahu fed'e akanaani d'ugefacha iraa bade, gugubate lalefata." 
1Timothy6:11 Ammo atini, nami Waaqa, waan kana ch'ufa lagad'u. Waan d'ugaafi ta Waaqi fed'ufi d'ugefachaafi jaalalafi obsafi laana deemiti barbaadi." 
1Timothy6:12 Utaalcha d'ugefacha keesati aka dansa utaali, jireenna hegeri argad'u; wonti akanatiifi maro jireenna kanatifi Waaqi sii yaame, gaafa atini d'ugefacha tante gumi durati himatte." 
1Timothy6:13 Waaqa ka jireenna waan ch'ufa kennuufi Yeso Kristo, ka Pontio Pilato durati d'uga himate, durati anini siti hima:" 
1Timothy6:14 Haga Guyya Aabbooni keenna Yeso Kristoni mullatuuti, seera ch'ufa, wollaala male, jabeesi guuti." 
1Timothy6:15 Yo hojjaani geete, Waaqi eeba, ka inni ch'allaani nama fidu, Hayyuuni Hayyoota ch'ufa, Abbaani Abbooti ch'ufati isa mullisa." 
1Timothy6:16 Nami indoone isa ch'alla; inni ifsa nami iti d'ufu indandeenne keesa taa. Nami tokoleeni taka isa ingarre, tokoleeni dandae isa inargu. Ulfinnafi jabeenni ka isaa tahinna, haga hegeri! Amini." 
1Timothy6:17 Dureeyi lafa tanatiini ufi inguddisiina, abdi teesani durooma lafa tanaa, ka nami waan isi aka imbeenne ira inkeyatina, ammo Waaqa ka arjoomaani waan ch'ufa namaa kennu gubba keyad'a jed'iini." 
1Timothy6:18 Waan dansa tolcha jed'iini, Huji dansaani durooma jed'iini, Arja taha, waan qabdani namaa qooda jed'iini." 
1Timothy6:19 Kara kanaani yayaba hori ka hegeri namaa tahu tolfatani. Duuba akanaani jireenna d'uga argatani. 
1Timothy6:20 Timotheo, waan harka keetiti lakisani jabeesi. Hasaa Waaqi imfeene, ka daalluma ka nami gari wollaale Beekhuma jed'uuni lakisi." 
1Timothy6:21 Wonti akanatiifi nami gari waan beekhuma suni qabu ufi seha, tanaafi d'ugefacha ufi balleesa. Eebiti Waaqa isani ch'ufa woliini tahinna." 
2Timothy1:1 Maqaani kiyya Paulo, anini fed'i Waaqa gula ergatta Yeso Kristoti, isati na erge, aka anini jireenna maro Yeso Kristotitiifi nuu kakhatani odeesu." 
2Timothy1:2 Gara Timotheo, ilma ani jaalad'u: Waaqa Abbaafi Kristo Yesoni, Aabbooni keenna, eebafi naasufi nagaya sii kenninna." 
2Timothy1:3 Anini Waaqa ka qalbi dansaani, akuma ababooti teenna tolchite hojad'uufi, galata deebisa. Anini galata isaa deebisa hojja halkani guyya kad'acha tiyya keesati si qaabad'u." 
2Timothy1:4 Imimaani kanke inqaabad'a, waan kanaafi guddo si argu fed'a, aka guddo gammadu." 
2Timothy1:5 Anini d'ugefacha tante ta d'uga inqaabad'a, d'ugefacha ta aka akko tante Losifi haate Eunikeni qabani. Atileeni tami akasi qabda, imbeekha." 
2Timothy1:6 Maro waan kanatifi anini si qaabsiisa, eeba Waaqi gaafa anini harka sira kaye sii kenne jabeesi, huji tantele owisi." 
2Timothy1:7 Wonti akanatiifi Waaqi lubbu nu daafansiiftu nu inkennine, ammo lubbu jabeennaafi jaalalafi ufi qorqoracha nuu kenne." 
2Timothy1:8 Aabbo Yeso d'ugeesu inch'eerfatiini; ana ka maro isaatiifi hid'anile inch'eerfatiini. Ammo, maro Odu Dansaatiifi gaargala obsi, akuma Waaqi jabeenna sii kenne." 
2Timothy1:9 Inni nu baase, jireenna qulqullo iti nu yaame, maro nu waan dansa tolchinefiiniti, ammo maro fed'ifi eeba isaati. Inni eeba tana ato lafa inuumiini Kristo Yeso keesa nuu kenne," 
2Timothy1:10 ammo amma ya d'ufiisa Qarqaarsa keenna Kristo Yesotiini nuti mullisani. Inni ya jabeenna duisa dabsate, Odu Dansaani jireenna inhobaane mullise." 
2Timothy1:11 Waaqi ya na fohate, aka anini Odu Dansa odeese, ergattufi barsiiftu tahu;" 
2Timothy1:12 maro waan kanatifi anini akana gaargala. Ammo anini ammalle inch'eerfad'u, waan anini nama abdad'e beekhufi, ammalle imbeekha aka inni haga guyyaani gahuuti waan inni harka kiyyati kenne qorqoratu." 
2Timothy1:13 Dubbi d'uga ta anini si barsiise ha akheekha sii taatuuti, jabeesi, d'ugefachaafi jaalala ta maro Kristo Yesotiifi teenna taate keesa tai." 
2Timothy1:14 Waan dansa ka harka keetiti kennani jabeesi, jabeenna Lubbu Qulqullo, ta nu keesa teetuni." 
2Timothy1:15 Atini imbeeta, aka nami lafa Asia keesa tau ch'ufti na biraa yae, Figelofi Hermogeneleeni." 
2Timothy1:16 Waaqi worra Onesiforoti nahiinna, waan inni maro heddu garaa na jabeeseefi. Inni waan anini hid'aansa keesa jiruufi na injibine," 
2Timothy1:17 ammo inni akuma dira Rumitini baheeni na barbaade na arge. 
2Timothy1:18 Aabbooni aka inni Guyya suni naasu Aabbo iraa argatu tolchiinna! Atini waan inni Efeso keesati naa tolchele akuma dansa beeta. 
2Timothy2:1 Atini duuba, ilma kiyya, maro eeba Kristo keesa jirtu qabduufi jabaad'u." 
2Timothy2:2 Dubbi tiyya ta anini si durati nama barsiise heddu nama atini d'ugefattu, ka dandae nama d'ibile barsiisuti kenni." 
2Timothy2:3 Qooda kanke ka gaargala fud'ad'u, aka askarti dansa ta Kristo Yeso." 
2Timothy2:4 Askartiini huji hojattu gudda isii gammachiisu feeti, waan d'ibi ka huji askartii intahiini keesa seenu imfeetu." 
2Timothy2:5 Nami utaalu, aada woldogoomsu guutu male, woma inargatu." 
2Timothy2:6 Abbaani oobru ka aka dansa hojate, mid'aani qara ka oobru ufi argachu male." 
2Timothy2:7 Waan anini siini jed'e kana heregi, Aabbooni waan ch'ufa keesa si hubachiisa." 
2Timothy2:8 Yeso Kristo qaabad'u, ka duisa keesaa kaasani, ka d'aloota Daudi, akuma Odu Dansa ta anini barsiisu keesati himani." 
2Timothy2:9 Waan anini Odu Dansa hasaeefi gaargala, ammalle aka nama wo yake na hid'ani. Ammo dubbini Waaqa hid'aansa keesa injirtu;" 
2Timothy2:10 maro waan kanatifi anini gumi Waaqi fohate jed'e obsa, aka worrileeni baafama Kristo Yeso keesa jiru argatu, guddinna hegeri woliini." 
2Timothy2:11 Jechi kunini ka d'ugaati: Yo nu isa woliini doone, nu isa woliini jiraanna;" 
2Timothy2:12 yo obsine, isa woliini lafa finna: Yo nu isa mormanne, innileeni nu mormata;" 
2Timothy2:13 yo nu d'ugefacha iraa gorrele, inni ka d'ugefatani, waan inni dandae ufi imormanneefi." 
2Timothy2:14 Gumi tante waan kana qaabsiisi, Waaqa durati gorsi, aka worri maro dubbitiifi wolindinne. Wonti suni woma namaa imbaatu, ammo worra ch'aqasu ch'alla balleesiti." 
2Timothy2:15 Ufi qorqorad'u, aka Waaqi huji tante quufu, aka hojattu huji ufiiti inch'eere, ammo ka d'aamsa Waaqa qajeelche himu." 
2Timothy2:16 Hasaa nama Waaqa imbeenne; ka daalluma, ka Waaqa ira nama fageesu, lagad'u." 
2Timothy2:17 Wonti worri barsiisu aka mada diimtu namaa nyanyaatu jirti. Nami waan akana barsiisu Himenayofi Filetofa. 
2Timothy2:18 Worri kunini ya kara d'uga lakise, d'ugefacha jara d'ugefate ka gari yake, Kaisi keenna yayu dabre jed'ani." 
2Timothy2:19 Ammo yayabi Waaqi keyate dandae inchochou; ammalle dubbi tana irati t'aafani: Aabbooni worra isaa ch'ufa fuula beekha; ammalle, Nami nama Waaqa ufiini jed'u hameenna lakisu male jed'ani." 
2Timothy2:20 Mana gudda keesa miha gosa hedduti jira. Ka gari qarsifi worqi, ka gari faarafi mukha; ka gari gatiini guddo ka gari gatiini diqo." 
2Timothy2:21 Yo nami waan hamtu ch'ufa iraa ufi d'owe ufi qulqulleese, nama suni waan jabdu dandaani isani tolchani, waan inni aka huji dansa ch'ufa hojatu ufi baase abba ufiiti wo bahefi." 
2Timothy2:22 D'araa kaimooma lakisi, jara garaa qulqullooni Aabbo yaamatu woliini d'ugaafi, d'ugefachaafi jaalalafi nagaya barbaadi." 
2Timothy2:23 Ammo hasaa daalluma ka nama woma imbeenne lagad'u; wonti kunini woldidiisaani d'ufti, imbeeta." 
2Timothy2:24 Hojattuuni Aabbo woldidu himmalle. Inni nama ch'ufaa nahu male, barsiiftu dansaafi ta obsa qabdu," 
2Timothy2:25 ka laanatu kara nama isaani morku garsiisu tahu male. Hegeri Waaqi daba ira worra deebise, d'uga worra barsiisa." 
2Timothy2:26 Duuba qalbiini worraa deebinaani t'urura Sheet'ani worraani qabe mohate keesaa baqatani. 
2Timothy3:1 Waan kana qaabad'u! Guyyaani muumme gaargala hama qaba. 
2Timothy3:2 Nami ufo tahe, sabdae, ufi guddise, ufi saada; wolarabsani, worra ufiiti saalfachu didani, galata deebisu, didani, aada Waaqa lakisani;" 
2Timothy3:3 arja tahu didani, naasu lakisani, maqa wolt'ureesani, woldidani, wolhad'ani, waan dansa jibbani;" 
2Timothy3:4 wolballeesu fed'ani, mata jabaatani, ufi guddisani, Waaqa ira gammada jaalatani;" 
2Timothy3:5 nama aada Waaqa guutu ufi tolchani, ammo jabeenna isi didani. Jara akana kana ira fagaad'u." 
2Timothy3:6 Nami gari mana nad'eeni d'aqe, nad'eeni lalaaftu ta qara dabi iti ulfaate d'araa gosa ch'ufa gula yaatu fud'atani." 
2Timothy3:7 Nad'eeni tunini hojja ch'ufa wo barachu feeti, ammo haguma jirtu d'uga imbarattu." 
2Timothy3:8 Akuma duri Yanefi Yambreni dubbi Musa didde, akasuma worri kunileeni d'ugaa dida — nama herega inqamne, ka d'ugefacha argachu dad'abe." 
2Timothy3:9 Wonti kunini garu ind'at'u, waan nami ch'ufti aka worri daalle arguufi akuma jari kaani duri tahe." 
2Timothy3:10 Ammo atini ya barsiisa tiyyaafi adaba kiyyafi jireenna kiyya gula deemte; atini ya d'ugefacha tiyyaafi obsa kiyyafi jaalala tiyyaafi jabeenna kiyyafi," 
2Timothy3:11 gaargala kiyyafi d'aanicha kiyyale agarte. Waan Antiokiafi Ikoniofi Listra keesati na tolchani quba qabda, gaargala hama anini argad'e ch'ufa! Ammo Aabbooni ya waan suni ch'ufa keesaa na baase." 
2Timothy3:12 Nama Kristo Yeso woliini jireenna Waaqi fed'u keesa tau ch'ufti ingaargalchani; 
2Timothy3:13 ammo nama hamafi kiyyibaani ch'ufti ira hamaata, ufi sobani nama d'ibile sobani." 
2Timothy3:14 Ammo atini, d'uga si barsiisani aka dansa d'ugefatte keesa tai. Wonti akanatiifi atini nama si barsiise imbeeta," 
2Timothy3:15 ammalle haga ijoolluma teetiti ya T'aafi Qulqullo, ta dandeete hubacha baafama, maro d'ugefacha Kristo Yesotiifi sii kennitu baratte." 
2Timothy3:16 Wonti akasitiifi t'aafiini ch'ufti hafuura Waaqaa qabdi ammalle wo baati, isi d'ugani barsiisani, wollaalaani gorsani, qajeelaani garsiisani, waan jireenna dansaatiini barsiisani," 
2Timothy3:17 aka nami Waaqa ch'ufti qit'ae kurfo tae, huji dansa ch'ufa hojatu." 
2Timothy4:1 Anini fuula Waaqatiifi ka Kristo Yeso, ka nama ch'ufa ka duefi ka jirule qoru durati si kad'ad'a: maro d'ufiisafi Finna isaatiifi," 
2Timothy4:2 dubbi tana barsiisi, hojja ch'ufa odeesi, yo fed'anifi yo imfeenele namaa galchi, gorsi, jabeesi, obsaani barsiisi." 
2Timothy4:3 Wonti akanatiifi hojjaani nami barsiisa d'uga gula indeemne ind'ufti, ammo fed'i ufi ch'alla gula yau, nami ch'ufti barsiiftu heddu barbaadata, ta waan worri d'agayu fed'u worrati odeesitu." 
2Timothy4:4 D'uga ch'aqasu didani, odu d'ara gula deemani." 
2Timothy4:5 Ammo atini hojja ch'ufa ufi qorqorachu malte; gaargala obsi, aka nama Odu Dansa barsiisu tahi, huji Waaqa ch'ufa guuti." 
2Timothy4:6 Hojjaani sorio na baasani ya geete; hojjaani anini jireenna kana keesaa bahu ya geete. 
2Timothy4:7 Anini ya haga dandau utaale, dogoomsu tiyya la hobaafad'e, d'ugefacha ya jabeese." 
2Timothy4:8 Amma galata dabsachaati na eegata, ammo sure d'ugaa ta Aabbooni jaallabi d'ugaa guyya suni naa kennuti na eegata, na ch'allaaniti ammo worra jaalalaani d'ufiisa isaa eegu ch'ufa." 
2Timothy4:9 Jabaad'u, hurrisi nati kooti." 
2Timothy4:10 Demani ya waan lafaa jaalate na lakise, Thesalonike d'aqe." 
2Timothy4:11 Luka ch'allaani woliini jirra. Mariko barbaadi, woliini koota, inni huji na qarqaaru indandaa." 
2Timothy4:12 Anini Tikiko gara Efeso erge. 
2Timothy4:13 Yo d'uftu, kooti kiyya ka anini Troa keesa mana Karpoti lakise na kootiini; kitaaba ch'ufaani kooti, keesuma tatabe gogaa." 
2Timothy4:14 Iskandani, ka tumtu, waan hamtu na tolche; Aabbooni waan inni na tolche isa tolchiinna." 
2Timothy4:15 Ufira isa eegi, inni guddo d'aamsa keenna dide." 
2Timothy4:16 Gaafa anini guyya qara ufi dubbad'e, nami tokoleeni na inqarqaare; nami ch'ufti na biraa yae. Waaqi waan suni worrati inheregiini!" 
2Timothy4:17 Ammo Aabbooni na woliini tae naa jabeese, aka anini dubbi ch'ufa gosa d'ibileti odeesu; afaani nyeench'a keesaa naa baasani." 
2Timothy4:18 Ammalle Aabbooni hameenna ch'ufa keesaa na baase, haga anini Finna isaa argad'uuti na qorqorata. Guddinni ammafi hegerile ka isaa tahinna! Amini." 
2Timothy4:19 Anini nagaya Priskafi Akila d'aama, worra Onesiforole." 
2Timothy4:20 Erastoni Korinthoti hafe, anini Trofimo Miletoti lakise, waan inni fayya d'abeefi." 
2Timothy4:21 Jabaad'u, bulti qabanna duraa kooti. Eubulofi Pudefi Linofi Klaudiafi oboleyaani ch'ufti nagaya isanii d'aamani." 
2Timothy4:22 Aabbooni lubbu tante woliini tahinna. Eebitileeni isani ch'ufa woliini tahinna. 
Titus1:1 Maqaani kiyya Paulo, anini hojattu Waaqatiifi ergattu Yeso Kristo. La na fohatani aka anini d'aqe, d'ugefacha worra Waaqi fohate qarqaare, d'uga aadaani teenna," 
Titus1:2 ta jireenna hegeri abdattu barsiiftu worra barsiisu. Waaqi, ka d'ara indubbanne, ya jireenna kana duru nuu kakhate," 
Titus1:3 hojjaani geennaani dubbi ufi keesati nuti mullise. Waan kana harka kiyyati kennani, d'aamsa Waaqa, ka Qarqaarsa keenna, gula odeesa." 
Titus1:4 Anini tatabe tana Titoti t'aafa; inni ilma kiyya ka d'uga, d'ugefacha nu woliini qamnu tana keesa: Waaqa Abbaafi Yeso Kristoni, Qarqaarsi keenna, eebafi nagaya isanii kenniina." 
Titus1:5 Anini aka atini waan tolchu malani guutuufi lafa Krete keesati si lakise, ammalle aka atini dira ch'ufa keesati jaarole gumi fohattu. Gorsa kiyya qaabad'u:" 
Titus1:6 jaarsi wollaala qabaachu himmalle; niiti toko ch'alla qabaachu male, ilmaani isaa d'ugefacha qabaachu malte, ijoolle hamamtu ta aka bineensa jirtu, ta dubbi nama inch'aqamne intahiini." 
Titus1:7 Maro inni huji Waaqa harka qabuufi inni wollaala qabaachu himmalle. Kiyyibe miira indiqaatiini, farso d'uge namaani woldide insabdaiini." 
Titus1:8 Ha nama bulche waan dansa jaalatu. Ha ufi qorqorate qajeele, qulqullo tahe, adaba dansaani deemu." 
Titus1:9 Dubbi d'uga ha aka dansa jabeesu, ta d'ugefataniifi ta waan barsiisatini woli fakaattu. Kara kanaani inni dandae nama d'ibi barsiisa d'ugatiini qarqaare, wollaala nama didule agarsiisa." 
Titus1:10 Wonti akanatiifi nama hedduti jira, ka dubbi ch'aqasu dide dubbi d'aratiini nama sobu, keesuma worri aada Yahudi iti galefaani." 
Titus1:11 Sila worra dubbachu d'owu malani; wonti akanatiifi waan barsiisu himmalini barsiisani, akanaani ollowaani heddu balleesu jirani, aka hori argatani." 
Titus1:12 Namichi Krete toko, ka raaga worraa waan jed'e: Jari Krete ch'ufti kiyyiba, bineensa hama, ammalle sabdi woma hojachu imfeene." 
Titus1:13 Wonti inni jed'e sunini d'uga. Maro waan kanatifi aka dansa worra gorsu malte, aka worri d'ugefacha qit'e horate" 
Titus1:14 odu Yahuditiifi seera nama d'ugaa dide iraa d'ufu lakisu. 
Titus1:15 Nama qulqulloti wonti ch'ufti qulqullo; ammo worra t'uri, ka ind'ugefanne, wonti tokoleeni iti qulqulloniti, maro qalbifi heregi worraa t'uri qabuufi." 
Titus1:16 Waaqa beenna ufiini jed'ani, ammo hujiini worraa ind'areesiti. Worri nama jibbani, namale inch'aqasu, waan dansa tokole dandae intolchu." 
Titus2:1 Ammo atini, waan barsiisaani d'ugaa feetu barsiisu malte." 
Titus2:2 Jaaroleeni, Ufi iwolaaliina, qalbi horad'a, ufi qorqorad'a; d'ugefacha dansaafi jaalalafi obsa horad'a jed'iini." 
Titus2:3 Akasuma jaarole nad'eenileeni, Aka nad'eeni jireenna qulqullo qabdu taha jed'iini. Nama hamattani yokhaani tisse farsole intahiina jed'iini. Waan dansa barsiisu malte" 
Titus2:4 aka nad'eeni kaima jaalala d'iirsatiifi ta ijoolle ufi baratte," 
Titus2:5 ufi qorqoratte qulqulloomte, hallaqoomafi adabaani d'iirsa ufi saalfattu, aka nami tokoleeni hameenna dubbi Waaqa indubbanne." 
Titus2:6 Akaskasuma kaimaleeni, Ufi qorqorad'a jed'iini." 
Titus2:7 Atini akheekha huji dansa waan ch'ufa keesati worraa tahi. Barsiisa tante jabeesi, aka dansa barsiisi." 
Titus2:8 Dubbi dansa ta nami dandae intufanne dubbad'u aka nyaapi kanke waan nuuni jed'u, d'abe ch'eeru." 
Titus2:9 Tisseleleeni ha abbooti ufi guutte waan tolchitu ch'ufaani gammachiiftu. Ammalle dubbi afaani keesa deebifte," 
Titus2:10 abbooti woma dura inhatiini. Ammo ha dansoomafi d'uga garsiisani, aka barsiisa Waaqa Qarqaarsa keenna, waan tolchani ch'ufa keesati, d'ugeesitu." 
Titus2:11 Wonti akanatiifi Waaqi ya eeba ufi, maro baafama nama ch'ufatiifi, mullise." 
Titus2:12 Eebiti sunini waan nuuni jettu, waan hamtu ka Waaqi infeenefi d'araa nafa lakisa, ufi qorqorad'a, qajeela, lafa tana keesa jireenna Waaqi fed'u keesa taa." 
Titus2:13 Ato Guyya eeba ka nu abdannu eegannu, guyya guddinni Waaqa Guddafi Qarqaarsa keenna Yeso Kristoni mullatu." 
Titus2:14 Inni nafa ufi nuu kenne, aka hameenna ch'ufa keesaa nuu baase, gumi isaa qulqullo, ta waan dansa tolchu feetu nu tolchu." 
Titus2:15 Waan kana nama barsiisi, jabeenna kanke ch'ufaani nama si ch'aqasu ch'ufa jabeesi, gorsi. Nami tokoleeni si intufatiini." 
Titus3:1 Gumi teetiini, Dubbi jara lafa fidutiifi ta worra gugurda ch'aqasa, guuta, waan dansa ch'ufa tolcha jed'i qaabsiisi." 
Titus3:2 Hameenna nama tokole indubbatiina, ammo hojja ch'ufa nagayafi jaalafi adaba dansaani nama ch'ufa woliini taa jed'iini." 
Titus3:3 Wonti akanatiifi nuleeni duri daalle, dubbi inch'aqamne, ta wollaala tolchitu. Nu tissele d'araa nafatiifi gammada gosa ch'ufaa taane. Jireenna keenna ch'ufa daallumafi d'iibi keesa teenne. Nami hedduuni nu jibbe, nuleeni worra jibbine." 
Titus3:4 Ammo naasufi jaalalti Waaqa Qarqaarsa keenna mullannaani," 
Titus3:5 inni nu baase. Maro huji dansa nu hojannefiniti, ammo maro naasu isaatiifi nu baase, Lubbu Qulqullooni nu d'iqe, isiini d'aloota hareesafi jireenna haraa nuu kennite." 
Titus3:6 Wonti akanatiifi Waaqi guddiseti Lubbu ufi nura buuse, maro Yeso Kristo Qarqaarsa keennatiifi," 
Titus3:7 aka maro eeba isaatiifi nu Waaqaani wolti araaramne jireenna hegeri ka nu abdannu argannu. 
Titus3:8 Jechi kunini ka d'ugaati. Anini sii waan kana aka dansa jabeesitu fed'a, aka worri Waaqa d'ugefatu ch'ufti huji dansa jabeese hojatu. Wonti kunini waan dansa, nama ch'ufayu ira jirti." 
Titus3:9 Ammo wolmormiti daallumatiifi maqa heddu ka ababootatiifi woldidiisafi had'iisa waan seera lakisi. Wonti kunini ch'ufti woma tokole imbaatu. 
Titus3:10 Nama gargari nama baasu maro lama gorsi, duuba iti deebite maqale ind'aiini." 
Titus3:11 Nami akana kunini hama, dabi isaatu aka inni wollaala qabu agarsiisa." 
Titus3:12 Yo anini Artema yokhaani Tikiko siti ergu, jabaad'u, Nikopoliti nati kooti, anini ya aka haga bulti qabanna achi tau heregad'e." 
Titus3:13 Zena, nama seeratiifi Apolo haga dandeetu qarqaari, aka worri imaltu ufi yau, waan worri fed'u ka woreega ch'ufa kenniifi." 
Titus3:14 Biyya teenna aka huji dansa tolchani aka waan fed'ani argatani barsiisi, ufuma intataiina jed'iini." 
Titus3:15 Jari na woliini jiru ch'ufti nagaya d'aama. Jaalaani teenna ta d'ugefatte nagaya nu fuud'i. Eebiti Waaqa isani ch'ufa woliini jiraatiinna. 
Philemon1:1 Maqaani kiyya Paulo, nama maro Kristo Yesotiifi hid'aani, ammalle oboleesa keenna Timotheo woliini jira. Gara jaala Filemoni ka nu woliini hojannuufi. Gara jaalafi nama nu woliini hojatu Filemonifi" 
Philemon1:2 gara gumi mana kanke keesati wolwoldeetufi gara oboleeti teenna Afiafi askarticha keenna ka nu woliini hojatu Arkipo tatabe tana t'aafa. 
Philemon1:3 Waaqa Abba keennafi Aabbo Yeso Kristoni eebafi nagaya isanii kenninna. 
Philemon1:4 Hojja anini Waaqa kad'ad'u ch'ufa, oboleesa Filemoni, anini maqa kanke d'ae galata Waaqa deebisa." 
Philemon1:5 Anini jaalala atini gumi Waaqa ch'ufa jaalatufi d'ugefacha atini Aabbo Yeso d'ugefattu ya d'agaye. 
Philemon1:6 Wonti anini hojja ch'ufa Waaqa kad'ad'u, aka wold'aqisi keenna, d'ugefacha teenna keesa, hubacha eeba ta Kristo keesa jirtu, ta hagasira guddo nuu kennu." 
Philemon1:7 Jaalalti tante, oboleesa kiyya, ya gammadafi jabeenna gudda naa kennite! Wonti akanatiifi atini ya nama Waaqa ch'ufa gammachiifte." 
Philemon1:8 Maro waan kanatifi anini sila, aka oboleesa kanke Kristo keesa, garaa jabaad'e, Waan tolchu malani tolchi siini jed'a." 
Philemon1:9 Ammo waan anini si jaalad'uufi, wo si kad'ad'a. Anini waan kana ato Paulo nama maro isaatiifi hid'aansa keesa jiru taatele, inuma jed'a." 
Philemon1:10 Tanaafi maro Onesimo, ilma kiyya, Kristo keesatiifi, anini wo sii kad'achu fed'a; hid'aansa keesati anini kara lubbutiini abba isaa tahe." 
Philemon1:11 Duri inni woma sii imbahu, ammo anafi sile amma wo nuu baha." 
Philemon1:12 Anini isaa siti deebisa, ammo yo akasi tolchele garaani la lama na tahe." 
Philemon1:13 Anini isa arma na woliini tau fed'a, haga anini maro Odu Dansaatiifi hid'aansa keesa jiru, aka inni fulla tante na qarqaaru." 
Philemon1:14 Taatule anini irreeni, Na qarqaari siini injed'u; ammo sii fed'i teetiini tolchitu fed'a. Tanaafi haga atini ee jettuuti anini woma intolchu." 
Philemon1:15 Hegeri Onesimoni haga diqa toko si biraa deeme, aka eegi deebie, haga hegeri si woliini tau." 
Philemon1:16 Amma inni tisseeniti ammo tisse ira jira; inni oboleesa Kristo keesati. Inni guddo naa jaba! Si hagasira jabaata, waan inni tissetiifi oboleesa Aabbo keesa, taheefi." 
Philemon1:17 Tanaafi yo aka oboleesa na heregatte, akuma sila na heregattu, isaale heregad'u." 
Philemon1:18 Yo inni wollaala tokole sii tolche, yokhaani gati tante qabaate, nati heregad'u." 
Philemon1:19 Anini waan kana harkuma kiyyaani t'aafa: Anini, Pauloni, sii baasa. Ammo aka atini jireenna kanke maro tiyya qabdufu yaala bahi." 
Philemon1:20 Tanaafi, oboleesa kiyya, waan kana na tolchi, maro Aabbootiifi; garaa kiyya gammachiisi, aka oboleesa Kristo keesa." 
Philemon1:21 Anini inheregad'a ato sii t'aafu, aka atini waan kana naa tolchitu, waan hagana ira jirule naa tolchita!" 
Philemon1:22 Ammalle fulla bulti naa tolchi, anini inheregad'a, hegeri Waaqi kad'acha teesani d'agayeti harka keesaniti na deebisa." 
Philemon1:23 Epafraani, ka hid'aansa keesa maro Kristo Yesotiifi na woliini jiru, nagaya sii d'aama;" 
Philemon1:24 worri na woliini hojatu, Marikofi Aristarkofi Demafi Lukaleeni nagaya d'aamani." 
Philemon1:25 Eebiti Aabbo Yeso Kristo ha isani woliini jiraatuuti. 
Hebrews1:1 Duri Waaqi maro heddufi aka heddu afaani raagootatiini ababoota teennati dubbate," 
Hebrews1:2 ammo ammatana, bara eege kana keesa la Ilma isatiini nuti dubbate. Waaqi waan gubba jira ch'ufa isaani uume, isa fohate, aka gaafa muumme inni waan ch'ufa d'aallu." 
Hebrews1:3 Inni ifsa guddinna Waaqatiini biliqa, akuma Waaqi jiru innileeni jira, waan uumani ch'ufa dubbi jabeenna isatiini olqaba. Eegi daba nama iraa qulqulleese, inni gubba harka mirga ka Waaqa Guddinna gubba tae." 
Hebrews1:4 Malaika ira yayu Ilma guddisani, akuma maqaani inni argate suni maqa worraa ira jiru." 
Hebrews1:5 Wonti akanatiifi Waaqi taka yoomi malaika tokoleeni akana jed'e, Atini Ilma kiyya; anini arra yayu abbaa sii tahe. Yokhaani ammalle, Anini abba isaa tahe, inni Ilma naa taha." 
Hebrews1:6 Ammalle gaafa Ilma angafa lafaani d'ufe inni waan jed'e, Malaikaani Waaqa ch'ufti ha isa guddiftu." 
Hebrews1:7 Inni waan malaika dubbate waan jed'e, Inni malaika ufi bubbe tolche, hojattu ufi araba ibida tolcha." 
Hebrews1:8 Ammo waan Ilma, Waaqi waan jed'e, Hayyumti tante, Ee Waaqa, haga hegeri jirti! Anini d'ugaani nama fidda." 
Hebrews1:9 Atini d'uga jaalatte d'ara jibbita. Maro waan kanatifi Waaqi, Waaqi kanke, si fohate, gammada guddinna ka wahela keti ira jiru, sii kenne." 
Hebrews1:10 Ammalle inni waan jed'e, Aabbo, atini gaafa qara lafa uumte, harka keetiini gubba mid'aasite," 
Hebrews1:11 gubbaani tuni ch'ufti imbaddi, ammo atini inhafta. Isiini ch'ufti aka woya jaarti;" 
Hebrews1:12 atini aka woya isi woli ira dachaafta, isiini aka woya jijiramti. Ammo atini kanuma, haguma jirtu inuma jirta." 
Hebrews1:13 Waaqi taka malaika isatiini, kooti, harka kiyya ka mirga tai, haga anini nyaapa kanke barch'uma miila kanketi tolchuuti injenne." 
Hebrews1:14 Malaikaani maani re? Worri lubbu Waaqaa hojattu, ammalle isati worra erga, aka worra baafama argatu qarqaartu." 
Hebrews2:1 Maro waan kanatifi nu dubbi d'ageenne tana jabeesu male, aka iraa ingorre." 
Hebrews2:2 Yo d'aamsi malaikaani jette suni d'ugaa tahe, ammalle yo nami ind'ugefanne yokhaani ka ee jed'e imfud'anne ch'ufti gaargala argate," 
Hebrews2:3 akamiini dandeenne baana, yo nu baafama akana kana injabeesine? Aabbooni baafama kana qara yayu hime, worri isa d'agaye, aka isiini d'uga aka dansa nu beesise." 
Hebrews2:4 Waaqileeni d'uga ufi ta worrati dare, akheekhafi waan mamatiifi waan jabdu heddu tolche. Ammalle Lubbu Qulqullo fed'i ufi gula namaa qoode." 
Hebrews2:5 Waaqi lafa d'uftu ta sila uumu malaika iti guddo intolchine — lafa nu teenne waan isi dubbannu. 
Hebrews2:6 Ammo akuma t'aafi keesati fulla d'ibi t'aafani, Nami maani, Ee Waaqa, ka atini waan isaa hereddu? Yokhaani nami maani, Ee Waaqa ka atini teete waan isaa qulqultu?" 
Hebrews2:7 Atini haga diqa toko malaika ira isa diqeesite, atini boku guddinna ka hayyuma isaa kennite," 
Hebrews2:8 aka inni waan ch'ufa mohatu tolchite. Waan jed'ani, Waaqi nama aka inni waan ch'ufa mohatu tolche; waan ch'ufa jechaani waan tokole iraa inhambimne jecha. Ammo nu ammatana nama waan ch'ufa fidu inarginu." 
Hebrews2:9 Ammo Yeso ingarra! Haga diqa toko malaika ira diqeesani, aka inni eeba Waaqa gula maro nama ch'ufatiifi duu. Maro duisa inni due suniifi, ammatana boku guddinna ka hayyuma isaa kennani." 
Hebrews2:10 Aki Waaqi, ka waan ch'ufa uume qorqoratu, gaargala Yesoni argateeni isa qit'oomsu fullaa, aka ilmaani heddu guddinna isaa qoodachiisu. Wonti akanatiifi nami worra dura deeme baafama worraa kennu Yeso." 
Hebrews2:11 Yesoni nama ch'ufa daba iraa qulqulleese, isaafi worri qulqulleesanileeni ka Abba taka tahani. Maro waan kanatifi Yesoni, Oboleyaani worraani jechu inch'eere." 
Hebrews2:12 Inni waan jed'u, Ee Waaqa, anini waan kanke oboleyaani tiyyati dubbad'e, gumi isaani ch'ufa durati maqa kanke faarsa." 
Hebrews2:13 Inni ammalle waan jed'u, Anini abdi tiyya Waaqa ira keyad'a. Ammalle inni waan jed'u, Anini ijoolle Waaqi naa kenne woliini jira." 
Hebrews2:14 Waan ijoolleeni suni nama nafafi d'iiga qabu taateefi, Yesoleeni aka worraa tahe nafa argate. Wonti inni akasi tolcheefi, aka duisa isatiini Sheet'ana, ka duisa ira jabeenna qabu dabsatu." 
Hebrews2:15 Akanaani worra haguma jiru tissele duisa tahe duisa sodaate, tissooma suni keesaa baasu." 
Hebrews2:16 Aki inni malaika inqarqaarre mirkana, ammo akuma t'aafiini jettu, Inni d'aloota Abrahamu qarqaara." 
Hebrews2:17 Tanaafi inni kara ch'ufaani, akuma oboleyaani isaa tahu male, aka qaallu gudda ka d'ugatiifi ka naasu, huji Waaqa keesati tahe daba namaa araaramu." 
Hebrews2:18 Duuba waan isale duri ilaalatani garagalchaniifi, inni dandae worra ilaalatani inqarqaara." 
Hebrews3:1 Oboleyaani tiyya ta Kristiana, Waaqi ya isanile yaame! Yeso ka Waaqi erge, aka Qaallu Gudda d'ugefacha teenna tahu, ilaala." 
Hebrews3:2 Akuma Musani duri huji Waaqa ch'ufa guute, mana isaa keesati, akasuma Yesoleeni huji Waaqi isa fohateefi guute." 
Hebrews3:3 Nami mana jaaru, mana suni ira gurra argata. Akuma suni Yesoni Musa ira guddinna argachu male." 
Hebrews3:4 Mana ch'ufa namati jaara — ammalle waan ch'ufa Waaqati jaare. 
Hebrews3:5 Musani huji Mana Waaqa ch'ufa guute. Inni hojattu, waan Waaqi hegeri dubbatu ch'ufa la dubbate." 
Hebrews3:6 Ammo Kristoni aka Ilma mana Abba qorqoratu waan ch'ufa guute. Nu mana isaati, yo nu waan abdannu, soda male, garaa jabaanne d'ugefanne." 
Hebrews3:7 Tanaafi, akuma Lubbuuni Qulqullooni jettu, Yo qonqo Waaqa arra d'ageettani," 
Hebrews3:8 aka duri mata jabaatani Waaqa diddani, amma indidiina, aka gaafa duri lafa gamooji keesati isa ilaalattani." 
Hebrews3:9 Achiti ababooti teesani nati gamte, ato waan anini ganna afurtama keesati tolche argitele." 
Hebrews3:10 Maro waan kanatifi anini worra kanati dalane, waan jed'e, Worri kuni hojja ch'ufa waan heregu keesati wollaala qaba, taka kara kiyya imbaranne" 
Hebrews3:11 anini dalane kakhad'e waan jed'e, Worri kuni haguma jiru boqota anini worraa kurfeese inargatu!" 
Hebrews3:12 Oboleyaani tiyya, eegad'a, aka nami tokoleeni, isani keesa, garaa hama ka ind'ugefanne argate Waaqa jireenna iraa garingale." 
Hebrews3:13 Ammo aka dabi nama tokole yake sobe mata injabeesine, guyya ch'ufa woli qarqaara, haga t'aafiini, Arra jettu ch'ufa." 
Hebrews3:14 Nuuni ch'ufti Kristoni woli wahela, yo nu d'ugefacha teenna haga muumme jabeesine qabanne." 
Hebrews3:15 T'aafiini akana jetti: Yo qonqo Waaqa arra d'ageettani, aka duri mata jabaatani Waaqa diddani indidiina." 
Hebrews3:16 Eentu qonqo Waaqa d'agaye dubbi isaa dide? Worra Musani Misiri keesaa yaame ch'ufa. 
Hebrews3:17 Waaqi ganna afurtama eennuti dalane! Worra daba tolche, ka lafa gamooji keesati raawate ch'ufa." 
Hebrews3:18 Gaafa Waaqi khakhate, worri kuni haguma jiru boqota anini worraa kurfeese inargatu jed'e, Inni waan eennu dubbate? Inni waan worra dubbi isaa dide dubbate." 
Hebrews3:19 Tanaafi, aka worri waan d'ugefachu dideefi boqota suni argachu dad'abe argina." 
Hebrews4:1 Duuba, Waaqi ya nuti kakhate, aka nu olseene isa woliini boqonnu. Tanaafi nu qorqorachu malle, aka isani tokoleeni boqota suni ind'amne." 
Hebrews4:2 Nuleeni, akuma worra, Odu Dansa d'ageenne. Worri Odu Dansa ya d'agaye, ammo woma worraa imbaane, maro d'ageennaani d'ugefachaani imfud'atiniifi." 
Hebrews4:3 Nu, worri d'ugefate, olseenne Waaqa woliini boqonna. Akuma inni jed'e, Anini dalane kakhad'e waan jed'e, Worri kuni haguma jiru boqota anini worraa kurfeese inargatu. Ato hujiini isaa ta duri ta uumama hobaatele inni waan kana la dubbate." 
Hebrews4:4 Wonti akanatiifi fulla toko t'aafiini waan guyya torbeeso akana jetti, Waaqi guyya torbeeso huji ufi ch'ufa iraa boqote." 
Hebrews4:5 Ammalle waan dubbi tana dubbatani, Worri kuni haguma jiru boqota anini worraa kurfeese inargatu!" 
Hebrews4:6 Worri qara Odu Dansa d'agaye, boqota suni inarganne, waan Waaqa didaniifi. Ammo nama gari boqota suni inargata." 
Hebrews4:7 Maro waan kanatifi Waaqi guyya d'ibi fohate ka Arra jed'ani. Ganna heddu eegi suni afaani Dauditini dubbate, t'aafi qara maqa d'aani keesati, waan jed'e, Yo qonqo Waaqa arra d'ageettani, mata jabaatani indidiina." 
Hebrews4:8 Ato sila duri Yoshuani worra suni boqota suni kenne, Waaqi eegi suni waan guyya d'ibi indubbatu." 
Hebrews4:9 Tanaafi boqota gumi Waaqa injira ammalle, akuma Waaqi guyya Sabato boqote suni." 
Hebrews4:10 Wonti akanatiifi nami boqota Waaqi kennuufi argatu ch'ufti akuma Waaqi huji isaa iraa boqote boqota. 
Hebrews4:11 Tanaafi nu haga dandeennu jabaachu malle, aka boqota suni argannu. Nuuni tokoleeni, aka worri suni ch'aqasu dide boqota argachu dad'abe, tahu himmalle." 
Hebrews4:12 Wonti akanatiifi dubbini Waaqa jireenna qabdi, ammalle jabdu. Sheefti ch'ufa ira qara qabdi. Nafa ch'ufa tarsaafti, haga fulla onneefi lubbuuni wolti ejitufi fulla mitafi d'uuti wolti ejitu. Isiini fed'ifi herega garaa nama ilaalti." 
Hebrews4:13 Waan tokole dandaani Waaqa ind'ossani. Wonti lafa keesa jira ch'ufti ila isaa dura jirti; isa durati waan keenna ch'ufa himachu malle. 
Hebrews4:14 Tanaafi d'ugefacha teenna jabeesu male. Nu qaallu gudda ka fuula Waaqa dura seene qamna — Yeso, Ilma Waaqa." 
Hebrews4:15 Qaalluuni keenna guddaani nama laafinna keennaa nahu diduniti; ammo nu qaallu gudda, ka akuma keenna kara ch'ufaani ilaalatani, ammo daba intolchiini qamna." 
Hebrews4:16 Tanaafi jabaanne, barch'uma Waaqati d'ufu male, fulla eebiti jirtu. Achiti naasufi eeba arganna, ta hojja nu d'iba qabaanne nu qarqaartu." 
Hebrews5:1 Qaallu gudda jiddu nama keesaa fohatani, aka maro namatiifi Waaqa hojatu. Inni waan Waaqaa baasaniifi sorio ta daba baaftu baasa." 
Hebrews5:2 Nama daallefi ka wollaala tolchu obse gorsu dandaa, waan innileeni laafinna qabuufi." 
Hebrews5:3 Maro waan kanatifi inni, maro daba gumi ch'allaaniti, ammo maro daba ufile sorio qallu male." 
Hebrews5:4 Nami guddinna kana ufiini imfud'atu, ammo Waaqati yaama, akuma duri Haruni yaamani." 
Hebrews5:5 Akasuma Kristoni guddinna kana ufi fud'ate qaallu gudda ufi intolchine, ammo Waaqi waan isaani jed'e, Atini Ilma kiyya, anini arra ya abbaa sii tahe." 
Hebrews5:6 Fulla d'ibileti inni waan jed'e, Atini qaallu haga hegerile jiru taata, aada qaalluma ta Melkizedeki gula." 
Hebrews5:7 Gaafa lafa jiru, Yesoni qonqo guddofi imimaaniini aka male Waaqa kad'ate, ka dandae duisa keesaa isa baasu. Waan inni Waaqa sodaateefi Waaqi isa d'agaye." 
Hebrews5:8 Ammo, ato Ilma Waaqa tahele, inni kara gaargalatiini Waaqa guutu barate." 
Hebrews5:9 Inni qit'oomnaani, abba baafama hegeri ka nama isa saalfatu ch'ufaa tahe," 
Hebrews5:10 Waaqi qaallu gudda isa tolche, aada qaalluma Melkizedeki gula." 
Hebrews5:11 Waan hedduti jira, ta sila nu dubbi tana irati jennu, ammo guddo jabaatti, aka isaniti himnu, waan isani guddo mata jabaattaniifi." 
Hebrews5:12 Isani hojja tana jara nama barsiisu tahu maltani, ufiiftu nama waan qara ta dubbi Waaqa isani barsiisu feetani. Isani harma hod'u maltani, sagale jabdu indandeettani." 
Hebrews5:13 Wonti akanatiifi nami harma hod'u ammalle ijoolle, d'arafi d'uga gargari imbeekhu." 
Hebrews5:14 Ammo sagaleeni jajabduuni ta nama gugurdati, ka hubacha argate waan dansaafi hamtu gargari beekhu." 
Hebrews6:1 Tanaafi barsiisa qara ta Kristo lafa d'aamne, dura deemne ta hagasi ira jajabdu barachuu malle. Nu waan yayaba d'ugefacha teenna deebine keyannufi inqamnu; ta aka huji woma imbaane iraa deebiitifa Waaqa d'ugefacha fa barsiisa waan batisotiifi ta harka ira kayanifi kaisa nama duetiifi qorsuma hegeri d'uftu." 
Hebrews6:2  
Hebrews6:3 Yo Waaqi jed'e akana tolchina. 
Hebrews6:4 Nama qara d'ugefate eege lakise iraa bade dandaani daba iraa wo deebisani? Duri worri ifsa Waaqa keesa jira, galata gubba miefate qooda ufi ka Lubbu Qulqullo argate." 
Hebrews6:5 Aka dubbini Waaqa dansa argani, ammalle jabeenna d'aloota d'ufule beekhani." 
Hebrews6:6 Amma ya jigani! Tanaafi dandaani daba ira indeebisani, waan Ilma Waaqa ammalle mukha irati fannisani nama ch'ufa durati ch'eersaniifi." 
Hebrews6:7 Lafa guyya ch'ufa bisaani d'udde ta mid'aani iti oobrani abba iti oobre baaftu Waaqi ineebisa. 
Hebrews6:8 Ammo yo qoraatifi harama guddo baafte woma imbaatu; Waaqi hegeri inabaara, eege ibidaani balleesani." 
Hebrews6:9 Ammo yo akasi dubbannele, jaalaani teenna, nu waan keesani ya quumne. Nu imbeenna, aka isani eeba guddo ta baafama isani kennitu qabdani." 
Hebrews6:10 Waaqi ka d'ugaati. Inni huji isani maro isa jaalattaniifi tolchitani inded'u, hojja isani gumi Waaqa duri qarqaartani arrale qarqaartani." 
Hebrews6:11 Fed'iini teenna guddooni, aka isani owa amma qabdani kana, haga muumme teetanini, aka wonti isani heregatani ch'ufti isanii taatu." 
Hebrews6:12 Nu isanii lalaaftani imfeenu, ammo aka worra d'ugefate obsu taatani feena, aka waan Waaqi kakhate argattani." 
Hebrews6:13 Gaafa Waaqi Abrahamuti kakhate, inni aka waan qara jed'e guutu kakhate. Waan nami tokoleeni ka isa ira gudda injirreefi, inni gaafa kakhate maqa ufi d'ae." 
Hebrews6:14 Inni waan jed'e, Anini inkakhad'a, aka si eebise, ilmaani heddu sii kennu." 
Hebrews6:15 Abrahamuuni obse jennaani waan Waaqi iti kakhate argate. 
Hebrews6:16 Yo nami kakhatu, inni maqa nama isa ira jirutiini kakhata, ammalle kakhuuni waan nami irati wold'abe ch'ufa ind'ugefachiifti." 
Hebrews6:17 Waaqi worra waan inni iti khakhate argate ch'ufa diideese iti himu fed'e, aka qalbi ufi garingalfanne, tanaafi aka jaba kakhate." 
Hebrews6:18 Duuba waan lamati jira, ta injijiramneefi ta Waaqi dandae irati inkiyyimne." 
Hebrews6:19 Abdiini tuni jabduu aka male nu jabeesiti. Isiini jabdufi d'uga, ammalle golla Mana Waaqa ka gubba jiru keesa seenti, haga Fulla Qulqullo." 
Hebrews6:20 Yesoni ya maro teennaafi nu dura seene. Inni ya qaallu gudda haga hegeri tahe, aada qaalluma Melkizedeki gula." 
Hebrews7:1 Qaallichi Melkizedekiini kunini duri hayyu Salemuti, ammalle qaallu Waaqa Guddaati. Ato Abrahamuuni duula d'aqa hayyoota fit'e galu, Melkizedekiini isa arge eebiseefi." 
Hebrews7:2 Abrahamuuni qooda kud'anneeso ka waan qabu ch'ufa kenneefi. Maqaani qara ka Melkizedeki Hayyu D'ugaati. Maro inni hayyu Salemutiifi, maqaani isaa ammalle Hayyu Nagayaati." 
Hebrews7:3 Melkizedekiini abbaafi haad'a inqabu, ammalle ababootale inqabu; d'alootafi dua isale nami imbeekhu. Inni aka Ilma Waaqaa jira: haga jiru qaallu." 
Hebrews7:4 Aka inni gudda inagartaniyu? Abrahamuuni, abbaani keenna guddaani qooda kud'anneeso, ka waan inni boojie ch'ufa, kenneefi." 
Hebrews7:5 Qaaloleeni d'aloota Lawi Seeri gula qooda kud'anneeso ijoolle Israeli iraa guurachu indandeetii worri gosuma ufi ira fud'ata ato worri d'aloota Abrahamu tahele. 
Hebrews7:6 Melkizedekiini d'aloota Lawitiniti, ammo qooda kud'anneeso Abrahamu iraa fud'ate, nama Waaqi kakhateefi argatte eebise." 
Hebrews7:7 Aka nami nama eebisu nama eebisanifi ira jiru nami tokoleeni mormu indandau. 
Hebrews7:8 Qaaloti qooda kud'anneeso nama iraa guurtu indooti; ammo Melkizedekiini ka qooda kud'anneeso nama iraa guure, akuma t'aafiini jettu ammalle injira." 
Hebrews7:9 Tanaafi gaafa Abrahamuuni qooda kud'anneeso baase, Lawileeni, ka d'alooti isaa nama iraa guuru, ufile imbaase." 
Hebrews7:10 Lawini gaafasi ind'alanne, ammo gudeeda abba isaa Abrahamu keesa jira, gaafa Melkizedekiini isa arge." 
Hebrews7:11 Aada qaalluma Lawi gula Seera gosa Israeliti kennani. Yo sila aadaani qaalluma Lawi sunini qit'e taate, wonti qaalluuni d'ibiini, ka aada Melkizedeki, ka aada Haruni intahiini, d'ufuufi injirtu." 
Hebrews7:12 Wonti akanatiifi yo qaalluma garagalchani, Seerale garagalchu malani." 
Hebrews7:13 Aabbooni keenna, ka waan kana waan isaa dubbatani, gosa d'ibi; gochiti isaa taka qaallu, fulla sorio iti qalani, intaane." 
Hebrews7:14 Aka inni gosa Yuda guddo beekhani; Musaleeni gosa tana maqa ind'oomne, gaafa inni waan qaalole dubbate." 
Hebrews7:15 Dubbini tuni haga qarale ira qulqullofti: qaalluuni d'ibiini yayu mullate, ka aka Melkizedeki jiru." 
Hebrews7:16 Seerafi aada namaa gula inni qaallu intaane; ammo jabeenna jireenna muumme inqamnetiini qaallu tahe. 
Hebrews7:17 Akuma t'aafiini jettu, Atini haga jirtu, aada qaalluma Melkizedeki gula, qaallu taata." 
Hebrews7:18 Duuba akanaani aada duri ya lakisani, waan isiini laaftu ammalle woma imbaaneefi." 
Hebrews7:19 Seeri Musa dandae woma tokole inqit'eesu. Amma abdi d'ibiini ya d'ufani, ta Waaqati nu d'ieesitu." 
Hebrews7:20 Ammalle kakhu Waaqati jira. Gaafa jara kaani qaalole tolchani, kakhuuni tunini injirtu." 
Hebrews7:21 Ammo Yesoni kakhuuni qaallu tahe, gaafa Waaqi, Aabbooni ya kakhate, qalbi ufi gara ingalfatu: Atini haga jirtu qaallu taata isaani jed'e kaani." 
Hebrews7:22 Maro Yesotiifi, aka wold'aqisa ch'ufa ira dansa qamnu, ufi beenna." 
Hebrews7:23 Ammalle qaaloleeni duri heddu; waan worri duufi huji ufi guutu dad'abde. 
Hebrews7:24 Ammo Yesoni haga hegeri jira, duuba hujiini isaa ta qaalluma nama d'ibiti indabartu." 
Hebrews7:25 Ammalle inni indandaa, ammafi hegerile, aka worra isa gula Waaqati d'ufu baasu, waan inni haga hegeri Waaqa worraa kad'atuufi." 
Hebrews7:26 Yesoni duuba Qaallu Gudda, ka fed'i teenna ch'ufa nuu guutu! Inni qulqullo, wollaalafi daba tokole inqabu; isa ya worra ch'ubbutiini gargari basaani, gubbati olgeesani." 
Hebrews7:27 Inni aka qaalole gugurdo taani injiru ta guyya ch'ufa sorio qaltu, qara maro daba ufitiifi, ammalle maro daba namale. Inni sorio toko baase, taka quba ch'alla, gaafa nafa ufi baase." 
Hebrews7:28 Seeri Musa, nama qit'e intahiini qaalole gugurdo tolcha, ammo kakhuuni Waaqa, ta eegi Seera d'ufte, Ilma fohatti, ka haga hegeri qit'e tolchani." 
Hebrews8:1 Wonti nu jennu tana: nu qaallu gudda akana ka barch'uma Waaqa Gudda harka mirga gubbaa tau qamna. 
Hebrews8:2 Inni huji qaallu gudda Fulla Qulqulloti hojata, waaro Aabbooni d'aabe keesa, ta nami d'aabeeniti." 
Hebrews8:3 Qaallu gudda ch'ufa aka inni galatafi sorio Waaqaa baasu fohatani, tanaafi qaallichi keenna guddaleeni wo baasu male." 
Hebrews8:4 Yo sila inni lafa jiraate, qaallu tahu indandau, waan, aada Seera Yahuda gula, qaaloleeni galata baaftu jirtuufi." 
Hebrews8:5 Hujiini worri aka qaalole hojattu gaandidufi fakeennuma waan gubba jiraati. Musaleeni akuma kana. Gaafa inni diquma waaro ind'aabiini, Waaqi waan jed'eeni, Waan ch'ufa akuma gaara gubbati argite gula tolchi." 
Hebrews8:6 Ammo Yesoni ya huji qaalluma ta ta worra iraa jirtu argate, akuma wold'aqisi inni Waaqafi nama jidduti tolcheleeni ira dansa. Wonti akanatiifi wold'aqisi sunini kakhu waan ira dansa qaba." 
Hebrews8:7 Yo sila wold'aqisi qara qit'e tahe, wonti ka lameeso tolchaniifi injirtu." 
Hebrews8:8 Ammo Waaqi wollaala gumi isaa irati arge waan jed'e, Aabbooni waan jed'u, Guyyaani ind'ufa, ka anini wold'aqisa haraa gosa Israelitiifi ta Yuda woliini tolfad'u." 
Hebrews8:9 Aka wold'aqisa anini ababoota worraa woliini tolchetiiniti, gaafa anini worra harka qabe lafa Misiri keesaa baase. Worri wold'aqisa anini worra woliini tolche injabeesine; tanaafi anini waan worraa iyaalle, Tunini dubbi Aabbo Waaqi jed'e." 
Hebrews8:10 Aabbo waan jed'u, wold'aqisi taka tana gosa Israeli woliini tolchu kana: Anini Seera kiyya qalbi worra keesa kaye, garaa worra keesati t'aafa. Anini Waaqa worra taha, worrileeni gumi tiyya taha." 
Hebrews8:11 Nami tokoleeni gaafasi nama d'ibi imbarsiisu, yokhaani nami tokoleeni oboleesa ufitiini, Aabbo beekha injed'u. Wonti akanatiifi worri ch'ufti na beekha, diqaafi guddaani worraleeni." 
Hebrews8:12 Anini ch'ubbu worra inaraaramaafi, iti deebie daba worra inqaabad'u." 
Hebrews8:13 Waan wold'aqisa haraa dubbannaani Waaqi ka qara la dulloomse wonti dulloomatte ch'ich'ite ch'ufti yoosu baddi. 
Hebrews9:1 Wold'aqisi qara aada kad'achatiifi fulla Waaqa iti kad'atani nami harkaani mid'aase qaba. 
Hebrews9:2 Waaro d'aabani, bada isii Fulla Qulqullo jed'ani. Bada suni keesa ifsefi mesafi qit'a Waaqaa baasaniti jira." 
Hebrews9:3 Golla lameeso duuba, waaro ta Fulla Fulla Ch'ufa Ira Qulqullo jed'aniti jira." 
Hebrews9:4 Isi keesa fulla hit'aana iti aarsani ta worqiini mid'aasaniifi Sanduqa Wold'aqisa, ka Waaqa, ka worqi dibaniti jira. Sanduqi kaani eele worqi ta sagale manna jed'ani qabduufi ule Haruni, ta baala baaftefi d'akha lama ka dubbi wold'aqisa irati t'aafisa qabdu qaba." 
Hebrews9:5 Sanduqa gubba fakeenna waan lubbu qabaati ka aka Waaqi achi jiru garsiiftuti jira, ta koola ufi fulla daba namaa araaramaniti balliftu. Ammo yoi waan ch'ufa diideesani himani, ammaniti." 
Hebrews9:6 Eegi waan kana kurfeesani, qaaloleeni hojja ch'ufa bada waaro taani olseenti, aka huji ufi hojattu;" 
Hebrews9:7 ammo qaallu gudda ch'allati Waaro gaara keesa keesa seena, ammalle waan kana ganna keesati maro toko ch'alla tolcha. Qaalluuni kaani d'iiga fuud'e, aka maro ufitiifi, maro worra ato imbeekhiini daba tolcheefi, jed'e Waaqaa baasa." 
Hebrews9:8 Lubbuuni Qulqullooni akuma dansa agarsiifti, aka karaani ka Fulla Fulla Ch'ufa Ira Qulqullo d'aqu ammalle imbanne, haga badaani waaro olejitu." 
Hebrews9:9 Akheekhi kunini ammalle waan arra hima. Galatafi sorioni, ta Waaqa baasani, dandeete garaa nama Waaqa kad'atu inqulqulleesitu." 
Hebrews9:10 Wonti kunini waan nyaataniifi waan d'uganiifi aada qulqulleesa ch'alla. Tunini ch'ufti seera alaati, ta haga Waaqi waan ch'ufa garagalche imid'aasiini ch'alla jirtu." 
Hebrews9:11 Ammo Kristoni ya aka Qaallu Gudda, ka waan dansa lafa tana keesa jiru tahu d'ufe. Waarooni inni keesa hojatu waaro taani ira guddo, ammalle ira dansa. Nami imid'aasine, akasi jechaani waan lafa tana keesati uumaniiniti jechu." 
Hebrews9:12 Gaafa Kristoni waaro ke bahe dabre Fulla Fulla Ch'ufa Ira Qulqullo maro toko keesa seene, inni d'iiga sorio reetiifi ka yabiye imfud'anne; ammo d'iiguma ufi fud'ate, baafama hegeri nuu tolche." 
Hebrews9:13 D'iiga reetiifi ka koromitiifi daara jibicha sorio baasani nama qulqullo intahiiniti firfirsani, t'uri worraa iraa fuud'ani worraa qulqulleesani." 
Hebrews9:14 Waan wonti kunini d'uga taateefi, d'iigi Yeso hagasi ira wo baha? Lubbu hegeritiini inni aka sorio d'uga Waaqaa ufi baase. D'iigi isaa herega keenna huji hamtu ira qulqulleesa, aka nu Waaqa jiru hojannu." 
Hebrews9:15 Maro waan kanatifi Kristoni nama wold'aqisa haraa kurfeesu tahe, aka worri Waaqi yaame eeba hegeri ta Waaqi kakhate argatu. Wonti woni kuni taatuufi, maro duisi jiruufi ka wollaala wold'aqisa qara jalati tolchani, keesaa nama baasu jiruufi." 
Hebrews9:16 Fulla d'aalti jirtu, nami iraa d'aalani qara duu male," 
Hebrews9:17 d'aalti haga nami iraa d'aalani suni jiru injirtu, yo inni due ch'alla taati." 
Hebrews9:18 Maro waan kanatifi wold'aqisi qaraleeni d'iigaani tahe. 
Hebrews9:19 Qaraa fiit'e Musani Seera kitaaba Seera keesati t'aafani nama ch'ufati hime. Jennaani d'iiga yabiyetiifi ka korbeeyitifi bisaani fuud'e, kitaaba Seeratiifi nama ch'ufati qumbiifi butu diimtuuni fifit'e." 
Hebrews9:20 Duuba waan jed'e, D'iigi kunini ka wold'aqisa Waaqi isanii tolche beesisu." 
Hebrews9:21 Akasuma Musani Waarofi miha kad'acha ch'ufa d'iiga iti fifit'e. 
Hebrews9:22 Ammalle Seera gula waan ch'ufa d'iigaani qulqulleesani; dabale, yo d'iiga jissani ch'alla araaramani." 
Hebrews9:23 Tanaafi fakeenna waan gubba jirani sorio tanaani qulqulleesu malani. Ammo wonti gubba jirani sorio hagasi iraa feeti. 
Hebrews9:24 Wonti akanatiifi Kristoni fakeenna fulla qulqullo, ta nami harkaani mid'aase keesa inseenne. Inni gubbati olgale, fulla inni amma maro teennaafi fuula Waaqa dura eju." 
Hebrews9:25 Qaallichi Guddaani ka Yahudi ganna ch'ufa d'iiga horitiini Fulla Qulqullo seena. Ammo Kristoni maro heddu ufi baasu achi inseenne; 
Hebrews9:26 yo akasi tolche, maro heddu haga lafa uumani sila gaargala. Ammo ammatana inni ya maro tokotu mullate, ka d'alooti ch'ufti diquma inhobaiini, aka sorio nafa ufitiini daba balleesu." 
Hebrews9:27 Akuma nami ch'ufti maro toko ch'alla due, ammo eegi suni Waaqi nama qoru," 
Hebrews9:28 akasuma Kristole maro toko sorio baasani, aka daba nama heddu baasu. Inni maro lameesole indeebia, aka daba balleesuuniti, ammo aka worra isa eegatu baasu." 
Hebrews10:1 Seeri Yahudi fakeenna dansa ka waan d'ugaatiniti. Ammo inni gandidu waan dansa ka hegeri d'ufu ch'alla. Sorio takati ganna ch'ufa qalani baasani. Seeri yoosi akami dandae, sorio tanaani, worra Waaqati d'ufu qulqulleesa?" 
Hebrews10:2 Yo worra Waaqa kad'atu aka dansa daba iraa qulqulleesani, worri sila iti deebie daba ufirati inargu, sorio ch'ufa sila illakisani." 
Hebrews10:3 Ammo sorioni baasani ganna ch'ufa daba nama qaabsiifti. 
Hebrews10:4 Wonti akanatiifi d'iigi koromitiifi ka ree dandae daba imbaasu. 
Hebrews10:5 Maro waan kanatifi Kristoni, ato diquma lafa ind'ufiini, waan Waaqaani jed'e, Atini soriofi waan sii baasani imfeetu, ammo atini ya nafa naa kurfeesite." 
Hebrews10:6 Sorioni ta gubani si ingammachiiftu, yokhaani sorio ta daba baaftu." 
Hebrews10:7 Jennaani anini waan jed'e, Anini kuno, Ee Waaqa, aka waan atini feetu ch'ufa tolchu, akuma kitaaba Seera keesati waan kiyya t'aafani." 
Hebrews10:8 Qaraa fiit'e inni waan jed'e, Atini soriofi waan Waaqaa baasaniifi yokhaani sorio gubaniifi sorio daba baaftu imfeetu, isiini si ingammachiiftu. Inni waan kana, ato sorio tana Seera gula baasanile jed'e." 
Hebrews10:9 Jennaani inni waan jed'e, Anini kuno aka waan atini feetu ch'ufa tolchu. Tanaafi Waaqi sorio duri ch'ufa balleese, sorio Kristo fulla isii kaye." 
Hebrews10:10 Maro Yeso Kristoni waan Waaqi, Tolchi jed'eeni ch'ufa tolcheefi, sorioni nafa isaa yayu maro tokotu daba ch'ufa nura d'it'e." 
Hebrews10:11 Qaaloleeni Yahudi ch'ufti guyya ch'ufa huji ufi hojatte sorio takati maro heddu baafti. Ammo sorioni tunini daba keesaa nama imbaaftu. 
Hebrews10:12 Taatule Kristoni sorio toko maro dabaatiifi baase, sorio hojja ch'ufa dansa, duuba harka Waaqa ka mirga tae." 
Hebrews10:13 Achi tae eega, haga Waaqi nyaapa isaa barch'uma miila isaa tolchuuti." 
Hebrews10:14 Sorio tokooni inni ya worra daba iraa qulqulleesani haga hegeri qit'e tolche. 
Hebrews10:15 Lubbuuni Qulqulloleeni d'uga nuu taati. Qara isiini waan jettu: 
Hebrews10:16 Aabbooni waan jed'u, taka tana, Wold'aqisi anini worra woliini tolfad'u kana: Anini Seera kiyya garaa worraa keesa keyad'e, qalbi worrale keesati t'aafa." 
Hebrews10:17 Ammalle isiini waan jettu, Anini deebie dabaafi hameenna worraa tokole inqaabad'u." 
Hebrews10:18 Eegi waan kana ch'ufa araaramani, sorio daba baaftu iti deebiani imfed'ani." 
Hebrews10:19 Tanaafi oboleyaani tiyya, nu Fulla Fulla Ch'ufa Ira Qulqullo, maro d'iiga Yesotiifi, soda male seenu indandeenna." 
Hebrews10:20 Inni golla keesa kara hareesafi ka jireenna nuu bane; akasi jechaani nafa isaa keesa. 
Hebrews10:21 Nu qaallu gudda, ka Mana Waaqa qorqoratu qamna." 
Hebrews10:22 Koota yoosi, Waaqati d'iaanna, garaa d'ugatiifi ka d'ugefachatiini, garaa herega hameenna ira qulqulleesaniifi nafa bisaani qullooni d'iqaniini." 
Hebrews10:23 Abdi nu eegannu jabeesiina, waan nu aka Waaqi kakhu ufi guutu heregannuufi." 
Hebrews10:24 Waan woli herenna, wolqarqaarra, woljaalanne, waan dansa woli tolchina." 
Hebrews10:25 Wolwoldeenna lakisu himmalle, aka nami gari tolchu jiru. Ammo woljabeesiinna, wonti akanatiifi aka guyyaani Aabbo d'iaatu argu jirtani." 
Hebrews10:26 Wonti akanatiifi sorioni tokoleeni amma dandeete daba nuraa imbaaftu, yo nu beekha daba tolchine, eegi d'uga nuti himani." 
Hebrews10:27 Wonti nuu hafe, aka waan eegi tana d'ufa sodaannu; qorsumafi ibida gudda, ka worra Waaqa didu balleesu." 
Hebrews10:28 Nama Seera Musa didu ch'ufa naasu male ijeesani, eegi d'ugaani lamaa sadi, aka inni wollaala qabu himte." 
Hebrews10:29 Nama Ilma Waaqa tuffatu, ka d'iiga wold'aqisa Waaqa ka isa qulqulleese bilaasha sehu, ka Lubbu eebaa arabsu, maal tolchani re? Gaargala isaa, aka inni hama, me herega!" 
Hebrews10:30 Nu nama, Anini haalo imbaafad'a, anini gati imfud'ad'a jed'e imbeenna. Ammalle ka, Aabbooni gumi isaa inqora jed'ele imbeenna." 
Hebrews10:31 Waan guddo hamtuti, yo harka Waaqa jiru seenani." 
Hebrews10:32 Aka isani duri jirtani qaabad'a. Gaafasi, eegi ifsaani Waaqa isaniti ifse, isani guddo gaargaltani, ammo gaargali suni isani indabsanne." 
Hebrews10:33 Maro heddu gumi keesati isani arabsani gaargalchani, maro heddu worra akana tolchanile kalchu feetani." 
Hebrews10:34 Isani gaargala worra hid'ani qoodattani, ammalle gaafa miha keesani ch'ufa saamani gammadaani obsitani, maro isani aka waan hagasi ira jira, ta haga jirtu teetu, qabdani beetaniifi." 
Hebrews10:35 Tanaafi garaa jabaad'a, yo akasi tolchitani, gati guddo argattani." 
Hebrews10:36 Isani obsu maltani, aka fed'i Waaqa tolchitani, waan inni kakhate argattani." 
Hebrews10:37 Akuma t'aafiini jettu, D'iotu, nami d'ufu jiru ind'ufa, inturu." 
Hebrews10:38 Taatule nama kiyya ka d'uga d'ugefateeti jiraata; ammo yo tokoleeni garagale anini iraa ingammadu. 
Hebrews10:39 Nuu nama garagale baduuniti. Ammo nu d'ugefacha qamna, inuma baafamna." 
Hebrews11:1 D'ugefacha jechaani aka waan heregataniifi waan ilaani ingarre d'uga iti qabaatani. 
Hebrews11:2 D'ugefacha akana tanaani jaaroleeni duri gurra baafate. 
Hebrews11:3 D'ugefachaani, aka lafti dubbi Waaqatiini uumamte beenna, aka wonti nami ilaani argu waan nami ilaani ingarre keesaa baate." 
Hebrews11:4 D'ugefachati Habili sorio ta Kaini ira dansa baasise. Maro d'ugefacha isatiifi Waaqi, Nama d'uga isaani jed'e, waan Waaqi sorio isaa fud'ateefi. Maro d'ugefacha isatiifi Habilini arrale dubbata, ato duele." 
Hebrews11:5 D'ugefachati Henoko duu d'owe. Fulla Waaqa isa geesani nami isa argu dad'abe, waan Waaqi isa gubbati olgeeseefi. T'aafiini, ato isa gubbati olingeesiini, inni Waaqa gammachiise jetti." 
Hebrews11:6 Nami tokoleeni, d'ugefacha male, dandae Waaqa ingammachiisu. Nami Waaqati d'ufu, aka Waaqi jiruufi aka Waaqi worra isa barbaadu eebisu d'ugefachu male." 
Hebrews11:7 D'ugefachati Nuhu gorsa Waaqa ka ilaani ingarre, ka hegeri taha, d'ugefachiise. inni dubbi Waaqa ch'aqase, hobolo ta keesati isaafi worri isaa bahe ijaare. Kara kanaani inni wollaala lafati mure, d'uga d'ugefachaani d'uftu argate." 
Hebrews11:8 D'ugefachaani Abrahamuuni, gaafa Waaqi isa yaame ch'aqase, lafa Waaqi isaa kakhate d'aqe. Inni kae lafa ufi keesaa deeme, ka gara deemu imbeenne." 
Hebrews11:9 D'ugefachaani inni lafa Waaqi isaa kakhate keesa tae, aka keessuma. Waaro keesa, akuma Isaaqofi Yakobo tae, ka kakhu suni Waaqa iraa argate." 
Hebrews11:10 Wonti akanatiifi inni dira yayaba jaba qabu, ka Waaqi herege ijaare, eegachu jira." 
Hebrews11:11 D'ugefachati Abrahamu ijoolle kenne, ato inni guddo jaare, niitiini isaa maseena taatele. Inni aka Waaqi kakhu ufi inch'absine ind'ugefate." 
Hebrews11:12 Ato namichi kunini jaare rerepele, ijoolle aka urji jirtuufi ta aka maansa afaani galaana d'ale." 
Hebrews11:13 Worri kunini ch'ufti d'ugefacha keesa due. Waan Waaqi lafa keesa worraa kakhate inarganne, ammo fagoti argani heregatani, ammalle, Nu keessuma baqa yaatu jed'ani diideesani himani." 
Hebrews11:14 Nami waan akana kana jed'u aka lafa ufi barbaadu jiru; diideese agarsiisa. 
Hebrews11:15 Waan lafa ta keesaa yaani inherenne, ammo yo sila fed'ani dandaani iti dachaani." 
Hebrews11:16 Taatule lafa ira dansa barbaadani, lafa gubbaa jirtu. Maro waan kanatifi yo worri Waaqaani, Waaqa keenna jed'u, inni inch'eerfatu, waan inni dira worra mid'aaseefi." 
Hebrews11:17 D'ugefachaani Abrahamuuni ilma ufi Isaaqo aka sorio qallu fed'e, gaafa Waaqi Abrahamu ilaalate. Waaqi Abrahamuti kakhate, ammo inni kurfo jira aka ilma ufi tokocha aka sorio qallu." 
Hebrews11:18 Waaqi qara waan isaani jed'e, Isaaqo gula d'alooti kanke maqa argata." 
Hebrews11:19 Abrahamuuni waan Waaqi Isaaqo duisa keesaa kaasu dandau herege; tanaafi, fakeenna gula, Abrahamuuni Isaaqo duisa keesa argate." 
Hebrews11:20 D'ugefachaani Isaaqoni Esaufi Yakobo eeba hegeri kakhateefi. 
Hebrews11:21 D'ugefachaani Yakoboni, ato induiini, ilmaani Yusufu ch'ufa eebise. Inni ule ufiti hirkate Waaqa kad'ate." 
Hebrews11:22 Yusufuni, ato diquma induiini, d'ugefachaani waan godaanna gosa Israeli lafa Misiri keesaa dubbate, waan reefa isaa tolchanile hime." 
Hebrews11:23 D'ugefachaani abbaafi haati Musa jia sadi isa d'ossite, eegi inni d'alate. Aka inni mid'aaga arginaani soda male seera hayyu ch'absani." 
Hebrews11:24 Musani d'ugefachaani, gaafa inni guddate, ilma intala Farao ufiini jechu dide." 
Hebrews11:25 Inni worra Waaqaa woliini gaargalu fed'e, fulla haga diqa toko dabaani gammadu ira." 
Hebrews11:26 Inni hori lafa Misiri ira, araba maro Kristotiifi isa arabsani dansa heregate, waan inni galata eegi tana heregeefi." 
Hebrews11:27 D'ugefachaani Musani kae, lafa Misiri keesaa deeme, dalansu hayyu sodaachu dide. Inni iti deebiu dide, aka waan Waaqa ka imullanne argu." 
Hebrews11:28 D'ugefachaani inni jila Pasaka tolche, d'iiga balbalati fifit'e, aka malaikaani nama hobaaftu angafa d'iira ka gosa Israeli intund'e." 
Hebrews11:29 D'ugefachaani gochiti Israeli galaana Shamu, aka lafa goddu, taakite; ammo gochiti Misiri taaku feenaani bisaani liqimsani hobaasani." 
Hebrews11:30 D'ugefachati naabo Yeriko ch'abse jisse, eegi gochiti Israeli guyya torba ira marte." 
Hebrews11:31 D'ugefachati niiti sharmut'a, ta Rahabu jed'ani, worra Waaqa d'agayu dide woliini, duu d'owe, waan isiini jara dooya yau bulchiteefi." 
Hebrews11:32 Dura deeme, nama d'ibile hima re? Waan Gideonitifi Barakafi Samsonifi Yefthafi Daudifi Samuelifi raagoota ch'ufa amma himu indandau." 
Hebrews11:33 Worri d'ugefachaani lafa heddu had'e dabsate. Waan qajeela tolchani, waan kakhataniifi argatani. Afaani nyeench'a ch'uqaalani," 
Hebrews11:34 ibida goola d'aamfani, sheefti duraa bahani. Worri qara lalaafa, ammo eege jabaate. Lola keesati guddo jajabo, duula nyaapa dabsatani." 
Hebrews11:35 Nad'eeni d'ugefachaani nama iraa due, ka duisa keesaa kaasani, argatte. Nami gari, Nu galakisa jechu dide, duuba gaargalchani ijeesani, aka jireenna ira dansati kaasani." 
Hebrews11:36 Nama gari goyeesani lichooni d'aanani, ka gari haada sibiilatiini hid'ani mana hid'aansati geesani." 
Hebrews11:37 D'akhaani d'aanani gargari ch'irani, sheeftiini fit'ani. Goga hooliyetiifi ka laleesa hid'atani, hiyyoomatani, d'ipatani gaargalchani." 
Hebrews11:38 Lafti worrati had'oofti! Aka nama baqatu lafa gamoojitiifi gaareeni gubba yayaani, godafi boola keesa bulani." 
Hebrews11:39 Worri kunini maro d'ugefacha ufitiifi maqa dansa argate! Ammo waan Waaqi kakhateefi inarganne," 
Hebrews11:40 waan Waaqi waan hagasi ira dansa nuu heregeefi. Heregi isaa kana, nu male worri inqit'au." 
Hebrews12:1 Maro nami hedduuni aka dumansa nu marse nu laalufi, nu ulfinnafi daba jabeese nu qabu ufiraa baamne, d'ogoomsu nu dura tana aka d'iira oriu malle." 
Hebrews12:2 Yeso ufi durati laalla, waan d'ugefachaani teenna haga qaratiifi haga muummele isa keesa jirtuufi. Inni duisa maskali obse, maro gammada isa eegatuufi maskali gubbati duu inch'eerfanne, amma barch'uma Waaqa mirgaani taa." 
Hebrews12:3 Me, aka inni gaargale, jibba nami daba isa jibbe ch'ufa obse herega! Tanaafi illaafiina, indad'abiina!" 
Hebrews12:4 Wonti akanatiifi gaargala keesani ka daba keesati, d'iigi keesani injinne," 
Hebrews12:5 Dubbi dansa ta Waaqi aka ilmaani isaa isaniti dubbatu la deettani? Ilma kiyya, yo Aabbooni si qajeelche taba insehiini, yo inni si gorse garaa illaafiini" 
Hebrews12:6 wonti akanatiifi Aabbooni nama jaalatu ch'ufa inqajeelcha, nama ilma tolfatu ch'ufa ind'aana." 
Hebrews12:7 Waan isaniini qajeelchani ch'ufa fud'ad'a. Waaqi aka ilmaani ufi isani tolchu jira. Ilmi taka abbaani inqajeelchiini injira? 
Hebrews12:8 Yo aka ilmaani ch'ufa qajeelchani isani inqajeelchiini isani ilmaani d'ugaatiniti, ammo ilmaani ch'abanaati." 
Hebrews12:9 Abbootiini teenna ta lafa nu qajeelchiti, duuba worraa saalfanna. Abba keenna ka lubbu hagasi ira saalfanneefi jireenna argachu himmalle?" 
Hebrews12:10 Abbootiini teenna ta lafa haga diqa toko, fed'i worra gula, nu qajeelchite, Ammo Waaqi maro wonti kuni ira nu jirtuufi tolcha, aka nu qulqullooma isaa qoodannu." 
Hebrews12:11 Hojja nu qajeelchani waan nu lalefachiiftu fakaatti, nu ingammachiiftu. Ammo eegi suni, worri akana qajeelchani mid'aani nagaya ka jireenna d'uga argata." 
Hebrews12:12 Tanaafi harka keesani ka aare isani iraa bue olfud'ad'a! Jilba keesani ka lalaafe qajeelfad'a! 
Hebrews12:13 Kara qajeela gula deema, aka miili buqae innaafanne ammo fayyu." 
Hebrews12:14 Jabaad'a, aka nama ch'ufa nagayaani woliini teetani, jireenna qulqullo barbaaddani; wonti akanatiifi nami tokoleeni, qulqullooma male, Aabbo inargu." 
Hebrews12:15 Eegad'a, aka nami tokoleeni eeba Waaqa ind'amne. Eegad'a, aka nami tokoleeni mid'aani had'aa qabu tahe, nama heddu had'aa isatiini ingaargalchine." 
Hebrews12:16 Eegad'a aka nami tokoleeni sharmut'a tahe, yokhaani aka Esau inhamaanne, ka sagale guyya tokotiifi d'aala ufi ta angafooma gurgurate."
